authors_text: Lalita Kumari,Sukhdeep Singh,Vaibhav Varish Singh Rathore,Anuj Sharma
title: A Comprehensive Handwritten Paragraph Text Recognition System: LexiconNet
title_zh: 综合手写段落文本识别系统：LexiconNet
abstract: In this study, we have presented an efficient procedure using two state-of-the-art approaches from the literature of handwritten text recognition as Vertical Attention Network and Word Beam Search. The attention module is responsible for internal line segmentation that consequently processes a page in a line-by-line manner. At the decoding step, we have added a connectionist temporal classification-based word beam search decoder as a post-processing step. In this study, an end-to-end paragraph recognition system is presented with a lexicon decoder as a post-processing step. Our procedure reports state-of-the-art results on standard datasets. The reported character error rate is 3.24% on the IAM dataset with 27.19% improvement, 1.13% on RIMES with 40.83% improvement and 2.43% on the READ-16 dataset with 32.31% improvement from existing literature and the word error rate is 8.29% on IAM dataset with 43.02% improvement, 2.94% on RIMES dataset with 56.25% improvement and 7.35% on READ-2016 dataset with 47.27% improvement from the existing results. The character error rate and word error rate reported in this work surpass the results reported in the literature.
summary: In this study, we have presented an efficient procedure using two state-of-the-art approaches from the literature of handwritten text recognition as Vertical Attention Network and Word Beam Search. The attention module is responsible for internal line segmentation that consequently processes a page in a line-by-line manner. At the decoding step, we have added a connectionist temporal classification-based word beam search decoder as a post-processing step. In this study, an end-to-end paragraph recognition system is presented with a lexicon decoder as a post-processing step. Our procedure reports state-of-the-art results on standard datasets. The reported character error rate is 3.24% on the IAM dataset with 27.19% improvement, 1.13% on RIMES with 40.83% improvement and 2.43% on the READ-16 dataset with 32.31% improvement from existing literature and the word error rate is 8.29% on IAM dataset with 43.02% improvement, 2.94% on RIMES dataset with 56.25% improvement and 7.35% on READ-2016 dataset with 47.27% improvement from the existing results. The character error rate and word error rate reported in this work surpass the results reported in the literature.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种有效的程序，使用手写文本识别文献中的两种最先进的方法，即垂直注意网络和词束搜索。注意力模块负责内部行分割，从而以逐行的方式处理页面。在解码步骤中，我们添加了基于联结时间分类的词束搜索解码器作为后处理步骤。在本研究中，提出了一种端到端段落识别系统，并使用词典解码器作为后处理步骤。我们的程序报告标准数据集的最新结果。报告的字符错误率为 IAM 数据集上的 3.24%，改进了 27.19%；在 RIMES 上报告的字符错误率为 1.13%，改进了 40.83%；在 READ-16 数据集上报告的字符错误率为 2.43%，与现有文献相比改进了 32.31%；单词错误率为 8.29%，在 IAM 数据集上改进了 43.02%，在 RIMES 数据集上改进了 2.94%与 READ-2016 数据集相比，提高了 56.25% 和 7.35%，与现有结果相比提高了 47.27%。这项工作报告的字符错误率和单词错误率超过了文献报告的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于垂直注意力网络和词束搜索的端到端手写段落文本识别系统LexiconNet。
AI.motivation: 为了解决手写文本识别中段落级处理效率低、准确率不足的问题，通过结合最新算法提升识别性能。
AI.method: 采用垂直注意力网络实现行内分割，结合连接主义时序分类的词束搜索解码器，并引入词典解码器作为后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在IAM、RIMES和READ-16数据集上分别达到3.24%、1.13%和2.43%的字符错误率（较现有方法提升27.19%-40.83%），词错误率分别为8.29%、2.94%和7.35%（提升43.02%-56.25%）。
AI.conclusion: LexiconNet在标准数据集上实现了优于现有文献的字符和词错误率，验证了其在手写段落识别任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Youjun Xu,Jinchuan Xiao,Chia-Han Chou,Jianhang Zhang,Jintao Zhu,Qiwan Hu,Hemin Li,Ningsheng Han,Bingyu Liu,Shuaipeng Zhang,Jinyu Han,Zhen Zhang,Shuhao Zhang,Weilin Zhang,Luhua Lai,Jianfeng Pei
title: MolMiner: You only look once for chemical structure recognition
title_zh: MolMiner：化学结构识别只需查看一次
abstract: Molecular structures are always depicted as 2D printed form in scientific documents like journal papers and patents. However, these 2D depictions are not machine-readable. Due to a backlog of decades and an increasing amount of these printed literature, there is a high demand for the translation of printed depictions into machine-readable formats, which is known as Optical Chemical Structure Recognition (OCSR). Most OCSR systems developed over the last three decades follow a rule-based approach where the key step of vectorization of the depiction is based on the interpretation of vectors and nodes as bonds and atoms. Here, we present a practical software MolMiner, which is primarily built up using deep neural networks originally developed for semantic segmentation and object detection to recognize atom and bond elements from documents. These recognized elements can be easily connected as a molecular graph with distance-based construction algorithm. We carefully evaluate our software on four benchmark datasets with the state-of-the-art performance. Various real application scenarios are also tested, yielding satisfactory outcomes. The free download links of Mac and Windows versions are available: Mac: https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/mac/PharmaMind-mac-latest-setup.dmg and Windows: https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/win/PharmaMind-win-latest-setup.exe
summary: Molecular structures are always depicted as 2D printed form in scientific documents like journal papers and patents. However, these 2D depictions are not machine-readable. Due to a backlog of decades and an increasing amount of these printed literature, there is a high demand for the translation of printed depictions into machine-readable formats, which is known as Optical Chemical Structure Recognition (OCSR). Most OCSR systems developed over the last three decades follow a rule-based approach where the key step of vectorization of the depiction is based on the interpretation of vectors and nodes as bonds and atoms. Here, we present a practical software MolMiner, which is primarily built up using deep neural networks originally developed for semantic segmentation and object detection to recognize atom and bond elements from documents. These recognized elements can be easily connected as a molecular graph with distance-based construction algorithm. We carefully evaluate our software on four benchmark datasets with the state-of-the-art performance. Various real application scenarios are also tested, yielding satisfactory outcomes. The free download links of Mac and Windows versions are available: Mac: https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/mac/PharmaMind-mac-latest-setup.dmg and Windows: https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/win/PharmaMind-win-latest-setup.exe
abstract_zh: 在期刊论文和专利等科学文献中，分子结构总是以 2D 打印形式描述。然而，这些二维描述不是机器可读的。由于数十年的积压和这些印刷文献数量的不断增加，对将印刷描述翻译成机器可读格式的需求很高，这被称为光学化学结构识别（OCSR）。过去三十年开发的大多数 OCSR 系统都遵循基于规则的方法，其中描述矢量化的关键步骤是基于将矢量和节点解释为键和原子。在这里，我们提出了一个实用的软件 MolMiner，它主要使用最初为语义分割和对象检测而开发的深度神经网络构建，以识别文档中的原子和键元素。这些识别的元素可以通过基于距离的构建算法轻松连接为分子图。我们在四个基准数据集上仔细评估我们的软件，使其具有最先进的性能。还测试了各种实际应用场景，取得了令人满意的结果。 Mac 和 Windows 版本的免费下载链接如下： Mac：https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/mac/PharmaMind-mac-latest-setup.dmg Windows：https://molminer-cdn.iipharma.cn/pharma-mind/artifact/latest/win/PharmaMind-win-latest-setup.exe

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的化学结构识别软件MolMiner，用于将科学文献中的二维分子结构转化为机器可读格式。
AI.motivation: 传统基于规则的光学化学结构识别（OCSR）系统存在效率和准确性不足的问题，而科学文献中积累的大量二维分子结构图亟需自动化处理。
AI.method: 采用语义分割和目标检测领域的深度神经网络模型，识别文档中的原子和键元素，并通过基于距离的算法构建分子图。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，实际应用场景测试结果令人满意，提供Mac和Windows版本下载。
AI.conclusion: MolMiner为OCSR提供了高效可行的深度学习解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Arash Tavakoli,Arsalan Heydarian
title: The Impact of Surrounding Road Objects and Conditions on Drivers Abrupt Heart Rate Changes
title_zh: 周围道路物体和条件对驾驶员心率突变的影响
comment: Accepted to 66th Human Factors and Ergonomics Society International Annual Meeting 2022
comments: Accepted to 66th Human Factors and Ergonomics Society International Annual Meeting 2022
abstract: Recent studies have pointed out the importance of mitigating drivers stress and negative emotions. These studies show that certain road objects such as big vehicles might be associated with higher stress levels based on drivers subjective stress measures. Additionally, research shows strong correlations between drivers stress levels and increased heart rate (HR). In this paper, based on a naturalistic multimodal driving dataset, we analyze the visual scenes of driving in the vicinity of abrupt increases in drivers HR for the presence of certain stress-inducing road objects. We show that the probability of the presence of such objects increases when becoming closer to the abrupt increase in drivers HR. Additionally, we show that drivers facial engagement changes significantly in the vicinity of abrupt increases in HR. Our results lay the ground for a human-centered driving experience by detecting and mitigating drivers stress levels in the wild.
summary: Recent studies have pointed out the importance of mitigating drivers stress and negative emotions. These studies show that certain road objects such as big vehicles might be associated with higher stress levels based on drivers subjective stress measures. Additionally, research shows strong correlations between drivers stress levels and increased heart rate (HR). In this paper, based on a naturalistic multimodal driving dataset, we analyze the visual scenes of driving in the vicinity of abrupt increases in drivers HR for the presence of certain stress-inducing road objects. We show that the probability of the presence of such objects increases when becoming closer to the abrupt increase in drivers HR. Additionally, we show that drivers facial engagement changes significantly in the vicinity of abrupt increases in HR. Our results lay the ground for a human-centered driving experience by detecting and mitigating drivers stress levels in the wild.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究指出了减轻驾驶员压力和负面情绪的重要性。这些研究表明，根据驾驶员主观压力测量，某些道路物体（例如大型车辆）可能与较高的压力水平相关。此外，研究表明驾驶员的压力水平与心率 (HR) 增加之间存在很强的相关性。在本文中，基于自然多模态驾驶数据集，我们分析了在存在某些诱发压力的道路物体时驾驶员心率突然增加附近的驾驶视觉场景。我们表明，当接近驾驶员 HR 突然增加时，此类物体存在的概率会增加。此外，我们发现驾驶员的面部参与度在心率突然增加附近发生显着变化。我们的研究结果通过检测和减轻野外驾驶员的压力水平，为以人为本的驾驶体验奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文基于自然主义多模态驾驶数据集，分析驾驶场景中突发心率变化与周围道路物体及条件的关系。
AI.motivation: 驾驶压力和负面情绪可能引发心率异常，而现有研究多依赖主观评估，缺乏对客观道路因素与生理反应关联的深入分析。
AI.method: 通过分析驾驶场景的视觉数据及心率监测结果，识别突发心率升高前的道路物体特征及驾驶员面部行为变化。
AI.result: 发现突发心率升高前道路中大型车辆等压力源出现概率显著增加，且驾驶员面部参与度发生明显变化。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发实时检测并缓解驾驶员压力的智能驾驶系统提供了理论依据，有助于构建以人为中心的驾驶体验。

search_text: The Impact of Surrounding Road Objects and Conditions on Drivers Abrupt Heart Rate Changes 周围道路物体和条件对驾驶员心率突变的影响 Recent studies have pointed out the importance of mitigating drivers stress and negative emotions. These studies show that certain road objects such as big vehicles might be associated with higher stress levels based on drivers subjective stress measures. Additionally, research shows strong correlations between drivers stress levels and increased heart rate (HR). In this paper, based on a naturalistic multimodal driving dataset, we analyze the visual scenes of driving in the vicinity of abrupt increases in drivers HR for the presence of certain stress-inducing road objects. We show that the probability of the presence of such objects increases when becoming closer to the abrupt increase in drivers HR. Additionally, we show that drivers facial engagement changes significantly in the vicinity of abrupt increases in HR. Our results lay the ground for a human-centered driving experience by detecting and mitigating drivers stress levels in the wild. 最近的研究指出了减轻驾驶员压力和负面情绪的重要性。这些研究表明，根据驾驶员主观压力测量，某些道路物体（例如大型车辆）可能与较高的压力水平相关。此外，研究表明驾驶员的压力水平与心率 (HR) 增加之间存在很强的相关性。在本文中，基于自然多模态驾驶数据集，我们分析了在存在某些诱发压力的道路物体时驾驶员心率突然增加附近的驾驶视觉场景。我们表明，当接近驾驶员 HR 突然增加时，此类物体存在的概率会增加。此外，我们发现驾驶员的面部参与度在心率突然增加附近发生显着变化。我们的研究结果通过检测和减轻野外驾驶员的压力水平，为以人为本的驾驶体验奠定了基础。 本文基于自然主义多模态驾驶数据集，分析驾驶场景中突发心率变化与周围道路物体及条件的关系。 Arash Tavakoli,Arsalan Heydarian cs.HC

authors_text: Peilin Zhou,Dading Chong,Helin Wang,Qingcheng Zeng
title: Calibrate and Refine! A Novel and Agile Framework for ASR-error Robust Intent Detection
title_zh: 校准和细化！一种新颖、敏捷的 ASR 错误鲁棒意图检测框架
abstract: The past ten years have witnessed the rapid development of text-based intent detection, whose benchmark performances have already been taken to a remarkable level by deep learning techniques. However, automatic speech recognition (ASR) errors are inevitable in real-world applications due to the environment noise, unique speech patterns and etc, leading to sharp performance drop in state-of-the-art text-based intent detection models. Essentially, this phenomenon is caused by the semantic drift brought by ASR errors and most existing works tend to focus on designing new model structures to reduce its impact, which is at the expense of versatility and flexibility. Different from previous one-piece model, in this paper, we propose a novel and agile framework called CR-ID for ASR error robust intent detection with two plug-and-play modules, namely semantic drift calibration module (SDCM) and phonemic refinement module (PRM), which are both model-agnostic and thus could be easily integrated to any existing intent detection models without modifying their structures. Experimental results on SNIPS dataset show that, our proposed CR-ID framework achieves competitive performance and outperform all the baseline methods on ASR outputs, which verifies that CR-ID can effectively alleviate the semantic drift caused by ASR errors.
summary: The past ten years have witnessed the rapid development of text-based intent detection, whose benchmark performances have already been taken to a remarkable level by deep learning techniques. However, automatic speech recognition (ASR) errors are inevitable in real-world applications due to the environment noise, unique speech patterns and etc, leading to sharp performance drop in state-of-the-art text-based intent detection models. Essentially, this phenomenon is caused by the semantic drift brought by ASR errors and most existing works tend to focus on designing new model structures to reduce its impact, which is at the expense of versatility and flexibility. Different from previous one-piece model, in this paper, we propose a novel and agile framework called CR-ID for ASR error robust intent detection with two plug-and-play modules, namely semantic drift calibration module (SDCM) and phonemic refinement module (PRM), which are both model-agnostic and thus could be easily integrated to any existing intent detection models without modifying their structures. Experimental results on SNIPS dataset show that, our proposed CR-ID framework achieves competitive performance and outperform all the baseline methods on ASR outputs, which verifies that CR-ID can effectively alleviate the semantic drift caused by ASR errors.
abstract_zh: 过去十年见证了基于文本的意图检测的快速发展，其基准性能已经通过深度学习技术达到了令人瞩目的水平。然而，由于环境噪声、独特的语音模式等原因，自动语音识别（ASR）错误在实际应用中是不可避免的，导致最先进的基于文本的意图检测模型的性能急剧下降。本质上，这种现象是由 ASR 错误带来的语义漂移造成的，大多数现有工作倾向于设计新的模型结构来减少其影响，但这是以牺牲通用性和灵活性为代价的。与之前的整体模型不同，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而敏捷的框架，称为 CR-ID，用于 ASR 错误鲁棒意图检测，具有两个即插即用模块，即语义漂移校准模块（SDCM）和音素细化模块（PRM），这两个模块都是模型无关的，因此可以轻松集成到任何现有的意图检测模型，而无需修改其结构。在 SNIPS 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的 CR-ID 框架在 ASR 输出上实现了有竞争力的性能并优于所有基线方法，这验证了 CR-ID 可以有效缓解 ASR 错误引起的语义漂移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CR-ID的新型框架，通过两个模块解决ASR错误导致的意图检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过设计新模型结构减少ASR错误影响，但牺牲了模型的通用性和灵活性，亟需一种无需修改原有结构的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出CR-ID框架，包含语义漂移校准模块（SDCM）和音素优化模块（PRM），二者均为模型无关模块，可无缝集成到任意现有意图检测模型中。
AI.result: 在SNIPS数据集上实验表明，CR-ID在ASR输出上优于所有基线方法，有效缓解了ASR错误引起的语义漂移问题。
AI.conclusion: CR-ID框架通过模块化设计实现了对ASR错误的鲁棒性提升，为意图检测提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

A Novel and Agile Framework for ASR-error Robust Intent Detection 校准和细化！一种新颖、敏捷的 ASR 错误鲁棒意图检测框架 The past ten years have witnessed the rapid development of text-based intent detection, whose benchmark performances have already been taken to a remarkable level by deep learning techniques. However, automatic speech recognition (ASR) errors are inevitable in real-world applications due to the environment noise, unique speech patterns and etc, leading to sharp performance drop in state-of-the-art text-based intent detection models. Essentially, this phenomenon is caused by the semantic drift brought by ASR errors and most existing works tend to focus on designing new model structures to reduce its impact, which is at the expense of versatility and flexibility. Different from previous one-piece model, in this paper, we propose a novel and agile framework called CR-ID for ASR error robust intent detection with two plug-and-play modules, namely semantic drift calibration module (SDCM) and phonemic refinement module (PRM), which are both model-agnostic and thus could be easily integrated to any existing intent detection models without modifying their structures. Experimental results on SNIPS dataset show that, our proposed CR-ID framework achieves competitive performance and outperform all the baseline methods on ASR outputs, which verifies that CR-ID can effectively alleviate the semantic drift caused by ASR errors. 过去十年见证了基于文本的意图检测的快速发展，其基准性能已经通过深度学习技术达到了令人瞩目的水平。然而，由于环境噪声、独特的语音模式等原因，自动语音识别（ASR）错误在实际应用中是不可避免的，导致最先进的基于文本的意图检测模型的性能急剧下降。本质上，这种现象是由 ASR 错误带来的语义漂移造成的，大多数现有工作倾向于设计新的模型结构来减少其影响，但这是以牺牲通用性和灵活性为代价的。与之前的整体模型不同，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而敏捷的框架，称为 CR-ID，用于 ASR 错误鲁棒意图检测，具有两个即插即用模块，即语义漂移校准模块（SDCM）和音素细化模块（PRM），这两个模块都是模型无关的，因此可以轻松集成到任何现有的意图检测模型，而无需修改其结构。在 SNIPS 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的 CR-ID 框架在 ASR 输出上实现了有竞争力的性能并优于所有基线方法，这验证了 CR-ID 可以有效缓解 ASR 错误引起的语义漂移。 本文提出了一种名为CR-ID的新型框架，通过两个模块解决ASR错误导致的意图检测性能下降问题。 Peilin Zhou,Dading Chong,Helin Wang,Qingcheng Zeng cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuchao Li,Fuli Luo,Chuanqi Tan,Mengdi Wang,Songfang Huang,Shen Li,Junjie Bai
title: Parameter-Efficient Sparsity for Large Language Models Fine-Tuning
title_zh: 用于大型语言模型微调的参数高效稀疏性
comment: This paper is published in IJCAI 2022
comments: This paper is published in IJCAI 2022
abstract: With the dramatically increased number of parameters in language models, sparsity methods have received ever-increasing research focus to compress and accelerate the models. While most research focuses on how to accurately retain appropriate weights while maintaining the performance of the compressed model, there are challenges in the computational overhead and memory footprint of sparse training when compressing large-scale language models. To address this problem, we propose a Parameter-efficient Sparse Training (PST) method to reduce the number of trainable parameters during sparse-aware training in downstream tasks. Specifically, we first combine the data-free and data-driven criteria to efficiently and accurately measure the importance of weights. Then we investigate the intrinsic redundancy of data-driven weight importance and derive two obvious characteristics i.e., low-rankness and structuredness. Based on that, two groups of small matrices are introduced to compute the data-driven importance of weights, instead of using the original large importance score matrix, which therefore makes the sparse training resource-efficient and parameter-efficient. Experiments with diverse networks (i.e., BERT, RoBERTa and GPT-2) on dozens of datasets demonstrate PST performs on par or better than previous sparsity methods, despite only training a small number of parameters. For instance, compared with previous sparsity methods, our PST only requires 1.5% trainable parameters to achieve comparable performance on BERT.
summary: With the dramatically increased number of parameters in language models, sparsity methods have received ever-increasing research focus to compress and accelerate the models. While most research focuses on how to accurately retain appropriate weights while maintaining the performance of the compressed model, there are challenges in the computational overhead and memory footprint of sparse training when compressing large-scale language models. To address this problem, we propose a Parameter-efficient Sparse Training (PST) method to reduce the number of trainable parameters during sparse-aware training in downstream tasks. Specifically, we first combine the data-free and data-driven criteria to efficiently and accurately measure the importance of weights. Then we investigate the intrinsic redundancy of data-driven weight importance and derive two obvious characteristics i.e., low-rankness and structuredness. Based on that, two groups of small matrices are introduced to compute the data-driven importance of weights, instead of using the original large importance score matrix, which therefore makes the sparse training resource-efficient and parameter-efficient. Experiments with diverse networks (i.e., BERT, RoBERTa and GPT-2) on dozens of datasets demonstrate PST performs on par or better than previous sparsity methods, despite only training a small number of parameters. For instance, compared with previous sparsity methods, our PST only requires 1.5% trainable parameters to achieve comparable performance on BERT.
abstract_zh: 随着语言模型中参数数量的急剧增加，稀疏性方法越来越受到研究关注，以压缩和加速模型。虽然大多数研究重点是如何在保持压缩模型性能的同时准确保留适当的权重，但在压缩大规模语言模型时，稀疏训练的计算开销和内存占用存在挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种参数高效的稀疏训练（PST）方法，以减少下游任务中稀疏感知训练期间可训练参数的数量。具体来说，我们首先结合无数据和数据驱动的标准来高效、准确地衡量权重的重要性。然后，我们研究数据驱动的权重重要性的内在冗余，并得出两个明显的特征，即低秩性和结构化性。在此基础上，引入两组小矩阵来计算数据驱动的权重重要性，而不是使用原始的大重要性得分矩阵，从而使稀疏训练资源高效且参数高效。在数十个数据集上使用不同网络（即 BERT、RoBERTa 和 GPT-2）进行的实验表明，尽管只训练了少量参数，但 PST 的性能与以前的稀疏方法相当或更好。例如，与之前的稀疏方法相比，我们的 PST 只需要 1.5% 的可训练参数即可在 BERT 上实现可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数高效的稀疏训练方法（PST），用于在大型语言模型微调中减少可训练参数数量，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏训练方法在压缩大规模语言模型时面临计算开销大和内存占用高的挑战，需在保持性能的同时降低参数量。
AI.method: 结合无数据和数据驱动的标准衡量权重重要性，利用数据驱动权重重要性的低秩性和结构化特性，引入小型矩阵替代原始大矩阵以提升资源效率。
AI.result: 在BERT、RoBERTa和GPT-2等模型及多个数据集上，PST仅需1.5%的可训练参数即可达到与先前稀疏方法相当或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: PST通过参数高效的设计有效解决了大规模模型稀疏训练的资源瓶颈，为模型压缩提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种参数高效的稀疏训练方法（PST），用于在大型语言模型微调中减少可训练参数数量，同时保持模型性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有稀疏训练方法在压缩大规模语言模型时面临计算开销大和内存占用高的挑战，需在保持性能的同时降低参数量。

search_text: Parameter-Efficient Sparsity for Large Language Models Fine-Tuning 用于大型语言模型微调的参数高效稀疏性 With the dramatically increased number of parameters in language models, sparsity methods have received ever-increasing research focus to compress and accelerate the models. While most research focuses on how to accurately retain appropriate weights while maintaining the performance of the compressed model, there are challenges in the computational overhead and memory footprint of sparse training when compressing large-scale language models. To address this problem, we propose a Parameter-efficient Sparse Training (PST) method to reduce the number of trainable parameters during sparse-aware training in downstream tasks. Specifically, we first combine the data-free and data-driven criteria to efficiently and accurately measure the importance of weights. Then we investigate the intrinsic redundancy of data-driven weight importance and derive two obvious characteristics i.e., low-rankness and structuredness. Based on that, two groups of small matrices are introduced to compute the data-driven importance of weights, instead of using the original large importance score matrix, which therefore makes the sparse training resource-efficient and parameter-efficient. Experiments with diverse networks (i.e., BERT, RoBERTa and GPT-2) on dozens of datasets demonstrate PST performs on par or better than previous sparsity methods, despite only training a small number of parameters. For instance, compared with previous sparsity methods, our PST only requires 1.5% trainable parameters to achieve comparable performance on BERT. 随着语言模型中参数数量的急剧增加，稀疏性方法越来越受到研究关注，以压缩和加速模型。虽然大多数研究重点是如何在保持压缩模型性能的同时准确保留适当的权重，但在压缩大规模语言模型时，稀疏训练的计算开销和内存占用存在挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种参数高效的稀疏训练（PST）方法，以减少下游任务中稀疏感知训练期间可训练参数的数量。具体来说，我们首先结合无数据和数据驱动的标准来高效、准确地衡量权重的重要性。然后，我们研究数据驱动的权重重要性的内在冗余，并得出两个明显的特征，即低秩性和结构化性。在此基础上，引入两组小矩阵来计算数据驱动的权重重要性，而不是使用原始的大重要性得分矩阵，从而使稀疏训练资源高效且参数高效。在数十个数据集上使用不同网络（即 BERT、RoBERTa 和 GPT-2）进行的实验表明，尽管只训练了少量参数，但 PST 的性能与以前的稀疏方法相当或更好。例如，与之前的稀疏方法相比，我们的 PST 只需要 1.5% 的可训练参数即可在 BERT 上实现可比的性能。 本文提出一种参数高效的稀疏训练方法（PST），用于在大型语言模型微调中减少可训练参数数量，同时保持模型性能。 Yuchao Li,Fuli Luo,Chuanqi Tan,Mengdi Wang,Songfang Huang,Shen Li,Junjie Bai cs.AI

authors_text: Brian Montambault,Camelia D. Brumar,Michael Behrisch,Remco Chang
title: PIXAL: Anomaly Reasoning with Visual Analytics
title_zh: PIXEL：通过视觉分析进行异常推理
abstract: Anomaly detection remains an open challenge in many application areas. While there are a number of available machine learning algorithms for detecting anomalies, analysts are frequently asked to take additional steps in reasoning about the root cause of the anomalies and form actionable hypotheses that can be communicated to business stakeholders. Without the appropriate tools, this reasoning process is time-consuming, tedious, and potentially error-prone. In this paper we present PIXAL, a visual analytics system developed following an iterative design process with professional analysts responsible for anomaly detection. PIXAL is designed to fill gaps in existing tools commonly used by analysts to reason with and make sense of anomalies. PIXAL consists of three components: (1) an algorithm that finds patterns by aggregating multiple anomalous data points using first-order predicates, (2) a visualization tool that allows the analyst to build trust in the algorithmically-generated predicates by performing comparative and counterfactual analyses, and (3) a visualization tool that helps the analyst generate and validate hypotheses by exploring which features in the data most explain the anomalies. Finally, we present the results of a qualitative observational study with professional analysts. These results of the study indicate that PIXAL facilitates the anomaly reasoning process, allowing analysts to make sense of anomalies and generate hypotheses that are meaningful and actionable to business stakeholders.

While there are a number of available machine learning algorithms for detecting anomalies, analysts are frequently asked to take additional steps in reasoning about the root cause of the anomalies and form actionable hypotheses that can be communicated to business stakeholders. Without the appropriate tools, this reasoning process is time-consuming, tedious, and potentially error-prone. In this paper we present PIXAL, a visual analytics system developed following an iterative design process with professional analysts responsible for anomaly detection. PIXAL is designed to fill gaps in existing tools commonly used by analysts to reason with and make sense of anomalies. PIXAL consists of three components: (1) an algorithm that finds patterns by aggregating multiple anomalous data points using first-order predicates, (2) a visualization tool that allows the analyst to build trust in the algorithmically-generated predicates by performing comparative and counterfactual analyses, and (3) a visualization tool that helps the analyst generate and validate hypotheses by exploring which features in the data most explain the anomalies. Finally, we present the results of a qualitative observational study with professional analysts. These results of the study indicate that PIXAL facilitates the anomaly reasoning process, allowing analysts to make sense of anomalies and generate hypotheses that are meaningful and actionable to business stakeholders.
abstract_zh: 异常检测在许多应用领域仍然是一个开放的挑战。虽然有许多可用的机器学习算法可用于检测异常，但分析师经常被要求采取额外的步骤来推理异常的根本原因，并形成可以传达给业务利益相关者的可行假设。如果没有适当的工具，这个推理过程将非常耗时、乏味，而且可能容易出错。在本文中，我们介绍了 PIXAL，这是一种视觉分析系统，是由负责异常检测的专业分析师按照迭代设计流程开发的。 PIXAL 旨在填补分析师常用的现有工具的空白，以推理和理解异常情况。 PIXAL 由三个组件组成：(1) 通过使用一阶谓词聚合多个异常数据点来查找模式的算法；(2) 可视化工具，允许分析师通过执行比较和反事实分析来建立对算法生成的谓词的信任；(3) 可视化工具，通过探索数据中的哪些特征最能解释异常，帮助分析师生成和验证假设。最后，我们展示了专业分析师的定性观察研究的结果。这些研究结果表明，PIXAL 促进了异常推理过程，使分析师能够理解异常并生成对业务利益相关者有意义且可操作的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIXAL系统，通过可视化分析辅助分析师进行异常原因推理并生成可操作的假设。
AI.motivation: 现有工具难以有效支持分析师对异常根源的推理过程，导致耗时且易出错，需开发更高效的可视化分析系统。
AI.method: PIXAL包含三个组件：基于一阶谓词聚合异常数据点的算法、支持对比与反事实分析的可视化工具、用于探索异常解释特征并验证假设的可视化工具。
AI.result: 对专业分析师的定性观察研究显示，PIXAL能有效提升异常推理效率，生成对业务决策有意义的假设。
AI.conclusion: PIXAL弥补了现有工具的不足，通过算法与可视化结合，显著优化了异常分析流程及业务价值转化能力。

authors_text: Wei Dai,Mingcheng Zhang,Kin Huat Low
title: Data-Efficient Modeling for Precise Power Consumption Estimation of Quadrotor Operations Using Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 使用集成学习进行四旋翼飞行器操作的精确功耗估计的数据高效建模
abstract: Electric Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft is considered as the major aircraft type in the emerging urban air mobility. Accurate power consumption estimation is crucial to eVTOL, supporting advanced power management strategies and improving the efficiency and safety performance of flight operations. In this study, a framework for power consumption modeling of eVTOL aircraft was established. We employed an ensemble learning method, namely stacking, to develop a data-driven model using flight records of three different types of quadrotors. Random forest and extreme gradient boosting, showing advantages in prediction, were chosen as base-models, and a linear regression model was used as the meta-model. The established stacking model can accurately estimate the power of a quadrotor. Error analysis shows that about 80% prediction errors fall within one standard deviation interval and less than 0.5% error in the prediction for an entire flight can be expected with a confidence of more than 80%. Our model outperforms the existing models in two aspects: firstly, our model has a better prediction performance, and secondly, our model is more data-efficient, requiring a much smaller dataset. Our model provides a powerful tool for operators of eVTOL aircraft in mission management and contributes to promoting safe and energy-efficient urban air traffic.
summary: Electric Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft is considered as the major aircraft type in the emerging urban air mobility. Accurate power consumption estimation is crucial to eVTOL, supporting advanced power management strategies and improving the efficiency and safety performance of flight operations. In this study, a framework for power consumption modeling of eVTOL aircraft was established. We employed an ensemble learning method, namely stacking, to develop a data-driven model using flight records of three different types of quadrotors. Random forest and extreme gradient boosting, showing advantages in prediction, were chosen as base-models, and a linear regression model was used as the meta-model. The established stacking model can accurately estimate the power of a quadrotor. Error analysis shows that about 80% prediction errors fall within one standard deviation interval and less than 0.5% error in the prediction for an entire flight can be expected with a confidence of more than 80%. Our model outperforms the existing models in two aspects: firstly, our model has a better prediction performance, and secondly, our model is more data-efficient, requiring a much smaller dataset. Our model provides a powerful tool for operators of eVTOL aircraft in mission management and contributes to promoting safe and energy-efficient urban air traffic.
abstract_zh: 电动起降（eVTOL）飞机被认为是新兴城市空中交通的主要飞机类型。准确的功耗估算对于 eVTOL 至关重要，支持先进的功耗管理策略并提高飞行运行的效率和安全性能。本研究建立了 eVTOL 飞机功耗建模框架。我们采用集成学习方法，即堆叠，利用三种不同类型四旋翼飞行器的飞行记录开发数据驱动模型。选择在预测中显示出优势的随机森林和极限梯度提升作为基础模型，并使用线性回归模型作为元模型。建立的叠加模型可以准确估计四旋翼飞行器的功率。误差分析表明，大约 80% 的预测误差落在一个标准差区间内，整个飞行的预测误差小于 0.5%，置信度超过 80%。我们的模型在两个方面优于现有模型：首先，我们的模型具有更好的预测性能，其次，我们的模型数据效率更高，需要更小的数据集。我们的模型为电动垂直起降飞机运营商的任务管理提供了强大的工具，并有助于促进安全和节能的城市空中交通。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于集成学习的高效数据建模方法，用于精确估计四旋翼飞行器的功耗。
AI.motivation: 电动垂直起降（eVTOL）飞行器的精确功耗估计对提升飞行效率与安全性至关重要，但现有模型存在数据需求大或预测精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用堆叠集成学习框架，以随机森林和极端梯度提升为基模型，线性回归为元模型，结合三种四旋翼飞行器的飞行数据进行训练。
AI.result: 模型预测误差80%落在一个标准差范围内，单次飞行预测误差低于0.5%（置信度>80%），且数据效率显著优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为eVTOL运营者提供高效的任务管理工具，推动城市空中交通的安全与能源效率提升。

conclusion: 该模型为eVTOL运营者提供高效的任务管理工具，推动城市空中交通的安全与能源效率提升。
search_text: Data-Efficient Modeling for Precise Power Consumption Estimation of Quadrotor Operations Using Ensemble Learning 使用集成学习进行四旋翼飞行器操作的精确功耗估计的数据高效建模 Electric Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft is considered as the major aircraft type in the emerging urban air mobility. Accurate power consumption estimation is crucial to eVTOL, supporting advanced power management strategies and improving the efficiency and safety performance of flight operations. In this study, a framework for power consumption modeling of eVTOL aircraft was established. We employed an ensemble learning method, namely stacking, to develop a data-driven model using flight records of three different types of quadrotors. Random forest and extreme gradient boosting, showing advantages in prediction, were chosen as base-models, and a linear regression model was used as the meta-model. The established stacking model can accurately estimate the power of a quadrotor. Error analysis shows that about 80% prediction errors fall within one standard deviation interval and less than 0.5% error in the prediction for an entire flight can be expected with a confidence of more than 80%. Our model outperforms the existing models in two aspects: firstly, our model has a better prediction performance, and secondly, our model is more data-efficient, requiring a much smaller dataset. Our model provides a powerful tool for operators of eVTOL aircraft in mission management and contributes to promoting safe and energy-efficient urban air traffic. 电动起降（eVTOL）飞机被认为是新兴城市空中交通的主要飞机类型。准确的功耗估算对于 eVTOL 至关重要，支持先进的功耗管理策略并提高飞行运行的效率和安全性能。本研究建立了 eVTOL 飞机功耗建模框架。我们采用集成学习方法，即堆叠，利用三种不同类型四旋翼飞行器的飞行记录开发数据驱动模型。选择在预测中显示出优势的随机森林和极限梯度提升作为基础模型，并使用线性回归模型作为元模型。建立的叠加模型可以准确估计四旋翼飞行器的功率。误差分析表明，大约 80% 的预测误差落在一个标准差区间内，整个飞行的预测误差小于 0.5%，置信度超过 80%。我们的模型在两个方面优于现有模型：首先，我们的模型具有更好的预测性能，其次，我们的模型数据效率更高，需要更小的数据集。我们的模型为电动垂直起降飞机运营商的任务管理提供了强大的工具，并有助于促进安全和节能的城市空中交通。 本文提出了一种基于集成学习的高效数据建模方法，用于精确估计四旋翼飞行器的功耗。 Wei Dai,Mingcheng Zhang,Kin Huat Low cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mateus de Oliveira Oliveira,Farhad Vadiee
title: From Width-Based Model Checking to Width-Based Automated Theorem Proving
title_zh: 从基于宽度的模型检查到基于宽度的自动定理证明
comment: A preliminary version of this work was published in the proceedings of AAAI 2023
comments: A preliminary version of this work was published in the proceedings of AAAI 2023
abstract: In the field of parameterized complexity theory, the study of graph width measures has been intimately connected with the development of width-based model checking algorithms for combinatorial properties on graphs. In this work, we introduce a general framework to convert a large class of width-based model-checking algorithms into algorithms that can be used to test the validity of graph-theoretic conjectures on classes of graphs of bounded width. Our framework is modular and can be applied with respect to several well-studied width measures for graphs, including treewidth and cliquewidth. As a quantitative application of our framework, we prove analytically that for several long-standing graph-theoretic conjectures, there exists an algorithm that takes a number $k$ as input and correctly determines in time double-exponential in $k^{O(1)}$ whether the conjecture is valid on all graphs of treewidth at most $k$. These upper bounds, which may be regarded as upper-bounds on the size of proofs/disproofs for these conjectures on the class of graphs of treewidth at most $k$, improve significantly on theoretical upper bounds obtained using previously available techniques.
summary: In the field of parameterized complexity theory, the study of graph width measures has been intimately connected with the development of width-based model checking algorithms for combinatorial properties on graphs. In this work, we introduce a general framework to convert a large class of width-based model-checking algorithms into algorithms that can be used to test the validity of graph-theoretic conjectures on classes of graphs of bounded width. Our framework is modular and can be applied with respect to several well-studied width measures for graphs, including treewidth and cliquewidth. As a quantitative application of our framework, we prove analytically that for several long-standing graph-theoretic conjectures, there exists an algorithm that takes a number $k$ as input and correctly determines in time double-exponential in $k^{O(1)}$ whether the conjecture is valid on all graphs of treewidth at most $k$. These upper bounds, which may be regarded as upper-bounds on the size of proofs/disproofs for these conjectures on the class of graphs of treewidth at most $k$, improve significantly on theoretical upper bounds obtained using previously available techniques.
abstract_zh: 在参数化复杂性理论领域，图宽度度量的研究与图组合属性的基于宽度的模型检查算法的发展密切相关。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个通用框架，将一大类基于宽度的模型检查算法转换为可用于测试有界宽度图类上的图论猜想的有效性的算法。我们的框架是模块化的，可以应用于几个经过充分研究的图宽度度量，包括树宽度和团宽度。作为我们框架的定量应用，我们分析证明，对于几个长期存在的图论猜想，存在一种算法，该算法以数字 $k$ 作为输入，并正确地及时确定 $k^{O(1)}$ 中的双指数猜想是否在所有树宽最多为 $k$ 的图上有效。这些上限可以被视为对树宽最多 $k$ 的图类的这些猜想的证明/反证明大小的上限，显着改进了使用先前可用技术获得的理论上限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个通用框架，将基于宽度的模型检测算法转化为可用于验证图论猜想的自动定理证明算法。
AI.motivation: 现有技术难以有效验证长期存在的图论猜想，需改进理论上限和算法效率。
AI.method: 构建模块化框架，适用于多种图宽度度量（如树宽、团宽），并设计双指数时间算法验证猜想。
AI.result: 证明多个图论猜想可在双指数时间内验证，显著优于传统技术的理论上限。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动定理证明提供了新方法，提升了图类问题验证的效率与理论界分析能力。

authors_text: Lei Zhang,Yu Pan,Yi Liu,Qibin Zheng,Zhisong Pan
title: Multiple Domain Cyberspace Attack and Defense Game Based on Reward Randomization Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于奖励随机强化学习的多域网络空间攻防博弈
abstract: The existing network attack and defense method can be regarded as game, but most of the game only involves network domain, not multiple domain cyberspace. To address this challenge, this paper proposed a multiple domain cyberspace attack and defense game model based on reinforcement learning. We define the multiple domain cyberspace include physical domain, network domain and digital domain. By establishing two agents, representing the attacker and the defender respectively, defender will select the multiple domain actions in the multiple domain cyberspace to obtain defender's optimal reward by reinforcement learning. In order to improve the defense ability of defender, a game model based on reward randomization reinforcement learning is proposed. When the defender takes the multiple domain defense action, the reward is randomly given and subject to linear distribution, so as to find the better defense policy and improve defense success rate. The experimental results show that the game model can effectively simulate the attack and defense state of multiple domain cyberspace, and the proposed method has a higher defense success rate than DDPG and DQN.
summary: The existing network attack and defense method can be regarded as game, but most of the game only involves network domain, not multiple domain cyberspace. To address this challenge, this paper proposed a multiple domain cyberspace attack and defense game model based on reinforcement learning. We define the multiple domain cyberspace include physical domain, network domain and digital domain. By establishing two agents, representing the attacker and the defender respectively, defender will select the multiple domain actions in the multiple domain cyberspace to obtain defender's optimal reward by reinforcement learning. In order to improve the defense ability of defender, a game model based on reward randomization reinforcement learning is proposed. When the defender takes the multiple domain defense action, the reward is randomly given and subject to linear distribution, so as to find the better defense policy and improve defense success rate. The experimental results show that the game model can effectively simulate the attack and defense state of multiple domain cyberspace, and the proposed method has a higher defense success rate than DDPG and DQN.
abstract_zh: 现有的网络攻防方法可以看作是博弈，但博弈大多只涉及网络域，而不涉及多域网络空间。针对这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多域网络空间攻防博弈模型。我们定义网络空间的多域包括物理域、网络域和数字域。通过建立两个代理，分别代表攻击者和防御者，防御者将在多域网络空间中选择多域动作，通过强化学习获得防御者的最优奖励。为了提高防守方的防御能力，提出了一种基于奖励随机化强化学习的博弈模型。当防御者采取多域防御动作时，奖励随机给出并服从线性分布，从而找到更好的防御策略，提高防御成功率。实验结果表明，该博弈模型能够有效模拟多域网络空间的攻防状态，且所提方法比DDPG和DQN具有更高的防御成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于奖励随机化强化学习的多领域网络攻防博弈模型，涵盖物理、网络和数字领域。
AI.motivation: 现有网络攻防方法仅关注单一网络领域，难以应对多领域协同攻击的复杂场景，需构建跨领域博弈模型提升防御能力。
AI.method: 构建攻击者与防御者双智能体模型，防御者在多领域空间中通过奖励随机化强化学习选择动作，奖励值服从线性分布以优化防御策略。
AI.result: 实验验证该模型能有效模拟多领域攻防状态，防御成功率显著高于DDPG和DQN算法。
AI.conclusion: 奖励随机化强化学习方法有效提升了多领域网络环境下的动态防御能力，为跨域攻防博弈提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiazhi Xu,Sheng Huang,Fengtao Zhou,Luwen Huangfu,Daniel Zeng,Bo Liu
title: Boosting Multi-Label Image Classification with Complementary Parallel Self-Distillation
title_zh: 通过互补并行自蒸馏促进多标签图像分类
abstract: Multi-Label Image Classification (MLIC) approaches usually exploit label correlations to achieve good performance. However, emphasizing correlation like co-occurrence may overlook discriminative features of the target itself and lead to model overfitting, thus undermining the performance. In this study, we propose a generic framework named Parallel Self-Distillation (PSD) for boosting MLIC models. PSD decomposes the original MLIC task into several simpler MLIC sub-tasks via two elaborated complementary task decomposition strategies named Co-occurrence Graph Partition (CGP) and Dis-occurrence Graph Partition (DGP). Then, the MLIC models of fewer categories are trained with these sub-tasks in parallel for respectively learning the joint patterns and the category-specific patterns of labels. Finally, knowledge distillation is leveraged to learn a compact global ensemble of full categories with these learned patterns for reconciling the label correlation exploitation and model overfitting. Extensive results on MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE datasets demonstrate that our framework can be easily plugged into many MLIC approaches and improve performances of recent state-of-the-art approaches. The explainable visual study also further validates that our method is able to learn both the category-specific and co-occurring features. The source code is released at https://github.com/Robbie-Xu/CPSD.
summary: Multi-Label Image Classification (MLIC) approaches usually exploit label correlations to achieve good performance. However, emphasizing correlation like co-occurrence may overlook discriminative features of the target itself and lead to model overfitting, thus undermining the performance. In this study, we propose a generic framework named Parallel Self-Distillation (PSD) for boosting MLIC models. PSD decomposes the original MLIC task into several simpler MLIC sub-tasks via two elaborated complementary task decomposition strategies named Co-occurrence Graph Partition (CGP) and Dis-occurrence Graph Partition (DGP). Then, the MLIC models of fewer categories are trained with these sub-tasks in parallel for respectively learning the joint patterns and the category-specific patterns of labels. Finally, knowledge distillation is leveraged to learn a compact global ensemble of full categories with these learned patterns for reconciling the label correlation exploitation and model overfitting. Extensive results on MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE datasets demonstrate that our framework can be easily plugged into many MLIC approaches and improve performances of recent state-of-the-art approaches. The explainable visual study also further validates that our method is able to learn both the category-specific and co-occurring features. The source code is released at https://github.com/Robbie-Xu/CPSD.
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类（MLIC）方法通常利用标签相关性来实现良好的性能。然而，强调共现等相关性可能会忽视目标本身的判别特征，导致模型过度拟合，从而损害性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个名为并行自蒸馏 (PSD) 的通用框架，用于增强 MLIC 模型。 PSD 通过两种精心设计的互补任务分解策略（即共现图分区（CGP）和异现图分区（DGP））将原始 MLIC 任务分解为多个更简单的 MLIC 子任务。然后，使用这些子任务并行训练较少类别的 MLIC 模型，分别学习标签的联合模式和特定类别模式。最后，利用知识蒸馏来学习完整类别的紧凑全局集合，并使用这些学习模式来协调标签相关性利用和模型过度拟合。 MS-COCO 和 NUS-WIDE 数据集上的大量结果表明，我们的框架可以轻松插入到许多 MLIC 方法中，并提高最新最先进方法的性能。可解释的视觉研究还进一步验证了我们的方法能够学习特定类别和同时出现的特征。源代码发布于 https://github.com/Robbie-Xu/CPSD。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为并行自蒸馏（PSD）的通用框架，通过分解多标签图像分类任务以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度强调标签相关性可能导致模型过拟合，忽视目标本身的判别特征，从而影响性能。
AI.method: PSD采用两种互补的任务分解策略（CGP和DGP）将原任务拆分为子任务，通过并行训练学习联合模式和类别特异性模式，并利用知识蒸馏整合全局模型。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和NUS-WIDE数据集上显著提升最新方法的性能，可视化研究验证了方法能同时学习类别特异性和共现特征。
AI.conclusion: PSD框架有效平衡了标签相关性利用与模型泛化，具有良好的可扩展性和实际应用价值。

search_text: Boosting Multi-Label Image Classification with Complementary Parallel Self-Distillation 通过互补并行自蒸馏促进多标签图像分类 Multi-Label Image Classification (MLIC) approaches usually exploit label correlations to achieve good performance. However, emphasizing correlation like co-occurrence may overlook discriminative features of the target itself and lead to model overfitting, thus undermining the performance. In this study, we propose a generic framework named Parallel Self-Distillation (PSD) for boosting MLIC models. PSD decomposes the original MLIC task into several simpler MLIC sub-tasks via two elaborated complementary task decomposition strategies named Co-occurrence Graph Partition (CGP) and Dis-occurrence Graph Partition (DGP). Then, the MLIC models of fewer categories are trained with these sub-tasks in parallel for respectively learning the joint patterns and the category-specific patterns of labels. Finally, knowledge distillation is leveraged to learn a compact global ensemble of full categories with these learned patterns for reconciling the label correlation exploitation and model overfitting. Extensive results on MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE datasets demonstrate that our framework can be easily plugged into many MLIC approaches and improve performances of recent state-of-the-art approaches. The explainable visual study also further validates that our method is able to learn both the category-specific and co-occurring features. The source code is released at https://github.com/Robbie-Xu/CPSD. 多标签图像分类（MLIC）方法通常利用标签相关性来实现良好的性能。然而，强调共现等相关性可能会忽视目标本身的判别特征，导致模型过度拟合，从而损害性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个名为并行自蒸馏 (PSD) 的通用框架，用于增强 MLIC 模型。 PSD 通过两种精心设计的互补任务分解策略（即共现图分区（CGP）和异现图分区（DGP））将原始 MLIC 任务分解为多个更简单的 MLIC 子任务。然后，使用这些子任务并行训练较少类别的 MLIC 模型，分别学习标签的联合模式和特定类别模式。最后，利用知识蒸馏来学习完整类别的紧凑全局集合，并使用这些学习模式来协调标签相关性利用和模型过度拟合。 MS-COCO 和 NUS-WIDE 数据集上的大量结果表明，我们的框架可以轻松插入到许多 MLIC 方法中，并提高最新最先进方法的性能。可解释的视觉研究还进一步验证了我们的方法能够学习特定类别和同时出现的特征。源代码发布于 https://github.com/Robbie-Xu/CPSD。 该论文提出了一种名为并行自蒸馏（PSD）的通用框架，通过分解多标签图像分类任务以提升模型性能。 Jiazhi Xu,Sheng Huang,Fengtao Zhou,Luwen Huangfu,Daniel Zeng,Bo Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yubin Ge,Ziang Xiao,Jana Diesner,Heng Ji,Karrie Karahalios,Hari Sundaram
title: What should I Ask: A Knowledge-driven Approach for Follow-up Questions Generation in Conversational Surveys
title_zh: 我应该问什么：对话式调查中后续问题生成的知识驱动方法
abstract: Generating follow-up questions on the fly could significantly improve conversational survey quality and user experiences by enabling a more dynamic and personalized survey structure. In this paper, we proposed a novel task for knowledge-driven follow-up question generation in conversational surveys. We constructed a new human-annotated dataset of human-written follow-up questions with dialogue history and labeled knowledge in the context of conversational surveys. Along with the dataset, we designed and validated a set of reference-free Gricean-inspired evaluation metrics to systematically evaluate the quality of generated follow-up questions. We then propose a two-staged knowledge-driven model for the task, which generates informative and coherent follow-up questions by using knowledge to steer the generation process. The experiments demonstrate that compared to GPT-based baseline models, our two-staged model generates more informative, coherent, and clear follow-up questions.
summary: Generating follow-up questions on the fly could significantly improve conversational survey quality and user experiences by enabling a more dynamic and personalized survey structure. In this paper, we proposed a novel task for knowledge-driven follow-up question generation in conversational surveys. We constructed a new human-annotated dataset of human-written follow-up questions with dialogue history and labeled knowledge in the context of conversational surveys. Along with the dataset, we designed and validated a set of reference-free Gricean-inspired evaluation metrics to systematically evaluate the quality of generated follow-up questions. We then propose a two-staged knowledge-driven model for the task, which generates informative and coherent follow-up questions by using knowledge to steer the generation process. The experiments demonstrate that compared to GPT-based baseline models, our two-staged model generates more informative, coherent, and clear follow-up questions.
abstract_zh: 通过启用更加动态和个性化的调查结构，动态生成后续问题可以显着提高对话式调查质量和用户体验。在本文中，我们提出了一种在对话调查中知识驱动的后续问题生成的新任务。我们构建了一个新的人工注释数据集，其中包含人工编写的后续问题，其中包含对话历史记录和对话调查背景下的标记知识。除了数据集之外，我们还设计并验证了一组受 Gricean 启发的无参考评估指标，以系统地评估生成的后续问题的质量。然后，我们为该任务提出了一个两阶段知识驱动模型，该模型通过使用知识引导生成过程来生成信息丰富且连贯的后续问题。实验表明，与基于 GPT 的基线模型相比，我们的两阶段模型生成的后续问题信息更丰富、连贯且清晰。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识驱动的方法，用于在对话式调查中生成跟进问题，以提高调查质量和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 传统调查结构静态且缺乏个性化，难以动态适应用户回答，导致信息获取效率低下。
AI.method: 构建包含对话历史和标注知识的人类标注数据集，并设计无参考Gricean启发式评估指标；提出两阶段知识驱动模型，利用知识引导生成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，与基于GPT的基线模型相比，该模型生成的跟进问题更具信息性、连贯性和清晰度。
AI.conclusion: 知识驱动方法能有效提升对话式调查的动态性与个性化水平，为生成高质量跟进问题提供新思路。

authors_text: Bowen Xing,Ivor W. Tsang
title: Neural Subgraph Explorer: Reducing Noisy Information via Target-Oriented Syntax Graph Pruning
title_zh: 神经子图浏览器：通过面向目标的语法图修剪减少噪声信息
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the emerging success of leveraging syntax graphs for the target sentiment classification task. However, we discover that existing syntax-based models suffer from two issues: noisy information aggregation and loss of distant correlations. In this paper, we propose a novel model termed Neural Subgraph Explorer, which (1) reduces the noisy information via pruning target-irrelevant nodes on the syntax graph; (2) introduces beneficial first-order connections between the target and its related words into the obtained graph. Specifically, we design a multi-hop actions score estimator to evaluate the value of each word regarding the specific target. The discrete action sequence is sampled through Gumble-Softmax and then used for both of the syntax graph and the self-attention graph. To introduce the first-order connections between the target and its relevant words, the two pruned graphs are merged. Finally, graph convolution is conducted on the obtained unified graph to update the hidden states. And this process is stacked with multiple layers. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt of target-oriented syntax graph pruning in this task. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our model, which achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the emerging success of leveraging syntax graphs for the target sentiment classification task. However, we discover that existing syntax-based models suffer from two issues: noisy information aggregation and loss of distant correlations. In this paper, we propose a novel model termed Neural Subgraph Explorer, which (1) reduces the noisy information via pruning target-irrelevant nodes on the syntax graph; (2) introduces beneficial first-order connections between the target and its related words into the obtained graph. Specifically, we design a multi-hop actions score estimator to evaluate the value of each word regarding the specific target. The discrete action sequence is sampled through Gumble-Softmax and then used for both of the syntax graph and the self-attention graph. To introduce the first-order connections between the target and its relevant words, the two pruned graphs are merged. Finally, graph convolution is conducted on the obtained unified graph to update the hidden states. And this process is stacked with multiple layers. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt of target-oriented syntax graph pruning in this task. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our model, which achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用语法图进行目标情感分类任务取得了新的成功。然而，我们发现现有的基于语法的模型存在两个问题：噪声信息聚合和远程相关性丢失。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为神经子图浏览器的新颖模型，该模型（1）通过修剪语法图上与目标不相关的节点来减少噪声信息； (2)将目标与其相关词之间有益的一阶连接引入到获得的图中。具体来说，我们设计了一个多跳动作得分估计器来评估每个单词关于特定目标的值。离散动作序列通过 Gumble-Softmax 进行采样，然后用于语法图和自注意力图。为了引入目标与其相关单词之间的一阶连接，将两个修剪图合并。最后，对得到的统一图进行图卷积来更新隐藏状态。而这个过程是多层叠加的。据我们所知，这是该任务中面向目标的语法图修剪的首次尝试。实验结果证明了我们模型的优越性，实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种目标导向的句法图剪枝方法，通过消除噪声信息和引入有益连接提升目标情感分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有句法图模型存在噪声信息聚合和远程相关性丢失问题，影响目标情感分类性能。
AI.method: 设计多跳动作评分估计器评估词相关性，利用Gumble-Softmax采样剪枝句法图和自注意力图，合并后通过图卷积更新隐藏状态。
AI.result: 实验验证模型在目标情感分类任务中达到新的最先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现目标导向的句法图剪枝，有效解决噪声干扰和远程依赖问题，为相关任务提供新思路。

However, we discover that existing syntax-based models suffer from two issues: noisy information aggregation and loss of distant correlations. In this paper, we propose a novel model termed Neural Subgraph Explorer, which (1) reduces the noisy information via pruning target-irrelevant nodes on the syntax graph; (2) introduces beneficial first-order connections between the target and its related words into the obtained graph. Specifically, we design a multi-hop actions score estimator to evaluate the value of each word regarding the specific target. The discrete action sequence is sampled through Gumble-Softmax and then used for both of the syntax graph and the self-attention graph. To introduce the first-order connections between the target and its relevant words, the two pruned graphs are merged. Finally, graph convolution is conducted on the obtained unified graph to update the hidden states. And this process is stacked with multiple layers. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt of target-oriented syntax graph pruning in this task. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our model, which achieves new state-of-the-art performance. 近年来，利用语法图进行目标情感分类任务取得了新的成功。然而，我们发现现有的基于语法的模型存在两个问题：噪声信息聚合和远程相关性丢失。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为神经子图浏览器的新颖模型，该模型（1）通过修剪语法图上与目标不相关的节点来减少噪声信息； (2)将目标与其相关词之间有益的一阶连接引入到获得的图中。具体来说，我们设计了一个多跳动作得分估计器来评估每个单词关于特定目标的值。离散动作序列通过 Gumble-Softmax 进行采样，然后用于语法图和自注意力图。为了引入目标与其相关单词之间的一阶连接，将两个修剪图合并。最后，对得到的统一图进行图卷积来更新隐藏状态。而这个过程是多层叠加的。据我们所知，这是该任务中面向目标的语法图修剪的首次尝试。实验结果证明了我们模型的优越性，实现了新的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种目标导向的句法图剪枝方法，通过消除噪声信息和引入有益连接提升目标情感分类效果。 Bowen Xing,Ivor W. Tsang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Linh Nguyen,Akshay Iyer,Shweta Khushu
title: An Automated System for Detecting Visual Damages of Wind Turbine Blades
title_zh: 用于检测风力涡轮机叶片视觉损坏的自动化系统
abstract: Wind energy's ability to compete with fossil fuels on a market level depends on lowering wind's high operational costs. Since damages on wind turbine blades are the leading cause for these operational problems, identifying blade damages is critical. However, recent works in visual identification of blade damages are still experimental and focus on optimizing the traditional machine learning metrics such as IoU. In this paper, we argue that pushing models to production long before achieving the "optimal" model performance can still generate real value for this use case. We discuss the performance of our damage's suggestion model in production and how this system works in coordination with humans as part of a commercialized product and how it can contribute towards lowering wind energy's operational costs.
summary: Wind energy's ability to compete with fossil fuels on a market level depends on lowering wind's high operational costs. Since damages on wind turbine blades are the leading cause for these operational problems, identifying blade damages is critical. However, recent works in visual identification of blade damages are still experimental and focus on optimizing the traditional machine learning metrics such as IoU. In this paper, we argue that pushing models to production long before achieving the "optimal" model performance can still generate real value for this use case. We discuss the performance of our damage's suggestion model in production and how this system works in coordination with humans as part of a commercialized product and how it can contribute towards lowering wind energy's operational costs.
abstract_zh: 风能在市场上与化石燃料竞争的能力取决于降低风能的高运营成本。由于风力涡轮机叶片的损坏是这些运行问题的主要原因，因此识别叶片损坏至关重要。然而，最近在叶片损坏视觉识别方面的工作仍处于实验阶段，重点是优化 IoU 等传统机器学习指标。在本文中，我们认为，在实现“最佳”模型性能之前很久将模型推向生产仍然可以为此用例产生真正的价值。我们讨论了损害建议模型在生产中的性能，以及该系统如何作为商业产品的一部分与人类协调工作，以及它如何有助于降低风能的运营成本。

AI.tldr: 开发一种自动化系统以检测风力涡轮机叶片的视觉损伤，从而降低风能运营成本。
AI.motivation: 降低风能运营成本，通过提前部署有效检测系统来解决叶片损伤问题，尽管模型尚未达到最优性能。
AI.method: 采用机器学习模型进行损伤检测，并设计系统与人工协同工作，以商业化产品形式应用。
AI.result: 系统在实际生产中有效运行，与人工协作降低了风能运营成本。
AI.conclusion: 提前部署机器学习模型可实际降低风能运营成本，无需等待模型达到理论最优性能。

authors_text: Nader Zare,Arad Firouzkouhi,Omid Amini,Mahtab Sarvmaili,Aref Sayareh,Saba Ramezani Rad,Stan Matwin,Amilcar Soares
title: CYRUS Soccer Simulation 2D Team Description Paper 2022
title_zh: CYRUS 足球模拟 2D 球队描述文件 2022
abstract: Soccer Simulation 2D League is one of the major leagues of RoboCup competitions. In a Soccer Simulation 2D (SS2D) game, two teams of 11 players and one coach compete against each other. The players are only allowed to communicate with the server that is called Soccer Simulation Server. This paper introduces the previous and current research of the CYRUS soccer simulation team, the champion of RoboCup 2021. We will present our idea about improving Unmarking Decisioning and Positioning by using Pass Prediction Deep Neural Network. Based on our experimental results, this idea proven to be effective on increasing the winning rate of Cyrus against opponents.
summary: Soccer Simulation 2D League is one of the major leagues of RoboCup competitions. In a Soccer Simulation 2D (SS2D) game, two teams of 11 players and one coach compete against each other. The players are only allowed to communicate with the server that is called Soccer Simulation Server. This paper introduces the previous and current research of the CYRUS soccer simulation team, the champion of RoboCup 2021. We will present our idea about improving Unmarking Decisioning and Positioning by using Pass Prediction Deep Neural Network. Based on our experimental results, this idea proven to be effective on increasing the winning rate of Cyrus against opponents.
abstract_zh: 足球模拟2D联赛是RoboCup赛事的主要联赛之一。在 2D 足球模拟 (SS2D) 游戏中，两支由 11 名球员和一名教练组成的球队相互竞争。玩家只能与称为足球模拟服务器的服务器进行通信。本文介绍了 2021 年 RoboCup 冠军 CYRUS 足球模拟队之前和当前的研究。我们将提出利用传球预测深度神经网络改进无盯人决策和定位的想法。根据我们的实验结果，这个想法被证明对于提高Cyrus对对手的胜率是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CYRUS足球仿真团队在RoboCup 2021中夺冠后，针对SS2D联赛中取消标记决策和定位策略的改进研究。
AI.motivation: 为提升足球仿真团队在对抗中的表现，解决传统方法在动态环境下的决策效率与定位精度不足问题。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络构建传球预测模型，优化球员取消标记决策流程与实时定位策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升了CYRUS团队的胜率，验证了模型在动态对抗场景中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 传球预测深度神经网络为足球仿真团队的战术决策提供了有效技术支持，推动了SS2D联赛AI策略的发展。

authors_text: Shuyu Kong,You Li,Hai Zhou
title: Incentivizing Federated Learning
title_zh: 激励联邦学习
abstract: Federated Learning is an emerging distributed collaborative learning paradigm used by many of applications nowadays. The effectiveness of federated learning relies on clients' collective efforts and their willingness to contribute local data. However, due to privacy concerns and the costs of data collection and model training, clients may not always contribute all the data they possess, which would negatively affect the performance of the global model. This paper presents an incentive mechanism that encourages clients to contribute as much data as they can obtain. Unlike previous incentive mechanisms, our approach does not monetize data. Instead, we implicitly use model performance as a reward, i.e., significant contributors are paid off with better models. We theoretically prove that clients will use as much data as they can possibly possess to participate in federated learning under certain conditions with our incentive mechanism
summary: Federated Learning is an emerging distributed collaborative learning paradigm used by many of applications nowadays. The effectiveness of federated learning relies on clients' collective efforts and their willingness to contribute local data. However, due to privacy concerns and the costs of data collection and model training, clients may not always contribute all the data they possess, which would negatively affect the performance of the global model. This paper presents an incentive mechanism that encourages clients to contribute as much data as they can obtain. Unlike previous incentive mechanisms, our approach does not monetize data. Instead, we implicitly use model performance as a reward, i.e., significant contributors are paid off with better models. We theoretically prove that clients will use as much data as they can possibly possess to participate in federated learning under certain conditions with our incentive mechanism
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种新兴的分布式协作学习范式，如今被许多应用程序所使用。联邦学习的有效性依赖于客户的集体努力以及他们贡献本地数据的意愿。然而，由于隐私问题以及数据收集和模型训练的成本，客户可能并不总是贡献他们拥有的所有数据，这会对全局模型的性能产生负面影响。本文提出了一种激励机制，鼓励客户贡献尽可能多的数据。与以前的激励机制不同，我们的方法不会将数据货币化。相反，我们隐式地使用模型性能作为奖励，即重要的贡献者会得到更好的模型的回报。我们从理论上证明，通过我们的激励机制，在一定条件下，客户会使用尽可能多的数据来参与联邦学习

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非货币化的激励机制，通过模型性能作为隐性奖励，鼓励联邦学习中的客户端贡献更多数据。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习依赖客户端数据贡献，但隐私顾虑和成本导致贡献不足，现有激励机制多采用货币化方式存在局限。
AI.method: 设计基于模型性能的隐性激励机制，证明在特定条件下客户端会最大化数据贡献以获得更优模型。
AI.result: 理论证明该机制可使客户端在满足条件时完全贡献可用数据，提升全局模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 无需货币激励即可有效提升联邦学习数据贡献度，为隐私保护场景提供新解决方案。

Instead, we implicitly use model performance as a reward, i.e., significant contributors are paid off with better models. We theoretically prove that clients will use as much data as they can possibly possess to participate in federated learning under certain conditions with our incentive mechanism 联邦学习是一种新兴的分布式协作学习范式，如今被许多应用程序所使用。联邦学习的有效性依赖于客户的集体努力以及他们贡献本地数据的意愿。然而，由于隐私问题以及数据收集和模型训练的成本，客户可能并不总是贡献他们拥有的所有数据，这会对全局模型的性能产生负面影响。本文提出了一种激励机制，鼓励客户贡献尽可能多的数据。与以前的激励机制不同，我们的方法不会将数据货币化。相反，我们隐式地使用模型性能作为奖励，即重要的贡献者会得到更好的模型的回报。我们从理论上证明，通过我们的激励机制，在一定条件下，客户会使用尽可能多的数据来参与联邦学习 本文提出一种非货币化的激励机制，通过模型性能作为隐性奖励，鼓励联邦学习中的客户端贡献更多数据。 Shuyu Kong,You Li,Hai Zhou cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kanav Vats,Mehrnaz Fani,David A. Clausi,John S. Zelek
title: Evaluating deep tracking models for player tracking in broadcast ice hockey video
title_zh: 评估广播冰球视频中球员跟踪的深度跟踪模型
comment: Accepted to Linköping Hockey Analytics Conference (LINHAC). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03090
comments: Accepted to Linköping Hockey Analytics Conference (LINHAC). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03090
abstract: Tracking and identifying players is an important problem in computer vision based ice hockey analytics. Player tracking is a challenging problem since the motion of players in hockey is fast-paced and non-linear. There is also significant player-player and player-board occlusion, camera panning and zooming in hockey broadcast video. Prior published research perform player tracking with the help of handcrafted features for player detection and re-identification. Although commercial solutions for hockey player tracking exist, to the best of our knowledge, no network architectures used, training data or performance metrics are publicly reported. There is currently no published work for hockey player tracking making use of the recent advancements in deep learning while also reporting the current accuracy metrics used in literature. Therefore, in this paper, we compare and contrast several state-of-the-art tracking algorithms and analyze their performance and failure modes in ice hockey.
summary: Tracking and identifying players is an important problem in computer vision based ice hockey analytics. Player tracking is a challenging problem since the motion of players in hockey is fast-paced and non-linear. There is also significant player-player and player-board occlusion, camera panning and zooming in hockey broadcast video. Prior published research perform player tracking with the help of handcrafted features for player detection and re-identification. Although commercial solutions for hockey player tracking exist, to the best of our knowledge, no network architectures used, training data or performance metrics are publicly reported. There is currently no published work for hockey player tracking making use of the recent advancements in deep learning while also reporting the current accuracy metrics used in literature. Therefore, in this paper, we compare and contrast several state-of-the-art tracking algorithms and analyze their performance and failure modes in ice hockey.
abstract_zh: 跟踪和识别球员是基于计算机视觉的冰球分析中的一个重要问题。球员跟踪是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为曲棍球比赛中球员的运动是快节奏且非线性的。曲棍球广播视频中还存在明显的球员与球员以及球员与板之间的遮挡、摄像机平移和缩放。之前发表的研究借助手工制作的玩家检测和重新识别功能来执行玩家跟踪。尽管存在用于曲棍球运动员跟踪的商业解决方案，但据我们所知，没有公开报告使用的网络架构、训练数据或表现指标。目前还没有发表的曲棍球运动员跟踪工作，利用深度学习的最新进展，同时报告文献中使用的当前准确度指标。因此，在本文中，我们比较和对比了几种最先进的跟踪算法，并分析了它们在冰球运动中的性能和故障模式。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度学习跟踪模型在冰球赛事广播视频中对球员的跟踪效果。
AI.motivation: 冰球比赛中球员运动速度快且存在大量遮挡，传统手工特征方法效果有限，而现有商业解决方案未公开深度学习模型细节及性能指标。
AI.method: 对比分析多种先进跟踪算法在冰球场景下的性能，研究其成功与失败案例。
AI.result: 发现现有算法在处理高速运动、遮挡及摄像机动态变化时存在显著性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更鲁棒的深度学习模型以应对冰球视频特有的跟踪挑战。

authors_text: Sarah Aguasvivas Manzano,Vani Sundaram,Artemis Xu,Khoi Ly,Mark Rentschler,Robert Shepherd,Nikolaus Correll
title: Toward smart composites: small-scale, untethered prediction and control for soft sensor/actuator systems
title_zh: 迈向智能复合材料：软传感器/执行器系统的小规模、不受束缚的预测和控制
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Composite Materials. Special Issue: Multifunctional Composites for Autonomic, Adaptive and Self-Sustaining Systems
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Composite Materials. Special Issue: Multifunctional Composites for Autonomic, Adaptive and Self-Sustaining Systems
abstract: We present formulation and open-source tools to achieve in-material model predictive control of sensor/actuator systems using learned forward kinematics and on-device computation. Microcontroller units (MCUs) that compute the prediction and control task while colocated with the sensors and actuators enable in-material untethered behaviors. In this approach, small parameter size neural network models learn forward kinematics offline. Our open-source compiler, nn4mc, generates code to offload these predictions onto MCUs. A Newton-Raphson solver then computes the control input in real time. We first benchmark this nonlinear control approach against a PID controller on a mass-spring-damper simulation. We then study experimental results on two experimental rigs with different sensing, actuation and computational hardware: a tendon-based platform with embedded LightLace sensors and a HASEL-based platform with magnetic sensors. Experimental results indicate effective high-bandwidth tracking of reference paths (greater than or equal to 120 Hz) with a small memory footprint (less than or equal to 6.4% of flash memory). The measured path following error does not exceed 2mm in the tendon-based platform. The simulated path following error does not exceed 1mm in the HASEL-based platform. The mean power consumption of this approach in an ARM Cortex-M4f device is 45.4 mW. This control approach is also compatible with Tensorflow Lite models and equivalent on-device code. In-material intelligence enables a new class of composites that infuse autonomy into structures and systems with refined artificial proprioception.
summary: We present formulation and open-source tools to achieve in-material model predictive control of sensor/actuator systems using learned forward kinematics and on-device computation. Microcontroller units (MCUs) that compute the prediction and control task while colocated with the sensors and actuators enable in-material untethered behaviors. In this approach, small parameter size neural network models learn forward kinematics offline. Our open-source compiler, nn4mc, generates code to offload these predictions onto MCUs. A Newton-Raphson solver then computes the control input in real time. We first benchmark this nonlinear control approach against a PID controller on a mass-spring-damper simulation. We then study experimental results on two experimental rigs with different sensing, actuation and computational hardware: a tendon-based platform with embedded LightLace sensors and a HASEL-based platform with magnetic sensors. Experimental results indicate effective high-bandwidth tracking of reference paths (greater than or equal to 120 Hz) with a small memory footprint (less than or equal to 6.4% of flash memory). The measured path following error does not exceed 2mm in the tendon-based platform. The simulated path following error does not exceed 1mm in the HASEL-based platform. The mean power consumption of this approach in an ARM Cortex-M4f device is 45.4 mW. This control approach is also compatible with Tensorflow Lite models and equivalent on-device code. In-material intelligence enables a new class of composites that infuse autonomy into structures and systems with refined artificial proprioception.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了公式和开源工具，以使用学习的正向运动学和设备上计算来实现传感器/执行器系统的材料模型预测控制。微控制器单元 (MCU) 计算预测和控制任务，同时与传感器和执行器并置，实现材料内不受束缚的行为。在这种方法中，小参数大小的神经网络模型离线学习正向运动学。我们的开源编译器 nn4mc 生成代码以将这些预测卸载到 MCU 上。然后，牛顿-拉夫森求解器实时计算控制输入。我们首先在质量-弹簧-阻尼器仿真中对这种非线性控制方法与 PID 控制器进行基准测试。然后，我们研究了两个具有不同传感、驱动和计算硬件的实验装置的实验结果：一个带有嵌入式 LightLace 传感器的基于肌腱的平台和一个带有磁传感器的基于 HASEL 的平台。实验结果表明，可以以较小的内存占用（小于或等于闪存的 6.4%）实现对参考路径（大于或等于 120 Hz）的有效高带宽跟踪。在基于腱的平台中测量的路径跟随误差不超过2mm。基于HASEL的平台模拟路径跟随误差不超过1mm。 ARM Cortex-M4f 设备中这种方法的平均功耗为 45.4 mW。这种控制方法还与 Tensorflow Lite 模型和等效的设备上代码兼容。材料内智能使新型复合材料成为可能，通过精细的人工本体感觉将自主性注入到结构和系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于材料内部的模型预测控制方法，通过学习正向运动学和设备端计算，实现软传感器/执行器系统的智能复合材料控制。
AI.motivation: 传统外部控制方式限制了柔性系统的自主性和适应性，需开发无需外部连接的材料内嵌智能控制方案以提升结构自主性。
AI.method: 采用小型神经网络离线学习正向运动学，通过开源编译器nn4mc生成MCU代码，结合牛顿-拉夫森求解器实现实时控制，并兼容TensorFlow Lite模型。
AI.result: 在两种实验平台（肌腱式与HASEL式）中实现120Hz以上高带宽轨迹跟踪，路径误差分别小于2mm和1mm，内存占用低于6.4%，ARM Cortex-M4f设备功耗仅45.4mW。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为智能复合材料提供了材料内嵌的自主控制能力，通过精简的人工本体感觉实现结构与系统的深度融合创新。

authors_text: Andrea Gesmundo,Jeff Dean
title: muNet: Evolving Pretrained Deep Neural Networks into Scalable Auto-tuning Multitask Systems
title_zh: muNet：将预训练的深度神经网络发展为可扩展的自动调整多任务系统
abstract: Most uses of machine learning today involve training a model from scratch for a particular task, or sometimes starting with a model pretrained on a related task and then fine-tuning on a downstream task. Both approaches offer limited knowledge transfer between different tasks, time-consuming human-driven customization to individual tasks and high computational costs especially when starting from randomly initialized models. We propose a method that uses the layers of a pretrained deep neural network as building blocks to construct an ML system that can jointly solve an arbitrary number of tasks. The resulting system can leverage cross tasks knowledge transfer, while being immune from common drawbacks of multitask approaches such as catastrophic forgetting, gradients interference and negative transfer. We define an evolutionary approach designed to jointly select the prior knowledge relevant for each task, choose the subset of the model parameters to train and dynamically auto-tune its hyperparameters. Furthermore, a novel scale control method is employed to achieve quality/size trade-offs that outperform common fine-tuning techniques. Compared with standard fine-tuning on a benchmark of 10 diverse image classification tasks, the proposed model improves the average accuracy by 2.39% while using 47% less parameters per task.
summary: Most uses of machine learning today involve training a model from scratch for a particular task, or sometimes starting with a model pretrained on a related task and then fine-tuning on a downstream task. Both approaches offer limited knowledge transfer between different tasks, time-consuming human-driven customization to individual tasks and high computational costs especially when starting from randomly initialized models. We propose a method that uses the layers of a pretrained deep neural network as building blocks to construct an ML system that can jointly solve an arbitrary number of tasks. The resulting system can leverage cross tasks knowledge transfer, while being immune from common drawbacks of multitask approaches such as catastrophic forgetting, gradients interference and negative transfer. We define an evolutionary approach designed to jointly select the prior knowledge relevant for each task, choose the subset of the model parameters to train and dynamically auto-tune its hyperparameters. Furthermore, a novel scale control method is employed to achieve quality/size trade-offs that outperform common fine-tuning techniques. Compared with standard fine-tuning on a benchmark of 10 diverse image classification tasks, the proposed model improves the average accuracy by 2.39% while using 47% less parameters per task.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器学习的大多数用途都涉及从头开始针对特定任务训练模型，或者有时从针对相关任务预训练的模型开始，然后对下游任务进行微调。这两种方法都在不同任务之间提供有限的知识转移，对各个任务进行耗时的人工驱动定制，并且计算成本很高，尤其是从随机初始化的模型开始时。我们提出了一种方法，使用预训练的深度神经网络层作为构建块来构建可以联合解决任意数量任务的机器学习系统。由此产生的系统可以利用跨任务知识转移，同时避免多任务方法的常见缺点，例如灾难性遗忘、梯度干扰和负转移。我们定义了一种进化方法，旨在联合选择与每个任务相关的先验知识，选择模型参数的子集来训练和动态自动调整其超参数。此外，采用一种新颖的比例控制方法来实现质量/尺寸的权衡，其性能优于常见的微调技术。与在 10 个不同图像分类任务的基准上进行的标准微调相比，所提出的模型将平均准确率提高了 2.39%，同时每个任务使用的参数减少了 47%。

AI.motivation: 现有方法存在任务间知识转移有限、人工定制化耗时及计算成本高的问题，需提升多任务学习的效率与效果
AI.method: 利用预训练网络层构建多任务系统，结合进化算法选择任务相关知识与参数子集，动态调整超参数并引入规模控制方法
AI.result: 在10个图像分类任务基准测试中，平均准确率提升2.39%，每任务参数量减少47%
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效避免灾难性遗忘等多任务学习难题，在性能与效率间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Michael Villarreal,Bibek Poudel,Ryan Wickman,Yu Shen,Weizi Li
title: AutoJoin: Efficient Adversarial Training against Gradient-Free Perturbations for Robust Maneuvering via Denoising Autoencoder and Joint Learning
title_zh: AutoJoin：通过去噪自动编码器和联合学习，针对无梯度扰动进行有效的对抗训练，以实现稳健的操纵
abstract: With the growing use of machine learning algorithms and ubiquitous sensors, many `perception-to-control' systems are being developed and deployed. To ensure their trustworthiness, improving their robustness through adversarial training is one potential approach. We propose a gradient-free adversarial training technique, named AutoJoin, to effectively and efficiently produce robust models for image-based maneuvering. Compared to other state-of-the-art methods with testing on over 5M images, AutoJoin achieves significant performance increases up to the 40% range against perturbations while improving on clean performance up to 300%. AutoJoin is also highly efficient, saving up to 86% time per training epoch and 90% training data over other state-of-the-art techniques. The core idea of AutoJoin is to use a decoder attachment to the original regression model creating a denoising autoencoder within the architecture. This architecture allows the tasks `maneuvering' and `denoising sensor input' to be jointly learnt and reinforce each other's performance.
summary: With the growing use of machine learning algorithms and ubiquitous sensors, many `perception-to-control' systems are being developed and deployed. To ensure their trustworthiness, improving their robustness through adversarial training is one potential approach. We propose a gradient-free adversarial training technique, named AutoJoin, to effectively and efficiently produce robust models for image-based maneuvering. Compared to other state-of-the-art methods with testing on over 5M images, AutoJoin achieves significant performance increases up to the 40% range against perturbations while improving on clean performance up to 300%. AutoJoin is also highly efficient, saving up to 86% time per training epoch and 90% training data over other state-of-the-art techniques. The core idea of AutoJoin is to use a decoder attachment to the original regression model creating a denoising autoencoder within the architecture. This architecture allows the tasks `maneuvering' and `denoising sensor input' to be jointly learnt and reinforce each other's performance.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习算法和无处不在的传感器的日益使用，许多“感知到控制”系统正在被开发和部署。为了确保它们的可信度，通过对抗性训练来提高它们的鲁棒性是一种潜在的方法。我们提出了一种名为 AutoJoin 的无梯度对抗训练技术，可以有效且高效地为基于图像的机动生成稳健的模型。与在超过 500 万张图像上进行测试的其他最先进的方法相比，AutoJoin 的抗扰动性能显着提高了 40%，同时干净性能提高了 300%。 AutoJoin 也非常高效，与其他最先进的技术相比，每个训练周期可节省高达 86% 的时间和 90% 的训练数据。 AutoJoin 的核心思想是使用原始回归模型的解码器附件，在架构内创建去噪自动编码器。这种架构允许联合学习“操纵”和“传感器输入降噪”任务，并增强彼此的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoJoin的梯度无关对抗训练方法，通过去噪自编码器和联合学习提升图像机动控制系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着感知-控制系统的广泛应用，提高其对抗梯度无关扰动的鲁棒性成为关键需求。传统方法在效率和效果上存在不足，需更高效的对抗训练技术。
AI.method: 在回归模型中附加解码器形成去噪自编码器架构，联合学习机动控制与传感器输入去噪任务，实现对抗训练。
AI.result: 在500万张图像测试中，AutoJoin在抗扰性能提升最高达40%，干净数据性能提升300%，训练效率提升86%且减少90%训练数据。
AI.conclusion: AutoJoin通过联合学习机制显著提升了对抗扰动的鲁棒性与训练效率，为可靠控制系统提供了有效解决方案。
