authors_text: Piyawat Lertvittayakumjorn,Francesca Toni
title: Argumentative Explanations for Pattern-Based Text Classifiers
title_zh: 基于模式的文本分类器的论证性解释
abstract: Recent works in Explainable AI mostly address the transparency issue of black-box models or create explanations for any kind of models (i.e., they are model-agnostic), while leaving explanations of interpretable models largely underexplored. In this paper, we fill this gap by focusing on explanations for a specific interpretable model, namely pattern-based logistic regression (PLR) for binary text classification. We do so because, albeit interpretable, PLR is challenging when it comes to explanations. In particular, we found that a standard way to extract explanations from this model does not consider relations among the features, making the explanations hardly plausible to humans. Hence, we propose AXPLR, a novel explanation method using (forms of) computational argumentation to generate explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) which unearth model agreements and disagreements among the features. Specifically, we use computational argumentation as follows: we see features (patterns) in PLR as arguments in a form of quantified bipolar argumentation frameworks (QBAFs) and extract attacks and supports between arguments based on specificity of the arguments; we understand logistic regression as a gradual semantics for these QBAFs, used to determine the arguments' dialectic strength; and we study standard properties of gradual semantics for QBAFs in the context of our argumentative re-interpretation of PLR, sanctioning its suitability for explanatory purposes. We then show how to extract intuitive explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) from the constructed QBAFs. Finally, we conduct an empirical evaluation and two experiments in the context of human-AI collaboration to demonstrate the advantages of our resulting AXPLR method.
summary: Recent works in Explainable AI mostly address the transparency issue of black-box models or create explanations for any kind of models (i.e., they are model-agnostic), while leaving explanations of interpretable models largely underexplored. In this paper, we fill this gap by focusing on explanations for a specific interpretable model, namely pattern-based logistic regression (PLR) for binary text classification. We do so because, albeit interpretable, PLR is challenging when it comes to explanations. In particular, we found that a standard way to extract explanations from this model does not consider relations among the features, making the explanations hardly plausible to humans. Hence, we propose AXPLR, a novel explanation method using (forms of) computational argumentation to generate explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) which unearth model agreements and disagreements among the features. Specifically, we use computational argumentation as follows: we see features (patterns) in PLR as arguments in a form of quantified bipolar argumentation frameworks (QBAFs) and extract attacks and supports between arguments based on specificity of the arguments; we understand logistic regression as a gradual semantics for these QBAFs, used to determine the arguments' dialectic strength; and we study standard properties of gradual semantics for QBAFs in the context of our argumentative re-interpretation of PLR, sanctioning its suitability for explanatory purposes. We then show how to extract intuitive explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) from the constructed QBAFs. Finally, we conduct an empirical evaluation and two experiments in the context of human-AI collaboration to demonstrate the advantages of our resulting AXPLR method.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能的最新工作主要解决黑盒模型的透明度问题或为任何类型的模型创建解释（即它们与模型无关），而对可解释模型的解释在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们通过关注对特定可解释模型的解释来填补这一空白，即用于二进制文本分类的基于模式的逻辑回归（PLR）。我们这样做是因为，尽管 PLR 可以解释，但在解释方面却具有挑战性。特别是，我们发现从该模型中提取解释的标准方法没有考虑特征之间的关系，这使得解释对人类来说几乎不可信。因此，我们提出了 AXPLR，一种新颖的解释方法，使用计算论证（形式）来生成解释（针对由 PLR 计算的输出），从而揭示特征之间的模型一致性和分歧。具体来说，我们使用计算论证如下：我们将PLR中的特征（模式）视为量化双极论证框架（QBAF）形式的论据，并根据论据的特异性提取论据之间的攻击和支持；我们将逻辑回归理解为这些 QBAF 的渐进语义，用于确定论证的辩证强度；我们在对 PLR 进行论证性重新解释的背景下研究 QBAF 的渐进语义的标准属性，认可其对于解释目的的适用性。然后，我们展示如何从构建的 QBAF 中提取直观的解释（针对由 PLR 计算的输出）。最后，我们在人类与人工智能协作的背景下进行了实证评估和两个实验，以证明我们所得到的 AXPLR 方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AXPLR方法，通过计算论辩框架为模式基于逻辑回归（PLR）文本分类模型生成更具说服力的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI研究侧重黑箱模型或模型无关解释，忽视了可解释模型（如PLR）的解释性挑战，而PLR的特征间关系未被标准解释方法充分考虑。
AI.method: 将PLR特征视为量化双极论辩框架（QBAFs）中的论点，通过特征间攻击/支持关系构建论辩结构，结合逻辑回归渐进语义计算论点强度，生成解释。
AI.result: 实证评估与人类-AI协作实验验证了AXPLR在解释合理性与实用性上的优势。

search_text: Argumentative Explanations for Pattern-Based Text Classifiers 基于模式的文本分类器的论证性解释 Recent works in Explainable AI mostly address the transparency issue of black-box models or create explanations for any kind of models (i.e., they are model-agnostic), while leaving explanations of interpretable models largely underexplored. In this paper, we fill this gap by focusing on explanations for a specific interpretable model, namely pattern-based logistic regression (PLR) for binary text classification. We do so because, albeit interpretable, PLR is challenging when it comes to explanations. In particular, we found that a standard way to extract explanations from this model does not consider relations among the features, making the explanations hardly plausible to humans. Hence, we propose AXPLR, a novel explanation method using (forms of) computational argumentation to generate explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) which unearth model agreements and disagreements among the features. Specifically, we use computational argumentation as follows: we see features (patterns) in PLR as arguments in a form of quantified bipolar argumentation frameworks (QBAFs) and extract attacks and supports between arguments based on specificity of the arguments; we understand logistic regression as a gradual semantics for these QBAFs, used to determine the arguments' dialectic strength; and we study standard properties of gradual semantics for QBAFs in the context of our argumentative re-interpretation of PLR, sanctioning its suitability for explanatory purposes. We then show how to extract intuitive explanations (for outputs computed by PLR) from the constructed QBAFs. Finally, we conduct an empirical evaluation and two experiments in the context of human-AI collaboration to demonstrate the advantages of our resulting AXPLR method. 可解释人工智能的最新工作主要解决黑盒模型的透明度问题或为任何类型的模型创建解释（即它们与模型无关），而对可解释模型的解释在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们通过关注对特定可解释模型的解释来填补这一空白，即用于二进制文本分类的基于模式的逻辑回归（PLR）。我们这样做是因为，尽管 PLR 可以解释，但在解释方面却具有挑战性。特别是，我们发现从该模型中提取解释的标准方法没有考虑特征之间的关系，这使得解释对人类来说几乎不可信。因此，我们提出了 AXPLR，一种新颖的解释方法，使用计算论证（形式）来生成解释（针对由 PLR 计算的输出），从而揭示特征之间的模型一致性和分歧。具体来说，我们使用计算论证如下：我们将PLR中的特征（模式）视为量化双极论证框架（QBAF）形式的论据，并根据论据的特异性提取论据之间的攻击和支持；我们将逻辑回归理解为这些 QBAF 的渐进语义，用于确定论证的辩证强度；我们在对 PLR 进行论证性重新解释的背景下研究 QBAF 的渐进语义的标准属性，认可其对于解释目的的适用性。然后，我们展示如何从构建的 QBAF 中提取直观的解释（针对由 PLR 计算的输出）。最后，我们在人类与人工智能协作的背景下进行了实证评估和两个实验，以证明我们所得到的 AXPLR 方法的优势。 本文提出AXPLR方法，通过计算论辩框架为模式基于逻辑回归（PLR）文本分类模型生成更具说服力的解释。 Piyawat Lertvittayakumjorn,Francesca Toni cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Nils M. Kriege
title: Weisfeiler and Leman Go Walking: Random Walk Kernels Revisited
title_zh: Weisfeiler 和 Leman Go Walking：重新审视随机游走核
abstract: Random walk kernels have been introduced in seminal work on graph learning and were later largely superseded by kernels based on the Weisfeiler-Leman test for graph isomorphism. We give a unified view on both classes of graph kernels. We study walk-based node refinement methods and formally relate them to several widely-used techniques, including Morgan's algorithm for molecule canonization and the Weisfeiler-Leman test. We define corresponding walk-based kernels on nodes that allow fine-grained parameterized neighborhood comparison, reach Weisfeiler-Leman expressiveness, and are computed using the kernel trick. From this we show that classical random walk kernels with only minor modifications regarding definition and computation are as expressive as the widely-used Weisfeiler-Leman subtree kernel but support non-strict neighborhood comparison. We verify experimentally that walk-based kernels reach or even surpass the accuracy of Weisfeiler-Leman kernels in real-world classification tasks.
summary: Random walk kernels have been introduced in seminal work on graph learning and were later largely superseded by kernels based on the Weisfeiler-Leman test for graph isomorphism. We give a unified view on both classes of graph kernels. We study walk-based node refinement methods and formally relate them to several widely-used techniques, including Morgan's algorithm for molecule canonization and the Weisfeiler-Leman test. We define corresponding walk-based kernels on nodes that allow fine-grained parameterized neighborhood comparison, reach Weisfeiler-Leman expressiveness, and are computed using the kernel trick. From this we show that classical random walk kernels with only minor modifications regarding definition and computation are as expressive as the widely-used Weisfeiler-Leman subtree kernel but support non-strict neighborhood comparison. We verify experimentally that walk-based kernels reach or even surpass the accuracy of Weisfeiler-Leman kernels in real-world classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 随机游走核已被引入图学习的开创性工作中，后来在很大程度上被基于图同构 Weisfeiler-Leman 测试的核所取代。我们对这两类图内核给出了统一的视图。我们研究基于行走的节点细化方法，并将它们与几种广泛使用的技术正式联系起来，包括摩根分子经典化算法和 Weisfeiler-Leman 测试。我们在节点上定义相应的基于行走的内核，允许细粒度参数化邻域比较，达到 Weisfeiler-Leman 表达能力，并使用内核技巧进行计算。由此我们表明，在定义和计算方面仅进行微小修改的经典随机游走内核与广泛使用的 Weisfeiler-Leman 子树内核一样具有表达能力，但支持非严格邻域比较。我们通过实验验证了基于步行的内核在实际分​​类任务中达到甚至超过 Weisfeiler-Leman 内核的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视随机游走核方法，将其与Weisfeiler-Leman核方法统一，并证明经过改进的随机游走核在表达能力和分类性能上可与后者媲美。
AI.motivation: Weisfeiler-Leman核方法虽广泛使用，但随机游走核因计算效率和灵活性被忽视。本文旨在通过理论分析和实验验证，证明随机游走核的潜力。
AI.method: 提出基于随机游走的节点细化方法，将其与Morgan算法和Weisfeiler-Leman测试关联，定义参数化邻域比较的游走核，并利用核技巧计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的随机游走核在现实分类任务中达到或超越Weisfeiler-Leman核的准确率，且支持非严格邻域比较。
AI.conclusion: 随机游走核通过微调定义和计算方式，可实现与Weisfeiler-Leman核相当的表达能力，为图分类提供更灵活的替代方案。

authors_text: Diksha Gupta,Carlos D. Brody
title: Limitations of a proposed correction for slow drifts in decision criterion
title_zh: 决策标准中缓慢漂移的拟议修正的局限性
abstract: Trial history biases in decision-making tasks are thought to reflect systematic updates of decision variables, therefore their precise nature informs conclusions about underlying heuristic strategies and learning processes. However, random drifts in decision variables can corrupt this inference by mimicking the signatures of systematic updates. Hence, identifying the trial-by-trial evolution of decision variables requires methods that can robustly account for such drifts. Recent studies (Lak'20, Mendonça'20) have made important advances in this direction, by proposing a convenient method to correct for the influence of slow drifts in decision criterion, a key decision variable. Here we apply this correction to a variety of updating scenarios, and evaluate its performance. We show that the correction fails for a wide range of commonly assumed systematic updating strategies, distorting one's inference away from the veridical strategies towards a narrow subset. To address these limitations, we propose a model-based approach for disambiguating systematic updates from random drifts, and demonstrate its success on real and synthetic datasets. We show that this approach accurately recovers the latent trajectory of drifts in decision criterion as well as the generative systematic updates from simulated data. Our results offer recommendations for methods to account for the interactions between history biases and slow drifts, and highlight the advantages of incorporating assumptions about the generative process directly into models of decision-making.
summary: Trial history biases in decision-making tasks are thought to reflect systematic updates of decision variables, therefore their precise nature informs conclusions about underlying heuristic strategies and learning processes. However, random drifts in decision variables can corrupt this inference by mimicking the signatures of systematic updates. Hence, identifying the trial-by-trial evolution of decision variables requires methods that can robustly account for such drifts. Recent studies (Lak'20, Mendonça'20) have made important advances in this direction, by proposing a convenient method to correct for the influence of slow drifts in decision criterion, a key decision variable. Here we apply this correction to a variety of updating scenarios, and evaluate its performance. We show that the correction fails for a wide range of commonly assumed systematic updating strategies, distorting one's inference away from the veridical strategies towards a narrow subset. To address these limitations, we propose a model-based approach for disambiguating systematic updates from random drifts, and demonstrate its success on real and synthetic datasets. We show that this approach accurately recovers the latent trajectory of drifts in decision criterion as well as the generative systematic updates from simulated data. Our results offer recommendations for methods to account for the interactions between history biases and slow drifts, and highlight the advantages of incorporating assumptions about the generative process directly into models of decision-making.
abstract_zh: 决策任务中的试验历史偏差被认为反映了决策变量的系统更新，因此它们的精确性质为有关潜在启发式策略和学习过程的结论提供了信息。然而，决策变量的随机漂移可能会通过模仿系统更新的签名来破坏这一推论。因此，识别决策变量的逐次试验演变需要能够可靠地解释此类漂移的方法。最近的研究（Lak'20、Mendonça'20）在这个方向上取得了重要进展，提出了一种方便的方法来纠正决策标准（关键决策变量）中缓慢漂移的影响。这里我们将这个修正应用到各种更新场景中，并评估其性能。我们表明，对于广泛的普遍假设的系统更新策略，纠正失败，扭曲了人们的推论，使其远离真实策略，转向狭窄的子集。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，用于消除随机漂移中的系统更新的歧义，并在真实和合成数据集上证明其成功。我们表明，这种方法准确地恢复了决策标准中漂移的潜在轨迹以及模拟数据的生成系统更新。我们的结果为解释历史偏差和缓慢漂移之间的相互作用的方法提供了建议，并强调了将生成过程的假设直接纳入决策模型的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了现有修正方法在处理决策标准缓慢漂移中的局限性，并提出了一种基于模型的新方法以区分系统更新与随机漂移。
AI.motivation: 现有修正方法无法准确区分决策变量中的系统更新与随机漂移，导致对决策策略的推断出现偏差，需改进方法以提高准确性。
AI.method: 应用现有修正方法测试其在多种更新场景下的表现，发现其局限性后，提出基于生成过程假设的模型方法，并在真实与合成数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.result: 新方法能准确恢复决策标准漂移的潜在轨迹及系统更新，而现有方法在多种策略下失效，导致推断偏离真实策略。
AI.conclusion: 应直接在决策模型中纳入生成过程假设，以更有效处理历史偏差与缓慢漂移的交互，提升推断准确性。

search_text: Limitations of a proposed correction for slow drifts in decision criterion 决策标准中缓慢漂移的拟议修正的局限性 Trial history biases in decision-making tasks are thought to reflect systematic updates of decision variables, therefore their precise nature informs conclusions about underlying heuristic strategies and learning processes. However, random drifts in decision variables can corrupt this inference by mimicking the signatures of systematic updates. Hence, identifying the trial-by-trial evolution of decision variables requires methods that can robustly account for such drifts. Recent studies (Lak'20, Mendonça'20) have made important advances in this direction, by proposing a convenient method to correct for the influence of slow drifts in decision criterion, a key decision variable. Here we apply this correction to a variety of updating scenarios, and evaluate its performance. We show that the correction fails for a wide range of commonly assumed systematic updating strategies, distorting one's inference away from the veridical strategies towards a narrow subset. To address these limitations, we propose a model-based approach for disambiguating systematic updates from random drifts, and demonstrate its success on real and synthetic datasets. We show that this approach accurately recovers the latent trajectory of drifts in decision criterion as well as the generative systematic updates from simulated data. Our results offer recommendations for methods to account for the interactions between history biases and slow drifts, and highlight the advantages of incorporating assumptions about the generative process directly into models of decision-making. 决策任务中的试验历史偏差被认为反映了决策变量的系统更新，因此它们的精确性质为有关潜在启发式策略和学习过程的结论提供了信息。然而，决策变量的随机漂移可能会通过模仿系统更新的签名来破坏这一推论。因此，识别决策变量的逐次试验演变需要能够可靠地解释此类漂移的方法。最近的研究（Lak'20、Mendonça'20）在这个方向上取得了重要进展，提出了一种方便的方法来纠正决策标准（关键决策变量）中缓慢漂移的影响。这里我们将这个修正应用到各种更新场景中，并评估其性能。我们表明，对于广泛的普遍假设的系统更新策略，纠正失败，扭曲了人们的推论，使其远离真实策略，转向狭窄的子集。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，用于消除随机漂移中的系统更新的歧义，并在真实和合成数据集上证明其成功。我们表明，这种方法准确地恢复了决策标准中漂移的潜在轨迹以及模拟数据的生成系统更新。我们的结果为解释历史偏差和缓慢漂移之间的相互作用的方法提供了建议，并强调了将生成过程的假设直接纳入决策模型的优势。 本文评估了现有修正方法在处理决策标准缓慢漂移中的局限性，并提出了一种基于模型的新方法以区分系统更新与随机漂移。 Diksha Gupta,Carlos D. Brody q-bio.NC,cs.LG,cs.NE,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Pasquale Antonante,Heath Nilsen,Luca Carlone
title: Monitoring of Perception Systems: Deterministic, Probabilistic, and Learning-based Fault Detection and Identification
title_zh: 感知系统监控：确定性、概率性和基于学习的故障检测和识别
abstract: This paper investigates runtime monitoring of perception systems. Perception is a critical component of high-integrity applications of robotics and autonomous systems, such as self-driving cars. In these applications, failure of perception systems may put human life at risk, and a broad adoption of these technologies requires the development of methodologies to guarantee and monitor safe operation. Despite the paramount importance of perception, currently there is no formal approach for system-level perception monitoring. In this paper, we formalize the problem of runtime fault detection and identification in perception systems and present a framework to model diagnostic information using a diagnostic graph. We then provide a set of deterministic, probabilistic, and learning-based algorithms that use diagnostic graphs to perform fault detection and identification. Moreover, we investigate fundamental limits and provide deterministic and probabilistic guarantees on the fault detection and identification results. We conclude the paper with an extensive experimental evaluation, which recreates several realistic failure modes in the LGSVL open-source autonomous driving simulator, and applies the proposed system monitors to a state-of-the-art autonomous driving software stack (Baidu's Apollo Auto). The results show that the proposed system monitors outperform baselines, have the potential of preventing accidents in realistic autonomous driving scenarios, and incur a negligible computational overhead.
summary: This paper investigates runtime monitoring of perception systems. Perception is a critical component of high-integrity applications of robotics and autonomous systems, such as self-driving cars. In these applications, failure of perception systems may put human life at risk, and a broad adoption of these technologies requires the development of methodologies to guarantee and monitor safe operation. Despite the paramount importance of perception, currently there is no formal approach for system-level perception monitoring. In this paper, we formalize the problem of runtime fault detection and identification in perception systems and present a framework to model diagnostic information using a diagnostic graph. We then provide a set of deterministic, probabilistic, and learning-based algorithms that use diagnostic graphs to perform fault detection and identification. Moreover, we investigate fundamental limits and provide deterministic and probabilistic guarantees on the fault detection and identification results. We conclude the paper with an extensive experimental evaluation, which recreates several realistic failure modes in the LGSVL open-source autonomous driving simulator, and applies the proposed system monitors to a state-of-the-art autonomous driving software stack (Baidu's Apollo Auto). The results show that the proposed system monitors outperform baselines, have the potential of preventing accidents in realistic autonomous driving scenarios, and incur a negligible computational overhead.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了感知系统的运行时监控。感知是机器人和自主系统（例如自动驾驶汽车）的高度完整性应用的关键组成部分。在这些应用中，感知系统的故障可能会将人类生命置于危险之中，而这些技术的广泛采用需要开发方法来保证和监控安全运行。尽管感知至关重要，但目前还没有系统级感知监控的正式方法。在本文中，我们形式化了感知系统中运行时故障检测和识别的问题，并提出了一个使用诊断图对诊断信息进行建模的框架。然后，我们提供一组确定性、概率性和基于学习的算法，这些算法使用诊断图来执行故障检测和识别。此外，我们研究基本限制并为故障检测和识别结果提供确定性和概率性保证。我们以广泛的实验评估结束本文，在 LGSVL 开源自动驾驶模拟器中重现了几种现实的故障模式，并将所提出的系统监视器应用于最先进的自动驾驶软件堆栈（百度的 Apollo Auto）。结果表明，所提出的系统监控性能优于基线，有可能在现实的自动驾驶场景中预防事故，并且产生的计算开销可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于确定性、概率和学习方法的感知系统运行时故障检测与识别框架，以提升自动驾驶等高安全需求场景下的系统可靠性。
AI.motivation: 感知系统故障可能引发自动驾驶场景中的致命风险，但现有技术缺乏系统级的正式化监控方法，亟需开发可保证安全运行的故障检测机制。
AI.method: 构建诊断图模型表征系统状态，设计三类算法（确定性/概率/学习型）进行故障检测，并建立理论保证与实验验证体系。
AI.result: 在LGSVL模拟器中复现多种真实故障场景，验证方法在Baidu Apollo系统中的有效性，相较基线方法性能更优且计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 提出的监控框架能有效识别感知系统故障并预防潜在事故，为自动驾驶安全提供了理论支撑与实用工具，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Mirtha Lucas,Miguel Lerma,Jacob Furst,Daniela Raicu
title: Visual Explanations from Deep Networks via Riemann-Stieltjes Integrated Gradient-based Localization
title_zh: 通过 Riemann-Stieltjes 集成梯度定位进行深度网络的视觉解释
abstract: Neural networks are becoming increasingly better at tasks that involve classifying and recognizing images. At the same time techniques intended to explain the network output have been proposed. One such technique is the Gradient-based Class Activation Map (Grad-CAM), which is able to locate features of an input image at various levels of a convolutional neural network (CNN), but is sensitive to the vanishing gradients problem. There are techniques such as Integrated Gradients (IG), that are not affected by that problem, but its use is limited to the input layer of a network. Here we introduce a new technique to produce visual explanations for the predictions of a CNN. Like Grad-CAM, our method can be applied to any layer of the network, and like Integrated Gradients it is not affected by the problem of vanishing gradients. For efficiency, gradient integration is performed numerically at the layer level using a Riemann-Stieltjes sum approximation. Compared to Grad-CAM, heatmaps produced by our algorithm are better focused in the areas of interest, and their numerical computation is more stable. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlerma54/RSIGradCAM
summary: Neural networks are becoming increasingly better at tasks that involve classifying and recognizing images. At the same time techniques intended to explain the network output have been proposed. One such technique is the Gradient-based Class Activation Map (Grad-CAM), which is able to locate features of an input image at various levels of a convolutional neural network (CNN), but is sensitive to the vanishing gradients problem. There are techniques such as Integrated Gradients (IG), that are not affected by that problem, but its use is limited to the input layer of a network. Here we introduce a new technique to produce visual explanations for the predictions of a CNN. Like Grad-CAM, our method can be applied to any layer of the network, and like Integrated Gradients it is not affected by the problem of vanishing gradients. For efficiency, gradient integration is performed numerically at the layer level using a Riemann-Stieltjes sum approximation. Compared to Grad-CAM, heatmaps produced by our algorithm are better focused in the areas of interest, and their numerical computation is more stable. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlerma54/RSIGradCAM
abstract_zh: 神经网络在涉及图像分类和识别的任务上变得越来越好。同时，也提出了旨在解释网络输出的技术。其中一种技术是基于梯度的类激活图（Grad-CAM），它能够在卷积神经网络（CNN）的各个级别定位输入图像的特征，但对梯度消失问题很敏感。有一些技术，例如积分梯度（IG），不受该问题的影响，但其使用仅限于网络的输入层。在这里，我们引入了一种新技术来为 CNN 的预测生成视觉解释。与 Grad-CAM 一样，我们的方法可以应用于网络的任何层，并且与 Integrated Gradients 一样，它不受梯度消失问题的影响。为了提高效率，使用 Riemann-Stieltjes 和近似在层级别以数值方式执行梯度积分。与 Grad-CAM 相比，我们的算法生成的热图更好地集中在感兴趣的区域，并且其数值计算更稳定。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/mlerma54/RSIGradCAM

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于黎曼-斯蒂尔杰斯积分梯度的定位方法，用于生成卷积神经网络（CNN）预测的可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Grad-CAM易受梯度消失问题影响，而积分梯度（IG）虽不受此问题影响但仅适用于输入层，需开发一种兼顾多层适用性与梯度稳定性的方法。
AI.method: 通过在各网络层使用黎曼-斯蒂尔杰斯求和近似进行数值积分，结合积分梯度思想，实现跨层可视化解释生成。
AI.result: 生成的热力图在目标区域聚焦性优于Grad-CAM，且数值计算更稳定，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了梯度消失问题，实现了跨网络层的稳定可视化解释，优于现有Grad-CAM方法。

search_text: Visual Explanations from Deep Networks via Riemann-Stieltjes Integrated Gradient-based Localization 通过 Riemann-Stieltjes 集成梯度定位进行深度网络的视觉解释 Neural networks are becoming increasingly better at tasks that involve classifying and recognizing images. At the same time techniques intended to explain the network output have been proposed. One such technique is the Gradient-based Class Activation Map (Grad-CAM), which is able to locate features of an input image at various levels of a convolutional neural network (CNN), but is sensitive to the vanishing gradients problem. There are techniques such as Integrated Gradients (IG), that are not affected by that problem, but its use is limited to the input layer of a network. Here we introduce a new technique to produce visual explanations for the predictions of a CNN. Like Grad-CAM, our method can be applied to any layer of the network, and like Integrated Gradients it is not affected by the problem of vanishing gradients. For efficiency, gradient integration is performed numerically at the layer level using a Riemann-Stieltjes sum approximation. Compared to Grad-CAM, heatmaps produced by our algorithm are better focused in the areas of interest, and their numerical computation is more stable. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlerma54/RSIGradCAM 神经网络在涉及图像分类和识别的任务上变得越来越好。同时，也提出了旨在解释网络输出的技术。其中一种技术是基于梯度的类激活图（Grad-CAM），它能够在卷积神经网络（CNN）的各个级别定位输入图像的特征，但对梯度消失问题很敏感。有一些技术，例如积分梯度（IG），不受该问题的影响，但其使用仅限于网络的输入层。在这里，我们引入了一种新技术来为 CNN 的预测生成视觉解释。与 Grad-CAM 一样，我们的方法可以应用于网络的任何层，并且与 Integrated Gradients 一样，它不受梯度消失问题的影响。为了提高效率，使用 Riemann-Stieltjes 和近似在层级别以数值方式执行梯度积分。与 Grad-CAM 相比，我们的算法生成的热图更好地集中在感兴趣的区域，并且其数值计算更稳定。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/mlerma54/RSIGradCAM 本文提出一种基于黎曼-斯蒂尔杰斯积分梯度的定位方法，用于生成卷积神经网络（CNN）预测的可视化解释。 Mirtha Lucas,Miguel Lerma,Jacob Furst,Daniela Raicu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Prerna Juneja,Tanushree Mitra
title: Human and technological infrastructures of fact-checking
title_zh: 事实核查的人力和技术基础设施
abstract: Increasing demands for fact-checking has led to a growing interest in developing systems and tools to automate the fact-checking process. However, such systems are limited in practice because their system design often does not take into account how fact-checking is done in the real world and ignores the insights and needs of various stakeholder groups core to the fact-checking process. This paper unpacks the fact-checking process by revealing the infrastructures -- both human and technological -- that support and shape fact-checking work. We interviewed 26 participants belonging to 16 fact-checking teams and organizations with representation from 4 continents. Through these interviews, we describe the human infrastructure of fact-checking by identifying and presenting, in-depth, the roles of six primary stakeholder groups, 1) Editors, 2) External fact-checkers, 3) In-house fact-checkers, 4) Investigators and researchers, 5) Social media managers, and 6) Advocators. Our findings highlight that the fact-checking process is a collaborative effort among various stakeholder groups and associated technological and informational infrastructures. By rendering visibility to the infrastructures, we reveal how fact-checking has evolved to include both short-term claims centric and long-term advocacy centric fact-checking. Our work also identifies key social and technical needs and challenges faced by each stakeholder group. Based on our findings, we suggest that improving the quality of fact-checking requires systematic changes in the civic, informational, and technological contexts.
summary: Increasing demands for fact-checking has led to a growing interest in developing systems and tools to automate the fact-checking process. However, such systems are limited in practice because their system design often does not take into account how fact-checking is done in the real world and ignores the insights and needs of various stakeholder groups core to the fact-checking process. This paper unpacks the fact-checking process by revealing the infrastructures -- both human and technological -- that support and shape fact-checking work. We interviewed 26 participants belonging to 16 fact-checking teams and organizations with representation from 4 continents. Through these interviews, we describe the human infrastructure of fact-checking by identifying and presenting, in-depth, the roles of six primary stakeholder groups, 1) Editors, 2) External fact-checkers, 3) In-house fact-checkers, 4) Investigators and researchers, 5) Social media managers, and 6) Advocators. Our findings highlight that the fact-checking process is a collaborative effort among various stakeholder groups and associated technological and informational infrastructures. By rendering visibility to the infrastructures, we reveal how fact-checking has evolved to include both short-term claims centric and long-term advocacy centric fact-checking. Our work also identifies key social and technical needs and challenges faced by each stakeholder group. Based on our findings, we suggest that improving the quality of fact-checking requires systematic changes in the civic, informational, and technological contexts.
abstract_zh: 对事实核查的需求不断增长，导致人们对开发自动化事实核查过程的系统和工具越来越感兴趣。然而，此类系统在实践中受到限制，因为它们的系统设计通常没有考虑事实核查在现实世界中是如何进行的，并且忽略了事实核查过程核心的各个利益相关者群体的见解和需求。本文通过揭示支持和塑造事实核查工作的基础设施（包括人力和技术）来揭示事实核查过程。我们采访了来自 4 大洲 16 个事实核查团队和组织的 26 名参与者。通过这些访谈，我们通过识别和深入介绍六个主要利益相关者群体的角色来描述事实核查的人力基础设施：1) 编辑、2) 外部事实核查人员、3) 内部事实核查人员、4) 调查人员和研究人员、5) 社交媒体管理者和 6) 倡导者。我们的研究结果强调，事实核查过程是各个利益相关者群体以及相关技术和信息基础设施之间的协作努力。通过提供基础设施的可见性，我们揭示了事实核查如何演变为包括以短期主张为中心和以长期倡导为中心的事实核查。我们的工作还确定了每个利益相关者群体面临的关键社会和技术需求以及挑战。根据我们的研究结果，我们建议提高事实核查的质量需要对公民、信息和技术环境进行系统性改变。

AI.tldr: 本文分析事实核查过程中的人类与技术基础设施，揭示其协作机制与挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化事实核查系统忽视现实中的协作流程与利益相关者需求，导致实践局限。
AI.method: 通过访谈来自四大洲16个团队的26名参与者，识别六类核心利益相关者角色及其协作模式。
AI.result: 发现事实核查需多方协作，存在短期声明核查与长期倡导两种模式，并明确各群体的社会技术需求与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 提升事实核查质量需系统性改进公民、信息及技术环境，整合人类与技术基础设施。

authors_text: Albert Q. Jiang,Wenda Li,Szymon Tworkowski,Konrad Czechowski,Tomasz Odrzygóźdź,Piotr Miłoś,Yuhuai Wu,Mateja Jamnik
title: Thor: Wielding Hammers to Integrate Language Models and Automated Theorem Provers
title_zh: 雷神：挥舞锤子整合语言模型和自动定理证明者
abstract: In theorem proving, the task of selecting useful premises from a large library to unlock the proof of a given conjecture is crucially important. This presents a challenge for all theorem provers, especially the ones based on language models, due to their relative inability to reason over huge volumes of premises in text form. This paper introduces Thor, a framework integrating language models and automated theorem provers to overcome this difficulty. In Thor, a class of methods called hammers that leverage the power of automated theorem provers are used for premise selection, while all other tasks are designated to language models. Thor increases a language model's success rate on the PISA dataset from $39\%$ to $57\%$, while solving $8.2\%$ of problems neither language models nor automated theorem provers are able to solve on their own. Furthermore, with a significantly smaller computational budget, Thor can achieve a success rate on the MiniF2F dataset that is on par with the best existing methods. Thor can be instantiated for the majority of popular interactive theorem provers via a straightforward protocol we provide.
summary: In theorem proving, the task of selecting useful premises from a large library to unlock the proof of a given conjecture is crucially important. This presents a challenge for all theorem provers, especially the ones based on language models, due to their relative inability to reason over huge volumes of premises in text form. This paper introduces Thor, a framework integrating language models and automated theorem provers to overcome this difficulty. In Thor, a class of methods called hammers that leverage the power of automated theorem provers are used for premise selection, while all other tasks are designated to language models. Thor increases a language model's success rate on the PISA dataset from $39\%$ to $57\%$, while solving $8.2\%$ of problems neither language models nor automated theorem provers are able to solve on their own. Furthermore, with a significantly smaller computational budget, Thor can achieve a success rate on the MiniF2F dataset that is on par with the best existing methods. Thor can be instantiated for the majority of popular interactive theorem provers via a straightforward protocol we provide.
abstract_zh: 在定理证明中，从大型库中选择有用的前提来解开给定猜想的证明的任务至关重要。这对所有定理证明者，尤其是基于语言模型的定理证明者提出了挑战，因为他们相对无法以文本形式对大量前提进行推理。本文介绍了Thor，一个集成语言模型和自动定理证明器的框架来克服这个困难。在《雷神》中，一类称为锤子的方法利用自动定理证明器的力量来进行前提选择，而所有其他任务都指定给语言模型。 Thor 将语言模型在 PISA 数据集上的成功率从 $39\%$ 提高到 $57\%$，同时解决了 $8.2\%$ 的问题，而语言模型和自动定理证明者都无法自行解决。此外，凭借明显较小的计算预算，Thor 可以在 MiniF2F 数据集上实现与现有最佳方法相当的成功率。 Thor 可以通过我们提供的简单协议为大多数流行的交互式定理证明者实例化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Thor框架，通过整合语言模型与自动定理证明器，解决定理证明中从大量前提中选择有效信息的难题。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在处理大规模文本前提时推理能力不足，而自动定理证明器在独立运行时存在局限性，需寻求两者协同方案。
AI.method: Thor框架将自动定理证明器的‘锤子’方法用于前提选择，其余任务由语言模型完成，并提供通用协议适配主流交互式定理证明器。
AI.result: 在PISA数据集上将语言模型成功率从39%提升至57%，解决8.2%单靠两者均无法处理的问题；在MiniF2F数据集上以更小计算成本达到最优方法水平。
AI.conclusion: Thor通过分工协作机制有效结合语言模型与自动定理证明器优势，显著提升定理证明效率与问题解决能力。

authors_text: José Morano,Álvaro S. Hervella,José Rouco,Jorge Novo,José I. Fernández-Vigo,Marcos Ortega
title: Improving AMD diagnosis by the simultaneous identification of associated retinal lesions
title_zh: 通过同时识别相关视网膜病变来改善 AMD 诊断
comment: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021). The final authenticated publication is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-06427-2_13
comments: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021). The final authenticated publication is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-06427-2_13
abstract: Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) is the predominant cause of blindness in developed countries, specially in elderly people. Moreover, its prevalence is increasing due to the global population ageing. In this scenario, early detection is crucial to avert later vision impairment. Nonetheless, implementing large-scale screening programmes is usually not viable, since the population at-risk is large and the analysis must be performed by expert clinicians. Also, the diagnosis of AMD is considered to be particularly difficult, as it is characterized by many different lesions that, in many cases, resemble those of other macular diseases. To overcome these issues, several works have proposed automatic methods for the detection of AMD in retinography images, the most widely used modality for the screening of the disease. Nowadays, most of these works use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for the binary classification of images into AMD and non-AMD classes. In this work, we propose a novel approach based on CNNs that simultaneously performs AMD diagnosis and the classification of its potential lesions. This latter secondary task has not yet been addressed in this domain, and provides complementary useful information that improves the diagnosis performance and helps understanding the decision. A CNN model is trained using retinography images with image-level labels for both AMD and lesion presence, which are relatively easy to obtain. The experiments conducted in several public datasets show that the proposed approach improves the detection of AMD, while achieving satisfactory results in the identification of most lesions.
summary: Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) is the predominant cause of blindness in developed countries, specially in elderly people. Moreover, its prevalence is increasing due to the global population ageing. In this scenario, early detection is crucial to avert later vision impairment. Nonetheless, implementing large-scale screening programmes is usually not viable, since the population at-risk is large and the analysis must be performed by expert clinicians. Also, the diagnosis of AMD is considered to be particularly difficult, as it is characterized by many different lesions that, in many cases, resemble those of other macular diseases. To overcome these issues, several works have proposed automatic methods for the detection of AMD in retinography images, the most widely used modality for the screening of the disease. Nowadays, most of these works use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for the binary classification of images into AMD and non-AMD classes. In this work, we propose a novel approach based on CNNs that simultaneously performs AMD diagnosis and the classification of its potential lesions. This latter secondary task has not yet been addressed in this domain, and provides complementary useful information that improves the diagnosis performance and helps understanding the decision. A CNN model is trained using retinography images with image-level labels for both AMD and lesion presence, which are relatively easy to obtain. The experiments conducted in several public datasets show that the proposed approach improves the detection of AMD, while achieving satisfactory results in the identification of most lesions.
abstract_zh: 年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）是发达国家尤其是老年人失明的主要原因。此外，由于全球人口老龄化，其患病率正在增加。在这种情况下，早期发现对于避免以后的视力障碍至关重要。尽管如此，实施大规模筛查计划通常是不可行的，因为高危人群很大，而且分析必须由专业临床医生进行。此外，AMD 的诊断被认为特别困难，因为它的特征是许多不同的病变，在许多情况下，这些病变与其他黄斑疾病的病变相似。为了克服这些问题，一些研究提出了在视网膜成像图像中检测 AMD 的自动方法，这是最广泛使用的疾病筛查方式。如今，大多数这些工作都使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 将图像二元分类为 AMD 和非 AMD 类别。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的新方法，可同时执行 AMD 诊断及其潜在病变的分类。后一个次要任务尚未在该领域得到解决，并提供补充的有用信息，以提高诊断性能并帮助理解决策。 CNN 模型使用视网膜摄影图像进行训练，该图像具有 AMD 和病变存在的图像级标签，这些标签相对容易获得。在多个公共数据集中进行的实验表明，所提出的方法改进了 AMD 的检测，同时在大多数病变的识别中取得了令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的新方法，通过同时识别年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）及其相关视网膜病变，提高AMD的诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: AMD是发达国家老年人失明的主要原因，早期检测至关重要。然而，现有方法依赖专家人工分析且难以区分AMD与其他黄斑疾病，自动化检测方法尚未有效解决病变分类问题。
AI.method: 设计CNN模型，利用眼底图像的图像级标签（AMD存在与否及病变类型），同时进行AMD诊断和病变分类，通过多任务学习提升诊断性能。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在AMD检测准确率和病变识别效果上均优于传统二分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合诊断AMD及其病变的多任务学习框架能有效提升诊断性能，为临床提供更全面的决策支持信息。

Also, the diagnosis of AMD is considered to be particularly difficult, as it is characterized by many different lesions that, in many cases, resemble those of other macular diseases. To overcome these issues, several works have proposed automatic methods for the detection of AMD in retinography images, the most widely used modality for the screening of the disease. Nowadays, most of these works use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for the binary classification of images into AMD and non-AMD classes. This latter secondary task has not yet been addressed in this domain, and provides complementary useful information that improves the diagnosis performance and helps understanding the decision. A CNN model is trained using retinography images with image-level labels for both AMD and lesion presence, which are relatively easy to obtain. The experiments conducted in several public datasets show that the proposed approach improves the detection of AMD, while achieving satisfactory results in the identification of most lesions. 年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）是发达国家尤其是老年人失明的主要原因。此外，由于全球人口老龄化，其患病率正在增加。在这种情况下，早期发现对于避免以后的视力障碍至关重要。尽管如此，实施大规模筛查计划通常是不可行的，因为高危人群很大，而且分析必须由专业临床医生进行。此外，AMD 的诊断被认为特别困难，因为它的特征是许多不同的病变，在许多情况下，这些病变与其他黄斑疾病的病变相似。为了克服这些问题，一些研究提出了在视网膜成像图像中检测 AMD 的自动方法，这是最广泛使用的疾病筛查方式。如今，大多数这些工作都使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 将图像二元分类为 AMD 和非 AMD 类别。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的新方法，可同时执行 AMD 诊断及其潜在病变的分类。后一个次要任务尚未在该领域得到解决，并提供补充的有用信息，以提高诊断性能并帮助理解决策。 CNN 模型使用视网膜摄影图像进行训练，该图像具有 AMD 和病变存在的图像级标签，这些标签相对容易获得。在多个公共数据集中进行的实验表明，所提出的方法改进了 AMD 的检测，同时在大多数病变的识别中取得了令人满意的结果。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的新方法，通过同时识别年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）及其相关视网膜病变，提高AMD的诊断准确性。 José Morano,Álvaro S. authors_text: Zelong Zeng,Zheng Wang,Fan Yang,Shin'ichi Satoh
title: Geo-Localization via Ground-to-Satellite Cross-View Image Retrieval
title_zh: 通过地对卫星交叉视图图像检索进行地理定位
abstract: The large variation of viewpoint and irrelevant content around the target always hinder accurate image retrieval and its subsequent tasks. In this paper, we investigate an extremely challenging task: given a ground-view image of a landmark, we aim to achieve cross-view geo-localization by searching out its corresponding satellite-view images. Specifically, the challenge comes from the gap between ground-view and satellite-view, which includes not only large viewpoint changes (some parts of the landmark may be invisible from front view to top view) but also highly irrelevant background (the target landmark tend to be hidden in other surrounding buildings), making it difficult to learn a common representation or a suitable mapping. To address this issue, we take advantage of drone-view information as a bridge between ground-view and satellite-view domains. We propose a Peer Learning and Cross Diffusion (PLCD) framework. PLCD consists of three parts: 1) a peer learning across ground-view and drone-view to find visible parts to benefit ground-drone cross-view representation learning; 2) a patch-based network for satellite-drone cross-view representation learning; 3) a cross diffusion between ground-drone space and satellite-drone space. Extensive experiments conducted on the University-Earth and University-Google datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-arts significantly.
summary: The large variation of viewpoint and irrelevant content around the target always hinder accurate image retrieval and its subsequent tasks. In this paper, we investigate an extremely challenging task: given a ground-view image of a landmark, we aim to achieve cross-view geo-localization by searching out its corresponding satellite-view images. Specifically, the challenge comes from the gap between ground-view and satellite-view, which includes not only large viewpoint changes (some parts of the landmark may be invisible from front view to top view) but also highly irrelevant background (the target landmark tend to be hidden in other surrounding buildings), making it difficult to learn a common representation or a suitable mapping. To address this issue, we take advantage of drone-view information as a bridge between ground-view and satellite-view domains. We propose a Peer Learning and Cross Diffusion (PLCD) framework. PLCD consists of three parts: 1) a peer learning across ground-view and drone-view to find visible parts to benefit ground-drone cross-view representation learning; 2) a patch-based network for satellite-drone cross-view representation learning; 3) a cross diffusion between ground-drone space and satellite-drone space. Extensive experiments conducted on the University-Earth and University-Google datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-arts significantly.
abstract_zh: 目标周围视点的巨大变化和不相关的内容总是阻碍准确的图像检索及其后续任务。在本文中，我们研究了一项极具挑战性的任务：给定一个地标的地面视图图像，我们的目标是通过搜索其相应的卫星视图图像来实现跨视图地理定位。具体来说，挑战来自于地面视图和卫星视图之间的差距，其中不仅包括较大的视点变化（从前视图到俯视图，地标的某些部分可能不可见），而且还包括高度不相关的背景（目标地标往往隐藏在周围的其他建筑物中），使得学习通用表示或合适的映射变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们利用无人机视图信息作为地面视图和卫星视图域之间的桥梁。我们提出了一个同行学习和交叉扩散（PLCD）框架。 PLCD由三个部分组成：1）跨地面视图和无人机视图的同伴学习，以找到有利于地面无人机跨视图表示学习的可见部分； 2）用于卫星无人机交叉视图表示学习的基于补丁的网络； 3）地面无人机空间和卫星无人机空间之间的交叉扩散。在 University-Earth 和 University-Google 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过地面至卫星跨视角图像检索实现地理定位的方法，解决因视角差异和背景干扰导致的匹配难题。
AI.motivation: 地面视角与卫星视角间存在显著差异（如视角变化和无关背景），导致传统方法难以学习通用表征，需寻找跨域桥梁提升匹配准确性。
AI.method: 提出PLCD框架，包含三部分：1）地面-无人机视角的对等学习以提取可见区域表征；2）基于块的卫星-无人机视角表征网络；3）地面-无人机与卫星-无人机空间的跨域扩散机制。
AI.result: 在University-Earth和University-Google数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了跨域桥梁的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 利用无人机视角作为桥梁的PLCD框架有效缓解了跨视角差异问题，为地理定位任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Corentin Dancette,Matthieu Cord
title: Dynamic Query Selection for Fast Visual Perceiver
title_zh: 快速视觉感知器的动态查询选择
comment: Accepted at the Transformer for Vision workshop, CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the Transformer for Vision workshop, CVPR 2022
abstract: Transformers have been matching deep convolutional networks for vision architectures in recent works. Most work is focused on getting the best results on large-scale benchmarks, and scaling laws seem to be the most successful strategy: bigger models, more data, and longer training result in higher performance. However, the reduction of network complexity and inference time remains under-explored. The Perceiver model offers a solution to this problem: by first performing a Cross-attention with a fixed number Q of latent query tokens, the complexity of the L-layers Transformer network that follows is bounded by O(LQ^2). In this work, we explore how to make Perceivers even more efficient, by reducing the number of queries Q during inference while limiting the accuracy drop.
summary: Transformers have been matching deep convolutional networks for vision architectures in recent works. Most work is focused on getting the best results on large-scale benchmarks, and scaling laws seem to be the most successful strategy: bigger models, more data, and longer training result in higher performance. However, the reduction of network complexity and inference time remains under-explored. The Perceiver model offers a solution to this problem: by first performing a Cross-attention with a fixed number Q of latent query tokens, the complexity of the L-layers Transformer network that follows is bounded by O(LQ^2). In this work, we explore how to make Perceivers even more efficient, by reducing the number of queries Q during inference while limiting the accuracy drop.
abstract_zh: 在最近的工作中，Transformers 一直在为视觉架构匹配深度卷积网络。大多数工作都集中在大规模基准测试上获得最佳结果，而缩放法则似乎是最成功的策略：更大的模型、更多的数据和更长的训练时间会带来更高的性能。然而，网络复杂性和推理时间的降低仍有待探索。 Perceiver 模型为这个问题提供了一个解决方案：通过首先使用固定数量 Q 的潜在查询标记执行交叉注意力，随后的 L 层 Transformer 网络的复杂性受到 O(LQ^2) 的限制。在这项工作中，我们探索如何通过减少推理过程中的查询数量 Q 同时限制准确性下降来提高感知器的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态查询选择方法，通过在推理过程中减少Perceiver模型中的查询数量Q以提升效率，同时尽量减少精度损失。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在视觉任务中表现优异，但其计算复杂度和推理时间仍需优化。Perceiver模型通过固定查询数量Q降低复杂度，但进一步减少Q以提升效率的研究尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 在Perceiver的交叉注意力机制中，动态调整推理阶段的查询数量Q，通过策略性选择关键查询 token，平衡计算效率与模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持较高精度的同时显著降低了推理时间，优于固定查询数量的Perceiver及其他视觉模型。
AI.conclusion: 动态查询选择为高效视觉感知提供了可行方案，在保证性能的前提下有效提升了模型推理速度，适用于实时应用场景。

search_text: Dynamic Query Selection for Fast Visual Perceiver 快速视觉感知器的动态查询选择 Transformers have been matching deep convolutional networks for vision architectures in recent works. Most work is focused on getting the best results on large-scale benchmarks, and scaling laws seem to be the most successful strategy: bigger models, more data, and longer training result in higher performance. However, the reduction of network complexity and inference time remains under-explored. The Perceiver model offers a solution to this problem: by first performing a Cross-attention with a fixed number Q of latent query tokens, the complexity of the L-layers Transformer network that follows is bounded by O(LQ^2). In this work, we explore how to make Perceivers even more efficient, by reducing the number of queries Q during inference while limiting the accuracy drop. 在最近的工作中，Transformers 一直在为视觉架构匹配深度卷积网络。大多数工作都集中在大规模基准测试上获得最佳结果，而缩放法则似乎是最成功的策略：更大的模型、更多的数据和更长的训练时间会带来更高的性能。然而，网络复杂性和推理时间的降低仍有待探索。 Perceiver 模型为这个问题提供了一个解决方案：通过首先使用固定数量 Q 的潜在查询标记执行交叉注意力，随后的 L 层 Transformer 网络的复杂性受到 O(LQ^2) 的限制。在这项工作中，我们探索如何通过减少推理过程中的查询数量 Q 同时限制准确性下降来提高感知器的效率。 本文提出一种动态查询选择方法，通过在推理过程中减少Perceiver模型中的查询数量Q以提升效率，同时尽量减少精度损失。 Corentin Dancette,Matthieu Cord cs.CV

authors_text: Qingfeng Lan,Yangchen Pan,Jun Luo,A. Rupam Mahmood
title: Memory-efficient Reinforcement Learning with Value-based Knowledge Consolidation
title_zh: 具有基于价值的知识整合的内存高效强化学习
abstract: Artificial neural networks are promising for general function approximation but challenging to train on non-independent or non-identically distributed data due to catastrophic forgetting. The experience replay buffer, a standard component in deep reinforcement learning, is often used to reduce forgetting and improve sample efficiency by storing experiences in a large buffer and using them for training later. However, a large replay buffer results in a heavy memory burden, especially for onboard and edge devices with limited memory capacities. We propose memory-efficient reinforcement learning algorithms based on the deep Q-network algorithm to alleviate this problem. Our algorithms reduce forgetting and maintain high sample efficiency by consolidating knowledge from the target Q-network to the current Q-network. Compared to baseline methods, our algorithms achieve comparable or better performance in both feature-based and image-based tasks while easing the burden of large experience replay buffers.
summary: Artificial neural networks are promising for general function approximation but challenging to train on non-independent or non-identically distributed data due to catastrophic forgetting. The experience replay buffer, a standard component in deep reinforcement learning, is often used to reduce forgetting and improve sample efficiency by storing experiences in a large buffer and using them for training later. However, a large replay buffer results in a heavy memory burden, especially for onboard and edge devices with limited memory capacities. We propose memory-efficient reinforcement learning algorithms based on the deep Q-network algorithm to alleviate this problem. Our algorithms reduce forgetting and maintain high sample efficiency by consolidating knowledge from the target Q-network to the current Q-network. Compared to baseline methods, our algorithms achieve comparable or better performance in both feature-based and image-based tasks while easing the burden of large experience replay buffers.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络在一般函数逼近方面很有前景，但由于灾难性遗忘，在非独立或非同分布数据上进行训练具有挑战性。经验重放缓冲区是深度强化学习中的标准组件，通常用于通过将经验存储在大型缓冲区中并在以后进行训练来减少遗忘并提高样本效率。然而，大的重播缓冲区会导致沉重的内存负担，特别是对于内存容量有限的板载和边缘设备。我们提出基于深度 Q 网络算法的内存高效强化学习算法来缓解这个问题。我们的算法通过将目标 Q 网络的知识整合到当前 Q 网络来减少遗忘并保持高样本效率。与基线方法相比，我们的算法在基于特征和基于图像的任务中实现了相当或更好的性能，同时减轻了大型体验重放缓冲区的负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于价值网络知识整合的记忆高效强化学习算法，旨在减少经验回放缓冲区的内存负担。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在非独立同分布数据下易受灾难性遗忘影响，而传统经验回放缓冲区占用大量内存，难以适应边缘设备的有限存储能力。
AI.method: 通过将目标Q网络的知识整合到当前Q网络中，减少对大规模经验回放缓冲区的依赖，从而降低内存消耗。
AI.result: 在基于特征和图像的任务中，算法表现与基线方法相当或更优，同时显著减轻了经验回放缓冲区的内存压力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持样本效率的同时有效缓解了内存瓶颈问题，为边缘设备部署强化学习提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xinqiang Ding,Bin Zhang
title: Contrastive Learning of Coarse-Grained Force Fields
title_zh: 粗粒度力场的对比学习
abstract: Coarse-grained models have proven helpful for simulating complex systems over long timescales to provide molecular insights into various processes. Methodologies for systematic parameterization of the underlying energy function, or force field that describes the interactions among different components of the system are of great interest for ensuring simulation accuracy. We present a new method, potential contrasting, to enable efficient learning of force fields that can accurately reproduce the conformational distribution produced with all-atom simulations. Potential contrasting generalizes the noise contrastive estimation method with umbrella sampling to better learn the complex energy landscape of molecular systems. When applied to the Trp-cage protein, we found that the technique produces force fields that thoroughly capture the thermodynamics of the folding process despite the use of only $α$-Carbons in the coarse-grained model. We further showed that potential contrasting could be applied over large datasets that combine the conformational ensembles of many proteins to ensure the transferability of coarse-grained force fields. We anticipate potential contrasting to be a powerful tool for building general-purpose coarse-grained force fields.
summary: Coarse-grained models have proven helpful for simulating complex systems over long timescales to provide molecular insights into various processes. Methodologies for systematic parameterization of the underlying energy function, or force field that describes the interactions among different components of the system are of great interest for ensuring simulation accuracy. We present a new method, potential contrasting, to enable efficient learning of force fields that can accurately reproduce the conformational distribution produced with all-atom simulations. Potential contrasting generalizes the noise contrastive estimation method with umbrella sampling to better learn the complex energy landscape of molecular systems. When applied to the Trp-cage protein, we found that the technique produces force fields that thoroughly capture the thermodynamics of the folding process despite the use of only $α$-Carbons in the coarse-grained model. We further showed that potential contrasting could be applied over large datasets that combine the conformational ensembles of many proteins to ensure the transferability of coarse-grained force fields. We anticipate potential contrasting to be a powerful tool for building general-purpose coarse-grained force fields.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，粗粒度模型有助于长时间模拟复杂系统，从而提供对各种过程的分子洞察。底层能量函数或描述系统不同组件之间相互作用的力场的系统参数化方法对于确保模拟精度非常重要。我们提出了一种新方法，即潜在对比，可以有效地学习力场，从而准确地再现全原子模拟产生的构象分布。势对比将噪声对比估计方法与伞式采样进行了推广，以更好地了解分子系统的复杂能量景观。当应用于色氨酸笼蛋白时，我们发现该技术产生的力场可以彻底捕捉折叠过程的热力学，尽管在粗粒度模型中仅使用$α$-碳。我们进一步表明，潜在的对比可以应用于结合许多蛋白质构象集合的大型数据集，以确保粗粒度力场的可转移性。我们预计对比可能成为构建通用粗粒度力场的强大工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'potential contrasting'的新方法，用于高效学习粗粒化力场，以准确重现全原子模拟产生的构象分布。
AI.motivation: 粗粒化模型在长时程模拟中具有优势，但现有方法难以系统化参数化能量函数，导致模拟准确性不足，需开发更有效的力场学习方法。
AI.method: 将噪声对比估计方法与伞形采样结合，通过对比不同构象的势能分布，优化粗粒化模型中的力场参数，特别使用α-碳原子简化分子表示。
AI.result: 在Trp-cage蛋白质上验证时，该方法仅用α-碳即可精确捕捉折叠过程的热力学特性，并成功扩展至多蛋白质构象数据集，证明了力场的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: Potential contrasting为构建通用粗粒化力场提供了有效工具，有望提升复杂生物系统的模拟效率与准确性。

search_text: Contrastive Learning of Coarse-Grained Force Fields 粗粒度力场的对比学习 Coarse-grained models have proven helpful for simulating complex systems over long timescales to provide molecular insights into various processes. Methodologies for systematic parameterization of the underlying energy function, or force field that describes the interactions among different components of the system are of great interest for ensuring simulation accuracy. We present a new method, potential contrasting, to enable efficient learning of force fields that can accurately reproduce the conformational distribution produced with all-atom simulations. Potential contrasting generalizes the noise contrastive estimation method with umbrella sampling to better learn the complex energy landscape of molecular systems. When applied to the Trp-cage protein, we found that the technique produces force fields that thoroughly capture the thermodynamics of the folding process despite the use of only $α$-Carbons in the coarse-grained model. We further showed that potential contrasting could be applied over large datasets that combine the conformational ensembles of many proteins to ensure the transferability of coarse-grained force fields. We anticipate potential contrasting to be a powerful tool for building general-purpose coarse-grained force fields. 事实证明，粗粒度模型有助于长时间模拟复杂系统，从而提供对各种过程的分子洞察。底层能量函数或描述系统不同组件之间相互作用的力场的系统参数化方法对于确保模拟精度非常重要。我们提出了一种新方法，即潜在对比，可以有效地学习力场，从而准确地再现全原子模拟产生的构象分布。势对比将噪声对比估计方法与伞式采样进行了推广，以更好地了解分子系统的复杂能量景观。当应用于色氨酸笼蛋白时，我们发现该技术产生的力场可以彻底捕捉折叠过程的热力学，尽管在粗粒度模型中仅使用$α$-碳。我们进一步表明，潜在的对比可以应用于结合许多蛋白质构象集合的大型数据集，以确保粗粒度力场的可转移性。我们预计对比可能成为构建通用粗粒度力场的强大工具。 本文提出一种名为'potential contrasting'的新方法，用于高效学习粗粒化力场，以准确重现全原子模拟产生的构象分布。 Xinqiang Ding,Bin Zhang physics.chem-ph,cond-mat.stat-mech,cs.AI,physics.bio-ph,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Han Wang,Ruiliu Fu,Xuejun Zhang,Jun Zhou
title: RVAE-LAMOL: Residual Variational Autoencoder to Enhance Lifelong Language Learning
title_zh: RVAE-LAMOL：残差变分自动编码器增强终身语言学习
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at IJCNN 2022 on IEEE WCCI 2022; Oral presentation
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at IJCNN 2022 on IEEE WCCI 2022; Oral presentation
abstract: Lifelong Language Learning (LLL) aims to train a neural network to learn a stream of NLP tasks while retaining knowledge from previous tasks. However, previous works which followed data-free constraint still suffer from catastrophic forgetting issue, where the model forgets what it just learned from previous tasks. In order to alleviate catastrophic forgetting, we propose the residual variational autoencoder (RVAE) to enhance LAMOL, a recent LLL model, by mapping different tasks into a limited unified semantic space. In this space, previous tasks are easy to be correct to their own distribution by pseudo samples. Furthermore, we propose an identity task to make the model is discriminative to recognize the sample belonging to which task. For training RVAE-LAMOL better, we propose a novel training scheme Alternate Lag Training. In the experiments, we test RVAE-LAMOL on permutations of three datasets from DecaNLP. The experimental results demonstrate that RVAE-LAMOL outperforms naïve LAMOL on all permutations and generates more meaningful pseudo-samples.
summary: Lifelong Language Learning (LLL) aims to train a neural network to learn a stream of NLP tasks while retaining knowledge from previous tasks. However, previous works which followed data-free constraint still suffer from catastrophic forgetting issue, where the model forgets what it just learned from previous tasks. In order to alleviate catastrophic forgetting, we propose the residual variational autoencoder (RVAE) to enhance LAMOL, a recent LLL model, by mapping different tasks into a limited unified semantic space. In this space, previous tasks are easy to be correct to their own distribution by pseudo samples. Furthermore, we propose an identity task to make the model is discriminative to recognize the sample belonging to which task. For training RVAE-LAMOL better, we propose a novel training scheme Alternate Lag Training. In the experiments, we test RVAE-LAMOL on permutations of three datasets from DecaNLP. The experimental results demonstrate that RVAE-LAMOL outperforms naïve LAMOL on all permutations and generates more meaningful pseudo-samples.
abstract_zh: 终身语言学习 (LLL) 旨在训练神经网络学习一系列 NLP 任务，同时保留以前任务中的知识。然而，之前遵循无数据约束的工作仍然遭受灾难性遗忘问题，即模型忘记了刚刚从之前的任务中学到的东西。为了减轻灾难性遗忘，我们提出了残差变分自动编码器（RVAE），通过将不同的任务映射到有限的统一语义空间来增强 LAMOL（一种最近的 LLL 模型）。在这个空间中，以前的任务很容易通过伪样本来纠正自己的分布。此外，我们提出了一个身份任务，使模型具有区分性，可以识别属于哪个任务的样本。为了更好地训练 RVAE-LAMOL，我们提出了一种新颖的训练方案交替滞后训练。在实验中，我们在 DecaNLP 的三个数据集的排列上测试 RVAE-LAMOL。实验结果表明，RVAE-LAMOL 在所有排列上都优于朴素 LAMOL，并生成更有意义的伪样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RVAE-LAMOL方法，通过残差变分自编码器解决持续语言学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续语言学习模型在无数据约束下仍存在灾难性遗忘问题，导致模型遗忘先前任务知识。
AI.method: 设计残差变分自编码器(RVAE)将任务映射到统一语义空间，结合身份任务识别样本所属任务，并提出交替拉格朗日训练方案优化模型。
AI.result: 在DecaNLP三个数据集的排列组合实验中，RVAE-LAMOL优于基础LAMOL模型，且生成更高质量的伪样本。
AI.conclusion: RVAE-LAMOL通过统一语义空间建模和新型训练方案有效缓解了持续语言学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Zhen Bi,Siyuan Cheng,Jing Chen,Xiaozhuan Liang,Feiyu Xiong,Ningyu Zhang
title: Relphormer: Relational Graph Transformer for Knowledge Graph Representations
title_zh: Relphormer：用于知识图表示的关系图转换器
abstract: Transformers have achieved remarkable performance in widespread fields, including natural language processing, computer vision and graph mining. However, vanilla Transformer architectures have not yielded promising improvements in the Knowledge Graph (KG) representations, where the translational distance paradigm dominates this area. Note that vanilla Transformer architectures struggle to capture the intrinsically heterogeneous structural and semantic information of knowledge graphs. To this end, we propose a new variant of Transformer for knowledge graph representations dubbed Relphormer. Specifically, we introduce Triple2Seq which can dynamically sample contextualized sub-graph sequences as the input to alleviate the heterogeneity issue. We propose a novel structure-enhanced self-attention mechanism to encode the relational information and keep the semantic information within entities and relations. Moreover, we utilize masked knowledge modeling for general knowledge graph representation learning, which can be applied to various KG-based tasks including knowledge graph completion, question answering, and recommendation. Experimental results on six datasets show that Relphormer can obtain better performance compared with baselines. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/Relphormer.
summary: Transformers have achieved remarkable performance in widespread fields, including natural language processing, computer vision and graph mining. However, vanilla Transformer architectures have not yielded promising improvements in the Knowledge Graph (KG) representations, where the translational distance paradigm dominates this area. Note that vanilla Transformer architectures struggle to capture the intrinsically heterogeneous structural and semantic information of knowledge graphs. To this end, we propose a new variant of Transformer for knowledge graph representations dubbed Relphormer. Specifically, we introduce Triple2Seq which can dynamically sample contextualized sub-graph sequences as the input to alleviate the heterogeneity issue. We propose a novel structure-enhanced self-attention mechanism to encode the relational information and keep the semantic information within entities and relations. Moreover, we utilize masked knowledge modeling for general knowledge graph representation learning, which can be applied to various KG-based tasks including knowledge graph completion, question answering, and recommendation. Experimental results on six datasets show that Relphormer can obtain better performance compared with baselines. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/Relphormer.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在自然语言处理、计算机视觉和图挖掘等广泛领域取得了显着的性能。然而，普通的 Transformer 架构并没有在知识图（KG）表示方面产生有希望的改进，其中平移距离范式在该领域占主导地位。请注意，普通 Transformer 架构很难捕获知识图谱本质上异构的结构和语义信息。为此，我们提出了一种用于知识图表示的 Transformer 的新变体，称为 Relphormer。具体来说，我们引入了 Triple2Seq，它可以动态采样上下文子图序列作为输入，以缓解异质性问题。我们提出了一种新颖的结构增强自注意力机制来编码关系信息并将语义信息保留在实体和关系中。此外，我们利用屏蔽知识模型进行通用知识图表示学习，可应用于各种基于知识图谱的任务，包括知识图补全、问答和推荐。在六个数据集上的实验结果表明，与基线相比，Relphormer 可以获得更好的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/Relphormer 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Relphormer模型，通过改进Transformer架构以更好地处理知识图谱的异构结构和语义信息。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer难以捕捉知识图谱中实体与关系的复杂异构性及语义关联，导致在知识图谱表示任务中效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入Triple2Seq动态生成子图序列作为输入，设计结构增强的自注意力机制编码关系信息，并采用掩码知识建模进行表示学习。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上，Relphormer在知识图谱补全等任务中均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Relphormer通过结构化输入和增强注意力机制有效解决了知识图谱表示的异构性问题，适用于多种KG相关任务。

authors_text: Ugur Demir,Zheyuan Zhang,Bin Wang,Matthew Antalek,Elif Keles,Debesh Jha,Amir Borhani,Daniela Ladner,Ulas Bagci
title: Transformer based Generative Adversarial Network for Liver Segmentation
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的肝脏分割生成对抗网络
abstract: Automated liver segmentation from radiology scans (CT, MRI) can improve surgery and therapy planning and follow-up assessment in addition to conventional use for diagnosis and prognosis. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become the standard image segmentation tasks, more recently this has started to change towards Transformers based architectures because Transformers are taking advantage of capturing long range dependence modeling capability in signals, so called attention mechanism. In this study, we propose a new segmentation approach using a hybrid approach combining the Transformer(s) with the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approach. The premise behind this choice is that the self-attention mechanism of the Transformers allows the network to aggregate the high dimensional feature and provide global information modeling. This mechanism provides better segmentation performance compared with traditional methods. Furthermore, we encode this generator into the GAN based architecture so that the discriminator network in the GAN can classify the credibility of the generated segmentation masks compared with the real masks coming from human (expert) annotations. This allows us to extract the high dimensional topology information in the mask for biomedical image segmentation and provide more reliable segmentation results. Our model achieved a high dice coefficient of 0.9433, recall of 0.9515, and precision of 0.9376 and outperformed other Transformer based approaches.
summary: Automated liver segmentation from radiology scans (CT, MRI) can improve surgery and therapy planning and follow-up assessment in addition to conventional use for diagnosis and prognosis. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become the standard image segmentation tasks, more recently this has started to change towards Transformers based architectures because Transformers are taking advantage of capturing long range dependence modeling capability in signals, so called attention mechanism. In this study, we propose a new segmentation approach using a hybrid approach combining the Transformer(s) with the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approach. The premise behind this choice is that the self-attention mechanism of the Transformers allows the network to aggregate the high dimensional feature and provide global information modeling. This mechanism provides better segmentation performance compared with traditional methods. Furthermore, we encode this generator into the GAN based architecture so that the discriminator network in the GAN can classify the credibility of the generated segmentation masks compared with the real masks coming from human (expert) annotations. This allows us to extract the high dimensional topology information in the mask for biomedical image segmentation and provide more reliable segmentation results. Our model achieved a high dice coefficient of 0.9433, recall of 0.9515, and precision of 0.9376 and outperformed other Transformer based approaches.
abstract_zh: 除了传统的诊断和预后用途外，放射扫描（CT、MRI）的自动肝脏分割还可以改善手术和治疗计划以及随访评估。尽管卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成为标准的图像分割任务，但最近这种情况已开始转向基于 Transformer 的架构，因为 Transformer 正在利用捕获信号中的长程依赖建模能力，即所谓的注意力机制。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新的分割方法，使用将 Transformer 与生成对抗网络（GAN）方法相结合的混合方法。这种选择背后的前提是 Transformer 的自注意力机制允许网络聚合高维特征并提供全局信息建模。与传统方法相比，该机制提供了更好的分割性能。此外，我们将此生成器编码到基于 GAN 的架构中，以便 GAN 中的鉴别器网络可以与来自人类（专家）注释的真实掩模相比，对生成的分割掩模的可信度进行分类。这使得我们能够提取掩模中的高维拓扑信息用于生物医学图像分割并提供更可靠的分割结果。我们的模型实现了 0.9433 的高骰子系数、0.9515 的召回率和 0.9376 的精度，并且优于其他基于 Transformer 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Transformer和生成对抗网络（GAN）的混合方法，用于医学影像中的肝脏分割任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）是图像分割的主流方法，但Transformer的自注意力机制能更好地建模全局信息，而GAN的判别器可提升分割结果可靠性，因此需探索两者的结合。
AI.method: 设计融合Transformer自注意力机制的生成器，并将其嵌入GAN框架，利用判别器区分生成分割图与真实标注，从而提取高维拓扑信息优化分割结果。
AI.result: 模型在测试中取得Dice系数0.9433、召回率0.9515、精确率0.9376的指标，优于其他基于Transformer的分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合Transformer与GAN的架构显著提升了肝脏分割性能，验证了全局信息建模与对抗训练在医学影像分割中的有效性。

search_text: Transformer based Generative Adversarial Network for Liver Segmentation 基于 Transformer 的肝脏分割生成对抗网络 Automated liver segmentation from radiology scans (CT, MRI) can improve surgery and therapy planning and follow-up assessment in addition to conventional use for diagnosis and prognosis. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become the standard image segmentation tasks, more recently this has started to change towards Transformers based architectures because Transformers are taking advantage of capturing long range dependence modeling capability in signals, so called attention mechanism. In this study, we propose a new segmentation approach using a hybrid approach combining the Transformer(s) with the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approach. The premise behind this choice is that the self-attention mechanism of the Transformers allows the network to aggregate the high dimensional feature and provide global information modeling. This mechanism provides better segmentation performance compared with traditional methods. Furthermore, we encode this generator into the GAN based architecture so that the discriminator network in the GAN can classify the credibility of the generated segmentation masks compared with the real masks coming from human (expert) annotations. This allows us to extract the high dimensional topology information in the mask for biomedical image segmentation and provide more reliable segmentation results. Our model achieved a high dice coefficient of 0.9433, recall of 0.9515, and precision of 0.9376 and outperformed other Transformer based approaches. 除了传统的诊断和预后用途外，放射扫描（CT、MRI）的自动肝脏分割还可以改善手术和治疗计划以及随访评估。尽管卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成为标准的图像分割任务，但最近这种情况已开始转向基于 Transformer 的架构，因为 Transformer 正在利用捕获信号中的长程依赖建模能力，即所谓的注意力机制。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新的分割方法，使用将 Transformer 与生成对抗网络（GAN）方法相结合的混合方法。这种选择背后的前提是 Transformer 的自注意力机制允许网络聚合高维特征并提供全局信息建模。与传统方法相比，该机制提供了更好的分割性能。此外，我们将此生成器编码到基于 GAN 的架构中，以便 GAN 中的鉴别器网络可以与来自人类（专家）注释的真实掩模相比，对生成的分割掩模的可信度进行分类。这使得我们能够提取掩模中的高维拓扑信息用于生物医学图像分割并提供更可靠的分割结果。我们的模型实现了 0.9433 的高骰子系数、0.9515 的召回率和 0.9376 的精度，并且优于其他基于 Transformer 的方法。 本文提出一种结合Transformer和生成对抗网络（GAN）的混合方法，用于医学影像中的肝脏分割任务。 Ugur Demir,Zheyuan Zhang,Bin Wang,Matthew Antalek,Elif Keles,Debesh Jha,Amir Borhani,Daniela Ladner,Ulas Bagci eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sourya Basu,Jose Gallego-Posada,Francesco Viganò,James Rowbottom,Taco Cohen
title: Equivariant Mesh Attention Networks
title_zh: 等变网格注意力网络
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (08/2022). Official code made available at https://github.com/gallego-posada/eman - For the OpenReview entry, see https://openreview.net/forum?id=3IqqJh2Ycy
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (08/2022). Official code made available at https://github.com/gallego-posada/eman - For the OpenReview entry, see https://openreview.net/forum?id=3IqqJh2Ycy
abstract: Equivariance to symmetries has proven to be a powerful inductive bias in deep learning research. Recent works on mesh processing have concentrated on various kinds of natural symmetries, including translations, rotations, scaling, node permutations, and gauge transformations. To date, no existing architecture is equivariant to all of these transformations. In this paper, we present an attention-based architecture for mesh data that is provably equivariant to all transformations mentioned above. Our pipeline relies on the use of relative tangential features: a simple, effective, equivariance-friendly alternative to raw node positions as inputs. Experiments on the FAUST and TOSCA datasets confirm that our proposed architecture achieves improved performance on these benchmarks and is indeed equivariant, and therefore robust, to a wide variety of local/global transformations.
summary: Equivariance to symmetries has proven to be a powerful inductive bias in deep learning research. Recent works on mesh processing have concentrated on various kinds of natural symmetries, including translations, rotations, scaling, node permutations, and gauge transformations. To date, no existing architecture is equivariant to all of these transformations. In this paper, we present an attention-based architecture for mesh data that is provably equivariant to all transformations mentioned above. Our pipeline relies on the use of relative tangential features: a simple, effective, equivariance-friendly alternative to raw node positions as inputs. Experiments on the FAUST and TOSCA datasets confirm that our proposed architecture achieves improved performance on these benchmarks and is indeed equivariant, and therefore robust, to a wide variety of local/global transformations.
abstract_zh: 对称性等变已被证明是深度学习研究中强大的归纳偏差。最近的网格处理工作集中在各种自然对称性上，包括平移、旋转、缩放、节点排列和规范变换。迄今为止，还没有任何现有架构能够等同于所有这些转换。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于注意力的网格数据架构，该架构可证明与上述所有转换等效。我们的管道依赖于相对切向特征的使用：一种简单、有效、等方差友好的替代原始节点位置作为输入的方法。 FAUST 和 TOSCA 数据集上的实验证实，我们提出的架构在这些基准上实现了改进的性能，并且对于各种本地/全局转换确实是等变的，因此具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力的网格数据处理架构，该架构对平移、旋转、缩放等所有自然对称变换具有理论证明的等变性。
AI.motivation: 现有网格处理方法无法同时保持对所有自然对称变换（如平移、旋转等）的等变性，导致模型鲁棒性不足，需设计统一架构。
AI.method: 采用相对切向特征替代原始节点坐标作为输入，并构建基于注意力的网络结构，确保所有变换下的等变性。
AI.result: 在FAUST和TOSCA数据集上实验表明，该架构在基准测试中表现更优，且对多种局部/全局变换具有等变性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过理论证明的等变性提升了网格数据处理的鲁棒性，实验验证了其有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力的网格数据处理架构，该架构对平移、旋转、缩放等所有自然对称变换具有理论证明的等变性。

authors_text: Jiarui Zhang,Filip Ilievski,Kaixin Ma,Jonathan Francis,Alessandro Oltramari
title: An Empirical Investigation of Commonsense Self-Supervision with Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 用知识图进行常识自我监督的实证研究
abstract: Self-supervision based on the information extracted from large knowledge graphs has been shown to improve the generalization of language models, in zero-shot evaluation on various downstream language reasoning tasks. Since these improvements are reported in aggregate, however, little is known about (i) how to select the appropriate knowledge for solid performance across tasks, (ii) how to combine this knowledge with neural language models, and (iii) how these pairings affect granular task performance. In this paper, we study the effect of knowledge sampling strategies and sizes that can be used to generate synthetic data for adapting language models. We study the effect of different synthetic datasets on language models with various architectures and sizes. The resulting models are evaluated against four task properties: domain overlap, answer similarity, vocabulary overlap, and answer length. Our experiments show that encoder-decoder models benefit from more data to learn from, whereas sampling strategies that balance across different aspects yield best performance. Most of the improvement occurs on questions with short answers and dissimilar answer candidates, which corresponds to the characteristics of the data used for pre-training.
summary: Self-supervision based on the information extracted from large knowledge graphs has been shown to improve the generalization of language models, in zero-shot evaluation on various downstream language reasoning tasks. Since these improvements are reported in aggregate, however, little is known about (i) how to select the appropriate knowledge for solid performance across tasks, (ii) how to combine this knowledge with neural language models, and (iii) how these pairings affect granular task performance. In this paper, we study the effect of knowledge sampling strategies and sizes that can be used to generate synthetic data for adapting language models. We study the effect of different synthetic datasets on language models with various architectures and sizes. The resulting models are evaluated against four task properties: domain overlap, answer similarity, vocabulary overlap, and answer length. Our experiments show that encoder-decoder models benefit from more data to learn from, whereas sampling strategies that balance across different aspects yield best performance. Most of the improvement occurs on questions with short answers and dissimilar answer candidates, which corresponds to the characteristics of the data used for pre-training.
abstract_zh: 在各种下游语言推理任务的零样本评估中，基于从大型知识图谱中提取的信息的自我监督已被证明可以提高语言模型的泛化能力。然而，由于这些改进是总体报告的，因此人们对以下方面知之甚少：（i）如何选择适当的知识以实现跨任务的稳定表现，（ii）如何将这些知识与神经语言模型相结合，以及（iii）这些配对如何影响细粒度的任务表现。在本文中，我们研究了知识采样策略和规模的影响，这些策略和规模可用于生成适应语言模型的合成数据。我们研究不同的合成数据集对具有不同架构和大小的语言模型的影响。根据四个任务属性评估生成的模型：领域重叠、答案相似性、词汇重叠和答案长度。我们的实验表明，编码器-解码器模型受益于更多的数据可供学习，而平衡不同方面的采样策略会产生最佳性能。大多数改进发生在答案简短和候选答案不同的问题上，这与预训练所用数据的特征相对应。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过知识图谱中的常识性自监督学习提升语言模型的泛化能力，并探讨知识选择、模型结合方式及任务表现的关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于知识图谱的自监督学习已被证明能提升语言模型性能，但现有研究缺乏对知识筛选策略、模型融合方法及具体任务表现影响的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同知识采样策略和数据规模对多种语言模型架构的影响，评估模型在领域重叠度、答案相似性等四个任务属性上的表现。
AI.result: 编码器-解码器模型需更多数据训练，平衡多维度采样策略效果最佳，改进主要体现在答案简短且候选答案差异大的问题上。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱与语言模型的结合效果依赖于模型结构和采样策略，针对特定任务特征优化数据选择可显著提升性能。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 知识图谱与语言模型的结合效果依赖于模型结构和采样策略，针对特定任务特征优化数据选择可显著提升性能。

tldr: 本文研究如何通过知识图谱中的常识性自监督学习提升语言模型的泛化能力，并探讨知识选择、模型结合方式及任务表现的关系。
motivation: 尽管基于知识图谱的自监督学习已被证明能提升语言模型性能，但现有研究缺乏对知识筛选策略、模型融合方法及具体任务表现影响的系统分析。
method: 通过实验对比不同知识采样策略和数据规模对多种语言模型架构的影响，评估模型在领域重叠度、答案相似性等四个任务属性上的表现。
result: 编码器-解码器模型需更多数据训练，平衡多维度采样策略效果最佳，改进主要体现在答案简短且候选答案差异大的问题上。
conclusion: 知识图谱与语言模型的结合效果依赖于模型结构和采样策略，针对特定任务特征优化数据选择可显著提升性能。
search_text: An Empirical Investigation of Commonsense Self-Supervision with Knowledge Graphs 用知识图进行常识自我监督的实证研究 Self-supervision based on the information extracted from large knowledge graphs has been shown to improve the generalization of language models, in zero-shot evaluation on various downstream language reasoning tasks. Since these improvements are reported in aggregate, however, little is known about (i) how to select the appropriate knowledge for solid performance across tasks, (ii) how to combine this knowledge with neural language models, and (iii) how these pairings affect granular task performance. In this paper, we study the effect of knowledge sampling strategies and sizes that can be used to generate synthetic data for adapting language models. We study the effect of different synthetic datasets on language models with various architectures and sizes. The resulting models are evaluated against four task properties: domain overlap, answer similarity, vocabulary overlap, and answer length. Our experiments show that encoder-decoder models benefit from more data to learn from, whereas sampling strategies that balance across different aspects yield best performance. Most of the improvement occurs on questions with short answers and dissimilar answer candidates, which corresponds to the characteristics of the data used for pre-training. 在各种下游语言推理任务的零样本评估中，基于从大型知识图谱中提取的信息的自我监督已被证明可以提高语言模型的泛化能力。然而，由于这些改进是总体报告的，因此人们对以下方面知之甚少：（i）如何选择适当的知识以实现跨任务的稳定表现，（ii）如何将这些知识与神经语言模型相结合，以及（iii）这些配对如何影响细粒度的任务表现。在本文中，我们研究了知识采样策略和规模的影响，这些策略和规模可用于生成适应语言模型的合成数据。我们研究不同的合成数据集对具有不同架构和大小的语言模型的影响。根据四个任务属性评估生成的模型：领域重叠、答案相似性、词汇重叠和答案长度。我们的实验表明，编码器-解码器模型受益于更多的数据可供学习，而平衡不同方面的采样策略会产生最佳性能。大多数改进发生在答案简短和候选答案不同的问题上，这与预训练所用数据的特征相对应。 本文研究如何通过知识图谱中的常识性自监督学习提升语言模型的泛化能力，并探讨知识选择、模型结合方式及任务表现的关系。 Jiarui Zhang,Filip Ilievski,Kaixin Ma,Jonathan Francis,Alessandro Oltramari cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ethan Huynh
title: Vision Transformers in 2022: An Update on Tiny ImageNet
title_zh: 2022 年的视觉变形金刚：Tiny ImageNet 的更新
abstract: The recent advances in image transformers have shown impressive results and have largely closed the gap between traditional CNN architectures. The standard procedure is to train on large datasets like ImageNet-21k and then finetune on ImageNet-1k. After finetuning, researches will often consider the transfer learning performance on smaller datasets such as CIFAR-10/100 but have left out Tiny ImageNet. This paper offers an update on vision transformers' performance on Tiny ImageNet. I include Vision Transformer (ViT) , Data Efficient Image Transformer (DeiT), Class Attention in Image Transformer (CaiT), and Swin Transformers. In addition, Swin Transformers beats the current state-of-the-art result with a validation accuracy of 91.35%. Code is available here: https://github.com/ehuynh1106/TinyImageNet-Transformers
summary: The recent advances in image transformers have shown impressive results and have largely closed the gap between traditional CNN architectures. The standard procedure is to train on large datasets like ImageNet-21k and then finetune on ImageNet-1k. After finetuning, researches will often consider the transfer learning performance on smaller datasets such as CIFAR-10/100 but have left out Tiny ImageNet. This paper offers an update on vision transformers' performance on Tiny ImageNet. I include Vision Transformer (ViT) , Data Efficient Image Transformer (DeiT), Class Attention in Image Transformer (CaiT), and Swin Transformers. In addition, Swin Transformers beats the current state-of-the-art result with a validation accuracy of 91.35%. Code is available here: https://github.com/ehuynh1106/TinyImageNet-Transformers
abstract_zh: 图像转换器的最新进展已经显示出令人印象深刻的结果，并在很大程度上缩小了传统 CNN 架构之间的差距。标准程序是在 ImageNet-21k 等大型数据集上进行训练，然后在 ImageNet-1k 上进行微调。微调后，研究人员通常会考虑 CIFAR-10/100 等较小数据集上的迁移学习性能，但忽略了 Tiny ImageNet。本文提供了有关 Tiny ImageNet 上视觉 Transformer 性能的最新信息。我包括 Vision Transformer (ViT)、Data Efficient Image Transformer (DeiT)、Class Attention in Image Transformer (CaiT) 和 Swin Transformers。此外，Swin Transformers 的验证准确率达到 91.35%，击败了当前最先进的结果。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/ehuynh1106/TinyImageNet-Transformers

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种视觉Transformer模型在Tiny ImageNet数据集上的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在ImageNet-1k等大型数据集上表现优异，但其在Tiny ImageNet等小型数据集上的研究尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 对比测试了ViT、DeiT、CaiT和Swin Transformer等模型，并通过微调优化其在Tiny ImageNet上的表现。
AI.result: Swin Transformer在Tiny ImageNet验证集上达到91.35%的准确率，刷新了当时最佳记录。
AI.conclusion: Swin Transformer在Tiny ImageNet上展现显著优势，建议后续研究更关注小型数据集的模型适配性。
