authors_text: Alankar Kotwal,Anat Levin,Ioannis Gkioulekas
title: Swept-Angle Synthetic Wavelength Interferometry
title_zh: 扫频合成波长干涉测量
abstract: We present a new imaging technique, swept-angle synthetic wavelength interferometry, for full-field micron-scale 3D sensing. As in conventional synthetic wavelength interferometry, our technique uses light consisting of two narrowly-separated optical wavelengths, resulting in per-pixel interferometric measurements whose phase encodes scene depth. Our technique additionally uses a new type of light source that, by emulating spatially-incoherent illumination, makes interferometric measurements insensitive to aberrations and (sub)surface scattering, effects that corrupt phase measurements. The resulting technique combines the robustness to such corruptions of scanning interferometric setups, with the speed of full-field interferometric setups. Overall, our technique can recover full-frame depth at a lateral and axial resolution of 5 microns, at frame rates of 5 Hz, even under strong ambient light. We build an experimental prototype, and use it to demonstrate these capabilities by scanning a variety of objects, including objects representative of applications in inspection and fabrication, and objects that contain challenging light scattering effects.
summary: We present a new imaging technique, swept-angle synthetic wavelength interferometry, for full-field micron-scale 3D sensing. As in conventional synthetic wavelength interferometry, our technique uses light consisting of two narrowly-separated optical wavelengths, resulting in per-pixel interferometric measurements whose phase encodes scene depth. Our technique additionally uses a new type of light source that, by emulating spatially-incoherent illumination, makes interferometric measurements insensitive to aberrations and (sub)surface scattering, effects that corrupt phase measurements. The resulting technique combines the robustness to such corruptions of scanning interferometric setups, with the speed of full-field interferometric setups. Overall, our technique can recover full-frame depth at a lateral and axial resolution of 5 microns, at frame rates of 5 Hz, even under strong ambient light. We build an experimental prototype, and use it to demonstrate these capabilities by scanning a variety of objects, including objects representative of applications in inspection and fabrication, and objects that contain challenging light scattering effects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的成像技术，即扫角合成波长干涉测量法，用于全场微米级 3D 传感。与传统的合成波长干涉测量一样，我们的技术使用由两个间隔很窄的光波长组成的光，从而产生每像素干涉测量，其相位对场景深度进行编码。我们的技术还使用了一种新型光源，通过模拟空间不相干照明，使干涉测量对像差和（子）表面散射（破坏相位测量的影响）不敏感。由此产生的技术将扫描干涉装置对此类损坏的鲁棒性与全场干涉装置的速度结合起来。总体而言，我们的技术即使在强环境光下也可以以 5 微米的横向和轴向分辨率、5 Hz 的帧速率恢复全帧深度。我们构建了一个实验原型，并使用它通过扫描各种物体来演示这些功能，包括代表检查和制造应用的物体，以及包含具有挑战性的光散射效应的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的全场微米级3D成像技术——扫角合成波长干涉术，用于提高深度测量的鲁棒性和速度。
AI.motivation: 传统合成波长干涉术易受像差和表面散射影响，而全场干涉术在强环境光下表现不佳，需兼顾速度与鲁棒性的改进方案。
AI.method: 采用双窄间隔光波长光源，结合空间非相干照明模拟，消除像差和散射干扰，融合扫描干涉的鲁棒性与全场干涉的速度优势。
AI.result: 实现5微米横向和轴向分辨率，5Hz帧率，强环境光下稳定工作，成功扫描了检测与制造应用中的复杂散射物体。
AI.conclusion: 该技术有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在高精度3D传感领域具有广泛应用前景。

authors_text: Dominika Przewlocka-Rus,Tomasz Kryjak
title: Towards real-time and energy efficient Siamese tracking -- a hardware-software approach
title_zh: 迈向实时、节能的暹罗跟踪——一种硬件软件方法
abstract: Siamese trackers have been among the state-of-the-art solutions in each Visual Object Tracking (VOT) challenge over the past few years. However, with great accuracy comes great computational complexity: to achieve real-time processing, these trackers have to be massively parallelised and are usually run on high-end GPUs. Easy to implement, this approach is energy consuming, and thus cannot be used in many low-power applications. To overcome this, one can use energy-efficient embedded devices, such as heterogeneous platforms joining the ARM processor system with programmable logic (FPGA). In this work, we propose a hardware-software implementation of the well-known fully connected Siamese tracker (SiamFC). We have developed a quantised Siamese network for the FINN accelerator, using algorithm-accelerator co-design, and performed design space exploration to achieve the best efficiency-to-energy ratio (determined by FPS and used resources). For our network, running in the programmable logic part of the Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104, we achieved the processing of almost 50 frames-per-second with tracker accuracy on par with its floating point counterpart, as well as the original SiamFC network. The complete tracking system, implemented in ARM with the network accelerated on FPGA, achieves up to 17 fps. These results bring us towards bridging the gap between the highly accurate but energy-demanding algorithms and energy-efficient solutions ready to be used in low-power, edge systems.
summary: Siamese trackers have been among the state-of-the-art solutions in each Visual Object Tracking (VOT) challenge over the past few years. However, with great accuracy comes great computational complexity: to achieve real-time processing, these trackers have to be massively parallelised and are usually run on high-end GPUs. Easy to implement, this approach is energy consuming, and thus cannot be used in many low-power applications. To overcome this, one can use energy-efficient embedded devices, such as heterogeneous platforms joining the ARM processor system with programmable logic (FPGA). In this work, we propose a hardware-software implementation of the well-known fully connected Siamese tracker (SiamFC). We have developed a quantised Siamese network for the FINN accelerator, using algorithm-accelerator co-design, and performed design space exploration to achieve the best efficiency-to-energy ratio (determined by FPS and used resources). For our network, running in the programmable logic part of the Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104, we achieved the processing of almost 50 frames-per-second with tracker accuracy on par with its floating point counterpart, as well as the original SiamFC network. The complete tracking system, implemented in ARM with the network accelerated on FPGA, achieves up to 17 fps. These results bring us towards bridging the gap between the highly accurate but energy-demanding algorithms and energy-efficient solutions ready to be used in low-power, edge systems.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，连体跟踪器一直是各个视觉对象跟踪 (VOT) 挑战中最先进的解决方案之一。然而，高精度带来了巨大的计算复杂性：为了实现实时处理，这些跟踪器必须大规模并行化，并且通常在高端 GPU 上运行。这种方法易于实现，但耗能，因此不能在许多低功耗应用中使用。为了克服这一问题，可以使用节能嵌入式设备，例如将 ARM 处理器系统与可编程逻辑 (FPGA) 结合在一起的异构平台。在这项工作中，我们提出了著名的全连接暹罗跟踪器（SiamFC）的硬件软件实现。我们使用算法加速器协同设计为 FINN 加速器开发了量化暹罗网络，并进行了设计空间探索，以实现最佳的效率能量比（由 FPS 和使用的资源确定）。对于我们的网络，在 Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104 的可编程逻辑部分中运行，我们实现了每秒近 50 帧的处理速度，跟踪器精度与浮点对应网络以及原始 SiamFC 网络相当。完整的跟踪系统在 ARM 中实现，网络在 FPGA 上加速，速度高达 17 fps。这些结果使我们能够弥合高精度但耗能的算法与可用于低功耗边缘系统的节能解决方案之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种软硬件协同方法，优化Siamese跟踪器的实时性与能效，以适应低功耗边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 现有Siamese跟踪器虽精度高，但依赖高功耗GPU难以满足低功耗场景需求，需探索更节能的实现方案。
AI.method: 通过量化网络设计与FINN加速器协同优化，结合Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC平台的ARM-FPGA异构架构进行设计空间探索。
AI.result: 在ZCU104板实现接近50fps的处理速度，保持与浮点模型相当的精度，完整系统达17fps，能效比显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了高精度跟踪算法与低功耗需求，为边缘计算场景提供了可行的部署方案。

search_text: Towards real-time and energy efficient Siamese tracking -- a hardware-software approach 迈向实时、节能的暹罗跟踪——一种硬件软件方法 Siamese trackers have been among the state-of-the-art solutions in each Visual Object Tracking (VOT) challenge over the past few years. However, with great accuracy comes great computational complexity: to achieve real-time processing, these trackers have to be massively parallelised and are usually run on high-end GPUs. Easy to implement, this approach is energy consuming, and thus cannot be used in many low-power applications. To overcome this, one can use energy-efficient embedded devices, such as heterogeneous platforms joining the ARM processor system with programmable logic (FPGA). In this work, we propose a hardware-software implementation of the well-known fully connected Siamese tracker (SiamFC). We have developed a quantised Siamese network for the FINN accelerator, using algorithm-accelerator co-design, and performed design space exploration to achieve the best efficiency-to-energy ratio (determined by FPS and used resources). For our network, running in the programmable logic part of the Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104, we achieved the processing of almost 50 frames-per-second with tracker accuracy on par with its floating point counterpart, as well as the original SiamFC network. The complete tracking system, implemented in ARM with the network accelerated on FPGA, achieves up to 17 fps. These results bring us towards bridging the gap between the highly accurate but energy-demanding algorithms and energy-efficient solutions ready to be used in low-power, edge systems. 在过去几年中，连体跟踪器一直是各个视觉对象跟踪 (VOT) 挑战中最先进的解决方案之一。然而，高精度带来了巨大的计算复杂性：为了实现实时处理，这些跟踪器必须大规模并行化，并且通常在高端 GPU 上运行。这种方法易于实现，但耗能，因此不能在许多低功耗应用中使用。为了克服这一问题，可以使用节能嵌入式设备，例如将 ARM 处理器系统与可编程逻辑 (FPGA) 结合在一起的异构平台。在这项工作中，我们提出了著名的全连接暹罗跟踪器（SiamFC）的硬件软件实现。我们使用算法加速器协同设计为 FINN 加速器开发了量化暹罗网络，并进行了设计空间探索，以实现最佳的效率能量比（由 FPS 和使用的资源确定）。对于我们的网络，在 Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC ZCU104 的可编程逻辑部分中运行，我们实现了每秒近 50 帧的处理速度，跟踪器精度与浮点对应网络以及原始 SiamFC 网络相当。完整的跟踪系统在 ARM 中实现，网络在 FPGA 上加速，速度高达 17 fps。这些结果使我们能够弥合高精度但耗能的算法与可用于低功耗边缘系统的节能解决方案之间的差距。 本文提出一种软硬件协同方法，优化Siamese跟踪器的实时性与能效，以适应低功耗边缘设备。 Dominika Przewlocka-Rus,Tomasz Kryjak cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Juanhui Li,Harry Shomer,Jiayuan Ding,Yiqi Wang,Yao Ma,Neil Shah,Jiliang Tang,Dawei Yin
title: Are Message Passing Neural Networks Really Helpful for Knowledge Graph Completion?
title_zh: 消息传递神经网络真的有助于知识图谱补全吗？
abstract: Knowledge graphs (KGs) facilitate a wide variety of applications. Despite great efforts in creation and maintenance, even the largest KGs are far from complete. Hence, KG completion (KGC) has become one of the most crucial tasks for KG research. Recently, considerable literature in this space has centered around the use of Message Passing (Graph) Neural Networks (MPNNs), to learn powerful embeddings. The success of these methods is naturally attributed to the use of MPNNs over simpler multi-layer perceptron (MLP) models, given their additional message passing (MP) component. In this work, we find that surprisingly, simple MLP models are able to achieve comparable performance to MPNNs, suggesting that MP may not be as crucial as previously believed. With further exploration, we show careful scoring function and loss function design has a much stronger influence on KGC model performance. This suggests a conflation of scoring function design, loss function design, and MP in prior work, with promising insights regarding the scalability of state-of-the-art KGC methods today, as well as careful attention to more suitable MP designs for KGC tasks tomorrow. Our codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/Juanhui28/Are_MPNNs_helpful.
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) facilitate a wide variety of applications. Despite great efforts in creation and maintenance, even the largest KGs are far from complete. Hence, KG completion (KGC) has become one of the most crucial tasks for KG research. Recently, considerable literature in this space has centered around the use of Message Passing (Graph) Neural Networks (MPNNs), to learn powerful embeddings. The success of these methods is naturally attributed to the use of MPNNs over simpler multi-layer perceptron (MLP) models, given their additional message passing (MP) component. In this work, we find that surprisingly, simple MLP models are able to achieve comparable performance to MPNNs, suggesting that MP may not be as crucial as previously believed. With further exploration, we show careful scoring function and loss function design has a much stronger influence on KGC model performance. This suggests a conflation of scoring function design, loss function design, and MP in prior work, with promising insights regarding the scalability of state-of-the-art KGC methods today, as well as careful attention to more suitable MP designs for KGC tasks tomorrow. Our codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/Juanhui28/Are_MPNNs_helpful.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）促进了各种各样的应用。尽管在创建和维护方面付出了巨大的努力，但即使是最大的 KG 也远未完成。因此，知识图谱补全（KGC）已成为知识图谱研究最关键的任务之一。最近，该领域的大量文献都集中在使用消息传递（图）神经网络（MPNN）来学习强大的嵌入。这些方法的成功自然归功于 MPNN 在更简单的多层感知器 (MLP) 模型上的使用，因为它们具有额外的消息传递 (MP) 组件。在这项工作中，我们令人惊讶地发现，简单的 MLP 模型能够实现与 MPNN 相当的性能，这表明 MP 可能并不像以前认为的那么重要。通过进一步的探索，我们发现仔细的评分函数和损失函数设计对 KGC 模型性能有更大的影响。这表明将之前的工作中的评分函数设计、损失函数设计和 MP 结合起来，对当今最先进的 KGC 方法的可扩展性提出了有希望的见解，并仔细关注明天更适合 KGC 任务的 MP 设计。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/Juanhui28/Are_MPNNs_helpful。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了消息传递神经网络（MPNN）在知识图谱补全（KGC）任务中的实际效果，并质疑其必要性。
AI.motivation: 尽管MPNN在KGC中被广泛采用，但作者发现简单多层感知机（MLP）模型也能达到相似性能，因此探究MPNN的核心贡献是否被高估。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，作者使用MLP与MPNN模型进行KGC任务，并分析评分函数和损失函数设计对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，MLP模型在合理设计评分函数和损失函数的情况下，性能可与MPNN媲美，说明消息传递机制可能并非关键因素。
AI.conclusion: KGC模型的性能更依赖于评分函数和损失函数的设计，而非消息传递机制，未来研究应更关注这些组件的优化。

authors_text: Ryan Solgi,Zichang He,William Jiahua Liang,Zheng Zhang
title: Tensor Shape Search for Optimum Data Compression
title_zh: 用于最佳数据压缩的张量形状搜索
abstract: Various tensor decomposition methods have been proposed for data compression. In real world applications of the tensor decomposition, selecting the tensor shape for the given data poses a challenge and the shape of the tensor may affect the error and the compression ratio. In this work, we study the effect of the tensor shape on the tensor decomposition and propose an optimization model to find an optimum shape for the tensor train (TT) decomposition. The proposed optimization model maximizes the compression ratio of the TT decomposition given an error bound. We implement a genetic algorithm (GA) linked with the TT-SVD algorithm to solve the optimization model. We apply the proposed method for the compression of RGB images. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed evolutionary tensor shape search for the TT decomposition.
summary: Various tensor decomposition methods have been proposed for data compression. In real world applications of the tensor decomposition, selecting the tensor shape for the given data poses a challenge and the shape of the tensor may affect the error and the compression ratio. In this work, we study the effect of the tensor shape on the tensor decomposition and propose an optimization model to find an optimum shape for the tensor train (TT) decomposition. The proposed optimization model maximizes the compression ratio of the TT decomposition given an error bound. We implement a genetic algorithm (GA) linked with the TT-SVD algorithm to solve the optimization model. We apply the proposed method for the compression of RGB images. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed evolutionary tensor shape search for the TT decomposition.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了各种用于数据压缩的张量分解方法。在张量分解的现实应用中，为给定数据选择张量形状提出了挑战，张量的形状可能会影响误差和压缩比。在这项工作中，我们研究了张量形状对张量分解的影响，并提出了一种优化模型来寻找张量序列（TT）分解的最佳形状。所提出的优化模型在给定误差范围的情况下最大化 TT 分解的压缩比。我们实现了与 TT-SVD 算法相结合的遗传算法 (GA) 来求解优化模型。我们应用所提出的方法来压缩 RGB 图像。结果证明了所提出的用于 TT 分解的进化张量形状搜索的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究张量形状对张量分解的影响，提出优化模型以找到最优张量形状，从而在保证误差范围内最大化压缩比。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，张量形状的选择影响分解误差和压缩比，但现有方法缺乏对最优形状的系统研究。
AI.method: 结合遗传算法（GA）与TT-SVD算法，构建优化模型搜索最优张量形状以实现最大压缩比。
AI.result: 在RGB图像压缩实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，证明进化张量形状搜索能提升TT分解的压缩效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的进化张量形状搜索方法为张量分解的压缩优化提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的进化张量形状搜索方法为张量分解的压缩优化提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文研究张量形状对张量分解的影响，提出优化模型以找到最优张量形状，从而在保证误差范围内最大化压缩比。
motivation: 在实际应用中，张量形状的选择影响分解误差和压缩比，但现有方法缺乏对最优形状的系统研究。
method: 结合遗传算法（GA）与TT-SVD算法，构建优化模型搜索最优张量形状以实现最大压缩比。
result: 在RGB图像压缩实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，证明进化张量形状搜索能提升TT分解的压缩效率。
conclusion: 本文提出的进化张量形状搜索方法为张量分解的压缩优化提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Tensor Shape Search for Optimum Data Compression 用于最佳数据压缩的张量形状搜索 Various tensor decomposition methods have been proposed for data compression. In real world applications of the tensor decomposition, selecting the tensor shape for the given data poses a challenge and the shape of the tensor may affect the error and the compression ratio. In this work, we study the effect of the tensor shape on the tensor decomposition and propose an optimization model to find an optimum shape for the tensor train (TT) decomposition. The proposed optimization model maximizes the compression ratio of the TT decomposition given an error bound. We implement a genetic algorithm (GA) linked with the TT-SVD algorithm to solve the optimization model. We apply the proposed method for the compression of RGB images. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed evolutionary tensor shape search for the TT decomposition. 已经提出了各种用于数据压缩的张量分解方法。在张量分解的现实应用中，为给定数据选择张量形状提出了挑战，张量的形状可能会影响误差和压缩比。在这项工作中，我们研究了张量形状对张量分解的影响，并提出了一种优化模型来寻找张量序列（TT）分解的最佳形状。所提出的优化模型在给定误差范围的情况下最大化 TT 分解的压缩比。我们实现了与 TT-SVD 算法相结合的遗传算法 (GA) 来求解优化模型。我们应用所提出的方法来压缩 RGB 图像。结果证明了所提出的用于 TT 分解的进化张量形状搜索的有效性。 本文研究张量形状对张量分解的影响，提出优化模型以找到最优张量形状，从而在保证误差范围内最大化压缩比。 Ryan Solgi,Zichang He,William Jiahua Liang,Zheng Zhang eess.IV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Mark S Graham,Petru-Daniel Tudosiu,Paul Wright,Walter Hugo Lopez Pinaya,U Jean-Marie,Yee Mah,James Teo,Rolf H Jäger,David Werring,Parashkev Nachev,Sebastien Ourselin,M Jorge Cardoso
title: Transformer-based out-of-distribution detection for clinically safe segmentation
title_zh: 基于变压器的分布外检测，用于临床安全分割
abstract: In a clinical setting it is essential that deployed image processing systems are robust to the full range of inputs they might encounter and, in particular, do not make confidently wrong predictions. The most popular approach to safe processing is to train networks that can provide a measure of their uncertainty, but these tend to fail for inputs that are far outside the training data distribution. Recently, generative modelling approaches have been proposed as an alternative; these can quantify the likelihood of a data sample explicitly, filtering out any out-of-distribution (OOD) samples before further processing is performed. In this work, we focus on image segmentation and evaluate several approaches to network uncertainty in the far-OOD and near-OOD cases for the task of segmenting haemorrhages in head CTs. We find all of these approaches are unsuitable for safe segmentation as they provide confidently wrong predictions when operating OOD. We propose performing full 3D OOD detection using a VQ-GAN to provide a compressed latent representation of the image and a transformer to estimate the data likelihood. Our approach successfully identifies images in both the far- and near-OOD cases. We find a strong relationship between image likelihood and the quality of a model's segmentation, making this approach viable for filtering images unsuitable for segmentation. To our knowledge, this is the first time transformers have been applied to perform OOD detection on 3D image data. Code is available at github.com/marksgraham/transformer-ood.

abstract_zh: 在临床环境中，部署的图像处理系统必须能够应对可能遇到的各种输入，特别是不会做出错误的预测，这一点至关重要。最流行的安全处理方法是训练可以提供不确定性度量的网络，但对于远远超出训练数据分布的输入，这些方法往往会失败。最近，人们提出了生成建模方法作为替代方案；这些可以明确量化数据样本的可能性，在执行进一步处理之前过滤掉任何分布外（OOD）样本。在这项工作中，我们专注于图像分割，并评估了远 OOD 和近 OOD 情况下网络不确定性的几种方法，用于分割头部 CT 中的出血任务。我们发现所有这些方法都不适合安全分割，因为它们在操作 OOD 时提供了可靠的错误预测。我们建议使用 VQ-GAN 执行完整的 3D OOD 检测，以提供图像的压缩潜在表示，并使用转换器来估计数据可能性。我们的方法成功地识别了远距和近距 OOD 情况下的图像。我们发现图像似然性和模型分割质量之间存在很强的关系，使得这种方法可以过滤不适合分割的图像。据我们所知，这是第一次应用 Transformer 对 3D 图像数据进行 OOD 检测。代码可在 github.com/marksgraham/transformer-ood 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的3D医学图像分布外检测方法，用于提高临床分割任务的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法在远/近分布外场景下无法有效避免医学图像分割中的自信错误预测，威胁临床安全性。
AI.method: 结合VQ-GAN生成压缩潜在表示与Transformer估计数据似然，实现3D图像的分布外检测。
AI.result: 方法成功识别远/近分布外案例，图像似然与分割质量呈强相关性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 首次将Transformer应用于3D图像OOD检测，为临床安全分割提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Abdelrahman Mohamed,Hung-yi Lee,Lasse Borgholt,Jakob D. Havtorn,Joakim Edin,Christian Igel,Katrin Kirchhoff,Shang-Wen Li,Karen Livescu,Lars Maaløe,Tara N. Sainath,Shinji Watanabe
title: Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning: A Review
title_zh: 自监督语音表征学习：回顾
abstract: Although supervised deep learning has revolutionized speech and audio processing, it has necessitated the building of specialist models for individual tasks and application scenarios. It is likewise difficult to apply this to dialects and languages for which only limited labeled data is available. Self-supervised representation learning methods promise a single universal model that would benefit a wide variety of tasks and domains. Such methods have shown success in natural language processing and computer vision domains, achieving new levels of performance while reducing the number of labels required for many downstream scenarios. Speech representation learning is experiencing similar progress in three main categories: generative, contrastive, and predictive methods. Other approaches rely on multi-modal data for pre-training, mixing text or visual data streams with speech. Although self-supervised speech representation is still a nascent research area, it is closely related to acoustic word embedding and learning with zero lexical resources, both of which have seen active research for many years. This review presents approaches for self-supervised speech representation learning and their connection to other research areas. Since many current methods focus solely on automatic speech recognition as a downstream task, we review recent efforts on benchmarking learned representations to extend the application beyond speech recognition.
summary: Although supervised deep learning has revolutionized speech and audio processing, it has necessitated the building of specialist models for individual tasks and application scenarios. It is likewise difficult to apply this to dialects and languages for which only limited labeled data is available. Self-supervised representation learning methods promise a single universal model that would benefit a wide variety of tasks and domains. Such methods have shown success in natural language processing and computer vision domains, achieving new levels of performance while reducing the number of labels required for many downstream scenarios. Speech representation learning is experiencing similar progress in three main categories: generative, contrastive, and predictive methods. Other approaches rely on multi-modal data for pre-training, mixing text or visual data streams with speech. Although self-supervised speech representation is still a nascent research area, it is closely related to acoustic word embedding and learning with zero lexical resources, both of which have seen active research for many years. This review presents approaches for self-supervised speech representation learning and their connection to other research areas. Since many current methods focus solely on automatic speech recognition as a downstream task, we review recent efforts on benchmarking learned representations to extend the application beyond speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 尽管监督深度学习彻底改变了语音和音频处理，但它需要为单个任务和应用场景构建专业模型。同样很难将其应用于只有有限标记数据可用的方言和语言。自监督表示学习方法有望提供一个单一的通用模型，该模型将有利于各种任务和领域。此类方法在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域取得了成功，实现了新的性能水平，同时减少了许多下游场景所需的标签数量。语音表示学习在三个主要类别中正在经历类似的进展：生成方法、对比方法和预测方法。其他方法依赖于多模态数据进行预训练，将文本或视觉数据流与语音混合。尽管自监督语音表示仍然是一个新兴的研究领域，但它与声学词嵌入和零词汇资源学习密切相关，这两者都已经进行了多年的活跃研究。这篇综述介绍了自监督语音表征学习的方法及其与其他研究领域的联系。由于当前许多方法仅关注自动语音识别作为下游任务，因此我们回顾了最近在对学习表示进行基准测试以将应用扩展到语音识别之外的努力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自监督语音表征学习的方法及其与其他研究领域的联系，并探讨了其在语音识别以外的应用。
AI.motivation: 监督学习在语音处理中需要针对不同任务构建专用模型，且在数据稀缺的方言或语言中效果受限，自监督学习可提供通用模型以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 通过总结生成式、对比式、预测式方法及多模态预训练技术，分析自监督语音表征学习的现状，并讨论其与声学词嵌入和零词资源学习的关联。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流方法，指出当前研究多聚焦于语音识别任务，需进一步扩展表征应用范围并建立更全面的评估基准。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为语音表征提供了新方向，未来需加强跨任务泛化能力研究，并推动多模态与无监督学习的结合。

Since many current methods focus solely on automatic speech recognition as a downstream task, we review recent efforts on benchmarking learned representations to extend the application beyond speech recognition. 尽管监督深度学习彻底改变了语音和音频处理，但它需要为单个任务和应用场景构建专业模型。同样很难将其应用于只有有限标记数据可用的方言和语言。自监督表示学习方法有望提供一个单一的通用模型，该模型将有利于各种任务和领域。此类方法在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域取得了成功，实现了新的性能水平，同时减少了许多下游场景所需的标签数量。语音表示学习在三个主要类别中正在经历类似的进展：生成方法、对比方法和预测方法。其他方法依赖于多模态数据进行预训练，将文本或视觉数据流与语音混合。尽管自监督语音表示仍然是一个新兴的研究领域，但它与声学词嵌入和零词汇资源学习密切相关，这两者都已经进行了多年的活跃研究。这篇综述介绍了自监督语音表征学习的方法及其与其他研究领域的联系。由于当前许多方法仅关注自动语音识别作为下游任务，因此我们回顾了最近在对学习表示进行基准测试以将应用扩展到语音识别之外的努力。 本文综述了自监督语音表征学习的方法及其与其他研究领域的联系，并探讨了其在语音识别以外的应用。 Abdelrahman Mohamed,Hung-yi Lee,Lasse Borgholt,Jakob D. Havtorn,Joakim Edin,Christian Igel,Katrin Kirchhoff,Shang-Wen Li,Karen Livescu,Lars Maaløe,Tara N. Sainath,Shinji Watanabe cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shreshth Tuli,Giuliano Casale,Nicholas R. Jennings
title: MetaNet: Automated Dynamic Selection of Scheduling Policies in Cloud Environments
title_zh: MetaNet：云环境中调度策略的自动动态选择
abstract: Task scheduling is a well-studied problem in the context of optimizing the Quality of Service (QoS) of cloud computing environments. In order to sustain the rapid growth of computational demands, one of the most important QoS metrics for cloud schedulers is the execution cost. In this regard, several data-driven deep neural networks (DNNs) based schedulers have been proposed in recent years to allow scalable and efficient resource management in dynamic workload settings. However, optimal scheduling frequently relies on sophisticated DNNs with high computational needs implying higher execution costs. Further, even in non-stationary environments, sophisticated schedulers might not always be required and we could briefly rely on low-cost schedulers in the interest of cost-efficiency. Therefore, this work aims to solve the non-trivial meta problem of online dynamic selection of a scheduling policy using a surrogate model called MetaNet. Unlike traditional solutions with a fixed scheduling policy, MetaNet on-the-fly chooses a scheduler from a large set of DNN based methods to optimize task scheduling and execution costs in tandem. Compared to state-of-the-art DNN schedulers, this allows for improvement in execution costs, energy consumption, response time and service level agreement violations by up to 11, 43, 8 and 13 percent, respectively.
summary: Task scheduling is a well-studied problem in the context of optimizing the Quality of Service (QoS) of cloud computing environments. In order to sustain the rapid growth of computational demands, one of the most important QoS metrics for cloud schedulers is the execution cost. In this regard, several data-driven deep neural networks (DNNs) based schedulers have been proposed in recent years to allow scalable and efficient resource management in dynamic workload settings. However, optimal scheduling frequently relies on sophisticated DNNs with high computational needs implying higher execution costs. Further, even in non-stationary environments, sophisticated schedulers might not always be required and we could briefly rely on low-cost schedulers in the interest of cost-efficiency. Therefore, this work aims to solve the non-trivial meta problem of online dynamic selection of a scheduling policy using a surrogate model called MetaNet. Unlike traditional solutions with a fixed scheduling policy, MetaNet on-the-fly chooses a scheduler from a large set of DNN based methods to optimize task scheduling and execution costs in tandem. Compared to state-of-the-art DNN schedulers, this allows for improvement in execution costs, energy consumption, response time and service level agreement violations by up to 11, 43, 8 and 13 percent, respectively.
abstract_zh: 任务调度是优化云计算环境服务质量（QoS）背景下一个经过深入研究的问题。为了维持计算需求的快速增长，云调度程序最重要的 QoS 指标之一是执行成本。在这方面，近年来提出了几种基于数据驱动的深度神经网络（DNN）的调度器，以允许在动态工作负载设置中进行可扩展且高效的资源管理。然而，最优调度经常依赖于复杂的 DNN，其高计算需求意味着更高的执行成本。此外，即使在非静态环境中，也可能并不总是需要复杂的调度程序，为了提高成本效率，我们可以暂时依赖低成本调度程序。因此，这项工作旨在使用称为 MetaNet 的代理模型来解决在线动态选择调度策略的重要元问题。与具有固定调度策略的传统解决方案不同，MetaNet 即时从大量基于 DNN 的方法中选择调度程序，以同时优化任务调度和执行成本。与最先进的 DNN 调度程序相比，这可以将执行成本、能耗、响应时间和服务级别协议违规率分别提高高达 11%、43%、8% 和 13%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MetaNet的元学习框架，用于在云计算环境中动态选择任务调度策略，以优化执行成本和其他服务质量指标。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络（DNN）调度器计算开销大且在非平稳环境中并非始终必要，而低开销调度器在成本效率上具有优势，因此需要一种动态选择调度策略的机制。
AI.method: 通过构建元学习模型MetaNet，在线实时从多个DNN调度器中选择最优策略，根据当前工作负载动态调整调度方法。
AI.result: 相比现有DNN调度器，MetaNet在执行成本、能耗、响应时间和服务协议违规率上分别提升11%、43%、8%和13%。
AI.conclusion: MetaNet有效解决了动态环境下的调度策略选择难题，实现了成本与性能的平衡优化。

authors_text: Xingzhe He,Bastian Wandt,Helge Rhodin
title: AutoLink: Self-supervised Learning of Human Skeletons and Object Outlines by Linking Keypoints
title_zh: AutoLink：通过链接关键点进行人体骨骼和物体轮廓的自监督学习
abstract: Structured representations such as keypoints are widely used in pose transfer, conditional image generation, animation, and 3D reconstruction. However, their supervised learning requires expensive annotation for each target domain. We propose a self-supervised method that learns to disentangle object structure from the appearance with a graph of 2D keypoints linked by straight edges. Both the keypoint location and their pairwise edge weights are learned, given only a collection of images depicting the same object class. The resulting graph is interpretable, for example, AutoLink recovers the human skeleton topology when applied to images showing people. Our key ingredients are i) an encoder that predicts keypoint locations in an input image, ii) a shared graph as a latent variable that links the same pairs of keypoints in every image, iii) an intermediate edge map that combines the latent graph edge weights and keypoint locations in a soft, differentiable manner, and iv) an inpainting objective on randomly masked images. Although simpler, AutoLink outperforms existing self-supervised methods on the established keypoint and pose estimation benchmarks and paves the way for structure-conditioned generative models on more diverse datasets. Project website: https://xingzhehe.github.io/autolink/.
summary: Structured representations such as keypoints are widely used in pose transfer, conditional image generation, animation, and 3D reconstruction. However, their supervised learning requires expensive annotation for each target domain. We propose a self-supervised method that learns to disentangle object structure from the appearance with a graph of 2D keypoints linked by straight edges. Both the keypoint location and their pairwise edge weights are learned, given only a collection of images depicting the same object class. The resulting graph is interpretable, for example, AutoLink recovers the human skeleton topology when applied to images showing people. Our key ingredients are i) an encoder that predicts keypoint locations in an input image, ii) a shared graph as a latent variable that links the same pairs of keypoints in every image, iii) an intermediate edge map that combines the latent graph edge weights and keypoint locations in a soft, differentiable manner, and iv) an inpainting objective on randomly masked images. Although simpler, AutoLink outperforms existing self-supervised methods on the established keypoint and pose estimation benchmarks and paves the way for structure-conditioned generative models on more diverse datasets. Project website: https://xingzhehe.github.io/autolink/.
abstract_zh: 关键点等结构化表示广泛应用于姿势迁移、条件图像生成、动画和 3D 重建。然而，他们的监督学习需要对每个目标域进行昂贵的注释。我们提出了一种自监督方法，通过直边链接的 2D 关键点图来学习将对象结构与外观分开。仅给出描绘同一对象类的图像集合，即可学习关键点位置及其成对边缘权重。生成的图形是可解释的，例如，自动链接在应用于显示人物的图像时可以恢复人体骨骼拓扑。我们的关键成分是 i) 预测输入图像中关键点位置的编码器，ii) 作为潜在变量的共享图，链接每个图像中相同的关键点对，iii) 中间边缘图，以软可微分的方式组合潜在图边缘权重和关键点位置，以及 iv) 随机屏蔽图像上的修复目标。虽然更简单，但 AutoLink 在已建立的关键点和姿态估计基准上优于现有的自监督方法，并为更多样化的数据集上的结构条件生成模型铺平了道路。项目网站：https://xingzhehe.github.io/autolink/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督方法AutoLink，通过链接关键点学习人体骨骼和物体轮廓的结构化表示。
AI.motivation: 传统关键点监督学习需要针对每个目标领域进行昂贵的标注，限制了其应用。本文旨在开发无需人工标注的自监督方法以学习结构化表示。
AI.method: 方法包含四部分：i) 编码器预测输入图像关键点位置；ii) 共享图作为潜在变量连接所有图像中相同关键点对；iii) 软化可微分的边缘图结合潜在图权重与关键点位置；iv) 对随机遮罩图像进行修复目标训练。
AI.result: AutoLink在关键点和姿态估计基准测试中优于现有自监督方法，并为更多样化的数据集结构条件生成模型奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习有效解耦物体结构与外观，为无标注数据的结构化表示学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shreshth Tuli,Giuliano Casale,Nicholas R. Jennings
title: SplitPlace: AI Augmented Splitting and Placement of Large-Scale Neural Networks in Mobile Edge Environments
title_zh: SplitPlace：移动边缘环境中大规模神经网络的人工智能增强分割和布局
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
abstract: In recent years, deep learning models have become ubiquitous in industry and academia alike. Deep neural networks can solve some of the most complex pattern-recognition problems today, but come with the price of massive compute and memory requirements. This makes the problem of deploying such large-scale neural networks challenging in resource-constrained mobile edge computing platforms, specifically in mission-critical domains like surveillance and healthcare. To solve this, a promising solution is to split resource-hungry neural networks into lightweight disjoint smaller components for pipelined distributed processing. At present, there are two main approaches to do this: semantic and layer-wise splitting. The former partitions a neural network into parallel disjoint models that produce a part of the result, whereas the latter partitions into sequential models that produce intermediate results. However, there is no intelligent algorithm that decides which splitting strategy to use and places such modular splits to edge nodes for optimal performance. To combat this, this work proposes a novel AI-driven online policy, SplitPlace, that uses Multi-Armed-Bandits to intelligently decide between layer and semantic splitting strategies based on the input task's service deadline demands. SplitPlace places such neural network split fragments on mobile edge devices using decision-aware reinforcement learning for efficient and scalable computing. Moreover, SplitPlace fine-tunes its placement engine to adapt to volatile environments. Our experiments on physical mobile-edge environments with real-world workloads show that SplitPlace can significantly improve the state-of-the-art in terms of average response time, deadline violation rate, inference accuracy, and total reward by up to 46, 69, 3 and 12 percent respectively.

Deep neural networks can solve some of the most complex pattern-recognition problems today, but come with the price of massive compute and memory requirements. This makes the problem of deploying such large-scale neural networks challenging in resource-constrained mobile edge computing platforms, specifically in mission-critical domains like surveillance and healthcare. To solve this, a promising solution is to split resource-hungry neural networks into lightweight disjoint smaller components for pipelined distributed processing. The former partitions a neural network into parallel disjoint models that produce a part of the result, whereas the latter partitions into sequential models that produce intermediate results. To combat this, this work proposes a novel AI-driven online policy, SplitPlace, that uses Multi-Armed-Bandits to intelligently decide between layer and semantic splitting strategies based on the input task's service deadline demands. SplitPlace places such neural network split fragments on mobile edge devices using decision-aware reinforcement learning for efficient and scalable computing. Moreover, SplitPlace fine-tunes its placement engine to adapt to volatile environments. Our experiments on physical mobile-edge environments with real-world workloads show that SplitPlace can significantly improve the state-of-the-art in terms of average response time, deadline violation rate, inference accuracy, and total reward by up to 46, 69, 3 and 12 percent respectively.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习模型在工业界和学术界已经变得无处不在。深度神经网络可以解决当今一些最复杂的模式识别问题，但代价是需要大量计算和内存。这使得在资源有限的移动边缘计算平台中部署如此大规模的神经网络面临挑战，特别是在监控和医疗保健等关键任务领域。为了解决这个问题，一个有前途的解决方案是将资源匮乏的神经网络分割成轻量级的、不相交的较小组件，以进行流水线分布式处理。目前，主要有两种方法可以做到这一点：语义分割和分层分割。前者将神经网络划分为产生部分结果的并行不相交模型，而后者将神经网络划分为产生中间结果的顺序模型。然而，没有智能算法来决定使用哪种分裂策略并将这种模块化分裂放置到边缘节点以获得最佳性能。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了一种新颖的人工智能驱动的在线策略 SplitPlace，它使用 Multi-Armed-Bandits 根据输入任务的服务截止日期要求智能地决定层和语义分割策略。 SplitPlace 使用决策感知强化学习将此类神经网络分割片段放置在移动边缘设备上，以实现高效且可扩展的计算。此外，SplitPlace 还对其布局引擎进行了微调，以适应不稳定的环境。我们在具有真实工作负载的物理移动边缘环境上进行的实验表明，SplitPlace 可以在平均响应时间、截止日期违规率、推理准确性和总奖励方面分别显着提高高达 46%、69%、3% 和 12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SplitPlace，一种基于AI的在线策略，用于在移动边缘环境中智能分割和部署大规模神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络分割方法缺乏智能算法来选择分割策略并优化边缘节点部署，难以应对资源受限和动态环境下的性能需求。
AI.method: 结合多臂老虎机（MAB）和强化学习，根据任务截止时间动态选择层分割或语义分割策略，并通过决策感知的强化学习进行模块化部署。
AI.result: 实验表明，SplitPlace在平均响应时间、截止时间违反率、推理准确性和总奖励上分别提升46%、69%、3%和12%。
AI.conclusion: SplitPlace通过自适应策略显著优化了边缘环境下的神经网络部署性能，为动态场景提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiao Chen,Alex Morehead,Jian Liu,Jianlin Cheng
title: DProQ: A Gated-Graph Transformer for Protein Complex Structure Assessment
title_zh: DProQ：用于蛋白质复杂结构评估的门控图转换器
abstract: Proteins interact to form complexes to carry out essential biological functions. Computational methods have been developed to predict the structures of protein complexes. However, an important challenge in protein complex structure prediction is to estimate the quality of predicted protein complex structures without any knowledge of the corresponding native structures. Such estimations can then be used to select high-quality predicted complex structures to facilitate biomedical research such as protein function analysis and drug discovery. We challenge this significant task with DProQ, which introduces a gated neighborhood-modulating Graph Transformer (GGT) designed to predict the quality of 3D protein complex structures. Notably, we incorporate node and edge gates within a novel Graph Transformer framework to control information flow during graph message passing. We train and evaluate DProQ on four newly-developed datasets that we make publicly available in this work. Our rigorous experiments demonstrate that DProQ achieves state-of-the-art performance in ranking protein complex structures.
summary: Proteins interact to form complexes to carry out essential biological functions. Computational methods have been developed to predict the structures of protein complexes. However, an important challenge in protein complex structure prediction is to estimate the quality of predicted protein complex structures without any knowledge of the corresponding native structures. Such estimations can then be used to select high-quality predicted complex structures to facilitate biomedical research such as protein function analysis and drug discovery. We challenge this significant task with DProQ, which introduces a gated neighborhood-modulating Graph Transformer (GGT) designed to predict the quality of 3D protein complex structures. Notably, we incorporate node and edge gates within a novel Graph Transformer framework to control information flow during graph message passing. We train and evaluate DProQ on four newly-developed datasets that we make publicly available in this work. Our rigorous experiments demonstrate that DProQ achieves state-of-the-art performance in ranking protein complex structures.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质相互作用形成复合物以执行基本的生物功能。已经开发出计算方法来预测蛋白质复合物的结构。然而，蛋白质复合物结构预测的一个重要挑战是在不了解相应天然结构的情况下估计预测的蛋白质复合物结构的质量。然后，此类估计可用于选择高质量的预测复杂结构，以促进蛋白质功能分析和药物发现等生物医学研究。我们使用 DProQ 来挑战这项重要任务，它引入了门控邻域调制图变换器 (GGT)，旨在预测 3D 蛋白质复杂结构的质量。值得注意的是，我们将节点和边缘门合并到一个新颖的图形转换器框架中，以控制图形消息传递期间的信息流。我们在本工作中公开的四个新开发的数据集上训练和评估 DProQ。我们严格的实验表明，DProQ 在对蛋白质复杂结构进行排序方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DProQ方法，利用门控图变换器评估蛋白质复合物结构的质量。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质复合物结构预测缺乏无需已知天然结构的评估方法，亟需开发可靠的质量评估工具以支持生物医学研究。
AI.method: 设计包含节点和边门控机制的门控图变换器（GGT），通过控制图消息传递中的信息流来预测3D蛋白质复合物结构质量，并在四个公开数据集上训练验证。
AI.result: DProQ在蛋白质复合物结构排名任务中达到最先进的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DProQ通过创新的门控图变换器框架和公开数据集，有效解决了蛋白质复合物结构质量评估的关键挑战。

authors_text: Denny Zhou,Nathanael Schärli,Le Hou,Jason Wei,Nathan Scales,Xuezhi Wang,Dale Schuurmans,Claire Cui,Olivier Bousquet,Quoc Le,Ed Chi
title: Least-to-Most Prompting Enables Complex Reasoning in Large Language Models
title_zh: 从最少到最多的提示可以在大型语言模型中进行复杂的推理
abstract: Chain-of-thought prompting has demonstrated remarkable performance on various natural language reasoning tasks. However, it tends to perform poorly on tasks which requires solving problems harder than the exemplars shown in the prompts. To overcome this challenge of easy-to-hard generalization, we propose a novel prompting strategy, least-to-most prompting. The key idea in this strategy is to break down a complex problem into a series of simpler subproblems and then solve them in sequence. Solving each subproblem is facilitated by the answers to previously solved subproblems. Our experimental results on tasks related to symbolic manipulation, compositional generalization, and math reasoning reveal that least-to-most prompting is capable of generalizing to more difficult problems than those seen in the prompts. A notable finding is that when the GPT-3 code-davinci-002 model is used with least-to-most prompting, it can solve the compositional generalization benchmark SCAN in any split (including length split) with an accuracy of at least 99% using just 14 exemplars, compared to only 16% accuracy with chain-of-thought prompting. This is particularly noteworthy because neural-symbolic models in the literature that specialize in solving SCAN are trained on the entire training set containing over 15,000 examples. We have included prompts for all the tasks in the Appendix.

This is particularly noteworthy because neural-symbolic models in the literature that specialize in solving SCAN are trained on the entire training set containing over 15,000 examples. We have included prompts for all the tasks in the Appendix.
abstract_zh: 思维链提示在各种自然语言推理任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它往往在需要比提示中显示的示例更难解决问题的任务上表现不佳。为了克服从易到难的泛化挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的提示策略，即从最少到最多的提示。该策略的关键思想是将复杂问题分解为一系列更简单的子问题，然后按顺序解决它们。先前解决的子问题的答案有助于解决每个子问题。我们对与符号操作、组合概括和数学推理相关的任务的实验结果表明，从最少到最多的提示能够概括出比提示中看到的更困难的问题。一个值得注意的发现是，当 GPT-3 code-davinci-002 模型与从最少到最多的提示一起使用时，它可以仅使用 14 个样本来解决任何分割（包括长度分割）中的组合泛化基准 SCAN，准确率至少为 99%，而使用思想链提示的准确率仅为 16%。这是特别值得注意的，因为文献中专门解决 SCAN 的神经符号模型是在包含超过 15,000 个示例的整个训练集上进行训练的。我们在附录中包含了所有任务的提示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'least-to-most prompting'的新策略，通过将复杂问题分解为简单子问题逐步解决，提升大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的chain-of-thought提示方法在处理超出提示示例难度的任务时表现不佳，亟需一种能有效解决复杂问题的新型提示策略。
AI.method: 将复杂问题拆解为一系列简单子问题，利用已解决子问题的答案逐步推导，最终解决原问题。
AI.result: 在SCAN等基准测试中，使用该方法的GPT-3模型仅需14个示例即可达到99%准确率，远超chain-of-thought方法的16%。
AI.conclusion: least-to-most prompting能有效提升模型在符号操作、组合泛化和数学推理等任务中的表现，且优于专门设计的神经符号模型。

search_text: Least-to-Most Prompting Enables Complex Reasoning in Large Language Models 从最少到最多的提示可以在大型语言模型中进行复杂的推理 Chain-of-thought prompting has demonstrated remarkable performance on various natural language reasoning tasks. However, it tends to perform poorly on tasks which requires solving problems harder than the exemplars shown in the prompts. To overcome this challenge of easy-to-hard generalization, we propose a novel prompting strategy, least-to-most prompting. The key idea in this strategy is to break down a complex problem into a series of simpler subproblems and then solve them in sequence. Solving each subproblem is facilitated by the answers to previously solved subproblems. Our experimental results on tasks related to symbolic manipulation, compositional generalization, and math reasoning reveal that least-to-most prompting is capable of generalizing to more difficult problems than those seen in the prompts. A notable finding is that when the GPT-3 code-davinci-002 model is used with least-to-most prompting, it can solve the compositional generalization benchmark SCAN in any split (including length split) with an accuracy of at least 99% using just 14 exemplars, compared to only 16% accuracy with chain-of-thought prompting. This is particularly noteworthy because neural-symbolic models in the literature that specialize in solving SCAN are trained on the entire training set containing over 15,000 examples. We have included prompts for all the tasks in the Appendix. 思维链提示在各种自然语言推理任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它往往在需要比提示中显示的示例更难解决问题的任务上表现不佳。为了克服从易到难的泛化挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的提示策略，即从最少到最多的提示。该策略的关键思想是将复杂问题分解为一系列更简单的子问题，然后按顺序解决它们。先前解决的子问题的答案有助于解决每个子问题。我们对与符号操作、组合概括和数学推理相关的任务的实验结果表明，从最少到最多的提示能够概括出比提示中看到的更困难的问题。一个值得注意的发现是，当 GPT-3 code-davinci-002 模型与从最少到最多的提示一起使用时，它可以仅使用 14 个样本来解决任何分割（包括长度分割）中的组合泛化基准 SCAN，准确率至少为 99%，而使用思想链提示的准确率仅为 16%。这是特别值得注意的，因为文献中专门解决 SCAN 的神经符号模型是在包含超过 15,000 个示例的整个训练集上进行训练的。我们在附录中包含了所有任务的提示。 本文提出了一种名为'least-to-most prompting'的新策略，通过将复杂问题分解为简单子问题逐步解决，提升大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。 Denny Zhou,Nathanael Schärli,Le Hou,Jason Wei,Nathan Scales,Xuezhi Wang,Dale Schuurmans,Claire Cui,Olivier Bousquet,Quoc Le,Ed Chi cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Xuhong Wang,Sirui Chen,Yixuan He,Minjie Wang,Quan Gan,Yupu Yang,Junchi Yan
title: CEP3: Community Event Prediction with Neural Point Process on Graph
title_zh: CEP3：使用图上神经点过程进行社区事件预测
abstract: Many real world applications can be formulated as event forecasting on Continuous Time Dynamic Graphs (CTDGs) where the occurrence of a timed event between two entities is represented as an edge along with its occurrence timestamp in the graphs.However, most previous works approach the problem in compromised settings, either formulating it as a link prediction task on the graph given the event time or a time prediction problem given which event will happen next. In this paper, we propose a novel model combining Graph Neural Networks and Marked Temporal Point Process (MTPP) that jointly forecasts multiple link events and their timestamps on communities over a CTDG. Moreover, to scale our model to large graphs, we factorize the jointly event prediction problem into three easier conditional probability modeling problems.To evaluate the effectiveness of our model and the rationale behind such a decomposition, we establish a set of benchmarks and evaluation metrics for this event forecasting task. Our experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our model in terms of both model accuracy and training efficiency.
summary: Many real world applications can be formulated as event forecasting on Continuous Time Dynamic Graphs (CTDGs) where the occurrence of a timed event between two entities is represented as an edge along with its occurrence timestamp in the graphs.However, most previous works approach the problem in compromised settings, either formulating it as a link prediction task on the graph given the event time or a time prediction problem given which event will happen next. In this paper, we propose a novel model combining Graph Neural Networks and Marked Temporal Point Process (MTPP) that jointly forecasts multiple link events and their timestamps on communities over a CTDG. Moreover, to scale our model to large graphs, we factorize the jointly event prediction problem into three easier conditional probability modeling problems.To evaluate the effectiveness of our model and the rationale behind such a decomposition, we establish a set of benchmarks and evaluation metrics for this event forecasting task. Our experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our model in terms of both model accuracy and training efficiency.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的应用程序可以被表述为连续时间动态图（CTDG）上的事件预测，其中两个实体之间的定时事件的发生被表示为图中的边及其发生时间戳。然而，大多数先前的工作在妥协的设置中解决该问题，要么将其表述为给定事件时间的图上的链接预测任务，要么在给定下一个事件发生的情况下将其表述为时间预测问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合图神经网络和标记时间点过程（MTPP）的新颖模型，该模型通过 CTDG 联合预测社区上的多个链接事件及其时间戳。此外，为了将我们的模型扩展到大图，我们将联合事件预测问题分解为三个更简单的条件概率建模问题。为了评估我们模型的有效性以及这种分解背后的基本原理，我们为该事件预测任务建立了一组基准和评估指标。我们的实验证明了我们的模型在模型准确性和训练效率方面的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEP3模型，结合图神经网络与标记时间点过程，实现对连续时间动态图中社区事件的联合预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将事件预测任务拆分为链接预测或时间预测，无法同时建模事件关联性与时间动态性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计融合图神经网络（GNN）与标记时间点过程（MTPP）的联合模型，通过分解为三个条件概率子问题提升大规模图的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证，CEP3在预测精度与训练效率均优于现有方法，且分解策略有效性得到实验支持。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模事件关联性与时间动态性可显著提升预测性能，分解策略为大规模动态图事件预测提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zifeng Ding,Bailan He,Yunpu Ma,Zhen Han,Volker Tresp
title: Learning Meta Representations of One-shot Relations for Temporal Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
title_zh: 学习用于时态知识图链接预测的一次性关系的元表示
abstract: Few-shot relational learning for static knowledge graphs (KGs) has drawn greater interest in recent years, while few-shot learning for temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) has hardly been studied. Compared to KGs, TKGs contain rich temporal information, thus requiring temporal reasoning techniques for modeling. This poses a greater challenge in learning few-shot relations in the temporal context. In this paper, we follow the previous work that focuses on few-shot relational learning on static KGs and extend two fundamental TKG reasoning tasks, i.e., interpolated and extrapolated link prediction, to the one-shot setting. We propose four new large-scale benchmark datasets and develop a TKG reasoning model for learning one-shot relations in TKGs. Experimental results show that our model can achieve superior performance on all datasets in both TKG link prediction tasks.
summary: Few-shot relational learning for static knowledge graphs (KGs) has drawn greater interest in recent years, while few-shot learning for temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) has hardly been studied. Compared to KGs, TKGs contain rich temporal information, thus requiring temporal reasoning techniques for modeling. This poses a greater challenge in learning few-shot relations in the temporal context. In this paper, we follow the previous work that focuses on few-shot relational learning on static KGs and extend two fundamental TKG reasoning tasks, i.e., interpolated and extrapolated link prediction, to the one-shot setting. We propose four new large-scale benchmark datasets and develop a TKG reasoning model for learning one-shot relations in TKGs. Experimental results show that our model can achieve superior performance on all datasets in both TKG link prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，静态知识图（KG）的小样本关系学习引起了越来越多的兴趣，而时态知识图（TKG）的小样本学习却很少被研究。与 KG 相比，TKG 包含丰富的时间信息，因此需要时间推理技术进行建模。这对学习时间背景下的小样本关系提出了更大的挑战。在本文中，我们沿袭了之前专注于静态 KG 的少样本关系学习的工作，并将两个基本的 TKG 推理任务（即插值和外推链接预测）扩展到了单样本设置。我们提出了四个新的大规模基准数据集，并开发了一种 TKG 推理模型，用于学习 TKG 中的一次性关系。实验结果表明，我们的模型在两个 TKG 链路预测任务中都能在所有数据集上取得优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对时态知识图谱（TKG）的元表示学习方法，用于解决单次样本关系下的时间链路预测问题。
AI.motivation: 静态知识图谱的少样本关系学习已获关注，但时态知识图谱因包含丰富的时间信息，其少样本学习研究仍显不足，需开发新的时序推理技术。
AI.method: 扩展静态知识图谱的少样本学习框架，提出四类大规模基准数据集，并设计TKG推理模型以学习时序上下文中的单样本关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在所有数据集的插值和外推链路预测任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效捕捉了时态知识图谱中的时间依赖性，为少样本时序关系学习提供了新思路和基准支持。

motivation: 静态知识图谱的少样本关系学习已获关注，但时态知识图谱因包含丰富的时间信息，其少样本学习研究仍显不足，需开发新的时序推理技术。
method: 扩展静态知识图谱的少样本学习框架，提出四类大规模基准数据集，并设计TKG推理模型以学习时序上下文中的单样本关系。
result: 实验表明，该模型在所有数据集的插值和外推链路预测任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能。
conclusion: 本文方法有效捕捉了时态知识图谱中的时间依赖性，为少样本时序关系学习提供了新思路和基准支持。
search_text: Learning Meta Representations of One-shot Relations for Temporal Knowledge Graph Link Prediction 学习用于时态知识图链接预测的一次性关系的元表示 Few-shot relational learning for static knowledge graphs (KGs) has drawn greater interest in recent years, while few-shot learning for temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) has hardly been studied. Compared to KGs, TKGs contain rich temporal information, thus requiring temporal reasoning techniques for modeling. This poses a greater challenge in learning few-shot relations in the temporal context. In this paper, we follow the previous work that focuses on few-shot relational learning on static KGs and extend two fundamental TKG reasoning tasks, i.e., interpolated and extrapolated link prediction, to the one-shot setting. We propose four new large-scale benchmark datasets and develop a TKG reasoning model for learning one-shot relations in TKGs. Experimental results show that our model can achieve superior performance on all datasets in both TKG link prediction tasks. 近年来，静态知识图（KG）的小样本关系学习引起了越来越多的兴趣，而时态知识图（TKG）的小样本学习却很少被研究。与 KG 相比，TKG 包含丰富的时间信息，因此需要时间推理技术进行建模。这对学习时间背景下的小样本关系提出了更大的挑战。在本文中，我们沿袭了之前专注于静态 KG 的少样本关系学习的工作，并将两个基本的 TKG 推理任务（即插值和外推链接预测）扩展到了单样本设置。我们提出了四个新的大规模基准数据集，并开发了一种 TKG 推理模型，用于学习 TKG 中的一次性关系。实验结果表明，我们的模型在两个 TKG 链路预测任务中都能在所有数据集上取得优异的性能。 本文提出了一种针对时态知识图谱（TKG）的元表示学习方法，用于解决单次样本关系下的时间链路预测问题。 Zifeng Ding,Bailan He,Yunpu Ma,Zhen Han,Volker Tresp cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zihan Zhang,Xiang Xiang,Xuehua Peng,Jianbo Shao
title: A Pilot Study of Relating MYCN-Gene Amplification with Neuroblastoma-Patient CT Scans
title_zh: MYCN 基因扩增与神经母细胞瘤患者 CT 扫描相关的初步研究
abstract: Neuroblastoma is one of the most common cancers in infants, and the initial diagnosis of this disease is difficult. At present, the MYCN gene amplification (MNA) status is detected by invasive pathological examination of tumor samples. This is time-consuming and may have a hidden impact on children. To handle this problem, we adopt multiple machine learning (ML) algorithms to predict the presence or absence of MYCN gene amplification. The dataset is composed of retrospective CT images of 23 neuroblastoma patients. Different from previous work, we develop the algorithm without manually-segmented primary tumors which is time-consuming and not practical. Instead, we only need the coordinate of the center point and the number of tumor slices given by a subspecialty-trained pediatric radiologist. Specifically, CNN-based method uses pre-trained convolutional neural network, and radiomics-based method extracts radiomics features. Our results show that CNN-based method outperforms the radiomics-based method.
summary: Neuroblastoma is one of the most common cancers in infants, and the initial diagnosis of this disease is difficult. At present, the MYCN gene amplification (MNA) status is detected by invasive pathological examination of tumor samples. This is time-consuming and may have a hidden impact on children. To handle this problem, we adopt multiple machine learning (ML) algorithms to predict the presence or absence of MYCN gene amplification. The dataset is composed of retrospective CT images of 23 neuroblastoma patients. Different from previous work, we develop the algorithm without manually-segmented primary tumors which is time-consuming and not practical. Instead, we only need the coordinate of the center point and the number of tumor slices given by a subspecialty-trained pediatric radiologist. Specifically, CNN-based method uses pre-trained convolutional neural network, and radiomics-based method extracts radiomics features. Our results show that CNN-based method outperforms the radiomics-based method.
abstract_zh: 神经母细胞瘤是婴儿最常见的癌症之一，这种疾病的初步诊断很困难。目前，MYCN基因扩增（MNA）状态是通过对肿瘤样本进行有创病理检查来检测的。这样既费时又可能对孩子产生隐性影响。为了解决这个问题，我们采用多种机器学习（ML）算法来预测 MYCN 基因扩增是否存在。该数据集由 23 名神经母细胞瘤患者的回顾性 CT 图像组成。与之前的工作不同，我们开发的算法没有手动分割原发肿瘤，既耗时又不实用。相反，我们只需要由经过专业培训的儿科放射科医生给出的中心点坐标和肿瘤切片数量。具体来说，基于CNN的方法使用预训练的卷积神经网络，基于放射组学的方法提取放射组学特征。我们的结果表明，基于 CNN 的方法优于基于放射组学的方法。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在通过机器学习算法，基于CT扫描图像预测神经母细胞瘤患者的MYCN基因扩增状态，避免传统侵入性病理检查。
AI.motivation: 传统MYCN基因扩增检测依赖侵入性病理检查，耗时且可能对儿童造成伤害，需开发非侵入性替代方案。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）和放射组学方法，利用放射科医生提供的肿瘤中心坐标及切片数量，无需手动分割肿瘤区域。
AI.result: 基于CNN的方法在预测MYCN扩增状态上优于放射组学方法。
AI.conclusion: CNN方法可有效替代传统检测手段，为临床提供快速、非侵入的MYCN扩增预测方案。

authors_text: Sen Pei,Jiaxi Sun,Xiaopeng Zhang,Gaofeng Meng
title: Gradient Concealment: Free Lunch for Defending Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 梯度隐藏：防御对抗性攻击的免费午餐
abstract: Recent studies show that the deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved great success in various tasks. However, even the \emph{state-of-the-art} deep learning based classifiers are extremely vulnerable to adversarial examples, resulting in sharp decay of discrimination accuracy in the presence of enormous unknown attacks. Given the fact that neural networks are widely used in the open world scenario which can be safety-critical situations, mitigating the adversarial effects of deep learning methods has become an urgent need. Generally, conventional DNNs can be attacked with a dramatically high success rate since their gradient is exposed thoroughly in the white-box scenario, making it effortless to ruin a well trained classifier with only imperceptible perturbations in the raw data space. For tackling this problem, we propose a plug-and-play layer that is training-free, termed as \textbf{G}radient \textbf{C}oncealment \textbf{M}odule (GCM), concealing the vulnerable direction of gradient while guaranteeing the classification accuracy during the inference time. GCM reports superior defense results on the ImageNet classification benchmark, improving up to 63.41\% top-1 attack robustness (AR) when faced with adversarial inputs compared to the vanilla DNNs. Moreover, we use GCM in the CVPR 2022 Robust Classification Challenge, currently achieving \textbf{2nd} place in Phase II with only a tiny version of ConvNext. The code will be made available.
summary: Recent studies show that the deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved great success in various tasks. However, even the \emph{state-of-the-art} deep learning based classifiers are extremely vulnerable to adversarial examples, resulting in sharp decay of discrimination accuracy in the presence of enormous unknown attacks. Given the fact that neural networks are widely used in the open world scenario which can be safety-critical situations, mitigating the adversarial effects of deep learning methods has become an urgent need. Generally, conventional DNNs can be attacked with a dramatically high success rate since their gradient is exposed thoroughly in the white-box scenario, making it effortless to ruin a well trained classifier with only imperceptible perturbations in the raw data space. For tackling this problem, we propose a plug-and-play layer that is training-free, termed as \textbf{G}radient \textbf{C}oncealment \textbf{M}odule (GCM), concealing the vulnerable direction of gradient while guaranteeing the classification accuracy during the inference time. GCM reports superior defense results on the ImageNet classification benchmark, improving up to 63.41\% top-1 attack robustness (AR) when faced with adversarial inputs compared to the vanilla DNNs. Moreover, we use GCM in the CVPR 2022 Robust Classification Challenge, currently achieving \textbf{2nd} place in Phase II with only a tiny version of ConvNext. The code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明深度神经网络（DNN）在各种任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，即使是最先进的基于深度学习的分类器也极易受到对抗性示例的影响，导致在存在大量未知攻击的情况下判别准确性急剧下降。鉴于神经网络广泛应用于可能是安全关键情况的开放世界场景，减轻深度学习方法的对抗性影响已成为迫切需要。一般来说，传统的 DNN 受到攻击的成功率非常高，因为它们的梯度在白盒场景中完全暴露，因此可以毫不费力地破坏训练有素的分类器，而原始数据空间中只有难以察觉的扰动。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个免训练的即插即用层，称为 \textbf{G}radient \textbf{C}oncealment \textbf{M}odule (GCM)，隐藏梯度的脆弱方向，同时保证推理期间的分类精度。 GCM 在 ImageNet 分类基准上报告了卓越的防御结果，与普通 DNN 相比，在面对对抗性输入时，top-1 攻击鲁棒性 (AR) 提高了 63.41%。此外，我们在 CVPR 2022 鲁棒分类挑战赛中使用 GCM，目前仅使用 ConvNext 的小型版本在第二阶段获得 \textbf{2nd} 名次。该代码将可供使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为梯度遮蔽模块（GCM）的即插即用层，用于在推理时隐藏神经网络的梯度方向，从而提升对抗攻击的防御能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在开放场景中易受对抗样本攻击，尤其在白盒场景下梯度完全暴露，使得攻击者能通过微小扰动轻易破坏分类器性能。
AI.method: 设计一个无需训练的GCM模块，在推理过程中通过遮蔽梯度方向来降低对抗攻击的成功率，同时保持分类准确性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，GCM使对抗鲁棒性提升最高达63.41%；在CVPR 2022鲁棒分类挑战赛中，使用微型ConvNext模型获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: GCM通过简单有效的梯度遮蔽机制显著提升了模型的对抗防御能力，为实际应用中的安全关键场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Shiqi Li,Xiang Xiang
title: Lightweight Human Pose Estimation Using Heatmap-Weighting Loss
title_zh: 使用热图权重损失进行轻量级人体姿势估计
abstract: Recent research on human pose estimation exploits complex structures to improve performance on benchmark datasets, ignoring the resource overhead and inference speed when the model is actually deployed. In this paper, we lighten the computation cost and parameters of the deconvolution head network in SimpleBaseline and introduce an attention mechanism that utilizes original, inter-level, and intra-level information to intensify the accuracy. Additionally, we propose a novel loss function called heatmap weighting loss, which generates weights for each pixel on the heatmap that makes the model more focused on keypoints. Experiments demonstrate our method achieves a balance between performance, resource volume, and inference speed. Specifically, our method can achieve 65.3 AP score on COCO test-dev, while the inference speed is 55 FPS and 18 FPS on the mobile GPU and CPU, respectively.
summary: Recent research on human pose estimation exploits complex structures to improve performance on benchmark datasets, ignoring the resource overhead and inference speed when the model is actually deployed. In this paper, we lighten the computation cost and parameters of the deconvolution head network in SimpleBaseline and introduce an attention mechanism that utilizes original, inter-level, and intra-level information to intensify the accuracy. Additionally, we propose a novel loss function called heatmap weighting loss, which generates weights for each pixel on the heatmap that makes the model more focused on keypoints. Experiments demonstrate our method achieves a balance between performance, resource volume, and inference speed. Specifically, our method can achieve 65.3 AP score on COCO test-dev, while the inference speed is 55 FPS and 18 FPS on the mobile GPU and CPU, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近关于人体姿势估计的研究利用复杂的结构来提高基准数据集的性能，忽略了模型实际部署时的资源开销和推理速度。在本文中，我们减轻了 SimpleBaseline 中反卷积头网络的计算成本和参数，并引入了一种利用原始、层间和层内信息来提高准确性的注意力机制。此外，我们提出了一种称为热图权重损失的新颖损失函数，它为热图上的每个像素生成权重，使模型更加关注关键点。实验证明我们的方法在性能、资源量和推理速度之间实现了平衡。具体来说，我们的方法在 COCO test-dev 上可以达到 65.3 AP 分数，而在移动 GPU 和 CPU 上的推理速度分别为 55 FPS 和 18 FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的人体姿态估计方法，通过引入注意力机制和热图加权损失函数，提高了模型的精度和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体姿态估计方法在复杂结构上取得了良好的性能，但忽略了实际部署时的资源消耗和推理速度问题。
AI.method: 本文对SimpleBaseline中的反卷积头网络进行了轻量化处理，并引入了利用原始、跨层和层内信息的注意力机制。同时，提出了一种新的热图加权损失函数，通过为热图中的每个像素生成权重，使模型更加关注关键点。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在性能、资源消耗和推理速度之间取得了平衡。在COCO测试集上，该方法达到了65.3的AP分数，推理速度在移动GPU和CPU上分别为55 FPS和18 FPS。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法在保持较高精度的同时，显著降低了计算成本和推理时间，适合实际部署。

authors_text: Dianbo Liu,Vedant Shah,Oussama Boussif,Cristian Meo,Anirudh Goyal,Tianmin Shu,Michael Mozer,Nicolas Heess,Yoshua Bengio
title: Coordinating Policies Among Multiple Agents via an Intelligent Communication Channel
title_zh: 通过智能通信通道协调多个代理之间的策略
abstract: In Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), specialized channels are often introduced that allow agents to communicate directly with one another. In this paper, we propose an alternative approach whereby agents communicate through an intelligent facilitator that learns to sift through and interpret signals provided by all agents to improve the agents' collective performance. To ensure that this facilitator does not become a centralized controller, agents are incentivized to reduce their dependence on the messages it conveys, and the messages can only influence the selection of a policy from a fixed set, not instantaneous actions given the policy. We demonstrate the strength of this architecture over existing baselines on several cooperative MARL environments.
summary: In Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), specialized channels are often introduced that allow agents to communicate directly with one another. In this paper, we propose an alternative approach whereby agents communicate through an intelligent facilitator that learns to sift through and interpret signals provided by all agents to improve the agents' collective performance. To ensure that this facilitator does not become a centralized controller, agents are incentivized to reduce their dependence on the messages it conveys, and the messages can only influence the selection of a policy from a fixed set, not instantaneous actions given the policy. We demonstrate the strength of this architecture over existing baselines on several cooperative MARL environments.
abstract_zh: 在多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，经常引入专门的通道，允许智能体彼此直接通信。在本文中，我们提出了一种替代方法，即智能体通过智能促进器进行通信，智能促进器学会筛选和解释所有智能体提供的信号，以提高智能体的集体绩效。为了确保该促进者不会成为中心化控制器，代理会被激励减少对其所传达的消息的依赖，并且消息只能影响从固定集合中选择策略，而不能影响给定策略的即时操作。我们在几个合作的 MARL 环境中展示了该架构相对于现有基线的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过智能中介协调多智能体策略的方法，避免中心化控制并提升集体性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MARL中直接通信可能导致中心化控制风险，而现有方法在协调效率与去中心化之间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 设计智能中介筛选并解释所有智能体信号，通过约束消息仅影响策略选择而非即时动作，并激励智能体降低对中介依赖。
AI.result: 在多个合作型MARL环境中验证了该架构优于现有基线，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持去中心化的同时提升了多智能体协作效率，为MARL通信机制提供新思路。

authors_text: Li Yang,Zhibin He,Changhe Li,Junwei Han,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu,Tuo Zhang
title: Brain Cortical Functional Gradients Predict Cortical Folding Patterns via Attention Mesh Convolution
title_zh: 大脑皮质功能梯度通过注意力网格卷积预测皮质折叠模式
abstract: Since gyri and sulci, two basic anatomical building blocks of cortical folding patterns, were suggested to bear different functional roles, a precise mapping from brain function to gyro-sulcal patterns can provide profound insights into both biological and artificial neural networks. However, there lacks a generic theory and effective computational model so far, due to the highly nonlinear relation between them, huge inter-individual variabilities and a sophisticated description of brain function regions/networks distribution as mosaics, such that spatial patterning of them has not been considered. we adopted brain functional gradients derived from resting-state fMRI to embed the "gradual" change of functional connectivity patterns, and developed a novel attention mesh convolution model to predict cortical gyro-sulcal segmentation maps on individual brains. The convolution on mesh considers the spatial organization of functional gradients and folding patterns on a cortical sheet and the newly designed channel attention block enhances the interpretability of the contribution of different functional gradients to cortical folding prediction. Experiments show that the prediction performance via our model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. In addition, we found that the dominant functional gradients contribute less to folding prediction. On the activation maps of the last layer, some well-studied cortical landmarks are found on the borders of, rather than within, the highly activated regions. These results and findings suggest that a specifically designed artificial neural network can improve the precision of the mapping between brain functions and cortical folding patterns, and can provide valuable insight of brain anatomy-function relation for neuroscience.
summary: Since gyri and sulci, two basic anatomical building blocks of cortical folding patterns, were suggested to bear different functional roles, a precise mapping from brain function to gyro-sulcal patterns can provide profound insights into both biological and artificial neural networks. However, there lacks a generic theory and effective computational model so far, due to the highly nonlinear relation between them, huge inter-individual variabilities and a sophisticated description of brain function regions/networks distribution as mosaics, such that spatial patterning of them has not been considered. we adopted brain functional gradients derived from resting-state fMRI to embed the "gradual" change of functional connectivity patterns, and developed a novel attention mesh convolution model to predict cortical gyro-sulcal segmentation maps on individual brains. The convolution on mesh considers the spatial organization of functional gradients and folding patterns on a cortical sheet and the newly designed channel attention block enhances the interpretability of the contribution of different functional gradients to cortical folding prediction. Experiments show that the prediction performance via our model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. In addition, we found that the dominant functional gradients contribute less to folding prediction. On the activation maps of the last layer, some well-studied cortical landmarks are found on the borders of, rather than within, the highly activated regions. These results and findings suggest that a specifically designed artificial neural network can improve the precision of the mapping between brain functions and cortical folding patterns, and can provide valuable insight of brain anatomy-function relation for neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 由于脑回和脑沟这两个皮质折叠模式的基本解剖结构单元被认为具有不同的功能作用，因此从大脑功能到脑沟模式的精确映射可以为生物和人工神经网络提供深刻的见解。然而，由于它们之间的高度非线性关系、巨大的个体间差异以及对大脑功能区域/网络分布马赛克的复杂描述，迄今为止还缺乏通用的理论和有效的计算模型，从而没有考虑它们的空间模式。我们采用源自静息态功能磁共振成像的大脑功能梯度来嵌入功能连接模式的“逐渐”变化，并开发了一种新颖的注意力网格卷积模型来预测个体大脑上的皮质陀螺-脑沟分割图。网格上的卷积考虑了皮质片上功能梯度和折叠模式的空间组织，新设计的通道注意块增强了不同功能梯度对皮质折叠预测的贡献的可解释性。实验表明，我们的模型的预测性能优于其他最先进的模型。此外，我们发现主要功能梯度对折叠预测的贡献较小。在最后一层的激活图上，在高度激活区域的边界而不是内部发现了一些经过充分研究的皮质标志。这些结果和发现表明，专门设计的人工神经网络可以提高大脑功能和皮质折叠模式之间映射的精度，并且可以为神经科学提供关于大脑解剖功能关系的宝贵见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意机制的网格卷积模型，用于预测大脑皮层褶皱模式，并建立功能梯度与皮层折叠之间的映射关系。
AI.motivation: 皮层沟回与功能区域存在复杂非线性关系，现有理论缺乏有效计算模型来描述功能分布与折叠模式的空间关联性。
AI.method: 采用静息态fMRI功能梯度嵌入功能连接模式的渐变特征，设计注意网格卷积模型，结合空间组织特征与通道注意力机制增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: 模型预测性能优于现有方法，发现主导功能梯度对折叠预测贡献较小，激活区域边界存在经典皮层标志物。
AI.conclusion: 定制化神经网络可提升功能与折叠模式映射精度，为神经科学提供解剖-功能关系的新见解。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意机制的网格卷积模型，用于预测大脑皮层褶皱模式，并建立功能梯度与皮层折叠之间的映射关系。
motivation: 皮层沟回与功能区域存在复杂非线性关系，现有理论缺乏有效计算模型来描述功能分布与折叠模式的空间关联性。
method: 采用静息态fMRI功能梯度嵌入功能连接模式的渐变特征，设计注意网格卷积模型，结合空间组织特征与通道注意力机制增强模型可解释性。
result: 模型预测性能优于现有方法，发现主导功能梯度对折叠预测贡献较小，激活区域边界存在经典皮层标志物。
conclusion: 定制化神经网络可提升功能与折叠模式映射精度，为神经科学提供解剖-功能关系的新见解。
search_text: Brain Cortical Functional Gradients Predict Cortical Folding Patterns via Attention Mesh Convolution 大脑皮质功能梯度通过注意力网格卷积预测皮质折叠模式 Since gyri and sulci, two basic anatomical building blocks of cortical folding patterns, were suggested to bear different functional roles, a precise mapping from brain function to gyro-sulcal patterns can provide profound insights into both biological and artificial neural networks. However, there lacks a generic theory and effective computational model so far, due to the highly nonlinear relation between them, huge inter-individual variabilities and a sophisticated description of brain function regions/networks distribution as mosaics, such that spatial patterning of them has not been considered. we adopted brain functional gradients derived from resting-state fMRI to embed the "gradual" change of functional connectivity patterns, and developed a novel attention mesh convolution model to predict cortical gyro-sulcal segmentation maps on individual brains. The convolution on mesh considers the spatial organization of functional gradients and folding patterns on a cortical sheet and the newly designed channel attention block enhances the interpretability of the contribution of different functional gradients to cortical folding prediction. Experiments show that the prediction performance via our model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. In addition, we found that the dominant functional gradients contribute less to folding prediction. On the activation maps of the last layer, some well-studied cortical landmarks are found on the borders of, rather than within, the highly activated regions. These results and findings suggest that a specifically designed artificial neural network can improve the precision of the mapping between brain functions and cortical folding patterns, and can provide valuable insight of brain anatomy-function relation for neuroscience. 由于脑回和脑沟这两个皮质折叠模式的基本解剖结构单元被认为具有不同的功能作用，因此从大脑功能到脑沟模式的精确映射可以为生物和人工神经网络提供深刻的见解。然而，由于它们之间的高度非线性关系、巨大的个体间差异以及对大脑功能区域/网络分布马赛克的复杂描述，迄今为止还缺乏通用的理论和有效的计算模型，从而没有考虑它们的空间模式。我们采用源自静息态功能磁共振成像的大脑功能梯度来嵌入功能连接模式的“逐渐”变化，并开发了一种新颖的注意力网格卷积模型来预测个体大脑上的皮质陀螺-脑沟分割图。网格上的卷积考虑了皮质片上功能梯度和折叠模式的空间组织，新设计的通道注意块增强了不同功能梯度对皮质折叠预测的贡献的可解释性。实验表明，我们的模型的预测性能优于其他最先进的模型。此外，我们发现主要功能梯度对折叠预测的贡献较小。在最后一层的激活图上，在高度激活区域的边界而不是内部发现了一些经过充分研究的皮质标志。这些结果和发现表明，专门设计的人工神经网络可以提高大脑功能和皮质折叠模式之间映射的精度，并且可以为神经科学提供关于大脑解剖功能关系的宝贵见解。 本文提出了一种基于注意机制的网格卷积模型，用于预测大脑皮层褶皱模式，并建立功能梯度与皮层折叠之间的映射关系。 Li Yang,Zhibin He,Changhe Li,Junwei Han,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu,Tuo Zhang q-bio.NC,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Ji Liu,Peiyi Li,Huiyang Zhou
title: Not All SWAPs Have the Same Cost: A Case for Optimization-Aware Qubit Routing
title_zh: 并非所有交换都具有相同的成本：优化感知量子位路由的案例
abstract: Despite rapid advances in quantum computing technologies, the qubit connectivity limitation remains to be a critical challenge. Both near-term NISQ quantum computers and relatively long-term scalable quantum architectures do not offer full connectivity. As a result, quantum circuits may not be directly executed on quantum hardware, and a quantum compiler needs to perform qubit routing to make the circuit compatible with the device layout. During the qubit routing step, the compiler inserts SWAP gates and performs circuit transformations. Given the connectivity topology of the target hardware, there are typically multiple qubit routing candidates. The state-of-the-art compilers use a cost function to evaluate the number of SWAP gates for different routes and then select the one with the minimum number of SWAP gates. After qubit routing, the quantum compiler performs gate optimizations upon the circuit with the newly inserted SWAP gates. In this paper, we observe that the aforementioned qubit routing is not optimal, and qubit routing should \textit{not} be independent on subsequent gate optimizations. We find that with the consideration of gate optimizations, not all of the SWAP gates have the same basis-gate cost. These insights lead to the development of our qubit routing algorithm, NASSC (Not All Swaps have the Same Cost). NASSC is the first algorithm that considers the subsequent optimizations during the routing step. Our optimization-aware qubit routing leads to better routing decisions and benefits subsequent optimizations. We also propose a new optimization-aware decomposition for the inserted SWAP gates. Our experiments show that the routing overhead compiled with our routing algorithm is reduced by up to $69.30\%$ ($21.30\%$ on average) in the number of CNOT gates and up to $43.50\%$ ($7.61\%$ on average) in the circuit depth compared with the state-of-the-art scheme, SABRE.
summary: Despite rapid advances in quantum computing technologies, the qubit connectivity limitation remains to be a critical challenge. Both near-term NISQ quantum computers and relatively long-term scalable quantum architectures do not offer full connectivity. As a result, quantum circuits may not be directly executed on quantum hardware, and a quantum compiler needs to perform qubit routing to make the circuit compatible with the device layout. During the qubit routing step, the compiler inserts SWAP gates and performs circuit transformations. Given the connectivity topology of the target hardware, there are typically multiple qubit routing candidates. The state-of-the-art compilers use a cost function to evaluate the number of SWAP gates for different routes and then select the one with the minimum number of SWAP gates. After qubit routing, the quantum compiler performs gate optimizations upon the circuit with the newly inserted SWAP gates. In this paper, we observe that the aforementioned qubit routing is not optimal, and qubit routing should \textit{not} be independent on subsequent gate optimizations. We find that with the consideration of gate optimizations, not all of the SWAP gates have the same basis-gate cost. These insights lead to the development of our qubit routing algorithm, NASSC (Not All Swaps have the Same Cost). NASSC is the first algorithm that considers the subsequent optimizations during the routing step. Our optimization-aware qubit routing leads to better routing decisions and benefits subsequent optimizations. We also propose a new optimization-aware decomposition for the inserted SWAP gates. Our experiments show that the routing overhead compiled with our routing algorithm is reduced by up to $69.30\%$ ($21.30\%$ on average) in the number of CNOT gates and up to $43.50\%$ ($7.61\%$ on average) in the circuit depth compared with the state-of-the-art scheme, SABRE.
abstract_zh: 尽管量子计算技术取得了快速进步，但量子位连接限制仍然是一个严峻的挑战。近期的 NISQ 量子计算机和相对长期的可扩展量子架构都不提供完全连接。因此，量子电路可能无法直接在量子硬件上执行，并且量子编译器需要执行量子位路由以使电路与器件布局兼容。在量子位路由步骤中，编译器插入交换门并执行电路转换。给定目标硬件的连接拓扑，通常存在多个候选量子位路由。最先进的编译器使用成本函数来评估不同路由的 SWAP 门数量，然后选择 SWAP 门数量最少的一个。在量子位路由之后，量子编译器使用新插入的交换门对电路执行门优化。在本文中，我们观察到上述量子位路由不是最优的，并且量子位路由应该 \textit{not} 独立于后续的门优化。我们发现，考虑到门优化，并非所有的 SWAP 门都具有相同的基础门成本。这些见解促成了我们的量子位路由算法 NASSC（并非所有交换都具有相同成本）的开发。 NASSC 是第一个在路由步骤中考虑后续优化的算法。我们的优化感知量子位路由可以带来更好的路由决策，并有利于后续优化。我们还为插入的交换门提出了一种新的优化感知分解。我们的实验表明，与最先进的方案 SABRE 相比，使用我们的路由算法编译的路由开销在 CNOT 门的数量上减少了高达 $69.30\%$（平均 $21.30\%$），在电路深度上减少了高达 $43.50\%$（平均 $7.61\%$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化感知的量子比特路由算法NASSC，通过考虑后续门优化来改进量子电路编译中的SWAP门插入策略。
AI.motivation: 现有量子编译器在路由阶段仅以SWAP门数量作为成本函数，未考虑后续门优化对整体电路成本的影响，导致路由决策非最优。
AI.method: 开发了首个在路由阶段集成优化感知的算法NASSC，通过动态评估SWAP门对后续优化的潜在影响，并提出新的SWAP门分解方法以降低电路深度和门数量。
AI.result: 实验表明，与SABRE相比，NASSC将CNOT门数量减少最高69.30%（平均21.30%），电路深度减少最高43.50%（平均7.61%）。
AI.conclusion: 将优化感知纳入路由决策能显著提升量子电路编译效率，验证了路由与优化步骤协同设计的有效性。

authors_text: Dong Wei,Ying Sun,Ping Chai,Adrian Low,Sim Heng Ong
title: Myocardial Segmentation of Late Gadolinium Enhanced MR Images by Propagation of Contours from Cine MR Images
title_zh: 通过电影 MR 图像的轮廓传播对晚期钆增强 MR 图像进行心肌分割
abstract: Automatic segmentation of myocardium in Late Gadolinium Enhanced (LGE) Cardiac MR (CMR) images is often difficult due to the intensity heterogeneity resulting from accumulation of contrast agent in infarcted areas. In this paper, we propose an automatic segmentation framework that fully utilizes shared information between corresponding cine and LGE images of a same patient. Given myocardial contours in cine CMR images, the proposed framework achieves accurate segmentation of LGE CMR images in a coarse-to-fine manner. Affine registration is first performed between the corresponding cine and LGE image pair, followed by nonrigid registration, and finally local deformation of myocardial contours driven by forces derived from local features of the LGE image. Experimental results on real patient data with expert outlined ground truth show that the proposed framework can generate accurate and reliable results for myocardial segmentation of LGE CMR images.
summary: Automatic segmentation of myocardium in Late Gadolinium Enhanced (LGE) Cardiac MR (CMR) images is often difficult due to the intensity heterogeneity resulting from accumulation of contrast agent in infarcted areas. In this paper, we propose an automatic segmentation framework that fully utilizes shared information between corresponding cine and LGE images of a same patient. Given myocardial contours in cine CMR images, the proposed framework achieves accurate segmentation of LGE CMR images in a coarse-to-fine manner. Affine registration is first performed between the corresponding cine and LGE image pair, followed by nonrigid registration, and finally local deformation of myocardial contours driven by forces derived from local features of the LGE image. Experimental results on real patient data with expert outlined ground truth show that the proposed framework can generate accurate and reliable results for myocardial segmentation of LGE CMR images.
abstract_zh: 由于梗塞区域造影剂积聚导致强度不均匀，在晚期钆增强 (LGE) 心脏 MR (CMR) 图像中自动分割心肌通常很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动分割框架，该框架充分利用同一患者的相应电影和 LGE 图像之间的共享信息。给定电影 CMR 图像中的心肌轮廓，所提出的框架以从粗到细的方式实现了 LGE CMR 图像的精确分割。首先在相应的电影和 LGE 图像对之间执行仿射配准，然后进行非刚性配准，最后由源自 LGE 图像局部特征的力驱动心肌轮廓的局部变形。根据专家概述的真实患者数据进行的实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以为 LGE CMR 图像的心肌分割生成准确可靠的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用动态心脏MRI图像轮廓传播实现晚期钆增强MRI图像心肌分割的框架。
AI.motivation: 晚期钆增强心脏MRI图像因对比剂在坏死区域的积累导致强度不均匀，传统自动分割方法难以准确识别心肌边界。
AI.method: 通过仿射配准与非刚性配准对齐动态MRI与LGE图像，再基于LGE图像局部特征驱动心肌轮廓的局部变形优化。
AI.result: 在真实患者数据集上验证表明，该框架能生成准确可靠的心肌分割结果，与专家标注一致。
AI.conclusion: 结合多模态影像信息的轮廓传播框架有效提升了LGE图像心肌分割的精度与稳定性。
