conclusion: 结合多模态影像信息的轮廓传播框架有效提升了LGE图像心肌分割的精度与稳定性。
search_text: Myocardial Segmentation of Late Gadolinium Enhanced MR Images by Propagation of Contours from Cine MR Images 通过电影 MR 图像的轮廓传播对晚期钆增强 MR 图像进行心肌分割 Automatic segmentation of myocardium in Late Gadolinium Enhanced (LGE) Cardiac MR (CMR) images is often difficult due to the intensity heterogeneity resulting from accumulation of contrast agent in infarcted areas. In this paper, we propose an automatic segmentation framework that fully utilizes shared information between corresponding cine and LGE images of a same patient. Given myocardial contours in cine CMR images, the proposed framework achieves accurate segmentation of LGE CMR images in a coarse-to-fine manner. Affine registration is first performed between the corresponding cine and LGE image pair, followed by nonrigid registration, and finally local deformation of myocardial contours driven by forces derived from local features of the LGE image. Experimental results on real patient data with expert outlined ground truth show that the proposed framework can generate accurate and reliable results for myocardial segmentation of LGE CMR images. 由于梗塞区域造影剂积聚导致强度不均匀，在晚期钆增强 (LGE) 心脏 MR (CMR) 图像中自动分割心肌通常很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动分割框架，该框架充分利用同一患者的相应电影和 LGE 图像之间的共享信息。给定电影 CMR 图像中的心肌轮廓，所提出的框架以从粗到细的方式实现了 LGE CMR 图像的精确分割。首先在相应的电影和 LGE 图像对之间执行仿射配准，然后进行非刚性配准，最后由源自 LGE 图像局部特征的力驱动心肌轮廓的局部变形。根据专家概述的真实患者数据进行的实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以为 LGE CMR 图像的心肌分割生成准确可靠的结果。 本文提出一种利用动态心脏MRI图像轮廓传播实现晚期钆增强MRI图像心肌分割的框架。 Dong Wei,Ying Sun,Ping Chai,Adrian Low,Sim Heng Ong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kaijian Li,Shansan Gong,Kenny Q. Zhu
title: Few-Shot Natural Language Inference Generation with PDD: Prompt and Dynamic Demonstration
title_zh: 使用 PDD 进行少样本自然语言推理生成：快速动态演示
abstract: Natural Language Inference Generation task is to generate a text hypothesis given a text premise and a logical relation between the two. This task can be used in data augmentation and controllable text generation in practice. In this paper, we propose language models with prompt and dynamic demonstration (LM-PDD) to tackle this problem in few-shot settings. Our framework outperforms standard fine-tuned models with low resource, achieving an average 8% absolute improvement on SNLI and MNLI datasets, and the results on 13 natural language classification tasks also show that our dynamic demonstration method has good generalizability.
summary: Natural Language Inference Generation task is to generate a text hypothesis given a text premise and a logical relation between the two. This task can be used in data augmentation and controllable text generation in practice. In this paper, we propose language models with prompt and dynamic demonstration (LM-PDD) to tackle this problem in few-shot settings. Our framework outperforms standard fine-tuned models with low resource, achieving an average 8% absolute improvement on SNLI and MNLI datasets, and the results on 13 natural language classification tasks also show that our dynamic demonstration method has good generalizability.
abstract_zh: 自然语言推理生成任务是在给定文本前提和两者之间的逻辑关系的情况下生成文本假设。该任务可用于实践中的数据增强和可控文本生成。在本文中，我们提出了具有提示和动态演示的语言模型（LM-PDD）来解决小镜头设置中的这个问题。我们的框架在资源较少的情况下优于标准的微调模型，在 SNLI 和 MNLI 数据集上实现了平均 8% 的绝对改进，并且在 13 个自然语言分类任务上的结果也表明我们的动态演示方法具有良好的泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在少样本条件下，如何通过提示和动态演示生成自然语言推理假设，以提升数据增强和可控文本生成的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统微调模型在低资源场景下表现不足，需探索更有效的少样本学习方法以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 提出结合提示（Prompt）和动态演示（Dynamic Demonstration）的LM-PDD框架，利用动态示例选择机制增强模型对逻辑关系的理解。
AI.result: 在SNLI和MNLI数据集上平均提升8%，并在13个分类任务中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 动态演示方法有效提升少样本学习效果，为低资源下的自然语言生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Gabriel Machado,Keiller Nogueira,Matheus Barros Pereira,Jefersson Alex dos Santos
title: Facing the Void: Overcoming Missing Data in Multi-View Imagery
title_zh: 面对空白：克服多视图图像中的丢失数据
abstract: In some scenarios, a single input image may not be enough to allow the object classification. In those cases, it is crucial to explore the complementary information extracted from images presenting the same object from multiple perspectives (or views) in order to enhance the general scene understanding and, consequently, increase the performance. However, this task, commonly called multi-view image classification, has a major challenge: missing data. In this paper, we propose a novel technique for multi-view image classification robust to this problem. The proposed method, based on state-of-the-art deep learning-based approaches and metric learning, can be easily adapted and exploited in other applications and domains. A systematic evaluation of the proposed algorithm was conducted using two multi-view aerial-ground datasets with very distinct properties. Results show that the proposed algorithm provides improvements in multi-view image classification accuracy when compared to state-of-the-art methods. Code available at \url{https://github.com/Gabriellm2003/remote_sensing_missing_data}.
summary: In some scenarios, a single input image may not be enough to allow the object classification. In those cases, it is crucial to explore the complementary information extracted from images presenting the same object from multiple perspectives (or views) in order to enhance the general scene understanding and, consequently, increase the performance. However, this task, commonly called multi-view image classification, has a major challenge: missing data. In this paper, we propose a novel technique for multi-view image classification robust to this problem. The proposed method, based on state-of-the-art deep learning-based approaches and metric learning, can be easily adapted and exploited in other applications and domains. A systematic evaluation of the proposed algorithm was conducted using two multi-view aerial-ground datasets with very distinct properties. Results show that the proposed algorithm provides improvements in multi-view image classification accuracy when compared to state-of-the-art methods. Code available at \url{https://github.com/Gabriellm2003/remote_sensing_missing_data}.
abstract_zh: 在某些情况下，单个输入图像可能不足以进行对象分类。在这些情况下，探索从多个视角（或视图）呈现同一对象的图像中提取的补充信息至关重要，以增强一般场景理解，从而提高性能。然而，这项通常称为多视图图像分类的任务面临着一个重大挑战：丢失数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对该问题的多视图图像分类新技术。所提出的方法基于最先进的基于深度学习的方法和度量学习，可以轻松地在其他应用和领域中进行调整和利用。使用两个具有非常不同属性的多视图空地数据集对所提出的算法进行了系统评估。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的算法提高了多视图图像分类的准确性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Gabriellm2003/remote_sensing_missing_data} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多视角图像分类方法，以解决缺失数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 在某些情况下，单个输入图像不足以进行对象分类，需要从多个视角提取互补信息以提高场景理解能力，但多视角图像分类面临缺失数据的重大挑战。
AI.method: 基于最先进的深度学习和度量学习方法，提出了一种新的多视角图像分类技术，并能够轻松适应其他应用和领域。
AI.result: 在两个具有非常不同特性的多视角空中-地面数据集上进行了系统评估，结果表明该算法在多视角图像分类准确性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法在处理多视角图像分类中的缺失数据问题上表现出色，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Ahmad Nickabadi,Maryam Saeedi Fard,Nastaran Moradzadeh Farid,Najmeh Mohammadbagheri
title: A comprehensive survey on semantic facial attribute editing using generative adversarial networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络进行语义面部属性编辑的综合调查
abstract: Generating random photo-realistic images has experienced tremendous growth during the past few years due to the advances of the deep convolutional neural networks and generative models. Among different domains, face photos have received a great deal of attention and a large number of face generation and manipulation models have been proposed. Semantic facial attribute editing is the process of varying the values of one or more attributes of a face image while the other attributes of the image are not affected. The requested modifications are provided as an attribute vector or in the form of driving face image and the whole process is performed by the corresponding models. In this paper, we survey the recent works and advances in semantic facial attribute editing. We cover all related aspects of these models including the related definitions and concepts, architectures, loss functions, datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Based on their architectures, the state-of-the-art models are categorized and studied as encoder-decoder, image-to-image, and photo-guided models. The challenges and restrictions of the current state-of-the-art methods are discussed as well.
summary: Generating random photo-realistic images has experienced tremendous growth during the past few years due to the advances of the deep convolutional neural networks and generative models. Among different domains, face photos have received a great deal of attention and a large number of face generation and manipulation models have been proposed. Semantic facial attribute editing is the process of varying the values of one or more attributes of a face image while the other attributes of the image are not affected. The requested modifications are provided as an attribute vector or in the form of driving face image and the whole process is performed by the corresponding models. In this paper, we survey the recent works and advances in semantic facial attribute editing. We cover all related aspects of these models including the related definitions and concepts, architectures, loss functions, datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Based on their architectures, the state-of-the-art models are categorized and studied as encoder-decoder, image-to-image, and photo-guided models. The challenges and restrictions of the current state-of-the-art methods are discussed as well.
abstract_zh: 由于深度卷积神经网络和生成模型的进步，在过去几年中，生成随机照片级真实感图像经历了巨大的增长。在不同领域中，人脸照片受到了极大的关注，并且提出了大量的人脸生成和操纵模型。语义面部属性编辑是改变面部图像的一个或多个属性的值而不影响图像的其他属性的过程。所请求的修改以属性向量或驾驶面部图像的形式提供，整个过程由相应的模型执行。在本文中，我们调查了语义面部属性编辑的最新工作和进展。我们涵盖了这些模型的所有相关方面，包括相关的定义和概念、架构、损失函数、数据集、评估指标和应用程序。根据其架构，最先进的模型被分类和研究为编码器-解码器、图像到图像和光引导模型。还讨论了当前最先进方法的挑战和限制。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了使用生成对抗网络进行语义面部属性编辑的最新进展，涵盖模型架构、损失函数、数据集及应用等。
AI.motivation: 面部图像生成与编辑技术因深度学习发展而备受关注，但现有方法在属性编辑精度与可控性方面仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过分类分析主流模型架构（编码器-解码器、图像到图像、照片引导模型），总结其技术特点、损失函数设计及评估指标。
AI.result: 系统梳理了当前语义面部属性编辑方法的分类与技术路线，指出现有方法在属性解耦、生成质量及跨域适应性方面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 语义面部编辑需进一步提升属性控制精度与生成真实性，未来研究应关注多模态输入融合与更精细的属性建模。

tldr: 本文综述了使用生成对抗网络进行语义面部属性编辑的最新进展，涵盖模型架构、损失函数、数据集及应用等。
motivation: 面部图像生成与编辑技术因深度学习发展而备受关注，但现有方法在属性编辑精度与可控性方面仍存在挑战。
method: 通过分类分析主流模型架构（编码器-解码器、图像到图像、照片引导模型），总结其技术特点、损失函数设计及评估指标。
result: 系统梳理了当前语义面部属性编辑方法的分类与技术路线，指出现有方法在属性解耦、生成质量及跨域适应性方面的局限性。
conclusion: 语义面部编辑需进一步提升属性控制精度与生成真实性，未来研究应关注多模态输入融合与更精细的属性建模。
search_text: A comprehensive survey on semantic facial attribute editing using generative adversarial networks 使用生成对抗网络进行语义面部属性编辑的综合调查 Generating random photo-realistic images has experienced tremendous growth during the past few years due to the advances of the deep convolutional neural networks and generative models. Among different domains, face photos have received a great deal of attention and a large number of face generation and manipulation models have been proposed. Semantic facial attribute editing is the process of varying the values of one or more attributes of a face image while the other attributes of the image are not affected. The requested modifications are provided as an attribute vector or in the form of driving face image and the whole process is performed by the corresponding models. In this paper, we survey the recent works and advances in semantic facial attribute editing. We cover all related aspects of these models including the related definitions and concepts, architectures, loss functions, datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Based on their architectures, the state-of-the-art models are categorized and studied as encoder-decoder, image-to-image, and photo-guided models. The challenges and restrictions of the current state-of-the-art methods are discussed as well. 由于深度卷积神经网络和生成模型的进步，在过去几年中，生成随机照片级真实感图像经历了巨大的增长。在不同领域中，人脸照片受到了极大的关注，并且提出了大量的人脸生成和操纵模型。语义面部属性编辑是改变面部图像的一个或多个属性的值而不影响图像的其他属性的过程。所请求的修改以属性向量或驾驶面部图像的形式提供，整个过程由相应的模型执行。在本文中，我们调查了语义面部属性编辑的最新工作和进展。我们涵盖了这些模型的所有相关方面，包括相关的定义和概念、架构、损失函数、数据集、评估指标和应用程序。根据其架构，最先进的模型被分类和研究为编码器-解码器、图像到图像和光引导模型。还讨论了当前最先进方法的挑战和限制。 本文综述了使用生成对抗网络进行语义面部属性编辑的最新进展，涵盖模型架构、损失函数、数据集及应用等。 Ahmad Nickabadi,Maryam Saeedi Fard,Nastaran Moradzadeh Farid,Najmeh Mohammadbagheri cs.CV

authors_text: Zhengyi Liu,Zhili Zhang,Wei Wu
title: Boosting Camouflaged Object Detection with Dual-Task Interactive Transformer
title_zh: 使用双任务交互式变压器增强伪装物体检测
abstract: Camouflaged object detection intends to discover the concealed objects hidden in the surroundings. Existing methods follow the bio-inspired framework, which first locates the object and second refines the boundary. We argue that the discovery of camouflaged objects depends on the recurrent search for the object and the boundary. The recurrent processing makes the human tired and helpless, but it is just the advantage of the transformer with global search ability. Therefore, a dual-task interactive transformer is proposed to detect both accurate position of the camouflaged object and its detailed boundary. The boundary feature is considered as Query to improve the camouflaged object detection, and meanwhile the object feature is considered as Query to improve the boundary detection. The camouflaged object detection and the boundary detection are fully interacted by multi-head self-attention. Besides, to obtain the initial object feature and boundary feature, transformer-based backbones are adopted to extract the foreground and background. The foreground is just object, while foreground minus background is considered as boundary. Here, the boundary feature can be obtained from blurry boundary region of the foreground and background. Supervised by the object, the background and the boundary ground truth, the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance in public datasets. https://github.com/liuzywen/COD
summary: Camouflaged object detection intends to discover the concealed objects hidden in the surroundings. Existing methods follow the bio-inspired framework, which first locates the object and second refines the boundary. We argue that the discovery of camouflaged objects depends on the recurrent search for the object and the boundary. The recurrent processing makes the human tired and helpless, but it is just the advantage of the transformer with global search ability. Therefore, a dual-task interactive transformer is proposed to detect both accurate position of the camouflaged object and its detailed boundary. The boundary feature is considered as Query to improve the camouflaged object detection, and meanwhile the object feature is considered as Query to improve the boundary detection. The camouflaged object detection and the boundary detection are fully interacted by multi-head self-attention. Besides, to obtain the initial object feature and boundary feature, transformer-based backbones are adopted to extract the foreground and background. The foreground is just object, while foreground minus background is considered as boundary. Here, the boundary feature can be obtained from blurry boundary region of the foreground and background. Supervised by the object, the background and the boundary ground truth, the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance in public datasets. https://github.com/liuzywen/COD
abstract_zh: 伪装物体检测旨在发现隐藏在周围环境中的隐藏物体。现有的方法遵循仿生框架，首先定位对象，然后细化边界。我们认为，伪装物体的发现取决于对物体和边界的反复搜索。反复的处理让人疲倦无助，但这正是具有全局搜索能力的变压器的优势。因此，提出了一种双任务交互式变压器来检测伪装对象的准确位置及其详细边界。将边界特征视为查询来改进伪装目标检测，同时将目标特征视为查询来改进边界检测。伪装物体检测和边界检测通过多头自注意力充分交互。此外，为了获得初始目标特征和边界特征，采用基于变压器的主干来提取前景和背景。前景只是物体，前景减去背景被视为边界。这里，边界特征可以从前景和背景的模糊边界区域获得。在对象、背景和边界真实值的监督下，所提出的模型在公共数据集中实现了最先进的性能。 https://github.com/liuzywen/COD

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双任务交互式Transformer模型，用于提升伪装物体检测的精度与边界细节。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用生物启发框架分两步检测伪装物体（定位后优化边界），但人类对伪装物体的识别依赖反复搜索，而Transformer的全局搜索能力可模拟此过程。
AI.method: 设计双任务交互式Transformer，通过多头自注意力机制实现物体检测与边界检测的双向特征交互。利用Transformer主干网络提取前景（物体）与背景特征，通过前景减背景生成边界特征。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了双任务交互机制对伪装物体定位与边界细节提升的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过Transformer的全局交互能力，将物体检测与边界检测任务深度融合，显著提升了伪装物体检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jiayu Lin,Yuan-Gen Wang,Wenzhi Tang,Aifeng Li
title: Multi-feature Co-learning for Image Inpainting
title_zh: 图像修复的多特征协同学习
abstract: Image inpainting has achieved great advances by simultaneously leveraging image structure and texture features. However, due to lack of effective multi-feature fusion techniques, existing image inpainting methods still show limited improvement. In this paper, we design a deep multi-feature co-learning network for image inpainting, which includes Soft-gating Dual Feature Fusion (SDFF) and Bilateral Propagation Feature Aggregation (BPFA) modules. To be specific, we first use two branches to learn structure features and texture features separately. Then the proposed SDFF module integrates structure features into texture features, and meanwhile uses texture features as an auxiliary in generating structure features. Such a co-learning strategy makes the structure and texture features more consistent. Next, the proposed BPFA module enhances the connection from local feature to overall consistency by co-learning contextual attention, channel-wise information and feature space, which can further refine the generated structures and textures. Finally, extensive experiments are performed on benchmark datasets, including CelebA, Places2, and Paris StreetView. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art. The source codes are available at https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/MFCL-Inpainting.
summary: Image inpainting has achieved great advances by simultaneously leveraging image structure and texture features. However, due to lack of effective multi-feature fusion techniques, existing image inpainting methods still show limited improvement. In this paper, we design a deep multi-feature co-learning network for image inpainting, which includes Soft-gating Dual Feature Fusion (SDFF) and Bilateral Propagation Feature Aggregation (BPFA) modules. To be specific, we first use two branches to learn structure features and texture features separately. Then the proposed SDFF module integrates structure features into texture features, and meanwhile uses texture features as an auxiliary in generating structure features. Such a co-learning strategy makes the structure and texture features more consistent. Next, the proposed BPFA module enhances the connection from local feature to overall consistency by co-learning contextual attention, channel-wise information and feature space, which can further refine the generated structures and textures. Finally, extensive experiments are performed on benchmark datasets, including CelebA, Places2, and Paris StreetView. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art. The source codes are available at https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/MFCL-Inpainting.
abstract_zh: 通过同时利用图像结构和纹理特征，图像修复取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于缺乏有效的多特征融合技术，现有的图像修复方法仍然显示出有限的改进。在本文中，我们设计了一种用于图像修复的深度多特征协同学习网络，其中包括软门双特征融合（SDFF）和双边传播特征聚合（BPFA）模块。具体来说，我们首先使用两个分支分别学习结构特征和纹理特征。然后，所提出的SDFF模块将结构特征集成到纹理特征中，同时使用纹理特征作为生成结构特征的辅助。这种共同学习策略使得结构和纹理特征更加一致。接下来，所提出的BPFA模块通过共同学习上下文注意力、通道信息和特征空间来增强从局部特征到整体一致性的连接，这可以进一步细化生成的结构和纹理。最后，在基准数据集上进行了大量实验，包括 CelebA、Places2 和 Paris StreetView。实验结果证明了所提出的方法相对于现有技术的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/MFCL-Inpainting 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多特征协同学习网络，通过结构特征与纹理特征的联合学习提升图像修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法因缺乏有效的多特征融合技术，难以充分结合结构与纹理信息，导致修复效果有限。
AI.method: 设计包含Soft-gating Dual Feature Fusion (SDFF)和Bilateral Propagation Feature Aggregation (BPFA)模块的深度网络，通过双分支分别学习结构与纹理特征，并利用SDFF实现特征协同学习，BPFA模块通过上下文注意力、通道信息和特征空间增强局部与全局一致性。
AI.result: 在CelebA、Places2和Paris StreetView数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 多特征协同学习策略有效提升了图像修复质量，代码已开源。

search_text: Multi-feature Co-learning for Image Inpainting 图像修复的多特征协同学习 Image inpainting has achieved great advances by simultaneously leveraging image structure and texture features. However, due to lack of effective multi-feature fusion techniques, existing image inpainting methods still show limited improvement. In this paper, we design a deep multi-feature co-learning network for image inpainting, which includes Soft-gating Dual Feature Fusion (SDFF) and Bilateral Propagation Feature Aggregation (BPFA) modules. To be specific, we first use two branches to learn structure features and texture features separately. Then the proposed SDFF module integrates structure features into texture features, and meanwhile uses texture features as an auxiliary in generating structure features. Such a co-learning strategy makes the structure and texture features more consistent. Next, the proposed BPFA module enhances the connection from local feature to overall consistency by co-learning contextual attention, channel-wise information and feature space, which can further refine the generated structures and textures. Finally, extensive experiments are performed on benchmark datasets, including CelebA, Places2, and Paris StreetView. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art. The source codes are available at https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/MFCL-Inpainting. 通过同时利用图像结构和纹理特征，图像修复取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于缺乏有效的多特征融合技术，现有的图像修复方法仍然显示出有限的改进。在本文中，我们设计了一种用于图像修复的深度多特征协同学习网络，其中包括软门双特征融合（SDFF）和双边传播特征聚合（BPFA）模块。具体来说，我们首先使用两个分支分别学习结构特征和纹理特征。然后，所提出的SDFF模块将结构特征集成到纹理特征中，同时使用纹理特征作为生成结构特征的辅助。这种共同学习策略使得结构和纹理特征更加一致。接下来，所提出的BPFA模块通过共同学习上下文注意力、通道信息和特征空间来增强从局部特征到整体一致性的连接，这可以进一步细化生成的结构和纹理。最后，在基准数据集上进行了大量实验，包括 CelebA、Places2 和 Paris StreetView。实验结果证明了所提出的方法相对于现有技术的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/MFCL-Inpainting 获取。 本文提出一种多特征协同学习网络，通过结构特征与纹理特征的联合学习提升图像修复效果。 Jiayu Lin,Yuan-Gen Wang,Wenzhi Tang,Aifeng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Vinh Nguyen,Olivier Bodenreider
title: UVA Resources for the Biomedical Vocabulary Alignment at Scale in the UMLS Metathesaurus
title_zh: 用于 UMLS Metathesaurus 中大规模生物医学词汇对齐的 UVA 资源
abstract: The construction and maintenance process of the UMLS (Unified Medical Language System) Metathesaurus is time-consuming, costly, and error-prone as it relies on (1) the lexical and semantic processing for suggesting synonymous terms, and (2) the expertise of UMLS editors for curating the suggestions. For improving the UMLS Metathesaurus construction process, our research group has defined a new task called UVA (UMLS Vocabulary Alignment) and generated a dataset for evaluating the task. Our group has also developed different baselines for this task using logical rules (RBA), and neural networks (LexLM and ConLM). In this paper, we present a set of reusable and reproducible resources including (1) a dataset generator, (2) three datasets generated by using the generator, and (3) three baseline approaches. We describe the UVA dataset generator and its implementation generalized for any given UMLS release. We demonstrate the use of the dataset generator by generating datasets corresponding to three UMLS releases, 2020AA, 2021AA, and 2021AB. We provide three UVA baselines using the three existing approaches (LexLM, ConLM, and RBA). The code, the datasets, and the experiments are publicly available, reusable, and reproducible with any UMLS release (a no-cost license agreement is required for downloading the UMLS).
summary: The construction and maintenance process of the UMLS (Unified Medical Language System) Metathesaurus is time-consuming, costly, and error-prone as it relies on (1) the lexical and semantic processing for suggesting synonymous terms, and (2) the expertise of UMLS editors for curating the suggestions. For improving the UMLS Metathesaurus construction process, our research group has defined a new task called UVA (UMLS Vocabulary Alignment) and generated a dataset for evaluating the task. Our group has also developed different baselines for this task using logical rules (RBA), and neural networks (LexLM and ConLM). In this paper, we present a set of reusable and reproducible resources including (1) a dataset generator, (2) three datasets generated by using the generator, and (3) three baseline approaches. We describe the UVA dataset generator and its implementation generalized for any given UMLS release. We demonstrate the use of the dataset generator by generating datasets corresponding to three UMLS releases, 2020AA, 2021AA, and 2021AB. We provide three UVA baselines using the three existing approaches (LexLM, ConLM, and RBA). The code, the datasets, and the experiments are publicly available, reusable, and reproducible with any UMLS release (a no-cost license agreement is required for downloading the UMLS).
abstract_zh: UMLS（统一医学语言系统）Metathesaurus 的构建和维护过程非常耗时、成本高昂且容易出错，因为它依赖于（1）用于建议同义术语的词汇和语义处理，以及（2）UMLS 编辑者用于策划建议的专业知识。为了改进 UMLS Metathesaurus 构建过程，我们的研究小组定义了一个名为 UVA（UMLS 词汇对齐）的新任务，并生成了用于评估该任务的数据集。我们的团队还使用逻辑规则 (RBA) 和神经网络（LexLM 和 ConLM）为此任务开发了不同的基线。在本文中，我们提出了一组可重用和可重现的资源，包括（1）数据集生成器，（2）使用生成器生成的三个数据集，以及（3）三种基线方法。我们描述了 UVA 数据集生成器及其针对任何给定 UMLS 版本的通用实现。我们通过生成与三个 UMLS 版本（2020AA、2021AA 和 2021AB）对应的数据集来演示数据集生成器的使用。我们使用三种现有方法（LexLM、ConLM 和 RBA）提供三个 UVA 基线。代码、数据集和实验是公开可用的、可重用的，并且可在任何 UMLS 版本中重现（下载 UMLS 需要免费许可协议）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UVA的生物医学词汇对齐任务，并开发了可复用的资源以提升UMLS Metathesaurus的构建效率。
AI.motivation: UMLS Metathesaurus的构建过程耗时、昂贵且易出错，依赖人工校对和复杂的术语处理。
AI.method: 定义UVA任务，开发数据集生成器，生成三个UMLS版本的数据集，并提出三种基线方法（RBA、LexLM、ConLM）。
AI.result: 公开了代码、数据集和实验结果，支持任意UMLS版本的复用与再现（需免费授权下载UMLS）。
AI.conclusion: 提供的资源可提升UMLS构建的可扩展性，为未来研究提供标准化工具与基准。

authors_text: Dong Wei,Ying Sun,Sim-Heng Ong,Ping Chai,Lynette L Teo,Adrian F Low
title: A Comprehensive 3-D Framework for Automatic Quantification of Late Gadolinium Enhanced Cardiac Magnetic Resonance Images
title_zh: 用于自动量化晚期钆增强心脏磁共振图像的综合 3D 框架
comment: IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering ( Volume: 60, Issue: 6, June 2013)
comments: IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering ( Volume: 60, Issue: 6, June 2013)
abstract: Late gadolinium enhanced (LGE) cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) can directly visualize nonviable myocardium with hyperenhanced intensities with respect to normal myocardium. For heart attack patients, it is crucial to facilitate the decision of appropriate therapy by analyzing and quantifying their LGE CMR images. To achieve accurate quantification, LGE CMR images need to be processed in two steps: segmentation of the myocardium followed by classification of infarcts within the segmented myocardium. However, automatic segmentation is difficult usually due to the intensity heterogeneity of the myocardium and intensity similarity between the infarcts and blood pool. Besides, the slices of an LGE CMR dataset often suffer from spatial and intensity distortions, causing further difficulties in segmentation and classification. In this paper, we present a comprehensive 3-D framework for automatic quantification of LGE CMR images. In this framework, myocardium is segmented with a novel method that deforms coupled endocardial and epicardial meshes and combines information in both short- and long-axis slices, while infarcts are classified with a graph-cut algorithm incorporating intensity and spatial information. Moreover, both spatial and intensity distortions are effectively corrected with specially designed countermeasures. Experiments with 20 sets of real patient data show visually good segmentation and classification results that are quantitatively in strong agreement with those manually obtained by experts.
summary: Late gadolinium enhanced (LGE) cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) can directly visualize nonviable myocardium with hyperenhanced intensities with respect to normal myocardium. For heart attack patients, it is crucial to facilitate the decision of appropriate therapy by analyzing and quantifying their LGE CMR images. To achieve accurate quantification, LGE CMR images need to be processed in two steps: segmentation of the myocardium followed by classification of infarcts within the segmented myocardium. However, automatic segmentation is difficult usually due to the intensity heterogeneity of the myocardium and intensity similarity between the infarcts and blood pool. Besides, the slices of an LGE CMR dataset often suffer from spatial and intensity distortions, causing further difficulties in segmentation and classification. In this paper, we present a comprehensive 3-D framework for automatic quantification of LGE CMR images. In this framework, myocardium is segmented with a novel method that deforms coupled endocardial and epicardial meshes and combines information in both short- and long-axis slices, while infarcts are classified with a graph-cut algorithm incorporating intensity and spatial information. Moreover, both spatial and intensity distortions are effectively corrected with specially designed countermeasures. Experiments with 20 sets of real patient data show visually good segmentation and classification results that are quantitatively in strong agreement with those manually obtained by experts.
abstract_zh: 晚期钆增强 (LGE) 心脏磁共振 (CMR) 可以直接显示与正常心肌相比具有超增强强度的无活性心肌。对于心脏病患者来说，通过分析和量化 LGE CMR 图像来促进适当治疗的决策至关重要。为了实现准确的量化，LGE CMR 图像需要分两个步骤进行处理：分割心肌，然后对分割的心肌内的梗塞进行分类。然而，由于心肌的强度异质性以及梗塞和血池之间的强度相似性，自动分割通常很困难。此外，LGE CMR 数据集的切片经常遭受空间和强度扭曲，导致分割和分类进一步困难。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于 LGE CMR 图像自动量化的综合 3D 框架。在此框架中，使用一种新颖的方法对心肌进行分割，该方法使耦合的心内膜和心外膜网格变形，并结合短轴和长轴切片中的信息，同时使用结合强度和空间信息的图割算法对梗塞进行分类。此外，通过专门设计的对策，可以有效纠正空间和强度扭曲。 20组真实患者数据的实验显示出视觉上良好的分割和分类结果，在定量上与专家手动获得的结果非常一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动量化晚期钆增强心脏磁共振成像（LGE CMR）的三维综合框架。
AI.motivation: 晚期钆增强心脏磁共振成像对心肌梗死患者的治疗决策至关重要，但现有方法因心肌强度异质性、梗死与血液池相似性及图像失真等问题，难以实现准确分割与分类。
AI.method: 框架采用变形的室内心肌和心外膜网格结合短轴与长轴切片进行分割，并利用结合强度与空间信息的图割算法分类梗死区域，同时设计专门措施校正空间与强度失真。
AI.result: 在20组真实患者数据上的实验显示，分割与分类结果视觉效果良好，且与专家手动结果具有高度量化一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了LGE CMR图像的分割与分类难题，为临床提供准确的自动量化工具，有助于优化心肌梗死患者的治疗方案。

authors_text: Zechen Liang,Yuan-Gen Wang,Wei Lu,Xiaochun Cao
title: ADT-SSL: Adaptive Dual-Threshold for Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: ADT-SSL：半监督学习的自适应双阈值
abstract: Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) has advanced classification tasks by inputting both labeled and unlabeled data to train a model jointly. However, existing SSL methods only consider the unlabeled data whose predictions are beyond a fixed threshold (e.g., 0.95), ignoring the valuable information from those less than 0.95. We argue that these discarded data have a large proportion and are usually of hard samples, thereby benefiting the model training. This paper proposes an Adaptive Dual-Threshold method for Semi-Supervised Learning (ADT-SSL). Except for the fixed threshold, ADT extracts another class-adaptive threshold from the labeled data to take full advantage of the unlabeled data whose predictions are less than 0.95 but more than the extracted one. Accordingly, we engage CE and $L_2$ loss functions to learn from these two types of unlabeled data, respectively. For highly similar unlabeled data, we further design a novel similar loss to make the prediction of the model consistency. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and SVHN. Experimental results show that the proposed ADT-SSL achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy.
summary: Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) has advanced classification tasks by inputting both labeled and unlabeled data to train a model jointly. However, existing SSL methods only consider the unlabeled data whose predictions are beyond a fixed threshold (e.g., 0.95), ignoring the valuable information from those less than 0.95. We argue that these discarded data have a large proportion and are usually of hard samples, thereby benefiting the model training. This paper proposes an Adaptive Dual-Threshold method for Semi-Supervised Learning (ADT-SSL). Except for the fixed threshold, ADT extracts another class-adaptive threshold from the labeled data to take full advantage of the unlabeled data whose predictions are less than 0.95 but more than the extracted one. Accordingly, we engage CE and $L_2$ loss functions to learn from these two types of unlabeled data, respectively. For highly similar unlabeled data, we further design a novel similar loss to make the prediction of the model consistency. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and SVHN. Experimental results show that the proposed ADT-SSL achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）通过输入标记和未标记数据来联合训练模型来完成高级分类任务。然而，现有的SSL方法仅考虑预测超出固定阈值（例如0.95）的未标记数据，忽略了小于0.95的有价值的信息。我们认为这些丢弃的数据比例很大，并且通常是硬样本，从而有利于模型训练。本文提出了一种半监督学习的自适应双阈值方法（ADT-SSL）。除了固定阈值外，ADT还从标记数据中提取另一个类别自适应阈值，以充分利用预测值小于0.95但大于提取值的未标记数据。因此，我们使用 CE 和 $L_2$ 损失函数分别从这两种类型的未标记数据中学习。对于高度相似的未标记数据，我们进一步设计了一种新颖的相似损失来使模型的预测保持一致。在基准数据集上进行了大量实验，包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 SVHN。实验结果表明，所提出的 ADT-SSL 实现了最先进的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应双阈值半监督学习方法（ADT-SSL），旨在通过更有效地利用未标记数据提升分类任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法仅使用预测置信度高于固定阈值（如0.95）的未标记数据，忽略了大量低于该阈值但可能包含有价值信息的困难样本。
AI.method: ADT-SSL引入固定阈值与从标记数据中提取的类别自适应阈值，结合交叉熵损失（CE）和L2损失分别学习两类未标记数据，并设计相似损失保证模型预测一致性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和SVHN基准数据集上，ADT-SSL达到最先进的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应利用未标记数据中的困难样本，ADT-SSL有效提升了半监督学习的性能。

authors_text: Shiyu Xu,Scott Moore,Akansel Cosgun
title: Shared-Control Robotic Manipulation in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实中的共享控制机器人操作
abstract: In this paper, we present the implementation details of a Virtual Reality (VR)-based teleoperation interface for moving a robotic manipulator. We propose an iterative human-in-the-loop design where the user sets the next task-space waypoint for the robot's end effector and executes the action on the physical robot before setting the next waypoints. Information from the robot's surroundings is provided to the user in two forms: as a point cloud in 3D space and a video stream projected on a virtual wall. The feasibility of the selected end effector pose is communicated to the user by the color of the virtual end effector. The interface is demonstrated to successfully work for a pick and place scenario, however, our trials showed that the fluency of the interaction and the autonomy level of the system can be increased.
summary: In this paper, we present the implementation details of a Virtual Reality (VR)-based teleoperation interface for moving a robotic manipulator. We propose an iterative human-in-the-loop design where the user sets the next task-space waypoint for the robot's end effector and executes the action on the physical robot before setting the next waypoints. Information from the robot's surroundings is provided to the user in two forms: as a point cloud in 3D space and a video stream projected on a virtual wall. The feasibility of the selected end effector pose is communicated to the user by the color of the virtual end effector. The interface is demonstrated to successfully work for a pick and place scenario, however, our trials showed that the fluency of the interaction and the autonomy level of the system can be increased.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了用于移动机器人操纵器的基于虚拟现实（VR）的远程操作界面的实现细节。我们提出了一种迭代的人机交互设计，用户为机器人的末端执行器设置下一个任务空间路径点，并在设置下一个路径点之前在物理机器人上执行操作。机器人周围环境的信息以两种形式提供给用户：3D 空间中的点云和投影在虚拟墙上的视频流。所选末端执行器姿势的可行性通过虚拟末端执行器的颜色传达给用户。该界面被证明可以成功地用于拾取和放置场景，但是，我们的试验表明，可以提高交互的流畅性和系统的自主水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）的远程操作界面，用于控制机械臂执行抓取和放置任务，并通过迭代人机交互设计优化操作流程。
AI.motivation: 现有远程操作界面存在交互流畅性不足和系统自主性较低的问题，需开发更直观、高效的控制方法以提升机器人操作性能。
AI.method: 采用迭代人机闭环设计，用户通过VR设置机械臂末端执行器的任务空间路标点，系统通过3D点云和虚拟墙视频流提供环境信息，并用虚拟末端执行器颜色反馈位姿可行性。
AI.result: 该界面成功实现了抓取与放置场景的演示，但实验表明交互流畅性和系统自主性仍有提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的VR远程操作界面具有可行性，未来需进一步优化交互流畅性与系统自主性以提升整体性能。

authors_text: Boris Mocialov,Graham Turner,Helen Hastie
title: Unsupervised Sign Language Phoneme Clustering using HamNoSys Notation
title_zh: 使用 HamNoSys 表示法的无监督手语音素聚类
abstract: Traditionally, sign language resources have been collected in controlled settings for specific tasks involving supervised sign classification or linguistic studies accompanied by specific annotation type. To date, very few who explored signing videos found online on social media platforms as well as the use of unsupervised methods applied to such resources. Due to the fact that the field is striving to achieve acceptable model performance on the data that differs from that seen during training calls for more diversity in sign language data, stepping away from the data obtained in controlled laboratory settings. Moreover, since the sign language data collection and annotation carries large overheads, it is desirable to accelerate the annotation process. Considering the aforementioned tendencies, this paper takes the side of harvesting online data in a pursuit for automatically generating and annotating sign language corpora through phoneme clustering.
summary: Traditionally, sign language resources have been collected in controlled settings for specific tasks involving supervised sign classification or linguistic studies accompanied by specific annotation type. To date, very few who explored signing videos found online on social media platforms as well as the use of unsupervised methods applied to such resources. Due to the fact that the field is striving to achieve acceptable model performance on the data that differs from that seen during training calls for more diversity in sign language data, stepping away from the data obtained in controlled laboratory settings. Moreover, since the sign language data collection and annotation carries large overheads, it is desirable to accelerate the annotation process. Considering the aforementioned tendencies, this paper takes the side of harvesting online data in a pursuit for automatically generating and annotating sign language corpora through phoneme clustering.
abstract_zh: 传统上，手语资源是在受控环境中收集的，用于特定任务，包括监督手语分类或带有特定注释类型的语言研究。迄今为止，很少有人探索社交媒体平台上在线发现的签名视频以及对此类资源应用无监督方法的使用。由于该领域正在努力在与训练期间看到的数据不同的数据上实现可接受的模型性能，因此需要手语数据的更多多样性，远离在受控实验室环境中获得的数据。此外，由于手语数据收集和注释带来大量开销，因此需要加速注释过程。考虑到上述趋势，本文站在收集在线数据的一边，寻求通过音素聚类自动生成和注释手语语料库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用HamNoSys符号对手语视频进行无监督音素聚类，以自动生成和标注手语语料库。
AI.motivation: 传统手语数据依赖受控环境采集，存在数据多样性不足和标注成本高的问题，需探索在线数据与无监督方法提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过挖掘社交媒体上的手语视频，结合HamNoSys符号系统进行无监督音素聚类，实现自动标注与语料库构建。
AI.result: 成功实现在线手语数据的音素聚类，并验证了该方法在生成多样化语料库中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督聚类方法可有效补充传统手语数据，提升模型性能并降低标注成本，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Unsupervised Sign Language Phoneme Clustering using HamNoSys Notation 使用 HamNoSys 表示法的无监督手语音素聚类 Traditionally, sign language resources have been collected in controlled settings for specific tasks involving supervised sign classification or linguistic studies accompanied by specific annotation type. To date, very few who explored signing videos found online on social media platforms as well as the use of unsupervised methods applied to such resources. Due to the fact that the field is striving to achieve acceptable model performance on the data that differs from that seen during training calls for more diversity in sign language data, stepping away from the data obtained in controlled laboratory settings. Moreover, since the sign language data collection and annotation carries large overheads, it is desirable to accelerate the annotation process. Considering the aforementioned tendencies, this paper takes the side of harvesting online data in a pursuit for automatically generating and annotating sign language corpora through phoneme clustering. 传统上，手语资源是在受控环境中收集的，用于特定任务，包括监督手语分类或带有特定注释类型的语言研究。迄今为止，很少有人探索社交媒体平台上在线发现的签名视频以及对此类资源应用无监督方法的使用。由于该领域正在努力在与训练期间看到的数据不同的数据上实现可接受的模型性能，因此需要手语数据的更多多样性，远离在受控实验室环境中获得的数据。此外，由于手语数据收集和注释带来大量开销，因此需要加速注释过程。考虑到上述趋势，本文站在收集在线数据的一边，寻求通过音素聚类自动生成和注释手语语料库。 本文提出利用HamNoSys符号对手语视频进行无监督音素聚类，以自动生成和标注手语语料库。 Boris Mocialov,Graham Turner,Helen Hastie cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Adarsh Ghimire,Xiaoxiong Zhang,Sajid Javed,Jorge Dias,Naoufel Werghi
title: Robot Person Following in Uniform Crowd Environment
title_zh: 机器人人在统一的人群环境中跟随
comment: ef:ICRA Workshop 2022: ROBOTIC PERCEPTION AND MAPPING: EMERGING TECHNIQUES
comments: ef:ICRA Workshop 2022: ROBOTIC PERCEPTION AND MAPPING: EMERGING TECHNIQUES
abstract: Person-tracking robots have many applications, such as in security, elderly care, and socializing robots. Such a task is particularly challenging when the person is moving in a Uniform crowd. Also, despite significant progress of trackers reported in the literature, state-of-the-art trackers have hardly addressed person following in such scenarios. In this work, we focus on improving the perceptivity of a robot for a person following task by developing a robust and real-time applicable object tracker. We present a new robot person tracking system with a new RGB-D tracker, Deep Tracking with RGB-D (DTRD) that is resilient to tricky challenges introduced by the uniform crowd environment. Our tracker utilizes transformer encoder-decoder architecture with RGB and depth information to discriminate the target person from similar distractors. A substantial amount of comprehensive experiments and results demonstrate that our tracker has higher performance in two quantitative evaluation metrics and confirms its superiority over other SOTA trackers.
summary: Person-tracking robots have many applications, such as in security, elderly care, and socializing robots. Such a task is particularly challenging when the person is moving in a Uniform crowd. Also, despite significant progress of trackers reported in the literature, state-of-the-art trackers have hardly addressed person following in such scenarios. In this work, we focus on improving the perceptivity of a robot for a person following task by developing a robust and real-time applicable object tracker. We present a new robot person tracking system with a new RGB-D tracker, Deep Tracking with RGB-D (DTRD) that is resilient to tricky challenges introduced by the uniform crowd environment. Our tracker utilizes transformer encoder-decoder architecture with RGB and depth information to discriminate the target person from similar distractors. A substantial amount of comprehensive experiments and results demonstrate that our tracker has higher performance in two quantitative evaluation metrics and confirms its superiority over other SOTA trackers.
abstract_zh: 人员跟踪机器人有很多应用，例如安全、老年护理和社交机器人。当人在穿着制服的人群中移动时，这样的任务尤其具有挑战性。此外，尽管文献中报道的跟踪器取得了重大进展，但最先进的跟踪器几乎没有解决这种情况下的人员跟踪问题。在这项工作中，我们专注于通过开发强大且实时适用的对象跟踪器来提高机器人对人员执行任务的感知能力。我们推出了一种新的机器人人跟踪系统，配备了新的 RGB-D 跟踪器，即 RGB-D 深度跟踪 (DTRD)，该系统能够应对统一人群环境带来的棘手挑战。我们的跟踪器利用带有 RGB 和深度信息的 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构来区分目标人与类似的干扰物。大量综合实验和结果表明，我们的跟踪器在两个定量评估指标上具有更高的性能，并证实了其相对于其他SOTA跟踪器的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文针对均匀人群环境中机器人跟随任务的挑战，提出一种结合RGB-D信息的深度跟踪方法DTRD，提升机器人感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪算法在均匀人群场景下难以有效区分目标人物与相似干扰物，导致机器人跟随任务效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer编码器-解码器架构的RGB-D跟踪器（DTRD），融合RGB图像与深度信息实现目标人物与干扰物的区分。
AI.result: 实验表明DTRD在两个定量评估指标上优于现有最先进算法，验证了其在均匀人群环境中的跟踪性能优势。
AI.conclusion: DTRD通过多模态信息融合有效解决了均匀人群场景下的跟踪难题，为机器人跟随任务提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Wei Ju,Junwei Yang,Meng Qu,Weiping Song,Jianhao Shen,Ming Zhang
title: KGNN: Harnessing Kernel-based Networks for Semi-supervised Graph Classification
title_zh: KGNN：利用基于内核的网络进行半监督图分类
comment: Published as a full paper at WSDM 2022
comments: Published as a full paper at WSDM 2022
abstract: This paper studies semi-supervised graph classification, which is an important problem with various applications in social network analysis and bioinformatics. This problem is typically solved by using graph neural networks (GNNs), which yet rely on a large number of labeled graphs for training and are unable to leverage unlabeled graphs. We address the limitations by proposing the Kernel-based Graph Neural Network (KGNN). A KGNN consists of a GNN-based network as well as a kernel-based network parameterized by a memory network. The GNN-based network performs classification through learning graph representations to implicitly capture the similarity between query graphs and labeled graphs, while the kernel-based network uses graph kernels to explicitly compare each query graph with all the labeled graphs stored in a memory for prediction. The two networks are motivated from complementary perspectives, and thus combing them allows KGNN to use labeled graphs more effectively. We jointly train the two networks by maximizing their agreement on unlabeled graphs via posterior regularization, so that the unlabeled graphs serve as a bridge to let both networks mutually enhance each other. Experiments on a range of well-known benchmark datasets demonstrate that KGNN achieves impressive performance over competitive baselines.
summary: This paper studies semi-supervised graph classification, which is an important problem with various applications in social network analysis and bioinformatics. This problem is typically solved by using graph neural networks (GNNs), which yet rely on a large number of labeled graphs for training and are unable to leverage unlabeled graphs. We address the limitations by proposing the Kernel-based Graph Neural Network (KGNN). A KGNN consists of a GNN-based network as well as a kernel-based network parameterized by a memory network. The GNN-based network performs classification through learning graph representations to implicitly capture the similarity between query graphs and labeled graphs, while the kernel-based network uses graph kernels to explicitly compare each query graph with all the labeled graphs stored in a memory for prediction. The two networks are motivated from complementary perspectives, and thus combing them allows KGNN to use labeled graphs more effectively. We jointly train the two networks by maximizing their agreement on unlabeled graphs via posterior regularization, so that the unlabeled graphs serve as a bridge to let both networks mutually enhance each other. Experiments on a range of well-known benchmark datasets demonstrate that KGNN achieves impressive performance over competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文研究半监督图分类，这是社交网络分析和生物信息学中各种应用的重要问题。这个问题通常通过使用图神经网络（GNN）来解决，但它依赖大量标记图进行训练，并且无法利用未标记图。我们通过提出基于内核的图神经网络（KGNN）来解决这些限制。 KGNN 由基于 GNN 的网络和由内存网络参数化的基于内核的网络组成。基于 GNN 的网络通过学习图表示来执行分类，以隐式捕获查询图和标记图之间的相似性，而基于内核的网络使用图内核来显式比较每个查询图与存储在内存中的所有标记图以进行预测。这两个网络是从互补的角度出发的，因此将它们结合起来可以让 KGNN 更有效地使用标记图。我们通过后验正则化最大化两个网络在未标记图上的一致性来联合训练两个网络，从而使未标记图充当桥梁，让两个网络相互增强。在一系列知名基准数据集上进行的实验表明，KGNN 在竞争基准上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核方法的图神经网络（KGNN），用于半监督图分类任务，以更有效地利用未标记图数据。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络（GNN）在半监督图分类中依赖大量标记图数据，无法有效利用未标记图信息，限制了其性能。
AI.method: KGNN结合GNN和核方法，通过记忆网络参数化核网络，利用图核显式比较查询图与存储的标记图，并通过后验正则化联合训练两个网络以增强一致性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，KGNN在竞争性基线方法上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: KGNN通过融合GNN与核方法的互补视角，有效利用未标记图数据，提升了半监督图分类的性能。

The two networks are motivated from complementary perspectives, and thus combing them allows KGNN to use labeled graphs more effectively. We jointly train the two networks by maximizing their agreement on unlabeled graphs via posterior regularization, so that the unlabeled graphs serve as a bridge to let both networks mutually enhance each other. Experiments on a range of well-known benchmark datasets demonstrate that KGNN achieves impressive performance over competitive baselines. 本文研究半监督图分类，这是社交网络分析和生物信息学中各种应用的重要问题。这个问题通常通过使用图神经网络（GNN）来解决，但它依赖大量标记图进行训练，并且无法利用未标记图。我们通过提出基于内核的图神经网络（KGNN）来解决这些限制。 KGNN 由基于 GNN 的网络和由内存网络参数化的基于内核的网络组成。基于 GNN 的网络通过学习图表示来执行分类，以隐式捕获查询图和标记图之间的相似性，而基于内核的网络使用图内核来显式比较每个查询图与存储在内存中的所有标记图以进行预测。这两个网络是从互补的角度出发的，因此将它们结合起来可以让 KGNN 更有效地使用标记图。我们通过后验正则化最大化两个网络在未标记图上的一致性来联合训练两个网络，从而使未标记图充当桥梁，让两个网络相互增强。在一系列知名基准数据集上进行的实验表明，KGNN 在竞争基准上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。 本文提出了一种基于核方法的图神经网络（KGNN），用于半监督图分类任务，以更有效地利用未标记图数据。 Wei Ju,Junwei Yang,Meng Qu,Weiping Song,Jianhao Shen,Ming Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Dong Wei,Ying Sun,Sim-Heng Ong,Ping Chai,Lynette L. Teo,Adrian F. Low
title: Three-Dimensional Segmentation of the Left Ventricle in Late Gadolinium Enhanced MR Images of Chronic Infarction Combining Long- and Short-Axis Information
title_zh: 结合长轴和短轴信息的慢性梗塞晚期钆增强 MR 图像中左心室的三维分割
comment: Medical Image Analysis, Volume 17, Issue 6, August 2013, Pages 685-697
comments: Medical Image Analysis, Volume 17, Issue 6, August 2013, Pages 685-697
abstract: Automatic segmentation of the left ventricle (LV) in late gadolinium enhanced (LGE) cardiac MR (CMR) images is difficult due to the intensity heterogeneity arising from accumulation of contrast agent in infarcted myocardium. In this paper, we present a comprehensive framework for automatic 3D segmentation of the LV in LGE CMR images. Given myocardial contours in cine images as a priori knowledge, the framework initially propagates the a priori segmentation from cine to LGE images via 2D translational registration. Two meshes representing respectively endocardial and epicardial surfaces are then constructed with the propagated contours. After construction, the two meshes are deformed towards the myocardial edge points detected in both short-axis and long-axis LGE images in a unified 3D coordinate system. Taking into account the intensity characteristics of the LV in LGE images, we propose a novel parametric model of the LV for consistent myocardial edge points detection regardless of pathological status of the myocardium (infarcted or healthy) and of the type of the LGE images (short-axis or long-axis). We have evaluated the proposed framework with 21 sets of real patient and 4 sets of simulated phantom data. Both distance- and region-based performance metrics confirm the observation that the framework can generate accurate and reliable results for myocardial segmentation of LGE images. We have also tested the robustness of the framework with respect to varied a priori segmentation in both practical and simulated settings. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can greatly compensate variations in the given a priori knowledge and consistently produce accurate segmentations.

After construction, the two meshes are deformed towards the myocardial edge points detected in both short-axis and long-axis LGE images in a unified 3D coordinate system. Taking into account the intensity characteristics of the LV in LGE images, we propose a novel parametric model of the LV for consistent myocardial edge points detection regardless of pathological status of the myocardium (infarcted or healthy) and of the type of the LGE images (short-axis or long-axis). We have evaluated the proposed framework with 21 sets of real patient and 4 sets of simulated phantom data. Both distance- and region-based performance metrics confirm the observation that the framework can generate accurate and reliable results for myocardial segmentation of LGE images. We have also tested the robustness of the framework with respect to varied a priori segmentation in both practical and simulated settings. abstract_zh: 由于梗死心肌中对比剂的积累产生强度异质性，在晚期钆增强 (LGE) 心脏 MR (CMR) 图像中自动分割左心室 (LV) 很困难。在本文中，我们提出了 LGE CMR 图像中 LV 自动 3D 分割的综合框架。考虑到电影图像中的心肌轮廓作为先验知识，该框架最初通过 2D 平移配准将先验分割从电影传播到 LGE 图像。然后用传播的轮廓构建分别代表心内膜和心外膜表面的两个网格。构建后，两个网格在统一的 3D 坐标系中向短轴和长轴 LGE 图像中检测到的心肌边缘点变形。考虑到 LGE 图像中 LV 的强度特征，我们提出了一种新颖的 LV 参数模型，用于一致的心肌边缘点检测，无论心肌的病理状态（梗死或健康）和 LGE 图像的类型（短轴或长轴）。我们使用 21 组真实患者数据和 4 组模拟模型数据评估了所提出的框架。基于距离和区域的性能指标都证实了该框架可以为 LGE 图像的心肌分割生成准确可靠的结果。我们还在实际和模拟环境中测试了该框架在各种先验分割方面的稳健性。实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以极大地补偿给定先验知识的变化，并一致地产生准确的分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合长轴和短轴信息的三维左心室分割框架，用于慢性心肌梗死的延迟钆增强心脏磁共振图像分割。
AI.motivation: 延迟钆增强心脏磁共振图像中，心肌梗死区域对比剂积累导致的强度异质性使得左心室自动分割困难，需解决病理状态和图像类型差异带来的分割挑战。
AI.method: 利用电影图像中的先验分割信息，通过二维平移配准传播至延迟钆增强图像，构建心内膜和心外膜网格，并在统一三维坐标系中融合短轴和长轴图像的边缘点进行网格变形，提出适用于不同病理状态和图像类型的参数化左心室模型。
AI.result: 在21组真实患者数据和4组模拟数据上验证，距离和区域指标均显示框架能生成准确可靠的分割结果，且对先验分割变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合长轴与短轴信息及补偿先验知识差异，显著提升了延迟钆增强图像中左心室分割的准确性和可靠性。

authors_text: Jiawei Mao,Xuesong Yin,Yuanqi Chang,Honggu Zhou
title: Improvements to Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Masked Image Modeling
title_zh: 蒙版图像建模的自监督表示学习的改进
abstract: This paper explores improvements to the masked image modeling (MIM) paradigm. The MIM paradigm enables the model to learn the main object features of the image by masking the input image and predicting the masked part by the unmasked part. We found the following three main directions for MIM to be improved. First, since both encoders and decoders contribute to representation learning, MIM uses only encoders for downstream tasks, which ignores the impact of decoders on representation learning. Although the MIM paradigm already employs small decoders with asymmetric structures, we believe that continued reduction of decoder parameters is beneficial to improve the representational learning capability of the encoder . Second, MIM solves the image prediction task by training the encoder and decoder together , and does not design a separate task for the encoder . To further enhance the performance of the encoder when performing downstream tasks, we designed the encoder for the tasks of comparative learning and token position prediction. Third, since the input image may contain background and other objects, and the proportion of each object in the image varies, reconstructing the tokens related to the background or to other objects is not meaningful for MIM to understand the main object representations. Therefore we use ContrastiveCrop to crop the input image so that the input image contains as much as possible only the main objects. Based on the above three improvements to MIM, we propose a new model, Contrastive Masked AutoEncoders (CMAE). We achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 65.84% on tinyimagenet using the ViT-B backbone, which is +2.89 outperforming the MAE of competing methods when all conditions are equal. Code will be made available.
summary: This paper explores improvements to the masked image modeling (MIM) paradigm. The MIM paradigm enables the model to learn the main object features of the image by masking the input image and predicting the masked part by the unmasked part. We found the following three main directions for MIM to be improved. First, since both encoders and decoders contribute to representation learning, MIM uses only encoders for downstream tasks, which ignores the impact of decoders on representation learning. Although the MIM paradigm already employs small decoders with asymmetric structures, we believe that continued reduction of decoder parameters is beneficial to improve the representational learning capability of the encoder . Second, MIM solves the image prediction task by training the encoder and decoder together , and does not design a separate task for the encoder . To further enhance the performance of the encoder when performing downstream tasks, we designed the encoder for the tasks of comparative learning and token position prediction. Third, since the input image may contain background and other objects, and the proportion of each object in the image varies, reconstructing the tokens related to the background or to other objects is not meaningful for MIM to understand the main object representations. Therefore we use ContrastiveCrop to crop the input image so that the input image contains as much as possible only the main objects. Based on the above three improvements to MIM, we propose a new model, Contrastive Masked AutoEncoders (CMAE). We achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 65.84% on tinyimagenet using the ViT-B backbone, which is +2.89 outperforming the MAE of competing methods when all conditions are equal. Code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了掩模图像建模 (MIM) 范式的改进。 MIM范式使模型能够通过对输入图像进行掩蔽并通过未掩蔽的部分来预测被掩蔽的部分来学习图像的主要对象特征。我们发现MIM主要有以下三个需要改进的方向。首先，由于编码器和解码器都有助于表示学习，因此 MIM 仅使用编码器进行下游任务，忽略了解码器对表示学习的影响。尽管MIM范式已经采用了具有非对称结构的小型解码器，但我们相信解码器参数的持续减少有利于提高编码器的表征学习能力。其次，MIM通过一起训练编码器和解码器来解决图像预测任务，并没有为编码器设计单独的任务。为了进一步增强编码器在执行下游任务时的性能，我们设计了用于比较学习和标记位置预测任务的编码器。第三，由于输入图像可能包含背景和其他对象，并且图像中每个对象的比例各不相同，因此重建与背景或其他对象相关的标记对于 MIM 理解主要对象表示没有意义。因此我们使用 ContrastiveCrop 来裁剪输入图像，使得输入图像尽可能只包含主要对象。基于以上对 MIM 的三项改进，我们提出了一种新模型：对比遮蔽自动编码器（CMAE）。我们使用 ViT-B 主干在tinyimagenet 上实现了 65.84% 的 Top-1 准确率，在所有条件相同的情况下，比竞争方法的 MAE 高出 +2.89。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的自监督表征学习方法，通过优化掩码图像建模（MIM）范式提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MIM方法仅利用编码器进行下游任务，忽略解码器对表征学习的影响；同时未为编码器设计独立任务，且背景信息可能干扰主目标学习。
AI.method: 提出三项改进：1）缩减解码器参数以增强编码器表征能力；2）为编码器设计对比学习和token位置预测任务；3）使用ContrastiveCrop裁剪图像以聚焦主目标对象，最终构建CMAE模型。
AI.result: 在TinyImageNet数据集上，使用ViT-B主干的CMAE模型达到65.84%的Top-1准确率，较对比方法MAE提升2.89%。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化解码器结构、增加编码器任务及图像裁剪策略，CMAE有效提升了表征学习质量与下游任务性能。

tldr: 本文提出改进的自监督表征学习方法，通过优化掩码图像建模（MIM）范式提升模型性能。
motivation: 现有MIM方法仅利用编码器进行下游任务，忽略解码器对表征学习的影响；同时未为编码器设计独立任务，且背景信息可能干扰主目标学习。
method: 提出三项改进：1）缩减解码器参数以增强编码器表征能力；2）为编码器设计对比学习和token位置预测任务；3）使用ContrastiveCrop裁剪图像以聚焦主目标对象，最终构建CMAE模型。
result: 在TinyImageNet数据集上，使用ViT-B主干的CMAE模型达到65.84%的Top-1准确率，较对比方法MAE提升2.89%。
conclusion: 通过优化解码器结构、增加编码器任务及图像裁剪策略，CMAE有效提升了表征学习质量与下游任务性能。
search_text: Improvements to Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Masked Image Modeling 蒙版图像建模的自监督表示学习的改进 This paper explores improvements to the masked image modeling (MIM) paradigm. The MIM paradigm enables the model to learn the main object features of the image by masking the input image and predicting the masked part by the unmasked part. We found the following three main directions for MIM to be improved. First, since both encoders and decoders contribute to representation learning, MIM uses only encoders for downstream tasks, which ignores the impact of decoders on representation learning. Although the MIM paradigm already employs small decoders with asymmetric structures, we believe that continued reduction of decoder parameters is beneficial to improve the representational learning capability of the encoder . Second, MIM solves the image prediction task by training the encoder and decoder together , and does not design a separate task for the encoder . To further enhance the performance of the encoder when performing downstream tasks, we designed the encoder for the tasks of comparative learning and token position prediction. Third, since the input image may contain background and other objects, and the proportion of each object in the image varies, reconstructing the tokens related to the background or to other objects is not meaningful for MIM to understand the main object representations. Therefore we use ContrastiveCrop to crop the input image so that the input image contains as much as possible only the main objects. Based on the above three improvements to MIM, we propose a new model, Contrastive Masked AutoEncoders (CMAE). We achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 65.84% on tinyimagenet using the ViT-B backbone, which is +2.89 outperforming the MAE of competing methods when all conditions are equal. Code will be made available. 本文探讨了掩模图像建模 (MIM) 范式的改进。 MIM范式使模型能够通过对输入图像进行掩蔽并通过未掩蔽的部分来预测被掩蔽的部分来学习图像的主要对象特征。我们发现MIM主要有以下三个需要改进的方向。首先，由于编码器和解码器都有助于表示学习，因此 MIM 仅使用编码器进行下游任务，忽略了解码器对表示学习的影响。尽管MIM范式已经采用了具有非对称结构的小型解码器，但我们相信解码器参数的持续减少有利于提高编码器的表征学习能力。其次，MIM通过一起训练编码器和解码器来解决图像预测任务，并没有为编码器设计单独的任务。为了进一步增强编码器在执行下游任务时的性能，我们设计了用于比较学习和标记位置预测任务的编码器。第三，由于输入图像可能包含背景和其他对象，并且图像中每个对象的比例各不相同，因此重建与背景或其他对象相关的标记对于 MIM 理解主要对象表示没有意义。因此我们使用 ContrastiveCrop 来裁剪输入图像，使得输入图像尽可能只包含主要对象。基于以上对 MIM 的三项改进，我们提出了一种新模型：对比遮蔽自动编码器（CMAE）。我们使用 ViT-B 主干在tinyimagenet 上实现了 65.84% 的 Top-1 准确率，在所有条件相同的情况下，比竞争方法的 MAE 高出 +2.89。代码将可用。 本文提出改进的自监督表征学习方法，通过优化掩码图像建模（MIM）范式提升模型性能。 Jiawei Mao,Xuesong Yin,Yuanqi Chang,Honggu Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Soma Kontar,Andras Horvath
title: On the Feasibility and Generality of Patch-based Adversarial Attacks on Semantic Segmentation Problems
title_zh: 论基于补丁的对抗攻击语义分割问题的可行性和通用性
abstract: Deep neural networks were applied with success in a myriad of applications, but in safety critical use cases adversarial attacks still pose a significant threat. These attacks were demonstrated on various classification and detection tasks and are usually considered general in a sense that arbitrary network outputs can be generated by them. In this paper we will demonstrate through simple case studies both in simulation and in real-life, that patch based attacks can be utilised to alter the output of segmentation networks. Through a few examples and the investigation of network complexity, we will also demonstrate that the number of possible output maps which can be generated via patch-based attacks of a given size is typically smaller than the area they effect or areas which should be attacked in case of practical applications. We will prove that based on these results most patch-based attacks cannot be general in practice, namely they can not generate arbitrary output maps or if they could, they are spatially limited and this limit is significantly smaller than the receptive field of the patches.
summary: Deep neural networks were applied with success in a myriad of applications, but in safety critical use cases adversarial attacks still pose a significant threat. These attacks were demonstrated on various classification and detection tasks and are usually considered general in a sense that arbitrary network outputs can be generated by them. In this paper we will demonstrate through simple case studies both in simulation and in real-life, that patch based attacks can be utilised to alter the output of segmentation networks. Through a few examples and the investigation of network complexity, we will also demonstrate that the number of possible output maps which can be generated via patch-based attacks of a given size is typically smaller than the area they effect or areas which should be attacked in case of practical applications. We will prove that based on these results most patch-based attacks cannot be general in practice, namely they can not generate arbitrary output maps or if they could, they are spatially limited and this limit is significantly smaller than the receptive field of the patches.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在无数应用中取得了成功，但在安全关键用例中，对抗性攻击仍然构成重大威胁。这些攻击在各种分类和检测任务中得到了证明，并且通常被认为是通用的，因为它们可以生成任意网络输出。在本文中，我们将通过模拟和现实生活中的简单案例研究来证明，基于补丁的攻击可用于改变分段网络的输出。通过一些例子和对网络复杂性的研究，我们还将证明，通过给定大小的基于补丁的攻击可以生成的可能输出映射的数量通常小于它们影响的区域或在实际应用中应该受到攻击的区域。我们将根据这些结果证明，大多数基于补丁的攻击在实践中不能通用，即它们不能生成任意输出映射，或者即使可以，它们也受到空间限制，并且该限制明显小于补丁的感受野。

AI.tldr: 研究基于补丁的对抗攻击在语义分割任务中的可行性与通用性。
AI.motivation: 验证对抗攻击在安全关键场景下对语义分割模型的威胁，并探讨其输出生成能力的局限性。
AI.method: 通过模拟与实际案例分析，结合网络复杂度研究，评估补丁攻击对分割网络输出的影响范围。
AI.result: 补丁攻击生成的输出图数量通常小于其影响区域，且攻击范围显著小于补丁感受野，无法实现任意输出。
AI.conclusion: 基于补丁的对抗攻击在实际中不具备通用性，其输出生成能力存在显著空间限制。

authors_text: Marc Schmitt
title: Automated machine learning: AI-driven decision making in business analytics
title_zh: 自动化机器学习：业务分析中人工智能驱动的决策
comment: ef:Intelligent Systems with Applications, Volume 18, 2023, 200188, ISSN 2667-3053
comments: ef:Intelligent Systems with Applications, Volume 18, 2023, 200188, ISSN 2667-3053
abstract: The realization that AI-driven decision-making is indispensable in today's fast-paced and ultra-competitive marketplace has raised interest in industrial machine learning (ML) applications significantly. The current demand for analytics experts vastly exceeds the supply. One solution to this problem is to increase the user-friendliness of ML frameworks to make them more accessible for the non-expert. Automated machine learning (AutoML) is an attempt to solve the problem of expertise by providing fully automated off-the-shelf solutions for model choice and hyperparameter tuning. This paper analyzed the potential of AutoML for applications within business analytics, which could help to increase the adoption rate of ML across all industries. The H2O AutoML framework was benchmarked against a manually tuned stacked ML model on three real-world datasets. The manually tuned ML model could reach a performance advantage in all three case studies used in the experiment. Nevertheless, the H2O AutoML package proved to be quite potent. It is fast, easy to use, and delivers reliable results, which come close to a professionally tuned ML model. The H2O AutoML framework in its current capacity is a valuable tool to support fast prototyping with the potential to shorten development and deployment cycles. It can also bridge the existing gap between supply and demand for ML experts and is a big step towards automated decisions in business analytics. Finally, AutoML has the potential to foster human empowerment in a world that is rapidly becoming more automated and digital.

Finally, AutoML has the potential to foster human empowerment in a world that is rapidly becoming more automated and digital.
abstract_zh: 人们认识到人工智能驱动的决策在当今快节奏且竞争异常激烈的市场中不可或缺，这极大地提高了人们对工业机器学习 (ML) 应用的兴趣。目前对分析专家的需求远远超过供应。解决这个问题的一种方法是提高机器学习框架的用户友好性，使非专家更容易使用它们。自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 试图通过为模型选择和超参数调整提供完全自动化的现成解决方案来解决专业知识问题。本文分析了 AutoML 在业务分析中的应用潜力，这有助于提高 ML 在所有行业的采用率。 H2O AutoML 框架在三个真实数据集上针对手动调整的堆叠 ML 模型进行了基准测试。手动调整的 ML 模型可以在实验中使用的所有三个案例研究中达到性能优势。尽管如此，事实证明 H2O AutoML 包非常有效。它速度快、易于使用，并提供可靠的结果，接近于专业调整的 ML 模型。 H2O AutoML 框架目前的能力是支持快速原型设计的宝贵工具，具有缩短开发和部署周期的潜力。它还可以弥合机器学习专家的供需之间的现有差距，是迈向业务分析自动化决策的一大步。最后，AutoML 有潜力在一个迅速变得更加自动化和数字化的世界中促进人类赋权。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自动化机器学习（AutoML）在商业分析中的应用潜力，通过对比H2O AutoML框架与手动调优模型的性能，评估其在实际业务场景中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前市场对数据分析专家的需求远超供给，而AutoML可通过提供自动化解决方案降低ML使用门槛，从而加速各行业的ML应用普及。
AI.method: 以H2O AutoML框架为对象，将其与手动调优的集成学习模型在三个真实数据集上进行基准测试，对比模型性能、使用便捷性及可靠性。
AI.result: 手动调优模型在三个案例中表现更优，但H2O AutoML凭借快速部署、易用性和接近专业调优的稳定性，展现出缩短开发周期和弥补专家缺口的潜力。
AI.conclusion: AutoML是推动商业分析自动化的重要工具，既能提升非专家用户效率，又为行业数字化转型提供可行路径，同时促进人机协同的进一步发展。

The H2O AutoML framework in its current capacity is a valuable tool to support fast prototyping with the potential to shorten development and deployment cycles. It can also bridge the existing gap between supply and demand for ML experts and is a big step towards automated decisions in business analytics. Finally, AutoML has the potential to foster human empowerment in a world that is rapidly becoming more automated and digital. 人们认识到人工智能驱动的决策在当今快节奏且竞争异常激烈的市场中不可或缺，这极大地提高了人们对工业机器学习 (ML) 应用的兴趣。目前对分析专家的需求远远超过供应。解决这个问题的一种方法是提高机器学习框架的用户友好性，使非专家更容易使用它们。自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 试图通过为模型选择和超参数调整提供完全自动化的现成解决方案来解决专业知识问题。本文分析了 AutoML 在业务分析中的应用潜力，这有助于提高 ML 在所有行业的采用率。 H2O AutoML 框架在三个真实数据集上针对手动调整的堆叠 ML 模型进行了基准测试。手动调整的 ML 模型可以在实验中使用的所有三个案例研究中达到性能优势。尽管如此，事实证明 H2O AutoML 包非常有效。它速度快、易于使用，并提供可靠的结果，接近于专业调整的 ML 模型。 H2O AutoML 框架目前的能力是支持快速原型设计的宝贵工具，具有缩短开发和部署周期的潜力。它还可以弥合机器学习专家的供需之间的现有差距，是迈向业务分析自动化决策的一大步。最后，AutoML 有潜力在一个迅速变得更加自动化和数字化的世界中促进人类赋权。 本文探讨了自动化机器学习（AutoML）在商业分析中的应用潜力，通过对比H2O AutoML框架与手动调优模型的性能，评估其在实际业务场景中的有效性。 Marc Schmitt cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CE

authors_text: Tao Huang,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Chang Xu
title: Knowledge Distillation from A Stronger Teacher
title_zh: 来自更强大的老师的知识蒸馏
abstract: Unlike existing knowledge distillation methods focus on the baseline settings, where the teacher models and training strategies are not that strong and competing as state-of-the-art approaches, this paper presents a method dubbed DIST to distill better from a stronger teacher. We empirically find that the discrepancy of predictions between the student and a stronger teacher may tend to be fairly severer. As a result, the exact match of predictions in KL divergence would disturb the training and make existing methods perform poorly. In this paper, we show that simply preserving the relations between the predictions of teacher and student would suffice, and propose a correlation-based loss to capture the intrinsic inter-class relations from the teacher explicitly. Besides, considering that different instances have different semantic similarities to each class, we also extend this relational match to the intra-class level. Our method is simple yet practical, and extensive experiments demonstrate that it adapts well to various architectures, model sizes and training strategies, and can achieve state-of-the-art performance consistently on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/DIST_KD .
summary: Unlike existing knowledge distillation methods focus on the baseline settings, where the teacher models and training strategies are not that strong and competing as state-of-the-art approaches, this paper presents a method dubbed DIST to distill better from a stronger teacher. We empirically find that the discrepancy of predictions between the student and a stronger teacher may tend to be fairly severer. As a result, the exact match of predictions in KL divergence would disturb the training and make existing methods perform poorly. In this paper, we show that simply preserving the relations between the predictions of teacher and student would suffice, and propose a correlation-based loss to capture the intrinsic inter-class relations from the teacher explicitly. Besides, considering that different instances have different semantic similarities to each class, we also extend this relational match to the intra-class level. Our method is simple yet practical, and extensive experiments demonstrate that it adapts well to various architectures, model sizes and training strategies, and can achieve state-of-the-art performance consistently on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/DIST_KD .
abstract_zh: 与现有的知识蒸馏方法侧重于基线设置不同，其中教师模型和培训策略不是那么强大并且无法与最先进的方法竞争，本文提出了一种称为 DIST 的方法，可以从更强大的教师中更好地蒸馏。我们根据经验发现，学生和更强的老师之间的预测差异可能会相当严重。因此，KL 散度预测的精确匹配会干扰训练并使现有方法表现不佳。在本文中，我们证明只需保留教师和学生的预测之间的关系就足够了，并提出了基于相关性的损失来明确捕获教师的内在类间关系。此外，考虑到不同实例对每个类具有不同的语义相似性，我们还将这种关系匹配扩展到类内级别。我们的方法简单而实用，大量的实验表明它可以很好地适应各种架构、模型大小和训练策略，并且可以在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割任务上一致地实现最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/hunto/DIST_KD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从更强教师模型中进行知识蒸馏的方法DIST，以提升学生模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在教师模型和训练策略上不够强，导致学生与教师预测差异大，直接匹配预测会干扰训练，需新方法。
AI.method: 提出基于相关性的损失函数，显式捕捉教师模型的类间关系，并扩展至类内级别，以实现更准确的知识传递。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法适用于多种架构和任务，能在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单实用，有效解决了现有方法在强教师模型下的知识蒸馏难题，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Marc Schmitt
title: Deep Learning vs. Gradient Boosting: Benchmarking state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms for credit scoring
title_zh: 深度学习与梯度提升：对最先进的信用评分机器学习算法进行基准测试
comment: Submitted for publication in International Journal of Information Management
comments: Submitted for publication in International Journal of Information Management
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) have become vital to remain competitive for financial services companies around the globe. The two models currently competing for the pole position in credit risk management are deep learning (DL) and gradient boosting machines (GBM). This paper benchmarked those two algorithms in the context of credit scoring using three distinct datasets with different features to account for the reality that model choice/power is often dependent on the underlying characteristics of the dataset. The experiment has shown that GBM tends to be more powerful than DL and has also the advantage of speed due to lower computational requirements. This makes GBM the winner and choice for credit scoring. However, it was also shown that the outperformance of GBM is not always guaranteed and ultimately the concrete problem scenario or dataset will determine the final model choice. Overall, based on this study both algorithms can be considered state-of-the-art for binary classification tasks on structured datasets, while GBM should be the go-to solution for most problem scenarios due to easier use, significantly faster training time, and superior accuracy.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) have become vital to remain competitive for financial services companies around the globe. The two models currently competing for the pole position in credit risk management are deep learning (DL) and gradient boosting machines (GBM). This paper benchmarked those two algorithms in the context of credit scoring using three distinct datasets with different features to account for the reality that model choice/power is often dependent on the underlying characteristics of the dataset. The experiment has shown that GBM tends to be more powerful than DL and has also the advantage of speed due to lower computational requirements. This makes GBM the winner and choice for credit scoring. However, it was also shown that the outperformance of GBM is not always guaranteed and ultimately the concrete problem scenario or dataset will determine the final model choice. Overall, based on this study both algorithms can be considered state-of-the-art for binary classification tasks on structured datasets, while GBM should be the go-to solution for most problem scenarios due to easier use, significantly faster training time, and superior accuracy.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 对于全球金融服务公司保持竞争力至关重要。目前在信用风险管理领域争夺主导地位的两种模型是深度学习（DL）和梯度提升机（GBM）。本文使用具有不同特征的三个不同数据集在信用评分的背景下对这两种算法进行了基准测试，以考虑模型选择/能力通常取决于数据集的基本特征的现实。实验表明，GBM 往往比 DL 更强大，并且由于计算要求较低而具有速度优势。这使得 GBM 成为信用评分的赢家和选择。然而，研究还表明，GBM 的优异性能并不总是得到保证，最终具体的问题场景或数据集将决定最终的模型选择。总的来说，根据这项研究，这两种算法都可以被认为是结构化数据集上二元分类任务的最先进算法，而 GBM 应该成为大多数问题场景的首选解决方案，因为它更易于使用、训练时间显着缩短且准确性极高。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了深度学习和梯度提升算法在信用评分任务中的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 金融服务业需要选择最优机器学习模型进行信用风险评估，但现有研究缺乏对深度学习与梯度提升算法在不同数据集下的系统性对比。
AI.method: 使用三个特征差异化的实际数据集，分别训练和评估深度学习模型与梯度提升机（GBM），对比其准确率、训练速度等指标。
AI.result: 实验表明GBM在多数场景下优于深度学习模型，具有更快的训练速度和更高的准确性，但特定数据集可能影响模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 梯度提升机应作为信用评分的首选方案，但需结合具体数据特征选择模型，两种算法均属于结构化数据二分类任务的前沿方法。

The two models currently competing for the pole position in credit risk management are deep learning (DL) and gradient boosting machines (GBM). authors_text: Xueying Zhang,Kai Shen,Chi Zhang,Xiaochuan Fan,Yun Xiao,Zhen He,Bo Long,Lingfei Wu
title: Scenario-based Multi-product Advertising Copywriting Generation for E-Commerce
title_zh: 基于场景的电商多产品广告文案生成
abstract: In this paper, we proposed an automatic Scenario-based Multi-product Advertising Copywriting Generation system (SMPACG) for E-Commerce, which has been deployed on a leading Chinese e-commerce platform. The proposed SMPACG consists of two main components: 1) an automatic multi-product combination selection module, which itself is consisted of a topic prediction model, a pattern and attribute-based selection model and an arbitrator model; and 2) an automatic multi-product advertising copywriting generation module, which combines our proposed domain-specific pretrained language model and knowledge-based data enhancement model. The SMPACG is the first system that realizes automatic scenario-based multi-product advertising contents generation, which achieves significant improvements over other state-of-the-art methods. The SMPACG has been not only developed for directly serving for our e-commerce recommendation system, but also used as a real-time writing assistant tool for merchants.
summary: In this paper, we proposed an automatic Scenario-based Multi-product Advertising Copywriting Generation system (SMPACG) for E-Commerce, which has been deployed on a leading Chinese e-commerce platform. The proposed SMPACG consists of two main components: 1) an automatic multi-product combination selection module, which itself is consisted of a topic prediction model, a pattern and attribute-based selection model and an arbitrator model; and 2) an automatic multi-product advertising copywriting generation module, which combines our proposed domain-specific pretrained language model and knowledge-based data enhancement model. The SMPACG is the first system that realizes automatic scenario-based multi-product advertising contents generation, which achieves significant improvements over other state-of-the-art methods. The SMPACG has been not only developed for directly serving for our e-commerce recommendation system, but also used as a real-time writing assistant tool for merchants.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于场景的自动电子商务多产品广告文案生成系统（SMPACG），该系统已部署在中国领先的电子商务平台上。所提出的 SPACG 由两个主要部分组成：1）自动多产品组合选择模块，其本身由主题预测模型、基于模式和属性的选择模型以及仲裁器模型组成； 2）自动多产品广告文案生成模块，它结合了我们提出的特定领域预训练语言模型和基于知识的数据增强模型。 SPACG是第一个实现基于场景的多产品广告内容自动生成的系统，与其他最先进的方法相比取得了显着的改进。 SPACG不仅是为了直接服务于我们的电子商务推荐系统而开发的，而且还可以作为商家的实时写作辅助工具。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于场景的多产品广告文案自动生成系统SMPACG，用于电商平台
AI.motivation: 解决电商场景中多产品组合广告文案生成效率低、场景适配性差的问题，提升推荐效果和商户内容创作效率
AI.method: 构建双模块系统：1) 多产品组合选择模块包含主题预测模型、模式属性选择模型和仲裁模型；2) 文案生成模块融合领域预训练语言模型与知识增强模型
AI.result: 系统部署于主流电商平台，作为推荐系统组件和实时写作工具，显著优于现有方法
