search_text: Scenario-based Multi-product Advertising Copywriting Generation for E-Commerce 基于场景的电商多产品广告文案生成 In this paper, we proposed an automatic Scenario-based Multi-product Advertising Copywriting Generation system (SMPACG) for E-Commerce, which has been deployed on a leading Chinese e-commerce platform. The proposed SMPACG consists of two main components: 1) an automatic multi-product combination selection module, which itself is consisted of a topic prediction model, a pattern and attribute-based selection model and an arbitrator model; and 2) an automatic multi-product advertising copywriting generation module, which combines our proposed domain-specific pretrained language model and knowledge-based data enhancement model. The SMPACG is the first system that realizes automatic scenario-based multi-product advertising contents generation, which achieves significant improvements over other state-of-the-art methods. The SMPACG has been not only developed for directly serving for our e-commerce recommendation system, but also used as a real-time writing assistant tool for merchants. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于场景的自动电子商务多产品广告文案生成系统（SMPACG），该系统已部署在中国领先的电子商务平台上。所提出的 SPACG 由两个主要部分组成：1）自动多产品组合选择模块，其本身由主题预测模型、基于模式和属性的选择模型以及仲裁器模型组成； 2）自动多产品广告文案生成模块，它结合了我们提出的特定领域预训练语言模型和基于知识的数据增强模型。 SPACG是第一个实现基于场景的多产品广告内容自动生成的系统，与其他最先进的方法相比取得了显着的改进。 SPACG不仅是为了直接服务于我们的电子商务推荐系统而开发的，而且还可以作为商家的实时写作辅助工具。 提出了一种基于场景的多产品广告文案自动生成系统SMPACG，用于电商平台 Xueying Zhang,Kai Shen,Chi Zhang,Xiaochuan Fan,Yun Xiao,Zhen He,Bo Long,Lingfei Wu cs.AI

authors_text: Tuong Do,Huy Tran,Erman Tjiputra,Quang D. Tran,Anh Nguyen
title: Fine-Grained Visual Classification using Self Assessment Classifier
title_zh: 使用自我评估分类器进行细粒度视觉分类
abstract: Extracting discriminative features plays a crucial role in the fine-grained visual classification task. Most of the existing methods focus on developing attention or augmentation mechanisms to achieve this goal. However, addressing the ambiguity in the top-k prediction classes is not fully investigated. In this paper, we introduce a Self Assessment Classifier, which simultaneously leverages the representation of the image and top-k prediction classes to reassess the classification results. Our method is inspired by continual learning with coarse-grained and fine-grained classifiers to increase the discrimination of features in the backbone and produce attention maps of informative areas on the image. In practice, our method works as an auxiliary branch and can be easily integrated into different architectures. We show that by effectively addressing the ambiguity in the top-k prediction classes, our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on CUB200-2011, Stanford Dog, and FGVC Aircraft datasets. Furthermore, our method also consistently improves the accuracy of different existing fine-grained classifiers with a unified setup.
summary: Extracting discriminative features plays a crucial role in the fine-grained visual classification task. Most of the existing methods focus on developing attention or augmentation mechanisms to achieve this goal. However, addressing the ambiguity in the top-k prediction classes is not fully investigated. In this paper, we introduce a Self Assessment Classifier, which simultaneously leverages the representation of the image and top-k prediction classes to reassess the classification results. Our method is inspired by continual learning with coarse-grained and fine-grained classifiers to increase the discrimination of features in the backbone and produce attention maps of informative areas on the image. In practice, our method works as an auxiliary branch and can be easily integrated into different architectures. We show that by effectively addressing the ambiguity in the top-k prediction classes, our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on CUB200-2011, Stanford Dog, and FGVC Aircraft datasets. Furthermore, our method also consistently improves the accuracy of different existing fine-grained classifiers with a unified setup.
abstract_zh: 提取判别特征在细粒度视觉分类任务中起着至关重要的作用。大多数现有方法都专注于开发注意力或增强机制来实现这一目标。然而，解决 top-k 预测类别中的模糊性尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们引入了一种自我评估分类器，它同时利用图像的表示和 top-k 预测类来重新评估分类结果。我们的方法受到粗粒度和细粒度分类器持续学习的启发，以增加主干中特征的辨别力并生成图像上信息区域的注意力图。在实践中，我们的方法作为辅助分支，可以轻松集成到不同的架构中。我们证明，通过有效解决 top-k 预测类别中的模糊性，我们的方法在 CUB200-2011、Stanford Dog 和 FGVC Aircraft 数据集上取得了新的最先进结果。此外，我们的方法还通过统一的设置持续提高不同现有细粒度分类器的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自评估分类器，通过结合图像表示与top-k预测类别来解决细粒度视觉分类中的类别模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在细粒度分类中过度依赖注意力或数据增强机制，但未充分解决top-k预测类别间的歧义性，导致分类精度受限。
AI.method: 设计自评估分类器作为辅助分支，融合图像特征与top-k预测结果，借鉴持续学习思想生成注意力图以增强特征判别性。
AI.result: 在CUB200-2011、Stanford Dog和FGVC Aircraft数据集上取得新SOTA结果，并统一提升多种现有分类器的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效缓解top-k预测模糊性，该方法显著提升细粒度分类性能且具有跨架构适配性。

authors_text: Xin Deng,WenYu Zhang,Qing Ding,XinMing Zhang
title: PointVector: A Vector Representation In Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: PointVector：点云分析中的矢量表示
abstract: In point cloud analysis, point-based methods have rapidly developed in recent years. These methods have recently focused on concise MLP structures, such as PointNeXt, which have demonstrated competitiveness with Convolutional and Transformer structures. However, standard MLPs are limited in their ability to extract local features effectively. To address this limitation, we propose a Vector-oriented Point Set Abstraction that can aggregate neighboring features through higher-dimensional vectors. To facilitate network optimization, we construct a transformation from scalar to vector using independent angles based on 3D vector rotations. Finally, we develop a PointVector model that follows the structure of PointNeXt. Our experimental results demonstrate that PointVector achieves state-of-the-art performance $\textbf{72.3\% mIOU}$ on the S3DIS Area 5 and $\textbf{78.4\% mIOU}$ on the S3DIS (6-fold cross-validation) with only $\textbf{58\%}$ model parameters of PointNeXt. We hope our work will help the exploration of concise and effective feature representations. The code will be released soon.
summary: In point cloud analysis, point-based methods have rapidly developed in recent years. These methods have recently focused on concise MLP structures, such as PointNeXt, which have demonstrated competitiveness with Convolutional and Transformer structures. However, standard MLPs are limited in their ability to extract local features effectively. To address this limitation, we propose a Vector-oriented Point Set Abstraction that can aggregate neighboring features through higher-dimensional vectors. To facilitate network optimization, we construct a transformation from scalar to vector using independent angles based on 3D vector rotations. Finally, we develop a PointVector model that follows the structure of PointNeXt. Our experimental results demonstrate that PointVector achieves state-of-the-art performance $\textbf{72.3\% mIOU}$ on the S3DIS Area 5 and $\textbf{78.4\% mIOU}$ on the S3DIS (6-fold cross-validation) with only $\textbf{58\%}$ model parameters of PointNeXt. We hope our work will help the exploration of concise and effective feature representations. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 在点云分析中，基于点的方法近年来迅速发展。这些方法最近集中在简洁的 MLP 结构上，例如 PointNeXt，它已经证明了与卷积和 Transformer 结构的竞争力。然而，标准 MLP 有效提取局部特征的能力有限。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种面向向量的点集抽象，它可以通过高维向量聚合相邻特征。为了促进网络优化，我们使用基于 3D 矢量旋转的独立角度构建从标量到矢量的转换。最后，我们开发了一个遵循 PointNeXt 结构的 PointVector 模型。我们的实验结果表明，PointVector 在 S3DIS Area 5 上实现了最先进的性能 $\textbf{72.3\% mIOU}$ ，在 S3DIS 上实现了 $\textbf{78.4\% mIOU}$ （6 倍交叉验证），仅使用 PointNeXt 的 $\textbf{58\%}$ 模型参数。我们希望我们的工作将有助于探索简洁有效的特征表示。该代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointVector模型，通过向量表示改进点云分析中的局部特征提取，减少参数量并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MLP的点云方法在局部特征提取上存在局限，尽管结构简洁但效果不足，需探索更高效的特征表示方式。
AI.method: 设计向量导向的点集抽象方法，通过高维向量聚合邻域特征，并基于3D旋转角度构建标量到向量的转换，最终构建PointVector模型。
AI.result: 在S3DIS Area 5数据集上达到72.3% mIOU，在6折交叉验证中达78.4% mIOU，参数量仅为PointNeXt的58%。
AI.conclusion: PointVector通过向量表示实现了更高效且精确的点云分析，为简洁有效的特征表示探索提供了新方向。

ai_content.conclusion: PointVector通过向量表示实现了更高效且精确的点云分析，为简洁有效的特征表示探索提供了新方向。

authors_text: Daniel Kvak
title: Visualizing CoAtNet Predictions for Aiding Melanoma Detection
title_zh: 可视化 CoAtNet 预测以帮助黑色素瘤检测
abstract: Melanoma is considered to be the most aggressive form of skin cancer. Due to the similar shape of malignant and benign cancerous lesions, doctors spend considerably more time when diagnosing these findings. At present, the evaluation of malignancy is performed primarily by invasive histological examination of the suspicious lesion. Developing an accurate classifier for early and efficient detection can minimize and monitor the harmful effects of skin cancer and increase patient survival rates. This paper proposes a multi-class classification task using the CoAtNet architecture, a hybrid model that combines the depthwise convolution matrix operation of traditional convolutional neural networks with the strengths of Transformer models and self-attention mechanics to achieve better generalization and capacity. The proposed multi-class classifier achieves an overall precision of 0.901, recall 0.895, and AP 0.923, indicating high performance compared to other state-of-the-art networks.

Developing an accurate classifier for early and efficient detection can minimize and monitor the harmful effects of skin cancer and increase patient survival rates. abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤被认为是最具侵袭性的皮肤癌。由于恶性和良性癌性病变的形状相似，医生在诊断这些发现时要花费更多的时间。目前，恶性程度的评估主要通过对可疑病变进行侵入性组织学检查来进行。开发准确的分类器以进行早期有效的检测可以最大限度地减少和监测皮肤癌的有害影响并提高患者的生存率。本文提出了使用 CoAtNet 架构的多类分类任务，这是一种混合模型，将传统卷积神经网络的深度卷积矩阵运算与 Transformer 模型和自注意力机制的优点相结合，以实现更好的泛化和容量。所提出的多类分类器的总体精度为 0.901，召回率为 0.895，AP 为 0.923，与其他最先进的网络相比，具有较高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CoAtNet架构的多分类模型，用于辅助黑色素瘤检测，结合卷积神经网络与Transformer的优势以提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤诊断依赖侵入性组织学检查，且良恶性病变形态相似导致诊断耗时。开发高效分类器可提升早期检测准确率，改善患者生存率。
AI.method: 采用CoAtNet混合架构，融合传统卷积神经网络的深度卷积操作与Transformer的自注意力机制，构建多分类模型进行黑色素瘤预测可视化。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到0.901的精确率、0.895的召回率和0.923的平均精度，优于其他先进网络。
AI.conclusion: CoAtNet在黑色素瘤检测中表现出色，为非侵入性、高效的早期筛查提供了可行方案，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Michael Timothy Bennett
title: Computable Artificial General Intelligence
title_zh: 可计算通用人工智能
abstract: Artificial general intelligence (AGI) may herald our extinction, according to AI safety research. Yet claims regarding AGI must rely upon mathematical formalisms -- theoretical agents we may analyse or attempt to build. AIXI appears to be the only such formalism supported by proof that its behaviour is optimal, a consequence of its use of compression as a proxy for intelligence. Unfortunately, AIXI is incomputable and claims regarding its behaviour highly subjective. We argue that this is because AIXI formalises cognition as taking place in isolation from the environment in which goals are pursued (Cartesian dualism). We propose an alternative, supported by proof and experiment, which overcomes these problems. Integrating research from cognitive science with AI, we formalise an enactive model of learning and reasoning to address the problem of subjectivity. This allows us to formulate a different proxy for intelligence, called weakness, which addresses the problem of incomputability. We prove optimal behaviour is attained when weakness is maximised. This proof is supplemented by experimental results comparing weakness and description length (the closest analogue to compression possible without reintroducing subjectivity). Weakness outperforms description length, suggesting it is a better proxy. Furthermore we show that, if cognition is enactive, then minimisation of description length is neither necessary nor sufficient to attain optimal performance, undermining the notion that compression is closely related to intelligence. However, there remain open questions regarding the implementation of scale-able AGI. In the short term, these results may be best utilised to improve the performance of existing systems. For example, our results explain why Deepmind's Apperception Engine is able to generalise effectively, and how to replicate that performance by maximising weakness.
summary: Artificial general intelligence (AGI) may herald our extinction, according to AI safety research. Yet claims regarding AGI must rely upon mathematical formalisms -- theoretical agents we may analyse or attempt to build. AIXI appears to be the only such formalism supported by proof that its behaviour is optimal, a consequence of its use of compression as a proxy for intelligence. Unfortunately, AIXI is incomputable and claims regarding its behaviour highly subjective. We argue that this is because AIXI formalises cognition as taking place in isolation from the environment in which goals are pursued (Cartesian dualism). We propose an alternative, supported by proof and experiment, which overcomes these problems. Integrating research from cognitive science with AI, we formalise an enactive model of learning and reasoning to address the problem of subjectivity. This allows us to formulate a different proxy for intelligence, called weakness, which addresses the problem of incomputability. We prove optimal behaviour is attained when weakness is maximised. This proof is supplemented by experimental results comparing weakness and description length (the closest analogue to compression possible without reintroducing subjectivity). Weakness outperforms description length, suggesting it is a better proxy. Furthermore we show that, if cognition is enactive, then minimisation of description length is neither necessary nor sufficient to attain optimal performance, undermining the notion that compression is closely related to intelligence. However, there remain open questions regarding the implementation of scale-able AGI. In the short term, these results may be best utilised to improve the performance of existing systems. For example, our results explain why Deepmind's Apperception Engine is able to generalise effectively, and how to replicate that performance by maximising weakness.
abstract_zh: 根据人工智能安全研究，通用人工智能（AGI）可能预示着我们的灭绝。然而，有关通用人工智能的主张必须依赖于数学形式主义——我们可以分析或尝试构建的理论代理。 AIXI 似乎是唯一有证据证明其行为是最优的这种形式主义，这是它使用压缩作为智能代理的结果。不幸的是，AIXI 是无法计算的，并且关于其行为的主张非常主观。我们认为这是因为 AIXI 将认知形式化为与追求目标的环境隔离的认知（笛卡尔二元论）。我们提出了一种有证据和实验支持的替代方案，可以克服这些问题。将认知科学的研究与人工智能相结合，我们形式化了一个学习和推理的生成模型来解决主观性问题。这使我们能够制定一种不同的智能代理，称为弱点，它解决了不可计算性的问题。我们证明，当弱点最大化时，就会达到最佳行为。比较弱点和描述长度的实验结果补充了这一证明（在不重新引入主观性的情况下可能与压缩最接近的模拟）。弱点优于描述长度，表明它是一个更好的代理。此外，我们表明，如果认知是活跃的，那么描述长度的最小化对于获得最佳性能既不是必要的也不是充分的，从而破坏了压缩与智力密切相关的概念。然而，关于可扩展通用人工智能的实施仍然存在悬而未决的问题。在短期内，这些结果可能最好地用于提高现有系统的性能。例如，我们的结果解释了为什么 Deepmind 的感知引擎能够有效地泛化，以及如何通过最大化弱点来复制这种性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可计算的人工通用智能（AGI）模型，通过引入‘弱性’作为智能的新代理指标，解决传统AIXI模型的不可计算性和主观性问题。
AI.motivation: AIXI模型虽理论上最优，但因不可计算和高度主观性难以应用。作者认为其问题源于笛卡尔二元论假设，需建立更符合认知科学的可计算框架。
AI.method: 整合认知科学与AI理论，构建具身认知模型，定义‘弱性’作为智能新代理指标，通过理论证明与实验对比验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明‘弱性’优于传统描述长度（压缩）指标，且证明最小化描述长度并非实现最优性能的必要条件，动摇了压缩与智能的强关联假设。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新框架为可计算AGI提供理论支持，短期可优化现有系统（如DeepMind的Apperception Engine），但大规模AGI实现仍存挑战。

authors_text: Yangkai Du,Tengfei Ma,Lingfei Wu,Yiming Wu,Xuhong Zhang,Bo Long,Shouling Ji
title: Improving Long Tailed Document-Level Relation Extraction via Easy Relation Augmentation and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过简单的关系增强和对比学习改进长尾文档级关系提取
abstract: Towards real-world information extraction scenario, research of relation extraction is advancing to document-level relation extraction(DocRE). Existing approaches for DocRE aim to extract relation by encoding various information sources in the long context by novel model architectures. However, the inherent long-tailed distribution problem of DocRE is overlooked by prior work. We argue that mitigating the long-tailed distribution problem is crucial for DocRE in the real-world scenario. Motivated by the long-tailed distribution problem, we propose an Easy Relation Augmentation(ERA) method for improving DocRE by enhancing the performance of tailed relations. In addition, we further propose a novel contrastive learning framework based on our ERA, i.e., ERACL, which can further improve the model performance on tailed relations and achieve competitive overall DocRE performance compared to the state-of-arts.
summary: Towards real-world information extraction scenario, research of relation extraction is advancing to document-level relation extraction(DocRE). Existing approaches for DocRE aim to extract relation by encoding various information sources in the long context by novel model architectures. However, the inherent long-tailed distribution problem of DocRE is overlooked by prior work. We argue that mitigating the long-tailed distribution problem is crucial for DocRE in the real-world scenario. Motivated by the long-tailed distribution problem, we propose an Easy Relation Augmentation(ERA) method for improving DocRE by enhancing the performance of tailed relations. In addition, we further propose a novel contrastive learning framework based on our ERA, i.e., ERACL, which can further improve the model performance on tailed relations and achieve competitive overall DocRE performance compared to the state-of-arts.
abstract_zh: 针对现实世界的信息抽取场景，关系抽取的研究正在向文档级关系抽取（DocRE）发展。现有的 DocRE 方法旨在通过新颖的模型架构在长上下文中编码各种信息源来提取关系。然而，先前的工作忽略了 DocRE 固有的长尾分布问题。我们认为，缓解长尾分布问题对于现实场景中的 DocRE 至关重要。受长尾分布问题的启发，我们提出了一种简单关系增强（ERA）方法，通过增强尾部关系的性能来改进 DocRE。此外，我们进一步提出了一种基于我们的 ERA 的新型对比学习框架，即 ERACL，它可以进一步提高尾部关系上的模型性能，并与现有技术相比实现具有竞争力的整体 DocRE 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过易关系增强和对比学习方法改进文档级关系抽取中的长尾分布问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文档级关系抽取方法忽视了长尾分布问题，而该问题在真实场景中对模型性能影响显著。
AI.method: 提出易关系增强（ERA）方法增强尾部关系性能，并基于ERA设计对比学习框架ERACL。
AI.result: 在尾部关系上表现提升，整体性能与最先进方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决长尾分布问题，所提方法有效提升了文档级关系抽取的实用性与准确性。

search_text: Improving Long Tailed Document-Level Relation Extraction via Easy Relation Augmentation and Contrastive Learning 通过简单的关系增强和对比学习改进长尾文档级关系提取 Towards real-world information extraction scenario, research of relation extraction is advancing to document-level relation extraction(DocRE). Existing approaches for DocRE aim to extract relation by encoding various information sources in the long context by novel model architectures. However, the inherent long-tailed distribution problem of DocRE is overlooked by prior work. We argue that mitigating the long-tailed distribution problem is crucial for DocRE in the real-world scenario. Motivated by the long-tailed distribution problem, we propose an Easy Relation Augmentation(ERA) method for improving DocRE by enhancing the performance of tailed relations. In addition, we further propose a novel contrastive learning framework based on our ERA, i.e., ERACL, which can further improve the model performance on tailed relations and achieve competitive overall DocRE performance compared to the state-of-arts. 针对现实世界的信息抽取场景，关系抽取的研究正在向文档级关系抽取（DocRE）发展。现有的 DocRE 方法旨在通过新颖的模型架构在长上下文中编码各种信息源来提取关系。然而，先前的工作忽略了 DocRE 固有的长尾分布问题。我们认为，缓解长尾分布问题对于现实场景中的 DocRE 至关重要。受长尾分布问题的启发，我们提出了一种简单关系增强（ERA）方法，通过增强尾部关系的性能来改进 DocRE。此外，我们进一步提出了一种基于我们的 ERA 的新型对比学习框架，即 ERACL，它可以进一步提高尾部关系上的模型性能，并与现有技术相比实现具有竞争力的整体 DocRE 性能。 本文旨在通过易关系增强和对比学习方法改进文档级关系抽取中的长尾分布问题。 Yangkai Du,Tengfei Ma,Lingfei Wu,Yiming Wu,Xuhong Zhang,Bo Long,Shouling Ji cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Kelvin Kwakye,Younho Seong,Sun Yi
title: Travel Time, Distance and Costs Optimization for Paratransit Operations using Graph Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用图卷积神经网络优化辅助公交运营的行程时间、距离和成本
abstract: The provision of paratransit services is one option to meet the transportation needs of Vulnerable Road Users (VRUs). Like any other means of transportation, paratransit has obstacles such as high operational costs and longer trip times. As a result, customers are dissatisfied, and paratransit operators have a low approval rating. Researchers have undertaken various studies over the years to better understand the travel behaviors of paratransit customers and how they are operated. According to the findings of these researches, paratransit operators confront the challenge of determining the optimal route for their trips in order to save travel time. Depending on the nature of the challenge, most research used different optimization techniques to solve these routing problems. As a result, the goal of this study is to use Graph Convolutional Neural Networks (GCNs) to assist paratransit operators in researching various operational scenarios in a strategic setting in order to optimize routing, minimize operating costs and minimize their users' travel time. The study was carried out by using a randomized simulated dataset to help determine the decision to make in terms of fleet composition and capacity under different situations. For the various scenarios investigated, the GCN assisted in determining the minimum optimal gap.
summary: The provision of paratransit services is one option to meet the transportation needs of Vulnerable Road Users (VRUs). Like any other means of transportation, paratransit has obstacles such as high operational costs and longer trip times. As a result, customers are dissatisfied, and paratransit operators have a low approval rating. Researchers have undertaken various studies over the years to better understand the travel behaviors of paratransit customers and how they are operated. According to the findings of these researches, paratransit operators confront the challenge of determining the optimal route for their trips in order to save travel time. Depending on the nature of the challenge, most research used different optimization techniques to solve these routing problems. As a result, the goal of this study is to use Graph Convolutional Neural Networks (GCNs) to assist paratransit operators in researching various operational scenarios in a strategic setting in order to optimize routing, minimize operating costs and minimize their users' travel time. The study was carried out by using a randomized simulated dataset to help determine the decision to make in terms of fleet composition and capacity under different situations. For the various scenarios investigated, the GCN assisted in determining the minimum optimal gap.
abstract_zh: 提供辅助交通服务是满足弱势道路使用者 (VRU) 交通需求的一种选择。与任何其他交通方式一样，辅助客运系统也存在运营成本高和行程时间较长等障碍。结果，顾客不满意，辅助公交运营商的支持率也很低。多年来，研究人员进行了各种研究，以更好地了解辅助公交乘客的出行行为及其运营方式。根据这些研究的结果，辅助公交运营商面临着确定最佳出行路线以节省出行时间的挑战。根据挑战的性质，大多数研究使用不同的优化技术来解决这些路由问题。因此，本研究的目标是使用图卷积神经网络 (GCN) 协助辅助公交运营商研究战略环境中的各种运营场景，以优化路线、最大限度地降低运营成本并最大限度地减少用户的出行时间。该研究是通过使用随机模拟数据集进行的，以帮助确定在不同情况下在机队组成和容量方面做出的决策。对于所调查的各种场景，GCN 帮助确定最小最佳间隙。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在利用图卷积神经网络（GCN）优化合乘交通（Paratransit）的路线规划，以降低运营成本并减少用户出行时间。
AI.motivation: 合乘交通面临高运营成本和较长出行时间的问题，导致用户满意度低。现有研究缺乏有效的战略级优化方法以应对复杂运营场景。
AI.method: 通过构建随机模拟数据集，采用图卷积神经网络分析不同车队配置和容量场景，确定最优路线规划方案。
AI.result: GCN模型在多种场景下成功识别出最小优化间隙，为车队调度和路线规划提供了数据驱动的决策支持。
AI.conclusion: 图卷积神经网络能有效解决合乘交通的战略优化问题，为运营商提供降低运营成本和提升服务效率的新方法。

authors_text: Fuzhao Xue,Jianghai Chen,Aixin Sun,Xiaozhe Ren,Zangwei Zheng,Xiaoxin He,Yongming Chen,Xin Jiang,Yang You
title: A Study on Transformer Configuration and Training Objective
title_zh: 变压器配置及培训目标研究
abstract: Transformer-based models have delivered impressive results on many tasks, particularly vision and language tasks. In many model training situations, conventional configurations are typically adopted. For example, we often set the base model with hidden dimensions (i.e. model width) to be 768 and the number of transformer layers (i.e. model depth) to be 12. In this paper, we revisit these conventional configurations. Through theoretical analysis and experimental evaluation, we show that the masked autoencoder is effective in alleviating the over-smoothing issue in deep transformer training. Based on this finding, we propose Bamboo, an idea of using deeper and narrower transformer configurations, for masked autoencoder training. On ImageNet, with such a simple change in configuration, re-designed model achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy and outperforms SoTA models like MAE and BEiT. On language tasks, re-designed model outperforms BERT with default setting by 1.1 points on average, on GLUE datasets.
summary: Transformer-based models have delivered impressive results on many tasks, particularly vision and language tasks. In many model training situations, conventional configurations are typically adopted. For example, we often set the base model with hidden dimensions (i.e. model width) to be 768 and the number of transformer layers (i.e. model depth) to be 12. In this paper, we revisit these conventional configurations. Through theoretical analysis and experimental evaluation, we show that the masked autoencoder is effective in alleviating the over-smoothing issue in deep transformer training. Based on this finding, we propose Bamboo, an idea of using deeper and narrower transformer configurations, for masked autoencoder training. On ImageNet, with such a simple change in configuration, re-designed model achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy and outperforms SoTA models like MAE and BEiT. On language tasks, re-designed model outperforms BERT with default setting by 1.1 points on average, on GLUE datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型在许多任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，特别是视觉和语言任务。在许多模型训练情况下，通常采用常规配置。例如，我们经常将隐藏尺寸（即模型宽度）的基础模型设置为 768，将 Transformer 层数（即模型深度）设置为 12。在本文中，我们重新审视这些传统配置。通过理论分析和实验评估，我们表明屏蔽自动编码器可以有效缓解深度变压器训练中的过度平滑问题。基于这一发现，我们提出了 Bamboo，一种使用更深、更窄的变压器配置来进行掩码自动编码器训练的想法。在 ImageNet 上，通过如此简单的配置更改，重新设计的模型实现了 87.1% 的 top-1 准确率，并且优于 MAE 和 BEiT 等 SoTA 模型。在语言任务上，重新设计的模型在 GLUE 数据集上的性能平均优于默认设置下的 BERT 1.1 个点。

AI.tldr: 研究Transformer配置及训练目标，提出更优的深度与宽度配置方法
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer配置存在过平滑问题，深度与宽度的固定设置可能限制模型性能
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，提出Bamboo方法，采用更深更窄的Transformer结构结合掩码自编码器训练
AI.result: ImageNet上达到87.1% top-1准确率，超越MAE/BEiT等SOTA模型；GLUE任务平均超越BERT默认设置1.1个百分点
AI.conclusion: 深度与宽度的配置调整能有效缓解过平滑问题，Bamboo方法在多任务中展现性能优势

ai_content.conclusion: 深度与宽度的配置调整能有效缓解过平滑问题，Bamboo方法在多任务中展现性能优势

Based on this finding, we propose Bamboo, an idea of using deeper and narrower transformer configurations, for masked autoencoder training. On ImageNet, with such a simple change in configuration, re-designed model achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy and outperforms SoTA models like MAE and BEiT. On language tasks, re-designed model outperforms BERT with default setting by 1.1 points on average, on GLUE datasets. 基于 Transformer 的模型在许多任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，特别是视觉和语言任务。在许多模型训练情况下，通常采用常规配置。例如，我们经常将隐藏尺寸（即模型宽度）的基础模型设置为 768，将 Transformer 层数（即模型深度）设置为 12。在本文中，我们重新审视这些传统配置。通过理论分析和实验评估，我们表明屏蔽自动编码器可以有效缓解深度变压器训练中的过度平滑问题。基于这一发现，我们提出了 Bamboo，一种使用更深、更窄的变压器配置来进行掩码自动编码器训练的想法。在 ImageNet 上，通过如此简单的配置更改，重新设计的模型实现了 87.1% 的 top-1 准确率，并且优于 MAE 和 BEiT 等 SoTA 模型。在语言任务上，重新设计的模型在 GLUE 数据集上的性能平均优于默认设置下的 BERT 1.1 个点。 研究Transformer配置及训练目标，提出更优的深度与宽度配置方法 Fuzhao Xue,Jianghai Chen,Aixin Sun,Xiaozhe Ren,Zangwei Zheng,Xiaoxin He,Yongming Chen,Xin Jiang,Yang You cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Pavan C. Madhusudana,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik
title: Making Video Quality Assessment Models Sensitive to Frame Rate Distortions
title_zh: 使视频质量评估模型对帧率失真敏感
abstract: We consider the problem of capturing distortions arising from changes in frame rate as part of Video Quality Assessment (VQA). Variable frame rate (VFR) videos have become much more common, and streamed videos commonly range from 30 frames per second (fps) up to 120 fps. VFR-VQA offers unique challenges in terms of distortion types as well as in making non-uniform comparisons of reference and distorted videos having different frame rates. The majority of current VQA models require compared videos to be of the same frame rate, but are unable to adequately account for frame rate artifacts. The recently proposed Generalized Entropic Difference (GREED) VQA model succeeds at this task, using natural video statistics models of entropic differences of temporal band-pass coefficients, delivering superior performance on predicting video quality changes arising from frame rate distortions. Here we propose a simple fusion framework, whereby temporal features from GREED are combined with existing VQA models, towards improving model sensitivity towards frame rate distortions. We find through extensive experiments that this feature fusion significantly boosts model performance on both HFR/VFR datasets as well as fixed frame rate (FFR) VQA databases. Our results suggest that employing efficient temporal representations can result much more robust and accurate VQA models when frame rate variations can occur.
summary: We consider the problem of capturing distortions arising from changes in frame rate as part of Video Quality Assessment (VQA). Variable frame rate (VFR) videos have become much more common, and streamed videos commonly range from 30 frames per second (fps) up to 120 fps. VFR-VQA offers unique challenges in terms of distortion types as well as in making non-uniform comparisons of reference and distorted videos having different frame rates. The majority of current VQA models require compared videos to be of the same frame rate, but are unable to adequately account for frame rate artifacts. The recently proposed Generalized Entropic Difference (GREED) VQA model succeeds at this task, using natural video statistics models of entropic differences of temporal band-pass coefficients, delivering superior performance on predicting video quality changes arising from frame rate distortions. Here we propose a simple fusion framework, whereby temporal features from GREED are combined with existing VQA models, towards improving model sensitivity towards frame rate distortions. We find through extensive experiments that this feature fusion significantly boosts model performance on both HFR/VFR datasets as well as fixed frame rate (FFR) VQA databases. Our results suggest that employing efficient temporal representations can result much more robust and accurate VQA models when frame rate variations can occur.
abstract_zh: 我们将捕捉帧速率变化引起的失真问题视为视频质量评估 (VQA) 的一部分。可变帧率 (VFR) 视频变得更加常见，流式视频的帧率通常从 30 帧每秒 (fps) 到最高 120 fps。 VFR-VQA 在失真类型以及对具有不同帧速率的参考视频和失真视频进行非均匀比较方面提出了独特的挑战。当前的大多数 VQA 模型要求比较视频具有相同的帧速率，但无法充分考虑帧速率伪影。最近提出的广义熵差 (GREED) VQA 模型成功地完成了这项任务，它使用时间带通系数的熵差的自然视频统计模型，在预测由帧率失真引起的视频质量变化方面提供了卓越的性能。在这里，我们提出了一个简单的融合框架，将 GREED 的时间特征与现有的 VQA 模型相结合，以提高模型对帧率失真的敏感性。我们通过大量实验发现，这种特征融合显着提高了 HFR/VFR 数据集以及固定帧率 (FFR) VQA 数据库上的模型性能。我们的结果表明，当帧速率发生变化时，采用有效的时间表示可以产生更加稳健和准确的 VQA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合框架，通过结合GREED模型的时序特征与现有视频质量评估模型，提升模型对帧率失真敏感度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估模型难以处理变帧率（VFR）视频的帧率失真问题，而高帧率/变帧率视频在流媒体中日益普遍，亟需改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出基于GREED模型的时序特征与传统VQA模型的特征融合框架，利用熵差分析的时域带通系数捕捉帧率失真特性。
AI.result: 实验表明该融合方法在高帧率/变帧率数据集及固定帧率数据库上均显著提升模型性能，验证了时序表征有效性。
AI.conclusion: 高效时序特征融合可有效增强VQA模型对帧率变化的鲁棒性，为变帧率视频质量评估提供新思路。

authors_text: Mengyuan Zhang,Kai Liu
title: Enriched Robust Multi-View Kernel Subspace Clustering
title_zh: 丰富的鲁棒多视图内核子空间聚类
abstract: Subspace clustering is to find underlying low-dimensional subspaces and cluster the data points correctly. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view subspace clustering method. Most existing methods suffer from two critical issues. First, they usually adopt a two-stage framework and isolate the processes of affinity learning, multi-view information fusion and clustering. Second, they assume the data lies in a linear subspace which may fail in practice as most real-world datasets may have non-linearity structures. To address the above issues, in this paper we propose a novel Enriched Robust Multi-View Kernel Subspace Clustering framework where the consensus affinity matrix is learned from both multi-view data and spectral clustering. Due to the objective and constraints which is difficult to optimize, we propose an iterative optimization method which is easy to implement and can yield closed solution in each step. Extensive experiments have validated the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art clustering methods.
summary: Subspace clustering is to find underlying low-dimensional subspaces and cluster the data points correctly. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view subspace clustering method. Most existing methods suffer from two critical issues. First, they usually adopt a two-stage framework and isolate the processes of affinity learning, multi-view information fusion and clustering. Second, they assume the data lies in a linear subspace which may fail in practice as most real-world datasets may have non-linearity structures. To address the above issues, in this paper we propose a novel Enriched Robust Multi-View Kernel Subspace Clustering framework where the consensus affinity matrix is learned from both multi-view data and spectral clustering. Due to the objective and constraints which is difficult to optimize, we propose an iterative optimization method which is easy to implement and can yield closed solution in each step. Extensive experiments have validated the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art clustering methods.
abstract_zh: 子空间聚类是找到底层的低维子空间并对数据点进行正确的聚类。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图子空间聚类方法。大多数现有方法都存在两个关键问题。首先，它们通常采用两阶段框架，隔离亲和学习、多视图信息融合和聚类的过程。其次，他们假设数据位于线性子空间中，这在实践中可能会失败，因为大多数现实世界的数据集可能具有非线性结构。为了解决上述问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的丰富鲁棒多视图内核子空间聚类框架，其中从多视图数据和谱聚类中学习一致性亲和力矩阵。由于难以优化的目标和约束，我们提出了一种易于实现并且可以在每一步中产生封闭解的迭代优化方法。大量的实验验证了我们的方法相对于最先进的聚类方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的多视图核子空间聚类方法，解决现有方法的两阶段框架和线性假设问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两阶段框架导致过程分离，且假设数据线性可能不适用于实际非线性数据
AI.method: 提出融合多视图数据与谱聚类的共识亲和矩阵学习框架，并设计迭代优化算法以实现闭式解
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法优于现有聚类方法
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了多视图子空间聚类中的关键问题，具有更好的聚类性能

authors_text: Jing Ma,Xiang Xiang,Ke Wang,Yuchuan Wu,Yongbin Li
title: Aligning Logits Generatively for Principled Black-Box Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 生成性地对齐 Logits 以实现有原则的黑盒知识蒸馏
comment: To appear at CVPR 2024; significantly rewritten with extra experiments since the preliminary report
comments: To appear at CVPR 2024; significantly rewritten with extra experiments since the preliminary report
abstract: Black-Box Knowledge Distillation (B2KD) is a formulated problem for cloud-to-edge model compression with invisible data and models hosted on the server. B2KD faces challenges such as limited Internet exchange and edge-cloud disparity of data distributions. In this paper, we formalize a two-step workflow consisting of deprivatization and distillation, and theoretically provide a new optimization direction from logits to cell boundary different from direct logits alignment. With its guidance, we propose a new method Mapping-Emulation KD (MEKD) that distills a black-box cumbersome model into a lightweight one. Our method does not differentiate between treating soft or hard responses, and consists of: 1) deprivatization: emulating the inverse mapping of the teacher function with a generator, and 2) distillation: aligning low-dimensional logits of the teacher and student models by reducing the distance of high-dimensional image points. For different teacher-student pairs, our method yields inspiring distillation performance on various benchmarks, and outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Black-Box Knowledge Distillation (B2KD) is a formulated problem for cloud-to-edge model compression with invisible data and models hosted on the server. B2KD faces challenges such as limited Internet exchange and edge-cloud disparity of data distributions. In this paper, we formalize a two-step workflow consisting of deprivatization and distillation, and theoretically provide a new optimization direction from logits to cell boundary different from direct logits alignment. With its guidance, we propose a new method Mapping-Emulation KD (MEKD) that distills a black-box cumbersome model into a lightweight one. Our method does not differentiate between treating soft or hard responses, and consists of: 1) deprivatization: emulating the inverse mapping of the teacher function with a generator, and 2) distillation: aligning low-dimensional logits of the teacher and student models by reducing the distance of high-dimensional image points. For different teacher-student pairs, our method yields inspiring distillation performance on various benchmarks, and outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 黑盒知识蒸馏 (B2KD) 是一个针对云到边缘模型压缩的公式化问题，其中包含托管在服务器上的不可见数据和模型。 B2KD面临互联网交换有限、边云数据分布差异等挑战。在本文中，我们形式化了由去私有化和蒸馏组成的两步​​工作流程，并在理论上提供了不同于直接logits对齐的从logits到单元边界的新优化方向。在它的指导下，我们提出了一种新方法 Mapping-Emulation KD (MEKD)，将黑盒繁琐的模型提炼为轻量级模型。我们的方法不区分处理软响应或硬响应，包括：1）去私有化：用生成器模拟教师函数的逆映射，2）蒸馏：通过减少高维图像点的距离来对齐教师和学生模型的低维逻辑。对于不同的师生对，我们的方法在各种基准上产生了鼓舞人心的蒸馏性能，并且优于以前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MEKD的生成式对齐方法，用于解决黑盒知识蒸馏中的云到边缘模型压缩问题。
AI.motivation: 黑盒知识蒸馏面临互联网交换限制和边缘-云数据分布差异的挑战，现有方法难以有效应对这些实际场景问题。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：1）通过生成器模拟教师模型的逆映射实现去隐私化；2）通过降低高维图像点距离对齐教师和学生的低维logits。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在不同教师-学生模型对中均取得优于现有最先进方法的蒸馏效果。
AI.conclusion: MEKD通过生成式对齐框架有效解决了黑盒知识蒸馏中的核心挑战，为边缘设备模型压缩提供了新思路。

search_text: Aligning Logits Generatively for Principled Black-Box Knowledge Distillation 生成性地对齐 Logits 以实现有原则的黑盒知识蒸馏 Black-Box Knowledge Distillation (B2KD) is a formulated problem for cloud-to-edge model compression with invisible data and models hosted on the server. B2KD faces challenges such as limited Internet exchange and edge-cloud disparity of data distributions. In this paper, we formalize a two-step workflow consisting of deprivatization and distillation, and theoretically provide a new optimization direction from logits to cell boundary different from direct logits alignment. With its guidance, we propose a new method Mapping-Emulation KD (MEKD) that distills a black-box cumbersome model into a lightweight one. Our method does not differentiate between treating soft or hard responses, and consists of: 1) deprivatization: emulating the inverse mapping of the teacher function with a generator, and 2) distillation: aligning low-dimensional logits of the teacher and student models by reducing the distance of high-dimensional image points. For different teacher-student pairs, our method yields inspiring distillation performance on various benchmarks, and outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approaches. 黑盒知识蒸馏 (B2KD) 是一个针对云到边缘模型压缩的公式化问题，其中包含托管在服务器上的不可见数据和模型。 B2KD面临互联网交换有限、边云数据分布差异等挑战。在本文中，我们形式化了由去私有化和蒸馏组成的两步​​工作流程，并在理论上提供了不同于直接logits对齐的从logits到单元边界的新优化方向。在它的指导下，我们提出了一种新方法 Mapping-Emulation KD (MEKD)，将黑盒繁琐的模型提炼为轻量级模型。我们的方法不区分处理软响应或硬响应，包括：1）去私有化：用生成器模拟教师函数的逆映射，2）蒸馏：通过减少高维图像点的距离来对齐教师和学生模型的低维逻辑。对于不同的师生对，我们的方法在各种基准上产生了鼓舞人心的蒸馏性能，并且优于以前最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种名为MEKD的生成式对齐方法，用于解决黑盒知识蒸馏中的云到边缘模型压缩问题。 Jing Ma,Xiang Xiang,Ke Wang,Yuchuan Wu,Yongbin Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Danny Hernandez,Tom Brown,Tom Conerly,Nova DasSarma,Dawn Drain,Sheer El-Showk,Nelson Elhage,Zac Hatfield-Dodds,Tom Henighan,Tristan Hume,Scott Johnston,Ben Mann,Chris Olah,Catherine Olsson,Dario Amodei,Nicholas Joseph,Jared Kaplan,Sam McCandlish
title: Scaling Laws and Interpretability of Learning from Repeated Data
title_zh: 从重复数据中学习的缩放定律和可解释性
abstract: Recent large language models have been trained on vast datasets, but also often on repeated data, either intentionally for the purpose of upweighting higher quality data, or unintentionally because data deduplication is not perfect and the model is exposed to repeated data at the sentence, paragraph, or document level. Some works have reported substantial negative performance effects of this repeated data. In this paper we attempt to study repeated data systematically and to understand its effects mechanistically. To do this, we train a family of models where most of the data is unique but a small fraction of it is repeated many times. We find a strong double descent phenomenon, in which repeated data can lead test loss to increase midway through training. A predictable range of repetition frequency leads to surprisingly severe degradation in performance. For instance, performance of an 800M parameter model can be degraded to that of a 2x smaller model (400M params) by repeating 0.1% of the data 100 times, despite the other 90% of the training tokens remaining unique. We suspect there is a range in the middle where the data can be memorized and doing so consumes a large fraction of the model's capacity, and this may be where the peak of degradation occurs. Finally, we connect these observations to recent mechanistic interpretability work - attempting to reverse engineer the detailed computations performed by the model - by showing that data repetition disproportionately damages copying and internal structures associated with generalization, such as induction heads, providing a possible mechanism for the shift from generalization to memorization. Taken together, these results provide a hypothesis for why repeating a relatively small fraction of data in large language models could lead to disproportionately large harms to performance.
summary: Recent large language models have been trained on vast datasets, but also often on repeated data, either intentionally for the purpose of upweighting higher quality data, or unintentionally because data deduplication is not perfect and the model is exposed to repeated data at the sentence, paragraph, or document level. Some works have reported substantial negative performance effects of this repeated data. In this paper we attempt to study repeated data systematically and to understand its effects mechanistically. To do this, we train a family of models where most of the data is unique but a small fraction of it is repeated many times. We find a strong double descent phenomenon, in which repeated data can lead test loss to increase midway through training. A predictable range of repetition frequency leads to surprisingly severe degradation in performance. For instance, performance of an 800M parameter model can be degraded to that of a 2x smaller model (400M params) by repeating 0.1% of the data 100 times, despite the other 90% of the training tokens remaining unique. We suspect there is a range in the middle where the data can be memorized and doing so consumes a large fraction of the model's capacity, and this may be where the peak of degradation occurs. Finally, we connect these observations to recent mechanistic interpretability work - attempting to reverse engineer the detailed computations performed by the model - by showing that data repetition disproportionately damages copying and internal structures associated with generalization, such as induction heads, providing a possible mechanism for the shift from generalization to memorization. Taken together, these results provide a hypothesis for why repeating a relatively small fraction of data in large language models could lead to disproportionately large harms to performance.
abstract_zh: 最近的大型语言模型已经在大量数据集上进行了训练，但也经常在重复数据上进行训练，要么是故意为了提高更高质量的数据，要么是无意的，因为重复数据删除并不完美，并且模型暴露在句子、段落或文档级别的重复数据中。一些作品报告了这种重复数据对性能的巨大负面影响。在本文中，我们试图系统地研究重复数据并从机制上理解其影响。为此，我们训练了一系列模型，其中大部分数据都是唯一的，但一小部分数据重复了很多次。我们发现了强烈的双下降现象，其中重复的数据可能导致测试损失在训练中途增加。可预测的重复频率范围会导致性能严重下降。例如，通过重复 0.1% 的数据 100 次，800M 参数模型的性能可能会降级为 2 倍小模型（400M 参数）的性能，尽管其他 90% 的训练标记仍然是唯一的。我们怀疑中间有一个范围可以存储数据，这样做会消耗模型容量的很大一部分，这可能是退化峰值发生的地方。最后，我们将这些观察结果与最近的机械可解释性工作联系起来 - 试图对模型执行的详细计算进行逆向工程 - 通过表明数据重复不成比例地损害与泛化相关的复制和内部结构，例如归纳头，为从泛化到记忆的转变提供了可能的机制。总而言之，这些结果提供了一个假设，说明为什么在大型语言模型中重复相对较小的数据可能会导致性能受到不成比例的巨大损害。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了大规模语言模型训练中重复数据的影响，揭示了重复数据如何导致性能下降的机制。
AI.motivation: 大量语言模型常因数据去重不完善或有意重复数据而暴露于重复内容，但重复数据对性能的负面影响尚未被系统性研究。
AI.method: 训练一组模型，其中大部分数据唯一，但小部分数据被多次重复，并分析其对测试损失和模型容量的影响。
AI.result: 发现重复数据引发强烈双重下降现象，0.1%数据重复100次可使800M参数模型性能退化至400M参数模型水平，且重复数据会破坏模型的泛化结构（如归纳头）。
AI.conclusion: 重复数据迫使模型从泛化转向记忆，消耗大量容量，导致性能显著下降，为解释大模型中少量重复数据的破坏性提供了机制性解释。

authors_text: Chao Chen,Zijian Gao,Kele Xu,Sen Yang,Yiying Li,Bo Ding,Dawei Feng,Huaimin Wang
title: Nuclear Norm Maximization Based Curiosity-Driven Learning
title_zh: 基于核规范最大化的好奇心驱动学习
abstract: To handle the sparsity of the extrinsic rewards in reinforcement learning, researchers have proposed intrinsic reward which enables the agent to learn the skills that might come in handy for pursuing the rewards in the future, such as encouraging the agent to visit novel states. However, the intrinsic reward can be noisy due to the undesirable environment's stochasticity and directly applying the noisy value predictions to supervise the policy is detrimental to improve the learning performance and efficiency. Moreover, many previous studies employ $\ell^2$ norm or variance to measure the exploration novelty, which will amplify the noise due to the square operation. In this paper, we address aforementioned challenges by proposing a novel curiosity leveraging the nuclear norm maximization (NNM), which can quantify the novelty of exploring the environment more accurately while providing high-tolerance to the noise and outliers. We conduct extensive experiments across a variety of benchmark environments and the results suggest that NNM can provide state-of-the-art performance compared with previous curiosity methods. On 26 Atari games subset, when trained with only intrinsic reward, NNM achieves a human-normalized score of 1.09, which doubles that of competitive intrinsic rewards-based approaches. Our code will be released publicly to enhance the reproducibility.
summary: To handle the sparsity of the extrinsic rewards in reinforcement learning, researchers have proposed intrinsic reward which enables the agent to learn the skills that might come in handy for pursuing the rewards in the future, such as encouraging the agent to visit novel states. However, the intrinsic reward can be noisy due to the undesirable environment's stochasticity and directly applying the noisy value predictions to supervise the policy is detrimental to improve the learning performance and efficiency. Moreover, many previous studies employ $\ell^2$ norm or variance to measure the exploration novelty, which will amplify the noise due to the square operation. In this paper, we address aforementioned challenges by proposing a novel curiosity leveraging the nuclear norm maximization (NNM), which can quantify the novelty of exploring the environment more accurately while providing high-tolerance to the noise and outliers. We conduct extensive experiments across a variety of benchmark environments and the results suggest that NNM can provide state-of-the-art performance compared with previous curiosity methods. On 26 Atari games subset, when trained with only intrinsic reward, NNM achieves a human-normalized score of 1.09, which doubles that of competitive intrinsic rewards-based approaches. Our code will be released publicly to enhance the reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 为了解决强化学习中外在奖励的稀疏性问题，研究人员提出了内在奖励，使智能体能够学习可能​​在未来追求奖励时派上用场的技能，例如鼓励智能体访问新的状态。然而，由于不良环境的随机性，内在奖励可能是有噪声的，直接应用噪声值预测来监督策略不利于提高学习性能和效率。此外，许多先前的研究采用 $\ell^2$ 范数或方差来衡量探索新颖性，这会放大平方运算带来的噪声。在本文中，我们通过提出一种利用核范数最大化（NNM）的新颖好奇心来解决上述挑战，它可以更准确地量化探索环境的新颖性，同时提供对噪声和异常值的高容忍度。我们在各种基准环境中进行了广泛的实验，结果表明，与以前的好奇心方法相比，NNM 可以提供最先进的性能。在 26 个 Atari 游戏子集上，当仅使用内在奖励进行训练时，NNM 达到了 1.09 的人类标准化分数，这是基于竞争性内在奖励的方法的两倍。我们的代码将公开发布以提高可重复性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于核范数最大化的探索驱动学习方法，以解决强化学习中外在奖励稀疏问题
AI.motivation: 传统内在奖励方法因平方操作放大噪声，导致学习效率低下，需更鲁棒的探索度量
AI.method: 利用核范数最大化（NNM）量化环境探索新颖性，有效抑制噪声和异常值影响
AI.result: 在26个Atari游戏子集上，仅用内在奖励时NNM得分1.09，是其他方法的两倍
AI.conclusion: NNM方法在噪声容忍和探索效率上优于现有方法，为稀疏奖励场景提供新思路

tldr: 提出基于核范数最大化的探索驱动学习方法，以解决强化学习中外在奖励稀疏问题
motivation: 传统内在奖励方法因平方操作放大噪声，导致学习效率低下，需更鲁棒的探索度量
method: 利用核范数最大化（NNM）量化环境探索新颖性，有效抑制噪声和异常值影响
result: 在26个Atari游戏子集上，仅用内在奖励时NNM得分1.09，是其他方法的两倍

search_text: Nuclear Norm Maximization Based Curiosity-Driven Learning 基于核规范最大化的好奇心驱动学习 To handle the sparsity of the extrinsic rewards in reinforcement learning, researchers have proposed intrinsic reward which enables the agent to learn the skills that might come in handy for pursuing the rewards in the future, such as encouraging the agent to visit novel states. However, the intrinsic reward can be noisy due to the undesirable environment's stochasticity and directly applying the noisy value predictions to supervise the policy is detrimental to improve the learning performance and efficiency. Moreover, many previous studies employ $\ell^2$ norm or variance to measure the exploration novelty, which will amplify the noise due to the square operation. In this paper, we address aforementioned challenges by proposing a novel curiosity leveraging the nuclear norm maximization (NNM), which can quantify the novelty of exploring the environment more accurately while providing high-tolerance to the noise and outliers. We conduct extensive experiments across a variety of benchmark environments and the results suggest that NNM can provide state-of-the-art performance compared with previous curiosity methods. On 26 Atari games subset, when trained with only intrinsic reward, NNM achieves a human-normalized score of 1.09, which doubles that of competitive intrinsic rewards-based approaches. Our code will be released publicly to enhance the reproducibility. 为了解决强化学习中外在奖励的稀疏性问题，研究人员提出了内在奖励，使智能体能够学习可能​​在未来追求奖励时派上用场的技能，例如鼓励智能体访问新的状态。然而，由于不良环境的随机性，内在奖励可能是有噪声的，直接应用噪声值预测来监督策略不利于提高学习性能和效率。此外，许多先前的研究采用 $\ell^2$ 范数或方差来衡量探索新颖性，这会放大平方运算带来的噪声。在本文中，我们通过提出一种利用核范数最大化（NNM）的新颖好奇心来解决上述挑战，它可以更准确地量化探索环境的新颖性，同时提供对噪声和异常值的高容忍度。我们在各种基准环境中进行了广泛的实验，结果表明，与以前的好奇心方法相比，NNM 可以提供最先进的性能。在 26 个 Atari 游戏子集上，当仅使用内在奖励进行训练时，NNM 达到了 1.09 的人类标准化分数，这是基于竞争性内在奖励的方法的两倍。我们的代码将公开发布以提高可重复性。 提出基于核范数最大化的探索驱动学习方法，以解决强化学习中外在奖励稀疏问题 Chao Chen,Zijian Gao,Kele Xu,Sen Yang,Yiying Li,Bo Ding,Dawei Feng,Huaimin Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuheng Jia,Guanxing Lu,Hui Liu,Junhui Hou
title: Semi-Supervised Subspace Clustering via Tensor Low-Rank Representation
title_zh: 通过张量低阶表示的半监督子空间聚类
abstract: In this letter, we propose a novel semi-supervised subspace clustering method, which is able to simultaneously augment the initial supervisory information and construct a discriminative affinity matrix. By representing the limited amount of supervisory information as a pairwise constraint matrix, we observe that the ideal affinity matrix for clustering shares the same low-rank structure as the ideal pairwise constraint matrix. Thus, we stack the two matrices into a 3-D tensor, where a global low-rank constraint is imposed to promote the affinity matrix construction and augment the initial pairwise constraints synchronously. Besides, we use the local geometry structure of input samples to complement the global low-rank prior to achieve better affinity matrix learning. The proposed model is formulated as a Laplacian graph regularized convex low-rank tensor representation problem, which is further solved with an alternative iterative algorithm. In addition, we propose to refine the affinity matrix with the augmented pairwise constraints. Comprehensive experimental results on eight commonly-used benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/GuanxingLu/Subspace-Clustering.
summary: In this letter, we propose a novel semi-supervised subspace clustering method, which is able to simultaneously augment the initial supervisory information and construct a discriminative affinity matrix. By representing the limited amount of supervisory information as a pairwise constraint matrix, we observe that the ideal affinity matrix for clustering shares the same low-rank structure as the ideal pairwise constraint matrix. Thus, we stack the two matrices into a 3-D tensor, where a global low-rank constraint is imposed to promote the affinity matrix construction and augment the initial pairwise constraints synchronously. Besides, we use the local geometry structure of input samples to complement the global low-rank prior to achieve better affinity matrix learning. The proposed model is formulated as a Laplacian graph regularized convex low-rank tensor representation problem, which is further solved with an alternative iterative algorithm. In addition, we propose to refine the affinity matrix with the augmented pairwise constraints. Comprehensive experimental results on eight commonly-used benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/GuanxingLu/Subspace-Clustering.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督子空间聚类方法，该方法能够同时增强初始监督信息并构建判别亲和力矩阵。通过将有限数量的监督信息表示为成对约束矩阵，我们观察到用于聚类的理想亲和力矩阵与理想成对约束矩阵共享相同的低秩结构。因此，我们将两个矩阵堆叠成一个 3-D 张量，其中施加全局低秩约束以促进亲和矩阵构造并同步增强初始成对约束。此外，我们使用输入样本的局部几何结构来补充全局低秩先验，以实现更好的亲和力矩阵学习。所提出的模型被表述为拉普拉斯图正则化凸低秩张量表示问题，并用替代迭代算法进一步解决。此外，我们建议使用增强的成对约束来细化亲和力矩阵。八个常用基准数据集的综合实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。该代码可在 https://github.com/GuanxingLu/Subspace-Clustering 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督子空间聚类方法，通过张量低秩表示同时增强初始监督信息并构建判别性亲和矩阵。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效利用有限的监督信息并优化亲和矩阵，作者观察到理想亲和矩阵与约束矩阵共享低秩结构，从而提出结合张量低秩约束的解决方案。
AI.method: 将监督信息表示为成对约束矩阵，与亲和矩阵堆叠为3D张量，施加全局低秩约束并结合局部几何结构，通过交替迭代算法求解凸优化问题，最终优化亲和矩阵。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集上实验验证了该方法优于现有先进算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过张量低秩表示有效整合监督信息与局部结构，显著提升了子空间聚类性能。

authors_text: Jie Huang,Kerui Zhu,Kevin Chen-Chuan Chang,Jinjun Xiong,Wen-mei Hwu
title: DEER: Descriptive Knowledge Graph for Explaining Entity Relationships
title_zh: DEER：用于解释实体关系的描述性知识图
abstract: We propose DEER (Descriptive Knowledge Graph for Explaining Entity Relationships) - an open and informative form of modeling entity relationships. In DEER, relationships between entities are represented by free-text relation descriptions. For instance, the relationship between entities of machine learning and algorithm can be represented as ``Machine learning explores the study and construction of algorithms that can learn from and make predictions on data.'' To construct DEER, we propose a self-supervised learning method to extract relation descriptions with the analysis of dependency patterns and generate relation descriptions with a transformer-based relation description synthesizing model, where no human labeling is required. Experiments demonstrate that our system can extract and generate high-quality relation descriptions for explaining entity relationships. The results suggest that we can build an open and informative knowledge graph without human annotation.
summary: We propose DEER (Descriptive Knowledge Graph for Explaining Entity Relationships) - an open and informative form of modeling entity relationships. In DEER, relationships between entities are represented by free-text relation descriptions. For instance, the relationship between entities of machine learning and algorithm can be represented as ``Machine learning explores the study and construction of algorithms that can learn from and make predictions on data.'' To construct DEER, we propose a self-supervised learning method to extract relation descriptions with the analysis of dependency patterns and generate relation descriptions with a transformer-based relation description synthesizing model, where no human labeling is required. Experiments demonstrate that our system can extract and generate high-quality relation descriptions for explaining entity relationships. The results suggest that we can build an open and informative knowledge graph without human annotation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 DEER（用于解释实体关系的描述性知识图）——一种开放且信息丰富的实体关系建模形式。在 DEER 中，实体之间的关系由自由文本关系描述来表示。例如，机器学习实体和算法之间的关系可以表示为“机器学习探索了可以从数据中学习和预测的算法的研究和构建。”为了构建 DEER，我们提出了一种自监督学习方法，通过分析依赖模式来提取关系描述，并使用基于 Transformer 的关系描述合成模型生成关系描述，无需人工标记。实验表明，我们的系统可以提取并生成高质量的关系描述来解释实体关系。结果表明，我们可以构建一个开放且信息丰富的知识图谱，而无需人工注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEER，一种无需人工标注即可构建的描述性知识图谱，通过自由文本描述实体间关系。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱依赖人工标注关系描述，成本高且效率低，需自动化方法生成高质量关系描述。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习分析依赖模式，并利用基于Transformer的模型合成关系描述。
AI.result: 实验表明系统能生成高质量关系描述，验证了无需人工标注构建开放知识图谱的可行性。
AI.conclusion: DEER证明了通过自动化方法构建开放、信息丰富的知识图谱的潜力，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Chenguang Wang,Xiao Liu,Zui Chen,Haoyun Hong,Jie Tang,Dawn Song
title: DeepStruct: Pretraining of Language Models for Structure Prediction
title_zh: DeepStruct：用于结构预测的语言模型预训练
abstract: We introduce a method for improving the structural understanding abilities of language models. Unlike previous approaches that finetune the models with task-specific augmentation, we pretrain language models on a collection of task-agnostic corpora to generate structures from text. Our structure pretraining enables zero-shot transfer of the learned knowledge that models have about the structure tasks. We study the performance of this approach on 28 datasets, spanning 10 structure prediction tasks including open information extraction, joint entity and relation extraction, named entity recognition, relation classification, semantic role labeling, event extraction, coreference resolution, factual probe, intent detection, and dialogue state tracking. We further enhance the pretraining with the task-specific training sets. We show that a 10B parameter language model transfers non-trivially to most tasks and obtains state-of-the-art performance on 21 of 28 datasets that we evaluate.
summary: We introduce a method for improving the structural understanding abilities of language models. Unlike previous approaches that finetune the models with task-specific augmentation, we pretrain language models on a collection of task-agnostic corpora to generate structures from text. Our structure pretraining enables zero-shot transfer of the learned knowledge that models have about the structure tasks. We study the performance of this approach on 28 datasets, spanning 10 structure prediction tasks including open information extraction, joint entity and relation extraction, named entity recognition, relation classification, semantic role labeling, event extraction, coreference resolution, factual probe, intent detection, and dialogue state tracking. We further enhance the pretraining with the task-specific training sets. We show that a 10B parameter language model transfers non-trivially to most tasks and obtains state-of-the-art performance on 21 of 28 datasets that we evaluate.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种提高语言模型结构理解能力的方法。与之前通过特定于任务的增强来微调模型的方法不同，我们在与任务无关的语料库集合上预训练语言模型，以从文本生成结构。我们的结构预训练可以实现模型所学到的有关结构任务的知识的零样本迁移。我们研究了该方法在 28 个数据集上的性能，涵盖 10 个结构预测任务，包括开放信息提取、联合实体和关系提取、命名实体识别、关系分类、语义角色标记、事件提取、共指消解、事实探测、意图检测和对话状态跟踪。我们通过特定任务的训练集进一步加强预训练。我们展示了 10B 参数语言模型可以轻松地迁移到大多数任务，并在我们评估的 28 个数据集中的 21 个上获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预训练语言模型以提升结构预测能力的方法，通过任务无关的语料库预训练实现零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖任务特定微调，而本文旨在开发一种通用预训练方法，使模型无需微调即可处理多种结构预测任务。
AI.method: 在任务无关的语料库上预训练模型生成结构，结合任务特定训练集增强预训练，并测试零样本迁移效果。
AI.result: 10B参数模型在28个数据集的10类结构预测任务中表现优异，21个数据集达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 预训练结合任务特定训练能显著提升结构预测性能，证明零样本迁移在结构任务中的有效性。

search_text: DeepStruct: Pretraining of Language Models for Structure Prediction DeepStruct：用于结构预测的语言模型预训练 We introduce a method for improving the structural understanding abilities of language models. Unlike previous approaches that finetune the models with task-specific augmentation, we pretrain language models on a collection of task-agnostic corpora to generate structures from text. Our structure pretraining enables zero-shot transfer of the learned knowledge that models have about the structure tasks. We study the performance of this approach on 28 datasets, spanning 10 structure prediction tasks including open information extraction, joint entity and relation extraction, named entity recognition, relation classification, semantic role labeling, event extraction, coreference resolution, factual probe, intent detection, and dialogue state tracking. We further enhance the pretraining with the task-specific training sets. We show that a 10B parameter language model transfers non-trivially to most tasks and obtains state-of-the-art performance on 21 of 28 datasets that we evaluate. 我们介绍了一种提高语言模型结构理解能力的方法。与之前通过特定于任务的增强来微调模型的方法不同，我们在与任务无关的语料库集合上预训练语言模型，以从文本生成结构。我们的结构预训练可以实现模型所学到的有关结构任务的知识的零样本迁移。我们研究了该方法在 28 个数据集上的性能，涵盖 10 个结构预测任务，包括开放信息提取、联合实体和关系提取、命名实体识别、关系分类、语义角色标记、事件提取、共指消解、事实探测、意图检测和对话状态跟踪。我们通过特定任务的训练集进一步加强预训练。我们展示了 10B 参数语言模型可以轻松地迁移到大多数任务，并在我们评估的 28 个数据集中的 21 个上获得了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种预训练语言模型以提升结构预测能力的方法，通过任务无关的语料库预训练实现零样本迁移。 Chenguang Wang,Xiao Liu,Zui Chen,Haoyun Hong,Jie Tang,Dawn Song cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yifan Gao,Qingyu Yin,Zheng Li,Rui Meng,Tong Zhao,Bing Yin,Irwin King,Michael R. Lyu
title: Retrieval-Augmented Multilingual Keyphrase Generation with Retriever-Generator Iterative Training
title_zh: 通过检索器生成器迭代训练生成检索增强多语言关键短语
abstract: Keyphrase generation is the task of automatically predicting keyphrases given a piece of long text. Despite its recent flourishing, keyphrase generation on non-English languages haven't been vastly investigated. In this paper, we call attention to a new setting named multilingual keyphrase generation and we contribute two new datasets, EcommerceMKP and AcademicMKP, covering six languages. Technically, we propose a retrieval-augmented method for multilingual keyphrase generation to mitigate the data shortage problem in non-English languages. The retrieval-augmented model leverages keyphrase annotations in English datasets to facilitate generating keyphrases in low-resource languages. Given a non-English passage, a cross-lingual dense passage retrieval module finds relevant English passages. Then the associated English keyphrases serve as external knowledge for keyphrase generation in the current language. Moreover, we develop a retriever-generator iterative training algorithm to mine pseudo parallel passage pairs to strengthen the cross-lingual passage retriever. Comprehensive experiments and ablations show that the proposed approach outperforms all baselines.
summary: Keyphrase generation is the task of automatically predicting keyphrases given a piece of long text. Despite its recent flourishing, keyphrase generation on non-English languages haven't been vastly investigated. In this paper, we call attention to a new setting named multilingual keyphrase generation and we contribute two new datasets, EcommerceMKP and AcademicMKP, covering six languages. Technically, we propose a retrieval-augmented method for multilingual keyphrase generation to mitigate the data shortage problem in non-English languages. The retrieval-augmented model leverages keyphrase annotations in English datasets to facilitate generating keyphrases in low-resource languages. Given a non-English passage, a cross-lingual dense passage retrieval module finds relevant English passages. Then the associated English keyphrases serve as external knowledge for keyphrase generation in the current language. Moreover, we develop a retriever-generator iterative training algorithm to mine pseudo parallel passage pairs to strengthen the cross-lingual passage retriever. Comprehensive experiments and ablations show that the proposed approach outperforms all baselines.
abstract_zh: 关键词生成是根据一段长文本自动预测关键词的任务。尽管非英语语言的关键短语生成最近蓬勃发展，但尚未得到广泛研究。在本文中，我们提请注意一种名为多语言关键短语生成的新设置，并贡献了两个新数据集：EcommerceMKP 和AcademicMKP，涵盖六种语言。从技术上讲，我们提出了一种用于多语言关键短语生成的检索增强方法，以缓解非英语语言的数据短缺问题。检索增强模型利用英语数据集中的关键短语注释来促进以低资源语言生成关键短语。给定非英语段落，跨语言密集段落检索模块会找到相关的英语段落。然后相关的英语关键短语作为当前语言的关键短语生成的外部知识。此外，我们开发了一种检索器生成器迭代训练算法来挖掘伪平行段落对，以增强跨语言段落检索器。综合实验和消融表明，所提出的方法优于所有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于检索增强的多语言关键词生成方法，通过利用英文数据集中的关键词标注来解决非英语语言数据不足的问题，并构建了两个多语言数据集。
AI.motivation: 非英语语言的关键词生成研究不足且面临数据稀缺问题，现有方法难以有效利用跨语言知识。
AI.method: 设计检索增强模型，通过跨语言密集段落检索模块获取相关英文文本，利用其关键词作为外部知识辅助目标语言生成；开发检索器-生成器迭代训练算法挖掘伪平行语料以优化跨语言检索。
AI.result: 在多个语言数据集上实验表明，该方法在关键词生成任务中优于所有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强与迭代训练相结合有效缓解了多语言关键词生成的数据稀缺问题，验证了跨语言知识迁移的有效性。

authors_text: Samuel Wookey,Yaoshiang Ho,Tom Rikert,Juan David Gil Lopez,Juan Manuel Muñoz Beancur,Santiago Cortes,Ray Tawil,Aaron Sabin,Jack Lynch,Travis Harper,Nikhil Gajendrakumar
title: Masterful: A Training Platform for Computer Vision Models
title_zh: Masterful：计算机视觉模型训练平台
abstract: Masterful is a software platform to train deep learning computer vision models. Data and model architecture are inputs to the platform, and the output is a trained model. The platform's primary goal is to maximize a trained model's accuracy, which it achieves through its regularization and semi-supervised learning implementations. The platform's secondary goal is to minimize the amount of manual experimentation typically required to tune training hyperparameters, which it achieves via multiple metalearning algorithms which are custom built to control the platform's regularization and semi-supervised learning implementations. The platform's tertiary goal is to minimize the computing resources required to train a model, which it achieves via another set of metalearning algorithms which are purpose built to control Tensorflow's optimization implementations. The platform builds on top of Tensorflow's data management, architecture, automatic differentiation, and optimization implementations.
summary: Masterful is a software platform to train deep learning computer vision models. Data and model architecture are inputs to the platform, and the output is a trained model. The platform's primary goal is to maximize a trained model's accuracy, which it achieves through its regularization and semi-supervised learning implementations. The platform's secondary goal is to minimize the amount of manual experimentation typically required to tune training hyperparameters, which it achieves via multiple metalearning algorithms which are custom built to control the platform's regularization and semi-supervised learning implementations. The platform's tertiary goal is to minimize the computing resources required to train a model, which it achieves via another set of metalearning algorithms which are purpose built to control Tensorflow's optimization implementations. The platform builds on top of Tensorflow's data management, architecture, automatic differentiation, and optimization implementations.
abstract_zh: Masterful 是一个用于训练深度学习计算机视觉模型的软件平台。数据和模型架构是平台的输入，输出是经过训练的模型。该平台的主要目标是最大限度地提高训练模型的准确性，这是通过正则化和半监督学习实现来实现的。该平台的第二个目标是最大限度地减少调整训练超参数通常所需的手动实验量，这是通过定制的多个元学习算法来实现的，这些算法是为了控制平台的正则化和半监督学习实现而定制的。该平台的第三个目标是最大限度地减少训练模型所需的计算资源，这是通过另一组元学习算法来实现的，这些算法是专门为控制 Tensorflow 的优化实现而构建的。该平台建立在 Tensorflow 的数据管理、架构、自动微分和优化实现之上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Masterful平台，用于训练计算机视觉模型，通过正则化、半监督学习和元学习算法提升模型性能并优化资源使用。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型训练过程需大量手动调参且资源消耗高，亟需自动化工具提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 基于TensorFlow构建平台，结合正则化与半监督学习提升精度，利用元学习算法自动调节超参数，并优化计算资源分配。
AI.result: 平台有效提高模型准确性，减少手动实验需求，同时降低训练资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: Masterful通过多目标优化算法和TensorFlow集成，为计算机视觉模型训练提供了高效自动化解决方案。

The platform's tertiary goal is to minimize the computing resources required to train a model, which it achieves via another set of metalearning algorithms which are purpose built to control Tensorflow's optimization implementations. The platform builds on top of Tensorflow's data management, architecture, automatic differentiation, and optimization implementations. Masterful 是一个用于训练深度学习计算机视觉模型的软件平台。数据和模型架构是平台的输入，输出是经过训练的模型。该平台的主要目标是最大限度地提高训练模型的准确性，这是通过正则化和半监督学习实现来实现的。该平台的第二个目标是最大限度地减少调整训练超参数通常所需的手动实验量，这是通过定制的多个元学习算法来实现的，这些算法是为了控制平台的正则化和半监督学习实现而定制的。该平台的第三个目标是最大限度地减少训练模型所需的计算资源，这是通过另一组元学习算法来实现的，这些算法是专门为控制 Tensorflow 的优化实现而构建的。该平台建立在 Tensorflow 的数据管理、架构、自动微分和优化实现之上。 本文提出Masterful平台，用于训练计算机视觉模型，通过正则化、半监督学习和元学习算法提升模型性能并优化资源使用。 Samuel Wookey,Yaoshiang Ho,Tom Rikert,Juan David Gil Lopez,Juan Manuel Muñoz Beancur,Santiago Cortes,Ray Tawil,Aaron Sabin,Jack Lynch,Travis Harper,Nikhil Gajendrakumar cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Ai,Zidong Cao,Jinjing Zhu,Haotian Bai,Yucheng Chen,Lin Wang
title: Deep Learning for Omnidirectional Vision: A Survey and New Perspectives
title_zh: 全向视觉深度学习：调查和新视角
abstract: Omnidirectional image (ODI) data is captured with a 360x180 field-of-view, which is much wider than the pinhole cameras and contains richer spatial information than the conventional planar images. Accordingly, omnidirectional vision has attracted booming attention due to its more advantageous performance in numerous applications, such as autonomous driving and virtual reality. In recent years, the availability of customer-level 360 cameras has made omnidirectional vision more popular, and the advance of deep learning (DL) has significantly sparked its research and applications. This paper presents a systematic and comprehensive review and analysis of the recent progress in DL methods for omnidirectional vision. Our work covers four main contents: (i) An introduction to the principle of omnidirectional imaging, the convolution methods on the ODI, and datasets to highlight the differences and difficulties compared with the 2D planar image data; (ii) A structural and hierarchical taxonomy of the DL methods for omnidirectional vision; (iii) A summarization of the latest novel learning strategies and applications; (iv) An insightful discussion of the challenges and open problems by highlighting the potential research directions to trigger more research in the community.
summary: Omnidirectional image (ODI) data is captured with a 360x180 field-of-view, which is much wider than the pinhole cameras and contains richer spatial information than the conventional planar images. Accordingly, omnidirectional vision has attracted booming attention due to its more advantageous performance in numerous applications, such as autonomous driving and virtual reality. In recent years, the availability of customer-level 360 cameras has made omnidirectional vision more popular, and the advance of deep learning (DL) has significantly sparked its research and applications. This paper presents a systematic and comprehensive review and analysis of the recent progress in DL methods for omnidirectional vision. Our work covers four main contents: (i) An introduction to the principle of omnidirectional imaging, the convolution methods on the ODI, and datasets to highlight the differences and difficulties compared with the 2D planar image data; (ii) A structural and hierarchical taxonomy of the DL methods for omnidirectional vision; (iii) A summarization of the latest novel learning strategies and applications; (iv) An insightful discussion of the challenges and open problems by highlighting the potential research directions to trigger more research in the community.
abstract_zh: 全向图像 (ODI) 数据以 360x180 视场捕获，该视场比针孔相机宽得多，并且包含比传统平面图像更丰富的空间信息。因此，全向视觉因其在自动驾驶、虚拟现实等众多应用中更优越的性能而受到广泛关注。近年来，客户级360°摄像头的出现使得全方位视觉更加普及，而深度学习（DL）的进步极大地激发了其研究和应用。本文对全向视觉深度学习方法的最新进展进行了系统、全面的回顾和分析。我们的工作涵盖四个主要内容：（i）介绍全向成像的原理、ODI 上的卷积方法以及数据集，以突出与二维平面图像数据相比的差异和困难； (ii) 全向视觉 DL 方法的结构和层次分类； (iii) 最新新颖的学习策略和应用的总结； (iv) 通过强调潜在的研究方向来引发社区更多的研究，对挑战和未解决的问题进行富有洞察力的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了深度学习在全景视觉领域的最新进展，并提出了新的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 全景视觉因360°视角和丰富空间信息在自动驾驶等场景中具有优势，但其与传统2D图像存在显著差异，需系统总结深度学习方法及挑战。
AI.method: 通过四部分结构：全景成像原理与数据集分析、深度学习方法分类、新型学习策略总结、挑战与未来方向讨论。
AI.result: 梳理了全景视觉的深度学习方法体系，总结了最新应用案例，并指出现有技术在数据处理、模型泛化等核心问题上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步解决全景数据的高效处理、跨场景适应性等问题，推动该领域理论与应用的深度融合。

authors_text: Zeeshan Ahmad,Naimul Khan
title: A Survey on Physiological Signal Based Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于生理信号的情绪识别研究综述
abstract: Physiological Signals are the most reliable form of signals for emotion recognition, as they cannot be controlled deliberately by the subject. Existing review papers on emotion recognition based on physiological signals surveyed only the regular steps involved in the workflow of emotion recognition such as preprocessing, feature extraction, and classification. While these are important steps, such steps are required for any signal processing application. Emotion recognition poses its own set of challenges that are very important to address for a robust system. Thus, to bridge the gap in the existing literature, in this paper, we review the effect of inter-subject data variance on emotion recognition, important data annotation techniques for emotion recognition and their comparison, data preprocessing techniques for each physiological signal, data splitting techniques for improving the generalization of emotion recognition models and different multimodal fusion techniques and their comparison. Finally we discuss key challenges and future directions in this field.
summary: Physiological Signals are the most reliable form of signals for emotion recognition, as they cannot be controlled deliberately by the subject. Existing review papers on emotion recognition based on physiological signals surveyed only the regular steps involved in the workflow of emotion recognition such as preprocessing, feature extraction, and classification. While these are important steps, such steps are required for any signal processing application. Emotion recognition poses its own set of challenges that are very important to address for a robust system. Thus, to bridge the gap in the existing literature, in this paper, we review the effect of inter-subject data variance on emotion recognition, important data annotation techniques for emotion recognition and their comparison, data preprocessing techniques for each physiological signal, data splitting techniques for improving the generalization of emotion recognition models and different multimodal fusion techniques and their comparison. Finally we discuss key challenges and future directions in this field.
abstract_zh: 生理信号是情绪识别最可靠的信号形式，因为它们不能被主体有意控制。现有基于生理信号的情感识别的综述论文仅调查了情感识别工作流程中涉及的常规步骤，如预处理、特征提取和分类。虽然这些是重要的步骤，但任何信号处理应用都需要这些步骤。情绪识别提出了自己的一系列挑战，对于一个强大的系统来说，解决这些挑战非常重要。因此，为了弥补现有文献中的空白，本文回顾了主体间数据方差对情绪识别的影响、情绪识别的重要数据注释技术及其比较、每个生理信号的数据预处理技术、用于提高情绪识别模型泛化的数据分割技术以及不同的多模态融合技术及其比较。最后我们讨论该领域的主要挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于生理信号的情绪识别技术，重点分析了被试间数据差异、数据标注方法、预处理技术、数据分割策略及多模态融合技术。
AI.motivation: 现有综述仅关注通用信号处理步骤，而情绪识别存在独特挑战（如被试间差异、标注复杂性），需针对性研究以提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，系统梳理并比较了情绪识别中的关键环节，包括数据标注技术、生理信号预处理方法、数据分割策略及多模态融合技术。
AI.result: 总结了各技术路线的优缺点，指出被试间差异和标注不一致性是主要瓶颈，现有方法在跨被试泛化能力上仍需改进。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强多模态融合算法研究，并开发更普适的跨被试数据分割与标注方法，以提升情绪识别系统的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Suguman Bansal,Lydia Kavraki,Moshe Y. Vardi,Andrew Wells
title: Synthesis from Satisficing and Temporal Goals
title_zh: 从满意目标和暂时目标综合
abstract: Reactive synthesis from high-level specifications that combine hard constraints expressed in Linear Temporal Logic LTL with soft constraints expressed by discounted-sum (DS) rewards has applications in planning and reinforcement learning. An existing approach combines techniques from LTL synthesis with optimization for the DS rewards but has failed to yield a sound algorithm. An alternative approach combining LTL synthesis with satisficing DS rewards (rewards that achieve a threshold) is sound and complete for integer discount factors, but, in practice, a fractional discount factor is desired. This work extends the existing satisficing approach, presenting the first sound algorithm for synthesis from LTL and DS rewards with fractional discount factors. The utility of our algorithm is demonstrated on robotic planning domains.
summary: Reactive synthesis from high-level specifications that combine hard constraints expressed in Linear Temporal Logic LTL with soft constraints expressed by discounted-sum (DS) rewards has applications in planning and reinforcement learning. An existing approach combines techniques from LTL synthesis with optimization for the DS rewards but has failed to yield a sound algorithm. An alternative approach combining LTL synthesis with satisficing DS rewards (rewards that achieve a threshold) is sound and complete for integer discount factors, but, in practice, a fractional discount factor is desired. This work extends the existing satisficing approach, presenting the first sound algorithm for synthesis from LTL and DS rewards with fractional discount factors. The utility of our algorithm is demonstrated on robotic planning domains.
abstract_zh: 来自高级规范的反应性合成将线性时序逻辑 LTL 表示的硬约束与折扣和 (DS) 奖励表示的软约束相结合，可应用于规划和强化学习。现有的方法将 LTL 合成技术与 DS 奖励优化相结合，但未能产生合理的算法。对于整数折扣因子，将 LTL 合成与令人满意的 DS 奖励（达到阈值的奖励）相结合的替代方法是合理且完整的，但在实践中，需要小数折扣因子。这项工作扩展了现有的令人满意的方法，提出了第一个利用分数折扣因子合成 LTL 和 DS 奖励的合理算法。我们的算法的实用性在机器人规划领域得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对线性时态逻辑(LTL)与折扣和(DS)奖励合成的算法，解决了分数折扣因子下的合成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在结合LTL合成与DS奖励时存在不完善性，且分数折扣因子在实践中更具实用性，但缺乏有效算法。
AI.method: 扩展了现有满足阈值的DS奖励方法，提出首个适用于分数折扣因子的合成算法，确保算法的正确性与完整性。
AI.result: 在机器人规划领域验证了算法的有效性，证明其在实际应用中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法填补了分数折扣因子合成的空白，为规划与强化学习提供了更可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对线性时态逻辑(LTL)与折扣和(DS)奖励合成的算法，解决了分数折扣因子下的合成问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在结合LTL合成与DS奖励时存在不完善性，且分数折扣因子在实践中更具实用性，但缺乏有效算法。
