search_text: Synthesis from Satisficing and Temporal Goals 从满意目标和暂时目标综合 Reactive synthesis from high-level specifications that combine hard constraints expressed in Linear Temporal Logic LTL with soft constraints expressed by discounted-sum (DS) rewards has applications in planning and reinforcement learning. An existing approach combines techniques from LTL synthesis with optimization for the DS rewards but has failed to yield a sound algorithm. An alternative approach combining LTL synthesis with satisficing DS rewards (rewards that achieve a threshold) is sound and complete for integer discount factors, but, in practice, a fractional discount factor is desired. This work extends the existing satisficing approach, presenting the first sound algorithm for synthesis from LTL and DS rewards with fractional discount factors. The utility of our algorithm is demonstrated on robotic planning domains. 来自高级规范的反应性合成将线性时序逻辑 LTL 表示的硬约束与折扣和 (DS) 奖励表示的软约束相结合，可应用于规划和强化学习。现有的方法将 LTL 合成技术与 DS 奖励优化相结合，但未能产生合理的算法。对于整数折扣因子，将 LTL 合成与令人满意的 DS 奖励（达到阈值的奖励）相结合的替代方法是合理且完整的，但在实践中，需要小数折扣因子。这项工作扩展了现有的令人满意的方法，提出了第一个利用分数折扣因子合成 LTL 和 DS 奖励的合理算法。我们的算法的实用性在机器人规划领域得到了证明。 本文提出了一种针对线性时态逻辑(LTL)与折扣和(DS)奖励合成的算法，解决了分数折扣因子下的合成问题。 Suguman Bansal,Lydia Kavraki,Moshe Y. Vardi,Andrew Wells cs.AI,cs.LO,cs.RO

authors_text: Jungeum Kim,Xiao Wang
title: Robust Sensible Adversarial Learning of Deep Neural Networks for Image Classification
title_zh: 用于图像分类的深度神经网络的鲁棒敏感对抗学习
abstract: The idea of robustness is central and critical to modern statistical analysis. However, despite the recent advances of deep neural networks (DNNs), many studies have shown that DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Making imperceptible changes to an image can cause DNN models to make the wrong classification with high confidence, such as classifying a benign mole as a malignant tumor and a stop sign as a speed limit sign. The trade-off between robustness and standard accuracy is common for DNN models. In this paper, we introduce sensible adversarial learning and demonstrate the synergistic effect between pursuits of standard natural accuracy and robustness. Specifically, we define a sensible adversary which is useful for learning a robust model while keeping high natural accuracy. We theoretically establish that the Bayes classifier is the most robust multi-class classifier with the 0-1 loss under sensible adversarial learning. We propose a novel and efficient algorithm that trains a robust model using implicit loss truncation. We apply sensible adversarial learning for large-scale image classification to a handwritten digital image dataset called MNIST and an object recognition colored image dataset called CIFAR10. We have performed an extensive comparative study to compare our method with other competitive methods. Our experiments empirically demonstrate that our method is not sensitive to its hyperparameter and does not collapse even with a small model capacity while promoting robustness against various attacks and keeping high natural accuracy.
summary: The idea of robustness is central and critical to modern statistical analysis. However, despite the recent advances of deep neural networks (DNNs), many studies have shown that DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Making imperceptible changes to an image can cause DNN models to make the wrong classification with high confidence, such as classifying a benign mole as a malignant tumor and a stop sign as a speed limit sign. The trade-off between robustness and standard accuracy is common for DNN models. In this paper, we introduce sensible adversarial learning and demonstrate the synergistic effect between pursuits of standard natural accuracy and robustness. Specifically, we define a sensible adversary which is useful for learning a robust model while keeping high natural accuracy. We theoretically establish that the Bayes classifier is the most robust multi-class classifier with the 0-1 loss under sensible adversarial learning. We propose a novel and efficient algorithm that trains a robust model using implicit loss truncation. We apply sensible adversarial learning for large-scale image classification to a handwritten digital image dataset called MNIST and an object recognition colored image dataset called CIFAR10. We have performed an extensive comparative study to compare our method with other competitive methods. Our experiments empirically demonstrate that our method is not sensitive to its hyperparameter and does not collapse even with a small model capacity while promoting robustness against various attacks and keeping high natural accuracy.
abstract_zh: 稳健性的概念对于现代统计分析来说是核心且至关重要的。然而，尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 最近取得了进展，但许多研究表明 DNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击。对图像进行难以察觉的改变可能会导致 DNN 模型以高置信度做出错误分类，例如将良性痣分类为恶性肿瘤，将停车标志分类为限速标志。对于 DNN 模型来说，鲁棒性和标准精度之间的权衡很常见。在本文中，我们介绍了合理的对抗性学习，并证明了追求标准自然准确性和鲁棒性之间的协同效应。具体来说，我们定义了一个明智的对手，它对于学习鲁棒模型非常有用，同时保持较高的自然准确性。我们从理论上确定贝叶斯分类器是最鲁棒的多类分类器，在合理的对抗性学习下具有 0-1 损失。我们提出了一种新颖且有效的算法，该算法使用隐式损失截断来训练鲁棒模型。我们将大规模图像分类的合理对抗性学习应用于名为 MNIST 的手写数字图像数据集和名为 CIFAR10 的对象识别彩色图像数据集。我们进行了广泛的比较研究，将我们的方法与其他竞争方法进行比较。我们的实验经验证明，我们的方法对其超参数不敏感，即使模型容量较小也不会崩溃，同时提高了针对各种攻击的鲁棒性并保持了较高的自然准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为'合理对抗学习'的方法，旨在提升深度神经网络在图像分类任务中的鲁棒性，同时保持高自然准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在图像分类中表现优异，但其对对抗攻击的脆弱性及鲁棒性与准确率之间的权衡问题仍未解决。
AI.method: 定义'合理对抗者'以平衡鲁棒性与准确率，提出基于隐式损失截断的高效算法，并在MNIST和CIFAR10数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种攻击下保持高鲁棒性且不依赖超参数，小模型容量下亦表现稳定，优于其他竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 合理对抗学习通过理论分析与算法设计，有效解决了DNN鲁棒性与准确率的矛盾，为对抗样本防御提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nguyen Huu Phong,Augusto Santos,Bernardete Ribeiro
title: PSO-Convolutional Neural Networks with Heterogeneous Learning Rate
title_zh: PSO-具有异构学习率的卷积神经网络
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets or CNNs) have been candidly deployed in the scope of computer vision and related fields. Nevertheless, the dynamics of training of these neural networks lie still elusive: it is hard and computationally expensive to train them. A myriad of architectures and training strategies have been proposed to overcome this challenge and address several problems in image processing such as speech, image and action recognition as well as object detection. In this article, we propose a novel Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) based training for ConvNets. In such framework, the vector of weights of each ConvNet is typically cast as the position of a particle in phase space whereby PSO collaborative dynamics intertwines with Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) in order to boost training performance and generalization. Our approach goes as follows: i) [regular phase] each ConvNet is trained independently via SGD; ii) [collaborative phase] ConvNets share among themselves their current vector of weights (or particle-position) along with their gradient estimates of the Loss function. Distinct step sizes are coined by distinct ConvNets. By properly blending ConvNets with large (possibly random) step-sizes along with more conservative ones, we propose an algorithm with competitive performance with respect to other PSO-based approaches on Cifar-10 and Cifar-100 (accuracy of 98.31% and 87.48%). These accuracy levels are obtained by resorting to only four ConvNets -- such results are expected to scale with the number of collaborative ConvNets accordingly. We make our source codes available for download https://github.com/leonlha/PSO-ConvNet-Dynamics.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets or CNNs) have been candidly deployed in the scope of computer vision and related fields. Nevertheless, the dynamics of training of these neural networks lie still elusive: it is hard and computationally expensive to train them. A myriad of architectures and training strategies have been proposed to overcome this challenge and address several problems in image processing such as speech, image and action recognition as well as object detection. In this article, we propose a novel Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) based training for ConvNets. In such framework, the vector of weights of each ConvNet is typically cast as the position of a particle in phase space whereby PSO collaborative dynamics intertwines with Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) in order to boost training performance and generalization. Our approach goes as follows: i) [regular phase] each ConvNet is trained independently via SGD; ii) [collaborative phase] ConvNets share among themselves their current vector of weights (or particle-position) along with their gradient estimates of the Loss function. Distinct step sizes are coined by distinct ConvNets. By properly blending ConvNets with large (possibly random) step-sizes along with more conservative ones, we propose an algorithm with competitive performance with respect to other PSO-based approaches on Cifar-10 and Cifar-100 (accuracy of 98.31% and 87.48%). These accuracy levels are obtained by resorting to only four ConvNets -- such results are expected to scale with the number of collaborative ConvNets accordingly. We make our source codes available for download https://github.com/leonlha/PSO-ConvNet-Dynamics.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（ConvNets 或 CNNs）已经在计算机视觉和相关领域得到了广泛的应用。然而，这些神经网络的训练动态仍然难以捉摸：训练它们非常困难且计算成本昂贵。人们提出了多种架构和训练策略来克服这一挑战并解决图像处理中的几个问题，例如语音、图像和动作识别以及对象检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于粒子群优化（PSO）的卷积网络训练。在这样的框架中，每个 ConvNet 的权重向量通常被转换为相空间中粒子的位置，由此 PSO 协作动力学与随机梯度下降 (SGD) 交织在一起，以提高训练性能和泛化能力。我们的方法如下：i）[常规阶段]每个 ConvNet 通过 SGD 独立训练； ii) [协作阶段] ConvNet 之间共享当前的权重向量（或粒子位置）以及损失函数的梯度估计。不同的步长是由不同的卷积网络创造的。通过将大步长（可能是随机的）的 ConvNet 与更保守的步长正确混合，我们提出了一种算法，在 Cifar-10 和 Cifar-100 上相对于其他基于 PSO 的方法具有竞争性能（准确度分别为 98.31% 和 87.48%）。这些准确度水平是通过仅使用四个卷积网络来获得的——这样的结果预计会随着协作卷积网络的数量而相应地扩展。我们提供源代码下载 https://github.com/leonlha/PSO-ConvNet-Dynamics。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合粒子群优化（PSO）与随机梯度下降（SGD）的异步学习率卷积神经网络训练方法。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络训练过程计算成本高且效率低，亟需更高效的优化策略以提升模型性能与泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过将网络权重视为粒子位置，融合PSO协作动态与SGD，在独立训练阶段后引入权重与梯度共享的协作阶段，采用异步学习率策略优化模型。
AI.result: 在Cifar-10和Cifar-100数据集上分别达到98.31%和87.48%的准确率，仅使用4个卷积神经网络即可实现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持PSO优势的同时提升了训练效率，结果随协作网络数量增加而可扩展，代码已开源。

motivation: 传统卷积神经网络训练过程计算成本高且效率低，亟需更高效的优化策略以提升模型性能与泛化能力。
method: 通过将网络权重视为粒子位置，融合PSO协作动态与SGD，在独立训练阶段后引入权重与梯度共享的协作阶段，采用异步学习率策略优化模型。
result: 在Cifar-10和Cifar-100数据集上分别达到98.31%和87.48%的准确率，仅使用4个卷积神经网络即可实现。
conclusion: 该方法在保持PSO优势的同时提升了训练效率，结果随协作网络数量增加而可扩展，代码已开源。
search_text: PSO-Convolutional Neural Networks with Heterogeneous Learning Rate PSO-具有异构学习率的卷积神经网络 Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets or CNNs) have been candidly deployed in the scope of computer vision and related fields. Nevertheless, the dynamics of training of these neural networks lie still elusive: it is hard and computationally expensive to train them. A myriad of architectures and training strategies have been proposed to overcome this challenge and address several problems in image processing such as speech, image and action recognition as well as object detection. In this article, we propose a novel Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) based training for ConvNets. In such framework, the vector of weights of each ConvNet is typically cast as the position of a particle in phase space whereby PSO collaborative dynamics intertwines with Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) in order to boost training performance and generalization. Our approach goes as follows: i) [regular phase] each ConvNet is trained independently via SGD; ii) [collaborative phase] ConvNets share among themselves their current vector of weights (or particle-position) along with their gradient estimates of the Loss function. Distinct step sizes are coined by distinct ConvNets. By properly blending ConvNets with large (possibly random) step-sizes along with more conservative ones, we propose an algorithm with competitive performance with respect to other PSO-based approaches on Cifar-10 and Cifar-100 (accuracy of 98.31% and 87.48%). These accuracy levels are obtained by resorting to only four ConvNets -- such results are expected to scale with the number of collaborative ConvNets accordingly. We make our source codes available for download https://github.com/leonlha/PSO-ConvNet-Dynamics. 卷积神经网络（ConvNets 或 CNNs）已经在计算机视觉和相关领域得到了广泛的应用。然而，这些神经网络的训练动态仍然难以捉摸：训练它们非常困难且计算成本昂贵。人们提出了多种架构和训练策略来克服这一挑战并解决图像处理中的几个问题，例如语音、图像和动作识别以及对象检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于粒子群优化（PSO）的卷积网络训练。在这样的框架中，每个 ConvNet 的权重向量通常被转换为相空间中粒子的位置，由此 PSO 协作动力学与随机梯度下降 (SGD) 交织在一起，以提高训练性能和泛化能力。我们的方法如下：i）[常规阶段]每个 ConvNet 通过 SGD 独立训练； ii) [协作阶段] ConvNet 之间共享当前的权重向量（或粒子位置）以及损失函数的梯度估计。不同的步长是由不同的卷积网络创造的。通过将大步长（可能是随机的）的 ConvNet 与更保守的步长正确混合，我们提出了一种算法，在 Cifar-10 和 Cifar-100 上相对于其他基于 PSO 的方法具有竞争性能（准确度分别为 98.31% 和 87.48%）。这些准确度水平是通过仅使用四个卷积网络来获得的——这样的结果预计会随着协作卷积网络的数量而相应地扩展。我们提供源代码下载 https://github.com/leonlha/PSO-ConvNet-Dynamics。 本文提出了一种结合粒子群优化（PSO）与随机梯度下降（SGD）的异步学习率卷积神经网络训练方法。 Nguyen Huu Phong,Augusto Santos,Bernardete Ribeiro cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: João V. B. Soares,Avijit Shah,Topojoy Biswas
title: Temporally Precise Action Spotting in Soccer Videos Using Dense Detection Anchors
title_zh: 使用密集检测锚点在足球视频中进行时间精确的动作识别
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP), 2022
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP), 2022
abstract: We present a model for temporally precise action spotting in videos, which uses a dense set of detection anchors, predicting a detection confidence and corresponding fine-grained temporal displacement for each anchor. We experiment with two trunk architectures, both of which are able to incorporate large temporal contexts while preserving the smaller-scale features required for precise localization: a one-dimensional version of a u-net, and a Transformer encoder (TE). We also suggest best practices for training models of this kind, by applying Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) and mixup data augmentation. We achieve a new state-of-the-art on SoccerNet-v2, the largest soccer video dataset of its kind, with marked improvements in temporal localization. Additionally, our ablations show: the importance of predicting the temporal displacements; the trade-offs between the u-net and TE trunks; and the benefits of training with SAM and mixup.
summary: We present a model for temporally precise action spotting in videos, which uses a dense set of detection anchors, predicting a detection confidence and corresponding fine-grained temporal displacement for each anchor. We experiment with two trunk architectures, both of which are able to incorporate large temporal contexts while preserving the smaller-scale features required for precise localization: a one-dimensional version of a u-net, and a Transformer encoder (TE). We also suggest best practices for training models of this kind, by applying Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) and mixup data augmentation. We achieve a new state-of-the-art on SoccerNet-v2, the largest soccer video dataset of its kind, with marked improvements in temporal localization. Additionally, our ablations show: the importance of predicting the temporal displacements; the trade-offs between the u-net and TE trunks; and the benefits of training with SAM and mixup.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于视频中时间精确动作识别的模型，该模型使用一组密集的检测锚点，预测每个锚点的检测置信度和相应的细粒度时间位移。我们尝试了两种主干架构，这两种架构都能够合并大的时间上下文，同时保留精确定位所需的较小规模的特征：一维版本的 u-net 和 Transformer 编码器 (TE)。我们还通过应用锐度感知最小化（SAM）和混合数据增强来建议此类训练模型的最佳实践。我们在同类最大的足球视频数据集 SoccerNet-v2 上实现了新的最先进技术，在时间定位方面有了显着改进。此外，我们的消融显示：预测时间位移的重要性； u-net 和 TE 干线之间的权衡；以及使用 SAM 和 mixup 进行训练的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用密集检测锚点实现足球视频中时序精确动作检测的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动作定位精度与大时间范围上下文建模之间存在矛盾，需同时捕捉精细时空特征与全局信息。
AI.method: 设计包含1D U-Net和Transformer Encoder两种主干网络的架构，通过密集锚点预测置信度与时序位移，结合SAM优化和Mixup数据增强进行训练。
AI.result: 在SoccerNet-v2数据集上取得新SOTA结果，时序定位精度显著提升，消融实验证实了时序位移预测的重要性及训练策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 密集锚点框架结合多尺度特征建模与先进训练策略，可有效提升视频动作检测的时序精度，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Maria Eleni Athanasopoulou,Justina Deveikyte,Alan Mosca,Ilaria Peri,Alessandro Provetti
title: A Hybrid Model for Forecasting Short-Term Electricity Demand
title_zh: 预测短期电力需求的混合模型
abstract: Currently the UK Electric market is guided by load (demand) forecasts published every thirty minutes by the regulator. A key factor in predicting demand is weather conditions, with forecasts published every hour. We present HYENA: a hybrid predictive model that combines feature engineering (selection of the candidate predictor features), mobile-window predictors and finally LSTM encoder-decoders to achieve higher accuracy with respect to mainstream models from the literature. HYENA decreased MAPE loss by 16\% and RMSE loss by 10\% over the best available benchmark model, thus establishing a new state of the art for the UK electric load (and price) forecasting.
summary: Currently the UK Electric market is guided by load (demand) forecasts published every thirty minutes by the regulator. A key factor in predicting demand is weather conditions, with forecasts published every hour. We present HYENA: a hybrid predictive model that combines feature engineering (selection of the candidate predictor features), mobile-window predictors and finally LSTM encoder-decoders to achieve higher accuracy with respect to mainstream models from the literature. HYENA decreased MAPE loss by 16\% and RMSE loss by 10\% over the best available benchmark model, thus establishing a new state of the art for the UK electric load (and price) forecasting.
abstract_zh: 目前，英国电力市场以监管机构每三十分钟发布的负载（需求）预测为指导。预测需求的一个关键因素是天气状况，每小时都会发布预测。我们提出了 HYENA：一种混合预测模型，它结合了特征工程（候选预测器特征的选择）、移动窗口预测器以及最终的 LSTM 编码器-解码器，以相对于文献中的主流模型实现更高的准确性。与最佳可用基准模型相比，HYENA 将 MAPE 损失降低了 16%，将 RMSE 损失降低了 10%，从而为英国电力负荷（和价格）预测建立了新的技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合模型HYENA，用于提高英国短期电力需求预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 英国电力市场依赖精准的负荷预测，但现有模型在天气等动态因素影响下存在误差，需改进预测方法。
AI.method: 结合特征工程、移动窗口预测器与LSTM编码器-解码器的混合架构，整合多源时序数据并优化特征选择。
AI.result: HYENA模型使MAPE损失降低16%，RMSE损失降低10%，在英国电力负荷及价格预测任务中达到新状态-of-the-art。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型有效融合多技术优势，在电力需求预测领域验证了方法创新性与实际应用价值。

authors_text: Saurabh Kulshreshtha,Olga Kovaleva,Namrata Shivagunde,Anna Rumshisky
title: Down and Across: Introducing Crossword-Solving as a New NLP Benchmark
title_zh: 纵横交错：引入填字游戏作为新的 NLP 基准
comment: Accepted as long paper at ACL 2022
comments: Accepted as long paper at ACL 2022
abstract: Solving crossword puzzles requires diverse reasoning capabilities, access to a vast amount of knowledge about language and the world, and the ability to satisfy the constraints imposed by the structure of the puzzle. In this work, we introduce solving crossword puzzles as a new natural language understanding task. We release the specification of a corpus of crossword puzzles collected from the New York Times daily crossword spanning 25 years and comprised of a total of around nine thousand puzzles. These puzzles include a diverse set of clues: historic, factual, word meaning, synonyms/antonyms, fill-in-the-blank, abbreviations, prefixes/suffixes, wordplay, and cross-lingual, as well as clues that depend on the answers to other clues. We separately release the clue-answer pairs from these puzzles as an open-domain question answering dataset containing over half a million unique clue-answer pairs. For the question answering task, our baselines include several sequence-to-sequence and retrieval-based generative models. We also introduce a non-parametric constraint satisfaction baseline for solving the entire crossword puzzle. Finally, we propose an evaluation framework which consists of several complementary performance metrics.
summary: Solving crossword puzzles requires diverse reasoning capabilities, access to a vast amount of knowledge about language and the world, and the ability to satisfy the constraints imposed by the structure of the puzzle. In this work, we introduce solving crossword puzzles as a new natural language understanding task. We release the specification of a corpus of crossword puzzles collected from the New York Times daily crossword spanning 25 years and comprised of a total of around nine thousand puzzles. These puzzles include a diverse set of clues: historic, factual, word meaning, synonyms/antonyms, fill-in-the-blank, abbreviations, prefixes/suffixes, wordplay, and cross-lingual, as well as clues that depend on the answers to other clues. We separately release the clue-answer pairs from these puzzles as an open-domain question answering dataset containing over half a million unique clue-answer pairs. For the question answering task, our baselines include several sequence-to-sequence and retrieval-based generative models. We also introduce a non-parametric constraint satisfaction baseline for solving the entire crossword puzzle. Finally, we propose an evaluation framework which consists of several complementary performance metrics.
abstract_zh: 解决填字游戏需要多样化的推理能力、获取大量有关语言和世界的知识，以及满足谜题结构所施加的约束的能力。在这项工作中，我们将解决填字游戏作为一项新的自然语言理解任务。我们发布了从《纽约时报》每日填字游戏收集而来的填字游戏语料库，涵盖了 25 年的时间，总共包含约 9000 个谜题。这些谜题包括各种各样的线索：历史、事实、词义、同义词/反义词、填空、缩写、前缀/后缀、双关语和跨语言，以及依赖于其他线索答案的线索。我们将这些谜题中的线索答案对单独发布为开放域问答数据集，其中包含超过 50 万个独特的线索答案对。对于问答任务，我们的基线包括几个序列到序列和基于检索的生成模型。我们还引入了非参数约束满足基线来解决整个填字游戏。最后，我们提出了一个由几个互补的绩效指标组成的评估框架。

AI.tldr: 本文将填字游戏求解作为新的自然语言理解任务，构建包含九千个填字游戏和五十万条线索-答案对的数据集，并提出约束满足求解方法与评估框架。
AI.motivation: 填字游戏需要多维度推理能力与知识储备，现有NLP任务难以全面评估模型综合能力，亟需新型基准任务与开放域问答数据集。
AI.method: 构建纽约时报25年填字游戏语料库，分离线索-答案对形成问答数据集；采用序列到序列模型、检索生成模型及非参数约束满足算法进行基线测试，并设计多维度评估指标体系。
AI.result: 发布包含九千填字游戏和五十万条线索-答案对的基准数据集，验证了基线模型在跨领域线索理解与约束满足中的性能差异，证明该任务可有效评估模型综合能力。
AI.conclusion: 填字游戏求解为NLP提供了新颖且具挑战性的基准任务，所构建的数据集和评估框架可推动模型在知识推理与约束处理方向的研究进展。

search_text: Down and Across: Introducing Crossword-Solving as a New NLP Benchmark 纵横交错：引入填字游戏作为新的 NLP 基准 Solving crossword puzzles requires diverse reasoning capabilities, access to a vast amount of knowledge about language and the world, and the ability to satisfy the constraints imposed by the structure of the puzzle. In this work, we introduce solving crossword puzzles as a new natural language understanding task. We release the specification of a corpus of crossword puzzles collected from the New York Times daily crossword spanning 25 years and comprised of a total of around nine thousand puzzles. These puzzles include a diverse set of clues: historic, factual, word meaning, synonyms/antonyms, fill-in-the-blank, abbreviations, prefixes/suffixes, wordplay, and cross-lingual, as well as clues that depend on the answers to other clues. We separately release the clue-answer pairs from these puzzles as an open-domain question answering dataset containing over half a million unique clue-answer pairs. For the question answering task, our baselines include several sequence-to-sequence and retrieval-based generative models. We also introduce a non-parametric constraint satisfaction baseline for solving the entire crossword puzzle. Finally, we propose an evaluation framework which consists of several complementary performance metrics. 解决填字游戏需要多样化的推理能力、获取大量有关语言和世界的知识，以及满足谜题结构所施加的约束的能力。在这项工作中，我们将解决填字游戏作为一项新的自然语言理解任务。我们发布了从《纽约时报》每日填字游戏收集而来的填字游戏语料库，涵盖了 25 年的时间，总共包含约 9000 个谜题。这些谜题包括各种各样的线索：历史、事实、词义、同义词/反义词、填空、缩写、前缀/后缀、双关语和跨语言，以及依赖于其他线索答案的线索。我们将这些谜题中的线索答案对单独发布为开放域问答数据集，其中包含超过 50 万个独特的线索答案对。对于问答任务，我们的基线包括几个序列到序列和基于检索的生成模型。我们还引入了非参数约束满足基线来解决整个填字游戏。最后，我们提出了一个由几个互补的绩效指标组成的评估框架。 本文将填字游戏求解作为新的自然语言理解任务，构建包含九千个填字游戏和五十万条线索-答案对的数据集，并提出约束满足求解方法与评估框架。 Saurabh Kulshreshtha,Olga Kovaleva,Namrata Shivagunde,Anna Rumshisky cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Paschalis Lagias,George D. Magoulas,Ylli Prifti,Alessandro Provetti
title: Predicting Seriousness of Injury in a Traffic Accident: A New Imbalanced Dataset and Benchmark
title_zh: 预测交通事故中伤害的严重程度：新的不平衡数据集和基准
abstract: The paper introduces a new dataset to assess the performance of machine learning algorithms in the prediction of the seriousness of injury in a traffic accident. The dataset is created by aggregating publicly available datasets from the UK Department for Transport, which are drastically imbalanced with missing attributes sometimes approaching 50\% of the overall data dimensionality. The paper presents the data analysis pipeline starting from the publicly available data of road traffic accidents and ending with predictors of possible injuries and their degree of severity. It addresses the huge incompleteness of public data with a MissForest model. The paper also introduces two baseline approaches to create injury predictors: a supervised artificial neural network and a reinforcement learning model. The dataset can potentially stimulate diverse aspects of machine learning research on imbalanced datasets and the two approaches can be used as baseline references when researchers test more advanced learning algorithms in this area.
summary: The paper introduces a new dataset to assess the performance of machine learning algorithms in the prediction of the seriousness of injury in a traffic accident. The dataset is created by aggregating publicly available datasets from the UK Department for Transport, which are drastically imbalanced with missing attributes sometimes approaching 50\% of the overall data dimensionality. The paper presents the data analysis pipeline starting from the publicly available data of road traffic accidents and ending with predictors of possible injuries and their degree of severity. It addresses the huge incompleteness of public data with a MissForest model. The paper also introduces two baseline approaches to create injury predictors: a supervised artificial neural network and a reinforcement learning model. The dataset can potentially stimulate diverse aspects of machine learning research on imbalanced datasets and the two approaches can be used as baseline references when researchers test more advanced learning algorithms in this area.
abstract_zh: 该论文引入了一个新的数据集来评估机器学习算法在预测交通事故伤害严重程度方面的性能。该数据集是通过聚合英国交通部公开可用的数据集创建的，这些数据集严重不平衡，缺失的属性有时接近整体数据维度的 50%。本文介绍了数据分析流程，从公开的道路交通事故数据开始，到可能的伤害及其严重程度的预测因素结束。它通过 MissForest 模型解决了公共数据的巨大不完整性。该论文还介绍了两种创建伤害预测器的基线方法：监督人工神经网络和强化学习模型。该数据集可能会刺激不平衡数据集的机器学习研究的各个方面，并且当研究人员测试该领域更先进的学习算法时，这两种方法可以用作基线参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于预测交通事故伤害严重程度的新不平衡数据集，并建立两种基线预测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有公开交通事故数据存在严重不平衡和缺失值问题，影响机器学习模型性能评估，需构建专门数据集和基准方法推动相关研究。
AI.method: 采用MissForest模型处理数据缺失，构建包含伤害预测特征的数据集，并设计监督神经网络与强化学习作为基线预测方法。
AI.result: 发布首个针对交通事故伤害严重程度预测的不平衡数据集，提供两种可复现的基线预测方法供后续研究对比参考。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和方法为不平衡数据场景下的机器学习研究提供新基准，有助于推动更先进的算法开发与评估。

authors_text: Reza Davtalab,Rafael M. O. Cruz,Robert Sabourin
title: Dynamic Ensemble Selection Using Fuzzy Hyperboxes
title_zh: 使用模糊超框进行动态集成选择
abstract: Most dynamic ensemble selection (DES) methods utilize the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm to estimate the competence of classifiers in a small region surrounding the query sample. However, KNN is very sensitive to the local distribution of the data. Moreover, it also has a high computational cost as it requires storing the whole data in memory and performing multiple distance calculations during inference. Hence, the dependency on the KNN algorithm ends up limiting the use of DES techniques for large-scale problems. This paper presents a new DES framework based on fuzzy hyperboxes called FH-DES. Each hyperbox can represent a group of samples using only two data points (Min and Max corners). Thus, the hyperbox-based system will have less computational complexity than other dynamic selection methods. In addition, despite the KNN-based approaches, the fuzzy hyperbox is not sensitive to the local data distribution. Therefore, the local distribution of the samples does not affect the system's performance. Furthermore, in this research, for the first time, misclassified samples are used to estimate the competence of the classifiers, which has not been observed in previous fusion approaches. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method has high classification accuracy while having a lower complexity when compared with the state-of-the-art dynamic selection methods. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/redavtalab/FH-DES_IJCNN.git.
summary: Most dynamic ensemble selection (DES) methods utilize the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm to estimate the competence of classifiers in a small region surrounding the query sample. However, KNN is very sensitive to the local distribution of the data. Moreover, it also has a high computational cost as it requires storing the whole data in memory and performing multiple distance calculations during inference. Hence, the dependency on the KNN algorithm ends up limiting the use of DES techniques for large-scale problems. This paper presents a new DES framework based on fuzzy hyperboxes called FH-DES. Each hyperbox can represent a group of samples using only two data points (Min and Max corners). Thus, the hyperbox-based system will have less computational complexity than other dynamic selection methods. In addition, despite the KNN-based approaches, the fuzzy hyperbox is not sensitive to the local data distribution. Therefore, the local distribution of the samples does not affect the system's performance. Furthermore, in this research, for the first time, misclassified samples are used to estimate the competence of the classifiers, which has not been observed in previous fusion approaches. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method has high classification accuracy while having a lower complexity when compared with the state-of-the-art dynamic selection methods. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/redavtalab/FH-DES_IJCNN.git.
abstract_zh: 大多数动态集成选择 (DES) 方法利用 K 最近邻 (KNN) 算法来估计查询样本周围小区域中分类器的能力。然而，KNN 对数据的局部分布非常敏感。此外，它还具有较高的计算成本，因为它需要将整个数据存储在内存中并在推理过程中执行多次距离计算。因此，对 KNN 算法的依赖最终限制了 DES 技术在大规模问题上的使用。本文提出了一种基于模糊超框的新 DES 框架，称为 FH-DES。每个超框可以仅使用两个数据点（最小和最大角点）来表示一组样本。因此，基于超盒的系统将比其他动态选择方法具有更少的计算复杂性。此外，尽管有基于 KNN 的方法，模糊超盒对局部数据分布并不敏感。因此，样本的本地分布不会影响系统的性能。此外，在这项研究中，首次使用错误分类的样本来估计分类器的能力，这在以前的融合方法中尚未观察到。实验结果表明，与最先进的动态选择方法相比，该方法具有较高的分类精度，同时具有较低的复杂度。实现的代码可在 https://github.com/redavtalab/FH-DES_IJCNN.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊超盒子的动态集成选择框架FH-DES，用于解决传统方法在大规模数据集上的计算复杂度高和对局部分布敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统动态集成选择方法依赖KNN算法，但其计算成本高且对局部数据分布敏感，限制了其在大规模问题中的应用。
AI.method: 通过模糊超盒子（仅需两个数据点定义区域）替代KNN，降低计算复杂度；首次利用误分类样本评估分类器能力，减少对局部分布的依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明，FH-DES在保持高分类精度的同时，计算复杂度低于现有动态选择方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FH-DES框架通过模糊超盒子和误分类样本机制，在效率与鲁棒性上优于传统方法，适用于大规模数据集的分类任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊超盒子的动态集成选择框架FH-DES，用于解决传统方法在大规模数据集上的计算复杂度高和对局部分布敏感的问题。

ai_content.method: 通过模糊超盒子（仅需两个数据点定义区域）替代KNN，降低计算复杂度；首次利用误分类样本评估分类器能力，减少对局部分布的依赖。

search_text: Dynamic Ensemble Selection Using Fuzzy Hyperboxes 使用模糊超框进行动态集成选择 Most dynamic ensemble selection (DES) methods utilize the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm to estimate the competence of classifiers in a small region surrounding the query sample. However, KNN is very sensitive to the local distribution of the data. Moreover, it also has a high computational cost as it requires storing the whole data in memory and performing multiple distance calculations during inference. Hence, the dependency on the KNN algorithm ends up limiting the use of DES techniques for large-scale problems. This paper presents a new DES framework based on fuzzy hyperboxes called FH-DES. Each hyperbox can represent a group of samples using only two data points (Min and Max corners). Thus, the hyperbox-based system will have less computational complexity than other dynamic selection methods. In addition, despite the KNN-based approaches, the fuzzy hyperbox is not sensitive to the local data distribution. Therefore, the local distribution of the samples does not affect the system's performance. Furthermore, in this research, for the first time, misclassified samples are used to estimate the competence of the classifiers, which has not been observed in previous fusion approaches. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method has high classification accuracy while having a lower complexity when compared with the state-of-the-art dynamic selection methods. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/redavtalab/FH-DES_IJCNN.git. 大多数动态集成选择 (DES) 方法利用 K 最近邻 (KNN) 算法来估计查询样本周围小区域中分类器的能力。然而，KNN 对数据的局部分布非常敏感。此外，它还具有较高的计算成本，因为它需要将整个数据存储在内存中并在推理过程中执行多次距离计算。因此，对 KNN 算法的依赖最终限制了 DES 技术在大规模问题上的使用。本文提出了一种基于模糊超框的新 DES 框架，称为 FH-DES。每个超框可以仅使用两个数据点（最小和最大角点）来表示一组样本。因此，基于超盒的系统将比其他动态选择方法具有更少的计算复杂性。此外，尽管有基于 KNN 的方法，模糊超盒对局部数据分布并不敏感。因此，样本的本地分布不会影响系统的性能。此外，在这项研究中，首次使用错误分类的样本来估计分类器的能力，这在以前的融合方法中尚未观察到。实验结果表明，与最先进的动态选择方法相比，该方法具有较高的分类精度，同时具有较低的复杂度。实现的代码可在 https://github.com/redavtalab/FH-DES_IJCNN.git 获取。 本文提出了一种基于模糊超盒子的动态集成选择框架FH-DES，用于解决传统方法在大规模数据集上的计算复杂度高和对局部分布敏感的问题。 Reza Davtalab,Rafael M. O. Cruz,Robert Sabourin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sukrut Rao,Moritz Böhle,Bernt Schiele
title: Towards Better Understanding Attribution Methods
title_zh: 更好地理解归因方法
comment: 30 pages, 31 figures, 2 tables, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: 30 pages, 31 figures, 2 tables, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: Deep neural networks are very successful on many vision tasks, but hard to interpret due to their black box nature. To overcome this, various post-hoc attribution methods have been proposed to identify image regions most influential to the models' decisions. Evaluating such methods is challenging since no ground truth attributions exist. We thus propose three novel evaluation schemes to more reliably measure the faithfulness of those methods, to make comparisons between them more fair, and to make visual inspection more systematic. To address faithfulness, we propose a novel evaluation setting (DiFull) in which we carefully control which parts of the input can influence the output in order to distinguish possible from impossible attributions. To address fairness, we note that different methods are applied at different layers, which skews any comparison, and so evaluate all methods on the same layers (ML-Att) and discuss how this impacts their performance on quantitative metrics. For more systematic visualizations, we propose a scheme (AggAtt) to qualitatively evaluate the methods on complete datasets. We use these evaluation schemes to study strengths and shortcomings of some widely used attribution methods. Finally, we propose a post-processing smoothing step that significantly improves the performance of some attribution methods, and discuss its applicability.
summary: Deep neural networks are very successful on many vision tasks, but hard to interpret due to their black box nature. To overcome this, various post-hoc attribution methods have been proposed to identify image regions most influential to the models' decisions. Evaluating such methods is challenging since no ground truth attributions exist. We thus propose three novel evaluation schemes to more reliably measure the faithfulness of those methods, to make comparisons between them more fair, and to make visual inspection more systematic. To address faithfulness, we propose a novel evaluation setting (DiFull) in which we carefully control which parts of the input can influence the output in order to distinguish possible from impossible attributions. To address fairness, we note that different methods are applied at different layers, which skews any comparison, and so evaluate all methods on the same layers (ML-Att) and discuss how this impacts their performance on quantitative metrics. For more systematic visualizations, we propose a scheme (AggAtt) to qualitatively evaluate the methods on complete datasets. We use these evaluation schemes to study strengths and shortcomings of some widely used attribution methods. Finally, we propose a post-processing smoothing step that significantly improves the performance of some attribution methods, and discuss its applicability.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在许多视觉任务上都非常成功，但由于其黑盒性质而难以解释。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了各种事后归因方法来识别对模型决策最有影响的图像区域。评估此类方法具有挑战性，因为不存在基本事实归因。因此，我们提出了三种新颖的评估方案，以更可靠地衡量这些方法的可信度，使它们之间的比较更加公平，并使目视检查更加系统化。为了解决忠实度问题，我们提出了一种新颖的评估设置（DiFull），在该设置中，我们仔细控制输入的哪些部分可以影响输出，以便区分可能的归因和不可能的归因。为了解决公平性，我们注意到不同的方法应用于不同的层，这会扭曲任何比较，因此评估同一层（ML-Att）上的所有方法，并讨论这如何影响它们在定量指标上的性能。为了更系统的可视化，我们提出了一种方案（AggAtt）来定性评估完整数据集上的方法。我们使用这些评估方案来研究一些广泛使用的归因方法的优点和缺点。最后，我们提出了一种后处理平滑步骤，可以显着提高某些归因方法的性能，并讨论其适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出三种新的评估方案以更可靠地衡量归因方法的可靠性，促进方法间的公平比较与可视化分析。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法缺乏统一评估标准，导致方法间比较困难且结果难以验证。
AI.method: 提出DiFull评估可靠性，ML-Att确保公平比较，AggAtt实现系统可视化。
AI.result: 分析了主流归因方法的优缺点，并提出后处理平滑步骤显著提升部分方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提评估方案有助于全面理解归因方法特性，为实际应用提供指导。

authors_text: Yuning Wu,Jieliang Luo,Hui Li
title: Learning Dense Reward with Temporal Variant Self-Supervision
title_zh: 通过时间变异自我监督学习密集奖励
comment: 4 pages, 6 figures, accepted to ICRA 2022 RL for Contact-Rich Manipulation Workshop
comments: 4 pages, 6 figures, accepted to ICRA 2022 RL for Contact-Rich Manipulation Workshop
abstract: Rewards play an essential role in reinforcement learning. In contrast to rule-based game environments with well-defined reward functions, complex real-world robotic applications, such as contact-rich manipulation, lack explicit and informative descriptions that can directly be used as a reward. Previous effort has shown that it is possible to algorithmically extract dense rewards directly from multimodal observations. In this paper, we aim to extend this effort by proposing a more efficient and robust way of sampling and learning. In particular, our sampling approach utilizes temporal variance to simulate the fluctuating state and action distribution of a manipulation task. We then proposed a network architecture for self-supervised learning to better incorporate temporal information in latent representations. We tested our approach in two experimental setups, namely joint-assembly and door-opening. Preliminary results show that our approach is effective and efficient in learning dense rewards, and the learned rewards lead to faster convergence than baselines.
summary: Rewards play an essential role in reinforcement learning. In contrast to rule-based game environments with well-defined reward functions, complex real-world robotic applications, such as contact-rich manipulation, lack explicit and informative descriptions that can directly be used as a reward. Previous effort has shown that it is possible to algorithmically extract dense rewards directly from multimodal observations. In this paper, we aim to extend this effort by proposing a more efficient and robust way of sampling and learning. In particular, our sampling approach utilizes temporal variance to simulate the fluctuating state and action distribution of a manipulation task. We then proposed a network architecture for self-supervised learning to better incorporate temporal information in latent representations. We tested our approach in two experimental setups, namely joint-assembly and door-opening. Preliminary results show that our approach is effective and efficient in learning dense rewards, and the learned rewards lead to faster convergence than baselines.
abstract_zh: 奖励在强化学习中起着至关重要的作用。与具有明确奖励函数的基于规则的游戏环境相比，复杂的现实世界机器人应用程序（例如接触丰富的操作）缺乏可直接用作奖励的明确且信息丰富的描述。先前的努力表明，可以通过算法直接从多模态观察中提取密集奖励。在本文中，我们的目标是通过提出一种更有效、更稳健的采样和学习方式来扩展这项工作。特别是，我们的采样方法利用时间方差来模拟操作任务的波动状态和动作分布。然后，我们提出了一种用于自监督学习的网络架构，以更好地将时间信息纳入潜在表示中。我们在两个实验装置中测试了我们的方法，即联合组装和开门。初步结果表明，我们的方法在学习密集奖励方面是有效且高效的，并且学习到的奖励导致比基线更快的收敛。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时间变化自监督学习的密集奖励学习方法，用于复杂机器人任务
AI.motivation: 现实机器人任务缺乏显式奖励函数，传统方法效率低，需更高效学习密集奖励
AI.method: 利用时间方差采样模拟状态动作分布，结合自监督学习网络架构提升时间信息整合
AI.result: 实验显示方法有效高效，学习到的奖励使收敛速度优于基线
AI.conclusion: 该方法在复杂任务中有效，为密集奖励学习提供新思路

authors_text: Katrina Yezzi-Woodley,Alexander Terwilliger,Jiafeng Li,Eric Chen,Martha Tappen,Jeff Calder,Peter J. Olver
title: Using machine learning on new feature sets extracted from 3D models of broken animal bones to classify fragments according to break agent
title_zh: 使用机器学习对从破碎动物骨骼 3D 模型中提取的新特征集进行分类，根据断裂剂对碎片进行分类
abstract: Distinguishing agents of bone modification at paleoanthropological sites is at the root of much of the research directed at understanding early hominin exploitation of large animal resources and the effects those subsistence behaviors had on early hominin evolution. However, current methods, particularly in the area of fracture pattern analysis as a signal of marrow exploitation, have failed to overcome equifinality. Furthermore, researchers debate the replicability and validity of current and emerging methods for analyzing bone modifications. Here we present a new approach to fracture pattern analysis aimed at distinguishing bone fragments resulting from hominin bone breakage and those produced by carnivores. This new method uses 3D models of fragmentary bone to extract a much richer dataset that is more transparent and replicable than feature sets previously used in fracture pattern analysis. Supervised machine learning algorithms are properly used to classify bone fragments according to agent of breakage with average mean accuracy of 77% across tests.
summary: Distinguishing agents of bone modification at paleoanthropological sites is at the root of much of the research directed at understanding early hominin exploitation of large animal resources and the effects those subsistence behaviors had on early hominin evolution. However, current methods, particularly in the area of fracture pattern analysis as a signal of marrow exploitation, have failed to overcome equifinality. Furthermore, researchers debate the replicability and validity of current and emerging methods for analyzing bone modifications. Here we present a new approach to fracture pattern analysis aimed at distinguishing bone fragments resulting from hominin bone breakage and those produced by carnivores. This new method uses 3D models of fragmentary bone to extract a much richer dataset that is more transparent and replicable than feature sets previously used in fracture pattern analysis. Supervised machine learning algorithms are properly used to classify bone fragments according to agent of breakage with average mean accuracy of 77% across tests.
abstract_zh: 古人类遗址中骨骼修饰的区别因素是许多研究的基础，这些研究旨在了解早期古人类对大型动物资源的利用以及这些生存行为对早期古人类进化的影响。然而，当前的方法，特别是在作为骨髓利用信号的断裂模式分析领域，未能克服等效性。此外，研究人员还争论当前和新兴的骨修饰分析方法的可重复性和有效性。在这里，我们提出了一种新的骨折模式分析方法，旨在区分古人类骨折产生的骨头碎片和食肉动物产生的骨头碎片。这种新方法使用碎片骨的 3D 模型来提取更丰富的数据集，该数据集比以前在骨折模式分析中使用的特征集更加透明和可复制。监督机器学习算法被正确使用，根据断裂因素对骨碎片进行分类，整个测试的平均准确度为 77%。

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习对从破碎动物骨骼的3D模型中提取的新特征集进行分析，以根据断裂代理对骨骼碎片进行分类。
AI.motivation: 当前骨骼断裂模式分析方法存在等终性问题，且研究者对现有方法的可重复性和有效性存在争议，需开发更透明和可重复的新方法。
AI.method: 通过3D模型提取骨骼碎片的丰富数据集，并采用监督式机器学习算法进行分类。
AI.result: 测试中分类平均准确率达到77%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为区分人类与食肉动物造成的骨骼断裂提供了更可靠、可重复的解决方案，有助于古人类学研究。

authors_text: Anna Kędzior,Konrad Kułakowski
title: Multiple-criteria Heuristic Rating Estimation
title_zh: 多标准启发式评级估计
abstract: One of the most widespread multi-criteria decision-making methods is the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP). AHP successfully combines the pairwise comparisons method and the hierarchical approach. It allows the decision-maker to set priorities for all ranked alternatives. But what if, for some of them, their ranking value is known (e.g., it can be determined differently)? The Heuristic Rating Estimation (HRE) method proposed in 2014 tried to bring the answer to this question. However, the considerations were limited to a model that did not consider many criteria. In this work, we go a step further and analyze how HRE can be used as part of the AHP hierarchical framework. The theoretical considerations are accompanied by illustrative examples showing HRE as a multiple-criteria decision-making method.
summary: One of the most widespread multi-criteria decision-making methods is the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP). AHP successfully combines the pairwise comparisons method and the hierarchical approach. It allows the decision-maker to set priorities for all ranked alternatives. But what if, for some of them, their ranking value is known (e.g., it can be determined differently)? The Heuristic Rating Estimation (HRE) method proposed in 2014 tried to bring the answer to this question. However, the considerations were limited to a model that did not consider many criteria. In this work, we go a step further and analyze how HRE can be used as part of the AHP hierarchical framework. The theoretical considerations are accompanied by illustrative examples showing HRE as a multiple-criteria decision-making method.
abstract_zh: 最广泛使用的多标准决策方法之一是层次分析法（AHP）。 AHP 成功地结合了成对比较方法和层次方法。它允许决策者为所有排名的替代方案设置优先级。但是，如果对于其中一些人来说，他们的排名值是已知的（例如，可以以不同的方式确定）怎么办？ 2014年提出的启发式评级估计（HRE）方法试图为这个问题带来答案。然而，考虑因素仅限于没有考虑许多标准的模型。在这项工作中，我们更进一步分析了如何将 HRE 用作 AHP 分层框架的一部分。理论考虑还附有说明性示例，显示 HRE 作为多标准决策方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将启发式评分估计（HRE）方法整合到层次分析法（AHP）框架中，以解决多标准决策中部分替代方案排名已知的情况。
AI.motivation: 传统AHP在处理已知部分排名值时存在局限性，而早期HRE方法仅考虑少量准则，需扩展其应用范围以提升多标准决策的灵活性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实例验证，将HRE作为AHP的补充方法，结合多准则决策框架进行综合评估。
AI.result: 证明HRE可有效融入AHP体系，并通过示例展示其在多标准决策中的可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: HRE方法扩展了AHP的应用场景，为复杂多准则决策提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Vaughn Hamilton,Ananta Soneji,Allison McDonald,Elissa Redmiles
title: "Nudes? Shouldn't I charge for these?" : Motivations of New Sexual Content Creators on OnlyFans
title_zh: “裸体？我不应该收费吗？” ：OnlyFans 上新的色情内容创作者的动机
abstract: With over 1.5 million content creators, OnlyFans is one of the fastest growing subscription-based social media platforms. The platform is primarily associated with sexual content. Thus, OnlyFans creators are uniquely positioned at the intersection of professional social media content creation and sex work. While the experiences and motivations of experienced sex workers to adopt OnlyFans have been studied, in this work we seek to understand the motivations of creators who had not previously done sex work. Through a qualitative interview study of 22 U.S.-based OnlyFans creators, we find that beyond the typical motivations for pursuing gig work (e.g., flexibility, autonomy), our participants were motivated by three key factors: (1) societal visibility and mainstream acceptance of OnlyFans; (2) platform design and affordances such as boundary setting with clients, privacy from the public, and content archives; and (3) the pandemic, as OnlyFans provided an enormous opportunity to overcome lockdown-related issues.
summary: With over 1.5 million content creators, OnlyFans is one of the fastest growing subscription-based social media platforms. The platform is primarily associated with sexual content. Thus, OnlyFans creators are uniquely positioned at the intersection of professional social media content creation and sex work. While the experiences and motivations of experienced sex workers to adopt OnlyFans have been studied, in this work we seek to understand the motivations of creators who had not previously done sex work. Through a qualitative interview study of 22 U.S.-based OnlyFans creators, we find that beyond the typical motivations for pursuing gig work (e.g., flexibility, autonomy), our participants were motivated by three key factors: (1) societal visibility and mainstream acceptance of OnlyFans; (2) platform design and affordances such as boundary setting with clients, privacy from the public, and content archives; and (3) the pandemic, as OnlyFans provided an enormous opportunity to overcome lockdown-related issues.
abstract_zh: OnlyFans 拥有超过 150 万内容创作者，是增长最快的订阅式社交媒体平台之一。该平台主要与色情内容相关。因此，OnlyFans 创作者在专业社交媒体内容创作和性工作的交叉点上处于独特的地位。虽然我们对经验丰富的性工作者采用 OnlyFans 的经历和动机进行了研究，但在这项工作中，我们试图了解以前没有从事过性工作的创作者的动机。通过对 22 位美国 OnlyFans 创作者的定性访谈研究，我们发现，除了追求零工工作的典型动机（例如灵活性、自主性）之外，我们的参与者还受到三个关键因素的激励：（1）OnlyFans 的社会知名度和主流接受度； (2) 平台设计和功能可供性，例如与客户的边界设置、公众隐私和内容存档； (3) 大流行，因为 OnlyFans 提供了克服封锁相关问题的巨大机会。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了未从事过性工作的新型OnlyFans内容创作者的动机，探讨其选择在该平台发布性内容的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究关注经验丰富的性工作者使用OnlyFans的动机，但本文旨在填补对未从事性工作的新创作者动机的研究空白。
AI.method: 通过定性访谈法，对22名美国OnlyFans创作者进行深度访谈，分析其创作动机与平台使用体验。
AI.result: 研究发现，除灵活性和自主性等典型零工经济动机外，参与者主要受三大因素驱动：社会对OnlyFans的可见度与主流接受度、平台的边界设置与隐私保护功能、以及疫情期间的经济机会。
AI.conclusion: OnlyFans为新创作者提供了区别于传统性工作的独特职业路径，其平台设计与社会环境变化共同塑造了新型内容创作生态。

While the experiences and motivations of experienced sex workers to adopt OnlyFans have been studied, in this work we seek to understand the motivations of creators who had not previously done sex work. Through a qualitative interview study of 22 U.S.-based OnlyFans creators, we find that beyond the typical motivations for pursuing gig work (e.g., flexibility, autonomy), our participants were motivated by three key factors: (1) societal visibility and mainstream acceptance of OnlyFans; (2) platform design and affordances such as boundary setting with clients, privacy from the public, and content archives; and (3) the pandemic, as OnlyFans provided an enormous opportunity to overcome lockdown-related issues. OnlyFans 拥有超过 150 万内容创作者，是增长最快的订阅式社交媒体平台之一。该平台主要与色情内容相关。因此，OnlyFans 创作者在专业社交媒体内容创作和性工作的交叉点上处于独特的地位。虽然我们对经验丰富的性工作者采用 OnlyFans 的经历和动机进行了研究，但在这项工作中，我们试图了解以前没有从事过性工作的创作者的动机。通过对 22 位美国 OnlyFans 创作者的定性访谈研究，我们发现，除了追求零工工作的典型动机（例如灵活性、自主性）之外，我们的参与者还受到三个关键因素的激励：（1）OnlyFans 的社会知名度和主流接受度； (2) 平台设计和功能可供性，例如与客户的边界设置、公众隐私和内容存档； (3) 大流行，因为 OnlyFans 提供了克服封锁相关问题的巨大机会。 本文研究了未从事过性工作的新型OnlyFans内容创作者的动机，探讨其选择在该平台发布性内容的原因。 Vaughn Hamilton,Ananta Soneji,Allison McDonald,Elissa Redmiles cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Eman Naser-Karajah,Nabil Arman,Mustafa Jarrar
title: Current Trends and Approaches in Synonyms Extraction: Potential Adaptation to Arabic
title_zh: 同义词提取的当前趋势和方法：对阿拉伯语的潜在适应
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 11th Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval2021), 2021 International Conference on Information Technology (ICIT), 2021, pp. 428-434, IEEE
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 11th Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval2021), 2021 International Conference on Information Technology (ICIT), 2021, pp. 428-434, IEEE
abstract: Extracting synonyms from dictionaries or corpora is gaining special attention as synonyms play an important role in improving NLP application performance. This paper presents a survey of the different approaches and trends used in automatically extracting the synonyms. These approaches can be divided into four main categories. The first approach is to find the Synonyms using a translation graph. The second approach is to discover new transition pairs such as (Arabic-English) (English-France) then (Arabic-France). The third approach is to construct new WordNets by exploring synonymy graphs, and the fourth approach is to find similar words from corpora using Deep Learning methods, such as word embeddings and recently BERT models. The paper also presents a comparative analysis between these approaches and highlights potential adaptation to generate synonyms automatically in the Arabic language as future work.
summary: Extracting synonyms from dictionaries or corpora is gaining special attention as synonyms play an important role in improving NLP application performance. This paper presents a survey of the different approaches and trends used in automatically extracting the synonyms. These approaches can be divided into four main categories. The first approach is to find the Synonyms using a translation graph. The second approach is to discover new transition pairs such as (Arabic-English) (English-France) then (Arabic-France). The third approach is to construct new WordNets by exploring synonymy graphs, and the fourth approach is to find similar words from corpora using Deep Learning methods, such as word embeddings and recently BERT models. The paper also presents a comparative analysis between these approaches and highlights potential adaptation to generate synonyms automatically in the Arabic language as future work.
abstract_zh: 从词典或语料库中提取同义词正受到特别关注，因为同义词在提高 NLP 应用性能方面发挥着重要作用。本文对自动提取同义词所使用的不同方法和趋势进行了调查。这些方法可以分为四个主要类别。第一种方法是使用翻译图查找同义词。第二种方法是发现新的过渡对，例如（阿拉伯语-英语）（英语-法国）然后（阿拉伯语-法国）。第三种方法是通过探索同义词图来构建新的 WordNet，第四种方法是使用深度学习方法（例如词嵌入和最近的 BERT 模型）从语料库中查找相似的单词。本文还对这些方法进行了比较分析，并强调了未来工作中自动生成阿拉伯语同义词的潜在适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动提取同义词的不同方法，并探讨其在阿拉伯语中的潜在适应性。
AI.motivation: 同义词提取对提升自然语言处理（NLP）应用性能至关重要，而阿拉伯语的同义词提取仍面临挑战，需探索有效方法。
AI.method: 通过分类比较四种主流方法：翻译图、跨语言转换对、构建WordNet及基于深度学习（如词嵌入和BERT）的语料库相似词提取。
AI.result: 分析了各方法的优缺点，并指出未来可针对阿拉伯语特性优化这些方法以实现自动同义词生成。
AI.conclusion: 不同方法各有适用场景，未来研究需结合阿拉伯语语言特点进一步改进同义词提取技术。

authors_text: Viacheslav Meshchaninov,Ivan Molodetskikh,Dmitriy Vatolin
title: Combining Contrastive and Supervised Learning for Video Super-Resolution Detection
title_zh: 结合对比学习和监督学习进行视频超分辨率检测
abstract: Upscaled video detection is a helpful tool in multimedia forensics, but it is a challenging task that involves various upscaling and compression algorithms. There are many resolution-enhancement methods, including interpolation and deep-learning-based super-resolution, and they leave unique traces. In this work, we propose a new upscaled-resolution-detection method based on learning of visual representations using contrastive and cross-entropy losses. To explain how the method detects videos, we systematically review the major components of our framework - in particular, we show that most data-augmentation approaches hinder the learning of the method. Through extensive experiments on various datasets, we demonstrate that our method effectively detects upscaling even in compressed videos and outperforms the state-of-the-art alternatives. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/msu-video-group/SRDM
summary: Upscaled video detection is a helpful tool in multimedia forensics, but it is a challenging task that involves various upscaling and compression algorithms. There are many resolution-enhancement methods, including interpolation and deep-learning-based super-resolution, and they leave unique traces. In this work, we propose a new upscaled-resolution-detection method based on learning of visual representations using contrastive and cross-entropy losses. To explain how the method detects videos, we systematically review the major components of our framework - in particular, we show that most data-augmentation approaches hinder the learning of the method. Through extensive experiments on various datasets, we demonstrate that our method effectively detects upscaling even in compressed videos and outperforms the state-of-the-art alternatives. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/msu-video-group/SRDM
abstract_zh: 放大视频检测是多媒体取证中的有用工具，但这是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及各种放大和压缩算法。分辨率增强方法有很多，包括插值和基于深度学习的超分辨率，并且它们留下了独特的痕迹。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于使用对比和交叉熵损失学习视觉表示的新的高分辨率检测方法。为了解释该方法如何检测视频，我们系统地回顾了我们框架的主要组成部分 - 特别是，我们表明大多数数据增强方法阻碍了该方法的学习。通过对各种数据集的广泛实验，我们证明了我们的方法即使在压缩视频中也能有效地检测放大，并且优于最先进的替代方案。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/msu-video-group/SRDM 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合对比学习和监督学习的视频超分辨率检测方法，用于检测视频是否经过分辨率增强处理。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率检测方法在压缩视频中效果有限，且数据增强策略可能干扰特征学习，需更鲁棒的检测框架。
AI.method: 联合使用对比损失与交叉熵损失学习视觉表征，通过分析框架组件发现数据增强会阻碍模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证方法有效性，尤其在压缩视频中检测精度超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合损失函数设计提升检测性能，代码开源推动多媒体取证技术发展。

authors_text: Meng Yu,Yong Xu,Chunlei Zhang,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Dong Yu
title: NeuralEcho: A Self-Attentive Recurrent Neural Network For Unified Acoustic Echo Suppression And Speech Enhancement
title_zh: NeuralEcho：用于统一声学回声抑制和语音增强的自注意力循环神经网络
abstract: Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) plays an important role in the full-duplex speech communication as well as the front-end speech enhancement for recognition in the conditions when the loudspeaker plays back. In this paper, we present an all-deep-learning framework that implicitly estimates the second order statistics of echo/noise and target speech, and jointly solves echo and noise suppression through an attention based recurrent neural network. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art joint echo cancellation and speech enhancement method F-T-LSTM in terms of objective speech quality metrics, speech recognition accuracy and model complexity. We show that this model can work with speaker embedding for better target speech enhancement and furthermore develop a branch for automatic gain control (AGC) task to form an all-in-one front-end speech enhancement system.
summary: Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) plays an important role in the full-duplex speech communication as well as the front-end speech enhancement for recognition in the conditions when the loudspeaker plays back. In this paper, we present an all-deep-learning framework that implicitly estimates the second order statistics of echo/noise and target speech, and jointly solves echo and noise suppression through an attention based recurrent neural network. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art joint echo cancellation and speech enhancement method F-T-LSTM in terms of objective speech quality metrics, speech recognition accuracy and model complexity. We show that this model can work with speaker embedding for better target speech enhancement and furthermore develop a branch for automatic gain control (AGC) task to form an all-in-one front-end speech enhancement system.
abstract_zh: 声学回声消除（AEC）在全双工语音通信以及扬声器回放条件下的前端语音增强识别中发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们提出了一个全深度学习框架，隐式估计回声/噪声和目标语音的二阶统计量，并通过基于注意力的循环神经网络联合解决回声和噪声抑制。该模型在客观语音质量指标、语音识别准确性和模型复杂性方面优于最先进的联合回声消除和语音增强方法 F-T-LSTM。我们证明该模型可以与说话人嵌入一起使用，以实现更好的目标语音增强，并进一步开发自动增益控制（AGC）任务的分支，以形成一体化的前端语音增强系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的循环神经网络NeuralEcho，用于统一解决声学回声抑制与语音增强问题。
AI.motivation: 传统声学回声消除方法在复杂噪声环境下性能受限，且难以同时优化回声抑制与语音增强任务。
AI.method: 设计全深度学习框架，通过隐式估计回声/噪声与目标语音的二阶统计量，采用自注意力机制的循环神经网络实现联合抑制，并集成说话人嵌入与自动增益控制分支。
AI.result: 在客观语音质量指标、语音识别准确率及模型复杂度方面优于现有F-T-LSTM方法，且支持多任务联合优化。
AI.conclusion: NeuralEcho通过统一框架有效解决了回声抑制与语音增强的协同问题，为全前端语音增强系统提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 设计全深度学习框架，通过隐式估计回声/噪声与目标语音的二阶统计量，采用自注意力机制的循环神经网络实现联合抑制，并集成说话人嵌入与自动增益控制分支。
ai_content_json.result: 在客观语音质量指标、语音识别准确率及模型复杂度方面优于现有F-T-LSTM方法，且支持多任务联合优化。
ai_content_json.conclusion: NeuralEcho通过统一框架有效解决了回声抑制与语音增强的协同问题，为全前端语音增强系统提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: NeuralEcho: A Self-Attentive Recurrent Neural Network For Unified Acoustic Echo Suppression And Speech Enhancement NeuralEcho：用于统一声学回声抑制和语音增强的自注意力循环神经网络 Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) plays an important role in the full-duplex speech communication as well as the front-end speech enhancement for recognition in the conditions when the loudspeaker plays back. In this paper, we present an all-deep-learning framework that implicitly estimates the second order statistics of echo/noise and target speech, and jointly solves echo and noise suppression through an attention based recurrent neural network. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art joint echo cancellation and speech enhancement method F-T-LSTM in terms of objective speech quality metrics, speech recognition accuracy and model complexity. We show that this model can work with speaker embedding for better target speech enhancement and furthermore develop a branch for automatic gain control (AGC) task to form an all-in-one front-end speech enhancement system. 声学回声消除（AEC）在全双工语音通信以及扬声器回放条件下的前端语音增强识别中发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们提出了一个全深度学习框架，隐式估计回声/噪声和目标语音的二阶统计量，并通过基于注意力的循环神经网络联合解决回声和噪声抑制。该模型在客观语音质量指标、语音识别准确性和模型复杂性方面优于最先进的联合回声消除和语音增强方法 F-T-LSTM。我们证明该模型可以与说话人嵌入一起使用，以实现更好的目标语音增强，并进一步开发自动增益控制（AGC）任务的分支，以形成一体化的前端语音增强系统。 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的循环神经网络NeuralEcho，用于统一解决声学回声抑制与语音增强问题。 Meng Yu,Yong Xu,Chunlei Zhang,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Dong Yu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Mustafa Eyceoz,Justin Lee,Homayoon Beigi
title: Modernizing Open-Set Speech Language Identification
title_zh: 现代化开放语音语言识别
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, Technical Report: Recognition Technologies, Inc
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, Technical Report: Recognition Technologies, Inc
abstract: While most modern speech Language Identification methods are closed-set, we want to see if they can be modified and adapted for the open-set problem. When switching to the open-set problem, the solution gains the ability to reject an audio input when it fails to match any of our known language options. We tackle the open-set task by adapting two modern-day state-of-the-art approaches to closed-set language identification: the first using a CRNN with attention and the second using a TDNN. In addition to enhancing our input feature embeddings using MFCCs, log spectral features, and pitch, we will be attempting two approaches to out-of-set language detection: one using thresholds, and the other essentially performing a verification task. We will compare both the performance of the TDNN and the CRNN, as well as our detection approaches.
summary: While most modern speech Language Identification methods are closed-set, we want to see if they can be modified and adapted for the open-set problem. When switching to the open-set problem, the solution gains the ability to reject an audio input when it fails to match any of our known language options. We tackle the open-set task by adapting two modern-day state-of-the-art approaches to closed-set language identification: the first using a CRNN with attention and the second using a TDNN. In addition to enhancing our input feature embeddings using MFCCs, log spectral features, and pitch, we will be attempting two approaches to out-of-set language detection: one using thresholds, and the other essentially performing a verification task. We will compare both the performance of the TDNN and the CRNN, as well as our detection approaches.
abstract_zh: 虽然大多数现代语音识别方法都是封闭集的，但我们想看看它们是否可以修改并适应开放集问题。当切换到开集问题时，该解决方案能够在无法匹配任何我们已知的语言选项时拒绝音频输入。我们通过采用两种现代最先进的封闭集语言识别方法来解决开放集任务：第一个使用带有注意力的 CRNN，第二个使用 TDNN。除了使用 MFCC、对数谱特征和音调增强我们的输入特征嵌入之外，我们还将尝试两种超出集合的语言检测方法：一种使用阈值，另一种本质上执行验证任务。我们将比较 TDNN 和 CRNN 的性能以及我们的检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将封闭集语音语言识别方法改进为开放集任务，通过两种模型和两种检测方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 封闭集方法无法处理未知语言，开放集任务可增强系统鲁棒性，允许拒绝未知输入。
AI.method: 采用CRNN（带注意力）和TDNN模型，结合MFCC、对数谱和音高特征，使用阈值法和验证任务进行开放集检测。
AI.result: 比较了TDNN与CRNN的性能及两种检测方法的效果，验证任务可能优于阈值法。
AI.conclusion: 封闭集方法可有效适应开放集任务，验证任务的检测方式更具潜力，未来需进一步优化检测策略。

authors_text: Melani Sanchez-Garcia,Roberto Morollon-Ruiz,Ruben Martinez-Cantin,Jose J. Guerrero,Eduardo Fernandez-Jover
title: Assessing visual acuity in visual prostheses through a virtual-reality system
title_zh: 通过虚拟现实系统评估视觉假体的视力
abstract: Current visual implants still provide very low resolution and limited field of view, thus limiting visual acuity in implanted patients. Developments of new strategies of artificial vision simulation systems by harnessing new advancements in technologies are of upmost priorities for the development of new visual devices. In this work, we take advantage of virtual-reality software paired with a portable head-mounted display and evaluated the performance of normally sighted participants under simulated prosthetic vision with variable field of view and number of pixels. Our simulated prosthetic vision system allows simple experimentation in order to study the design parameters of future visual prostheses. Ten normally sighted participants volunteered for a visual acuity study. Subjects were required to identify computer-generated Landolt-C gap orientation and different stimulus based on light perception, time-resolution, light location and motion perception commonly used for visual acuity examination in the sighted. Visual acuity scores were recorded across different conditions of number of electrodes and size of field of view. Our results showed that of all conditions tested, a field of view of 20° and 1000 phosphenes of resolution proved the best, with a visual acuity of 1.3 logMAR. Furthermore, performance appears to be correlated with phosphene density, but showing a diminishing return when field of view is less than 20°. The development of new artificial vision simulation systems can be useful to guide the development of new visual devices and the optimization of field of view and resolution to provide a helpful and valuable visual aid to profoundly or totally blind patients.

abstract_zh: 目前的视觉植入物仍然提供非常低的分辨率和有限的视野，从而限制了植入患者的视力。利用新技术进步开发人工视觉模拟系统的新策略是开发新型视觉设备的首要任务。在这项工作中，我们利用虚拟现实软件与便携式头戴式显示器配对，并评估正常视力参与者在具有可变视场和像素数量的模拟假肢视觉下的表现。我们的模拟假肢视觉系统可以进行简单的实验，以研究未来视觉假肢的设计参数。十名视力正常的参与者自愿参加视力研究。受试者需要根据常用于视力检查的光感知、时间分辨率、光位置和运动感知来识别计算机生成的 Landolt-C 间隙方向和不同刺激。在不同电极数量和视野大小的条件下记录视力得分。我们的结果表明，在所有测试条件下，20° 视场和 1000 光幻视分辨率的效果最佳，视力为 1.3 logMAR。此外，性能似乎与光幻视密度相关，但当视场小于 20° 时，表现出收益递减。新型人工视觉模拟系统的开发可用于指导新型视觉设备的开发以及视野和分辨率的优化，为深度或完全失明的患者提供有用且有价值的视觉辅助。

AI.tldr: 本文通过虚拟现实系统评估视觉假体的视觉敏锐度，探索不同视野和像素条件下的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉植入物分辨率低且视野有限，限制了患者的视觉敏锐度，需开发新型人工视觉模拟系统以优化未来视觉假体设计。
AI.method: 利用虚拟现实软件与便携式头戴显示器，模拟不同视野和像素条件下的假体视觉，让正常视力受试者完成Landolt-C缺口识别等视觉敏锐度测试。
AI.result: 20°视野与1000个光斑的组合取得最佳视觉敏锐度（1.3 logMAR），光斑密度与性能正相关，但视野小于20°时收益递减。
AI.conclusion: 新型模拟系统可指导视觉假体的视野和分辨率优化，为全盲患者提供更有效的视觉辅助。

authors_text: Alex Morehead,Xiao Chen,Tianqi Wu,Jian Liu,Jianlin Cheng
title: EGR: Equivariant Graph Refinement and Assessment of 3D Protein Complex Structures
title_zh: EGR：3D 蛋白质复杂结构的等变图细化和评估
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures, and 8 tables. Under review
comments: 18 pages, 3 figures, and 8 tables. Under review
abstract: Protein complexes are macromolecules essential to the functioning and well-being of all living organisms. As the structure of a protein complex, in particular its region of interaction between multiple protein subunits (i.e., chains), has a notable influence on the biological function of the complex, computational methods that can quickly and effectively be used to refine and assess the quality of a protein complex's 3D structure can directly be used within a drug discovery pipeline to accelerate the development of new therapeutics and improve the efficacy of future vaccines. In this work, we introduce the Equivariant Graph Refiner (EGR), a novel E(3)-equivariant graph neural network (GNN) for multi-task structure refinement and assessment of protein complexes. Our experiments on new, diverse protein complex datasets, all of which we make publicly available in this work, demonstrate the state-of-the-art effectiveness of EGR for atomistic refinement and assessment of protein complexes and outline directions for future work in the field. In doing so, we establish a baseline for future studies in macromolecular refinement and structure analysis.
summary: Protein complexes are macromolecules essential to the functioning and well-being of all living organisms. As the structure of a protein complex, in particular its region of interaction between multiple protein subunits (i.e., chains), has a notable influence on the biological function of the complex, computational methods that can quickly and effectively be used to refine and assess the quality of a protein complex's 3D structure can directly be used within a drug discovery pipeline to accelerate the development of new therapeutics and improve the efficacy of future vaccines. In this work, we introduce the Equivariant Graph Refiner (EGR), a novel E(3)-equivariant graph neural network (GNN) for multi-task structure refinement and assessment of protein complexes. Our experiments on new, diverse protein complex datasets, all of which we make publicly available in this work, demonstrate the state-of-the-art effectiveness of EGR for atomistic refinement and assessment of protein complexes and outline directions for future work in the field. In doing so, we establish a baseline for future studies in macromolecular refinement and structure analysis.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质复合物是对所有生物体的功能和健康至关重要的大分子。由于蛋白质复合物的结构，特别是多个蛋白质亚基（即链）之间的相互作用区域，对该复合物的生物学功能具有显着影响，因此可以快速有效地用于细化和评估蛋白质复合物3D结构质量的计算方法可以直接在药物发现管道中使用，以加速新疗法的开发并提高未来疫苗的功效。在这项工作中，我们介绍了等变图细化器（EGR），这是一种新颖的 E(3) 等变图神经网络（GNN），用于多任务结构细化和蛋白质复合物评估。我们在新的、多样化的蛋白质复合物数据集上进行的实验（所有这些数据都在这项工作中公开）证明了 EGR 在原子细化和蛋白质复合物评估方面的最先进的有效性，并概述了该领域未来工作的方向。在此过程中，我们为未来大分子细化和结构分析的研究建立了基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EGR的E(3)-等变图神经网络，用于蛋白质复合物3D结构的优化与质量评估。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质复合物的结构对其功能至关重要，而现有方法难以高效优化和评估其3D结构，限制了药物研发和疫苗设计的效率。
AI.method: 设计E(3)-等变图神经网络（EGR），通过图结构建模蛋白质复合物，实现多任务的原子级结构优化与质量评估。
AI.result: 在公开的多样化数据集上验证了EGR的优越性，证明其在结构优化和评估任务中达到最先进水平，并为后续研究奠定基准。
AI.conclusion: EGR为蛋白质复合物结构分析提供了有效工具，同时通过公开数据集推动了该领域未来的研究方向。

authors_text: Md Ifraham Iqbal,Md. Saddam Hossain Mukta,Ahmed Rafi Hasan
title: A Dynamic Weighted Tabular Method for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 卷积神经网络的动态加权表格方法
abstract: Traditional Machine Learning (ML) models like Support Vector Machine, Random Forest, and Logistic Regression are generally preferred for classification tasks on tabular datasets. Tabular data consists of rows and columns corresponding to instances and features, respectively. Past studies indicate that traditional classifiers often produce unsatisfactory results in complex tabular datasets. Hence, researchers attempt to use the powerful Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for tabular datasets. Recent studies propose several techniques like SuperTML, Conditional GAN (CTGAN), and Tabular Convolution (TAC) for applying Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) on tabular data. These models outperform the traditional classifiers and substantially improve the performance on tabular data. This study introduces a novel technique, namely, Dynamic Weighted Tabular Method (DWTM), that uses feature weights dynamically based on statistical techniques to apply CNNs on tabular datasets. The method assigns weights dynamically to each feature based on their strength of associativity to the class labels. Each data point is converted into images and fed to a CNN model. The features are allocated image canvas space based on their weights. The DWTM is an improvement on the previously mentioned methods as it dynamically implements the entire experimental setting rather than using the static configuration provided in the previous methods. Furthermore, it uses the novel idea of using feature weights to create image canvas space. In this paper, the DWTM is applied to six benchmarked tabular datasets and it achieves outstanding performance (i.e., average accuracy = 95%) on all of them.

abstract_zh: 支持向量机、随机森林和逻辑回归等传统机器学习 (ML) 模型通常更适合表格数据集上的分类任务。表格数据由分别对应于实例和特征的行和列组成。过去的研究表明，传统的分类器在复杂的表格数据集中常常产生不令人满意的结果。因此，研究人员尝试使用强大的卷积神经网络（CNN）来处理表格数据集。最近的研究提出了几种技术，例如 SuperTML、条件 GAN (CTGAN) 和表格卷积 (TAC)，用于在表格数据上应用卷积神经网络 (CNN)。这些模型优于传统分类器，并显着提高了表格数据的性能。本研究引入了一种新技术，即动态加权表格方法（DWTM），该方法动态使用基于统计技术的特征权重，将 CNN 应用于表格数据集。该方法根据每个特征与类标签的关联强度动态地为每个特征分配权重。每个数据点都被转换为图像并馈送到 CNN 模型。这些特征根据其权重分配图像画布空间。 DWTM 是对前面提到的方法的改进，因为它动态地实现整个实验设置，而不是使用前面方法中提供的静态配置。此外，它采用了使用特征权重来创建图像画布空间的新颖想法。在本文中，DWTM 应用于六个基准表格数据集，并且在所有数据集上都取得了出色的性能（即平均准确率 = 95%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态加权表格方法（DWTM），通过动态分配特征权重将表格数据转换为图像并输入卷积神经网络（CNN），以提升复杂表格数据的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在复杂表格数据上表现不佳，尽管现有方法（如SuperTML、CTGAN）尝试用CNN处理表格数据，但仍存在静态配置限制，需改进动态调整机制。
AI.method: 基于统计技术动态计算特征与类别标签的关联性权重，按权重分配图像画布空间，将表格数据转换为图像输入CNN，实现端到端动态配置。
AI.result: 在六个基准表格数据集上达到平均95%的准确率，优于传统分类器及现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DWTM通过动态权重分配和图像画布空间优化，有效提升了CNN在表格数据上的分类性能，为表格数据的深度学习处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wei Zhang,Yu Bao
title: DELMAR: Deep Linear Matrix Approximately Reconstruction to Extract Hierarchical Functional Connectivity in the Human Brain
title_zh: DELMAR：深度线性矩阵近似重建以提取人脑中的分层功能连接
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, a deep linear matrix factorization technique. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.10264
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, a deep linear matrix factorization technique. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.10264
abstract: The Matrix Decomposition techniques have been a vital computational approach to analyzing the hierarchy of functional connectivity in the human brain. However, there are still four shortcomings of these methodologies: 1). Large training samples; 2). Manually tuning hyperparameters; 3). Time-consuming and require extensive computational source; 4). It cannot guarantee convergence to a unique fixed point. Therefore, we propose a novel deep matrix factorization technique called Deep Linear Matrix Approximate Reconstruction (DELMAR) to bridge the abovementioned gaps. The advantages of the proposed method are: at first, proposed DELMAR can estimate the important hyperparameters automatically; furthermore, DELMAR employs the matrix backpropagation to reduce the potential accumulative errors; finally, an orthogonal projection is introduced to update all variables of DELMAR rather than directly calculating the inverse matrices. The validation experiments of three peer methods and DELMAR using real functional MRI signal of the human brain demonstrates that our proposed method can efficiently identify the spatial feature in fMRI signal even faster and more accurately than other peer methods. Moreover, the theoretical analyses indicate that DELMAR can converge to the unique fixed point and even enable the accurate approximation of original input as DNNs.
summary: The Matrix Decomposition techniques have been a vital computational approach to analyzing the hierarchy of functional connectivity in the human brain. However, there are still four shortcomings of these methodologies: 1). Large training samples; 2). Manually tuning hyperparameters; 3). Time-consuming and require extensive computational source; 4). It cannot guarantee convergence to a unique fixed point. Therefore, we propose a novel deep matrix factorization technique called Deep Linear Matrix Approximate Reconstruction (DELMAR) to bridge the abovementioned gaps. The advantages of the proposed method are: at first, proposed DELMAR can estimate the important hyperparameters automatically; furthermore, DELMAR employs the matrix backpropagation to reduce the potential accumulative errors; finally, an orthogonal projection is introduced to update all variables of DELMAR rather than directly calculating the inverse matrices. The validation experiments of three peer methods and DELMAR using real functional MRI signal of the human brain demonstrates that our proposed method can efficiently identify the spatial feature in fMRI signal even faster and more accurately than other peer methods. Moreover, the theoretical analyses indicate that DELMAR can converge to the unique fixed point and even enable the accurate approximation of original input as DNNs.
abstract_zh: 矩阵分解技术一直是分析人脑功能连接层次结构的重要计算方法。然而，这些方法仍然存在四个缺点：1）。训练样本量大； 2）。手动调整超参数； 3）。耗时且需要大量计算源； 4).它不能保证收敛到唯一的不动点。因此，我们提出了一种称为深度线性矩阵近似重构（DELMAR）的新型深度矩阵分解技术来弥补上述差距。该方法的优点是：首先，所提出的DELMAR可以自动估计重要的超参数；此外，DELMAR采用矩阵反向传播来减少潜在的累积误差；最后，引入正交投影来更新DELMAR的所有变量，而不是直接计算逆矩阵。使用人脑真实功能 MRI 信号对三种同行方法和 DELMAR 进行的验证实验表明，我们提出的方法可以比其他同行方法更快、更准确地有效识别 fMRI 信号中的空间特征。此外，理论分析表明，DELMAR 可以收敛到唯一的不动点，甚至可以像 DNN 一样精确逼近原始输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DELMAR的深度矩阵分解方法，用于高效提取人脑功能连接的层次结构。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵分解方法存在训练样本需求大、需手动调参、计算耗时及无法保证收敛唯一性等缺陷，亟需改进。
AI.method: DELMAR通过自动估计超参数、矩阵反向传播减少误差、正交投影更新变量（避免逆矩阵计算）实现优化。
AI.result: 实验表明DELMAR在fMRI空间特征识别上比现有方法更快更准确，且理论分析证明其可收敛至唯一固定点。
AI.conclusion: DELMAR有效解决了传统方法局限性，在脑功能连接分析中展现出高效性与准确性优势。

search_text: DELMAR: Deep Linear Matrix Approximately Reconstruction to Extract Hierarchical Functional Connectivity in the Human Brain DELMAR：深度线性矩阵近似重建以提取人脑中的分层功能连接 The Matrix Decomposition techniques have been a vital computational approach to analyzing the hierarchy of functional connectivity in the human brain. However, there are still four shortcomings of these methodologies: 1). Large training samples; 2). Manually tuning hyperparameters; 3). Time-consuming and require extensive computational source; 4). It cannot guarantee convergence to a unique fixed point. Therefore, we propose a novel deep matrix factorization technique called Deep Linear Matrix Approximate Reconstruction (DELMAR) to bridge the abovementioned gaps. The advantages of the proposed method are: at first, proposed DELMAR can estimate the important hyperparameters automatically; furthermore, DELMAR employs the matrix backpropagation to reduce the potential accumulative errors; finally, an orthogonal projection is introduced to update all variables of DELMAR rather than directly calculating the inverse matrices. The validation experiments of three peer methods and DELMAR using real functional MRI signal of the human brain demonstrates that our proposed method can efficiently identify the spatial feature in fMRI signal even faster and more accurately than other peer methods. Moreover, the theoretical analyses indicate that DELMAR can converge to the unique fixed point and even enable the accurate approximation of original input as DNNs. 矩阵分解技术一直是分析人脑功能连接层次结构的重要计算方法。然而，这些方法仍然存在四个缺点：1）。训练样本量大； 2）。手动调整超参数； 3）。耗时且需要大量计算源； 4).它不能保证收敛到唯一的不动点。因此，我们提出了一种称为深度线性矩阵近似重构（DELMAR）的新型深度矩阵分解技术来弥补上述差距。该方法的优点是：首先，所提出的DELMAR可以自动估计重要的超参数；此外，DELMAR采用矩阵反向传播来减少潜在的累积误差；最后，引入正交投影来更新DELMAR的所有变量，而不是直接计算逆矩阵。使用人脑真实功能 MRI 信号对三种同行方法和 DELMAR 进行的验证实验表明，我们提出的方法可以比其他同行方法更快、更准确地有效识别 fMRI 信号中的空间特征。此外，理论分析表明，DELMAR 可以收敛到唯一的不动点，甚至可以像 DNN 一样精确逼近原始输入。 本文提出一种名为DELMAR的深度矩阵分解方法，用于高效提取人脑功能连接的层次结构。 Wei Zhang,Yu Bao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jillur Rahman Saurav,Mohammad Sadegh Nasr,Paul Koomey,Michael Robben,Manfred Huber,Jon Weidanz,Bríd Ryan,Eytan Ruppin,Peng Jiang,Jacob M. Luber
title: A SSIM Guided cGAN Architecture For Clinically Driven Generative Image Synthesis of Multiplexed Spatial Proteomics Channels
title_zh: 用于临床驱动的多重空间蛋白质组通道生成图像合成的 SSIM 引导 cGAN 架构
comment: ef:2023 IEEE CIBCB, Eindhoven, Netherlands, 2023, pp. 1-8
comments: ef:2023 IEEE CIBCB, Eindhoven, Netherlands, 2023, pp. 1-8
abstract: Here we present a structural similarity index measure (SSIM) guided conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) that generatively performs image-to-image (i2i) synthesis to generate photo-accurate protein channels in multiplexed spatial proteomics images. This approach can be utilized to accurately generate missing spatial proteomics channels that were not included during experimental data collection either at the bench or the clinic. Experimental spatial proteomic data from the Human BioMolecular Atlas Program (HuBMAP) was used to generate spatial representations of missing proteins through a U-Net based image synthesis pipeline. HuBMAP channels were hierarchically clustered by the (SSIM) as a heuristic to obtain the minimal set needed to recapitulate the underlying biology represented by the spatial landscape of proteins. We subsequently prove that our SSIM based architecture allows for scaling of generative image synthesis to slides with up to 100 channels, which is better than current state of the art algorithms which are limited to data with 11 channels. We validate these claims by generating a new experimental spatial proteomics data set from human lung adenocarcinoma tissue sections and show that a model trained on HuBMAP can accurately synthesize channels from our new data set. The ability to recapitulate experimental data from sparsely stained multiplexed histological slides containing spatial proteomic will have tremendous impact on medical diagnostics and drug development, and also raises important questions on the medical ethics of utilizing data produced by generative image synthesis in the clinical setting. The algorithm that we present in this paper will allow researchers and clinicians to save time and costs in proteomics based histological staining while also increasing the amount of data that they can generate through their experiments.

This approach can be utilized to accurately generate missing spatial proteomics channels that were not included during experimental data collection either at the bench or the clinic.
