We subsequently prove that our SSIM based architecture allows for scaling of generative image synthesis to slides with up to 100 channels, which is better than current state of the art algorithms which are limited to data with 11 channels. We validate these claims by generating a new experimental spatial proteomics data set from human lung adenocarcinoma tissue sections and show that a model trained on HuBMAP can accurately synthesize channels from our new data set. The ability to recapitulate experimental data from sparsely stained multiplexed histological slides containing spatial proteomic will have tremendous impact on medical diagnostics and drug development, and also raises important questions on the medical ethics of utilizing data produced by generative image synthesis in the clinical setting. The algorithm that we present in this paper will allow researchers and clinicians to save time and costs in proteomics based histological staining while also increasing the amount of data that they can generate through their experiments.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们提出了一种结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）引导的条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），它可以生成地执行图像到图像（i2i）合成，以在多重空间蛋白质组图像中生成照片精确的蛋白质通道。这种方法可用于准确生成缺失的空间蛋白质组学通道，这些通道在实验室或诊所的实验数据收集过程中未包括在内。来自人类生物分子图谱计划 (HuBMAP) 的实验空间蛋白质组数据用于通过基于 U-Net 的图像合成管道生成缺失蛋白质的空间表示。 HuBMAP 通道通过 (SSIM) 进行分层聚类，作为启发式以获得概括蛋白质空间景观所代表的基础生物学所需的最小集合。我们随后证明，我们基于 SSIM 的架构允许将生成图像合成扩展到最多 100 个通道的幻灯片，这比当前仅限于 11 个通道的数据的最先进算法更好。我们通过从人肺腺癌组织切片生成新的实验空间蛋白质组学数据集来验证这些说法，并表明在 HuBMAP 上训练的模型可以准确地从我们的新数据集中合成通道。从包含空间蛋白质组学的稀疏染色多重组织学载玻片中概括实验数据的能力将对医学诊断和药物开发产生巨大影响，并且还对在临床环境中利用生成图像合成产生的数据的医学伦理提出了重要问题。我们在本文中提出的算法将使研究人员和临床医生能够节省基于蛋白质组学的组织学染色的时间和成本，同时还增加他们通过实验生成的数据量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构相似性指数（SSIM）引导的条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），用于生成多通道空间蛋白质组学图像中的蛋白质通道，以补充实验中缺失的数据。
AI.motivation: 实验中常因技术或成本限制导致空间蛋白质组学通道缺失，传统方法难以高效生成高质量的缺失通道数据，限制了研究和临床应用。
AI.method: 采用SSIM分层聚类筛选关键通道，结合U-Net架构的生成模型，通过cGAN实现图像到图像的合成，并验证模型在100通道数据上的扩展能力。
AI.result: 模型成功生成了人类肺腺癌组织的新实验数据，支持最多100通道的合成，优于现有算法（仅支持11通道），并验证了其在临床数据中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升蛋白质组学研究效率，推动医学诊断和药物开发，但需关注生成数据在临床应用中的伦理问题。

authors_text: Victor Boutin,Lakshya Singhal,Xavier Thomas,Thomas Serre
title: Diversity vs. Recognizability: Human-like generalization in one-shot generative models
title_zh: 多样性与可识别性：一次性生成模型中的类人泛化
abstract: Robust generalization to new concepts has long remained a distinctive feature of human intelligence. However, recent progress in deep generative models has now led to neural architectures capable of synthesizing novel instances of unknown visual concepts from a single training example. Yet, a more precise comparison between these models and humans is not possible because existing performance metrics for generative models (i.e., FID, IS, likelihood) are not appropriate for the one-shot generation scenario. Here, we propose a new framework to evaluate one-shot generative models along two axes: sample recognizability vs. diversity (i.e., intra-class variability). Using this framework, we perform a systematic evaluation of representative one-shot generative models on the Omniglot handwritten dataset. We first show that GAN-like and VAE-like models fall on opposite ends of the diversity-recognizability space. Extensive analyses of the effect of key model parameters further revealed that spatial attention and context integration have a linear contribution to the diversity-recognizability trade-off. In contrast, disentanglement transports the model along a parabolic curve that could be used to maximize recognizability. Using the diversity-recognizability framework, we were able to identify models and parameters that closely approximate human data.
summary: Robust generalization to new concepts has long remained a distinctive feature of human intelligence. However, recent progress in deep generative models has now led to neural architectures capable of synthesizing novel instances of unknown visual concepts from a single training example. Yet, a more precise comparison between these models and humans is not possible because existing performance metrics for generative models (i.e., FID, IS, likelihood) are not appropriate for the one-shot generation scenario. Here, we propose a new framework to evaluate one-shot generative models along two axes: sample recognizability vs. diversity (i.e., intra-class variability). Using this framework, we perform a systematic evaluation of representative one-shot generative models on the Omniglot handwritten dataset. We first show that GAN-like and VAE-like models fall on opposite ends of the diversity-recognizability space. Extensive analyses of the effect of key model parameters further revealed that spatial attention and context integration have a linear contribution to the diversity-recognizability trade-off. In contrast, disentanglement transports the model along a parabolic curve that could be used to maximize recognizability. Using the diversity-recognizability framework, we were able to identify models and parameters that closely approximate human data.
abstract_zh: 对新概念的稳健概括长期以来一直是人类智能的显着特征。然而，深度生成模型的最新进展现在已经导致神经架构能够从单个训练示例中合成未知视觉概念的新实例。然而，不可能对这些模型和人类进行更精确的比较，因为生成模型的现有性能指标（即 FID、IS、可能性）不适合一次性生成场景。在这里，我们提出了一种新的框架来沿着两个轴评估一次性生成模型：样本可识别性与多样性（即类内变异性）。使用该框架，我们对 Omniglot 手写数据集上的代表性一次性生成模型进行了系统评估。我们首先证明类 GAN 和类 VAE 模型位于多样性识别空间的两端。对关键模型参数影响的广泛分析进一步表明，空间注意力和上下文整合对多样性-可识别性权衡具有线性贡献。相比之下，解开沿着抛物线传输模型，可用于最大化可识别性。使用多样性可识别性框架，我们能够识别与人类数据非常接近的模型和参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，用于评估单样本生成模型在可识别性与多样性之间的平衡，并分析其参数对生成效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型评估指标（如FID、IS）无法准确衡量单样本生成场景下的模型表现，需建立更贴近人类认知的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建双维度评估框架（可识别性 vs. 多样性），在Omniglot数据集上系统测试代表性模型，分析空间注意力、上下文整合和解耦等参数的影响机制。
AI.result: GAN类与VAE类模型在多样性-可识别性空间呈现对立分布，空间注意力与上下文整合呈线性贡献，解耦参数则沿抛物线影响可识别性，部分模型参数组合可逼近人类数据特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效揭示了生成模型的多样性-可识别性权衡规律，为设计类人单样本泛化能力的生成模型提供了理论依据和参数优化方向。

search_text: Diversity vs. Recognizability: Human-like generalization in one-shot generative models 多样性与可识别性：一次性生成模型中的类人泛化 Robust generalization to new concepts has long remained a distinctive feature of human intelligence. However, recent progress in deep generative models has now led to neural architectures capable of synthesizing novel instances of unknown visual concepts from a single training example. Yet, a more precise comparison between these models and humans is not possible because existing performance metrics for generative models (i.e., FID, IS, likelihood) are not appropriate for the one-shot generation scenario. Here, we propose a new framework to evaluate one-shot generative models along two axes: sample recognizability vs. diversity (i.e., intra-class variability). Using this framework, we perform a systematic evaluation of representative one-shot generative models on the Omniglot handwritten dataset. We first show that GAN-like and VAE-like models fall on opposite ends of the diversity-recognizability space. Extensive analyses of the effect of key model parameters further revealed that spatial attention and context integration have a linear contribution to the diversity-recognizability trade-off. In contrast, disentanglement transports the model along a parabolic curve that could be used to maximize recognizability. Using the diversity-recognizability framework, we were able to identify models and parameters that closely approximate human data. 对新概念的稳健概括长期以来一直是人类智能的显着特征。然而，深度生成模型的最新进展现在已经导致神经架构能够从单个训练示例中合成未知视觉概念的新实例。然而，不可能对这些模型和人类进行更精确的比较，因为生成模型的现有性能指标（即 FID、IS、可能性）不适合一次性生成场景。在这里，我们提出了一种新的框架来沿着两个轴评估一次性生成模型：样本可识别性与多样性（即类内变异性）。使用该框架，我们对 Omniglot 手写数据集上的代表性一次性生成模型进行了系统评估。我们首先证明类 GAN 和类 VAE 模型位于多样性识别空间的两端。对关键模型参数影响的广泛分析进一步表明，空间注意力和上下文整合对多样性-可识别性权衡具有线性贡献。相比之下，解开沿着抛物线传输模型，可用于最大化可识别性。使用多样性可识别性框架，我们能够识别与人类数据非常接近的模型和参数。 本文提出一种新框架，用于评估单样本生成模型在可识别性与多样性之间的平衡，并分析其参数对生成效果的影响。 Victor Boutin,Lakshya Singhal,Xavier Thomas,Thomas Serre cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Abhishek Dinkar Jagtap,Mattias Heinrich,Marian Himstedt
title: Automatic Generation of Synthetic Colonoscopy Videos for Domain Randomization
title_zh: 自动生成合成结肠镜检查视频以进行域随机化
abstract: An increasing number of colonoscopic guidance and assistance systems rely on machine learning algorithms which require a large amount of high-quality training data. In order to ensure high performance, the latter has to resemble a substantial portion of possible configurations. This particularly addresses varying anatomy, mucosa appearance and image sensor characteristics which are likely deteriorated by motion blur and inadequate illumination. The limited amount of readily available training data hampers to account for all of these possible configurations which results in reduced generalization capabilities of machine learning models. We propose an exemplary solution for synthesizing colonoscopy videos with substantial appearance and anatomical variations which enables to learn discriminative domain-randomized representations of the interior colon while mimicking real-world settings.
summary: An increasing number of colonoscopic guidance and assistance systems rely on machine learning algorithms which require a large amount of high-quality training data. In order to ensure high performance, the latter has to resemble a substantial portion of possible configurations. This particularly addresses varying anatomy, mucosa appearance and image sensor characteristics which are likely deteriorated by motion blur and inadequate illumination. The limited amount of readily available training data hampers to account for all of these possible configurations which results in reduced generalization capabilities of machine learning models. We propose an exemplary solution for synthesizing colonoscopy videos with substantial appearance and anatomical variations which enables to learn discriminative domain-randomized representations of the interior colon while mimicking real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的结肠镜引导和辅助系统依赖于机器学习算法，这需要大量高质量的训练数据。为了确保高性能，后者必须类似于大部分可能的配置。这特别解决了可能因运动模糊和照明不足而恶化的不同解剖结构、粘膜外观和图像传感器特性。现有训练数据的数量有限，无法解释所有这些可能的配置，从而导致机器学习模型的泛化能力降低。我们提出了一种示例性解决方案，用于合成具有大量外观和解剖变化的结肠镜检查视频，从而能够在模仿现实世界设置的同时学习内部结肠的判别性域随机表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成具有显著外观和解剖变异的合成结肠镜视频的方法，用于提升机器学习模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有结肠镜训练数据不足且无法覆盖所有临床场景，导致模型在真实环境中的泛化性能受限。
AI.method: 通过领域随机化技术合成结肠镜视频，模拟不同解剖结构、粘膜特征及光照条件等真实场景参数。
AI.result: 生成的合成数据有效扩展了训练集多样性，使模型能学习到更具区分性的领域随机化特征表示。
AI.conclusion: 合成结肠镜视频为领域随机化提供了可行方案，可显著提升医疗AI在复杂临床环境中的适应性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种生成具有显著外观和解剖变异的合成结肠镜视频的方法，用于提升机器学习模型的泛化能力。

authors_text: Abdullah Abdullah,Martin Holler,Karl Kunisch,Malena Sabate Landman
title: Latent-space disentanglement with untrained generator networks for the isolation of different motion types in video data
title_zh: 使用未经训练的生成器网络进行潜在空间解缠，用于隔离视频数据中的不同运动类型
abstract: Isolating different types of motion in video data is a highly relevant problem in video analysis. Applications can be found, for example, in dynamic medical or biological imaging, where the analysis and further processing of the dynamics of interest is often complicated by additional, unwanted dynamics, such as motion of the measurement subject. In this work, it is empirically shown that a representation of video data via untrained generator networks, together with a specific technique for latent space disentanglement that uses minimal, one-dimensional information on some of the underlying dynamics, allows to efficiently isolate different, highly non-linear motion types. In particular, such a representation allows to freeze any selection of motion types, and to obtain accurate independent representations of other dynamics of interest. Obtaining such a representation does not require any pre-training on a training data set, i.e., all parameters of the generator network are learned directly from a single video.
summary: Isolating different types of motion in video data is a highly relevant problem in video analysis. Applications can be found, for example, in dynamic medical or biological imaging, where the analysis and further processing of the dynamics of interest is often complicated by additional, unwanted dynamics, such as motion of the measurement subject. In this work, it is empirically shown that a representation of video data via untrained generator networks, together with a specific technique for latent space disentanglement that uses minimal, one-dimensional information on some of the underlying dynamics, allows to efficiently isolate different, highly non-linear motion types. In particular, such a representation allows to freeze any selection of motion types, and to obtain accurate independent representations of other dynamics of interest. Obtaining such a representation does not require any pre-training on a training data set, i.e., all parameters of the generator network are learned directly from a single video.
abstract_zh: 隔离视频数据中不同类型的运动是视频分析中高度相关的问题。例如，可以在动态医学或生物成像中找到应用，其中感兴趣的动态的分析和进一步处理通常因额外的、不需要的动态（例如测量对象的运动）而变得复杂。在这项工作中，经验表明，通过未经训练的生成器网络来表示视频数据，再加上使用一些底层动态的最小一维信息的潜在空间解缠的特定技术，可以有效地隔离不同的高度非线性运动类型。特别地，这样的表示允许冻结运动类型的任何选择，并获得感兴趣的其他动态的准确的独立表示。获得这种表示不需要对训练数据集进行任何预训练，即生成器网络的所有参数都是直接从单个视频中学习的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用未训练生成器网络与潜在空间解耦技术，从视频数据中分离不同类型的运动。
AI.motivation: 在动态医学或生物成像中，目标动态常受无关运动干扰，需有效分离不同运动类型以提升分析准确性。
AI.method: 通过未训练生成器网络提取视频表征，结合利用少量一维动态信息的潜在空间解耦技术，直接从单个视频学习生成器参数，无需预训练。
AI.result: 成功分离多种高度非线性运动类型，可冻结任意选择的运动并独立表征其他动态，且无需预训练数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需预训练即可从单视频中学习，有效解决动态分析中运动分离的挑战，具有广泛应用潜力。

Applications can be found, for example, in dynamic medical or biological imaging, where the analysis and further processing of the dynamics of interest is often complicated by additional, unwanted dynamics, such as motion of the measurement subject. In this work, it is empirically shown that a representation of video data via untrained generator networks, together with a specific technique for latent space disentanglement that uses minimal, one-dimensional information on some of the underlying dynamics, allows to efficiently isolate different, highly non-linear motion types. In particular, such a representation allows to freeze any selection of motion types, and to obtain accurate independent representations of other dynamics of interest. Obtaining such a representation does not require any pre-training on a training data set, i.e., all parameters of the generator network are learned directly from a single video. 隔离视频数据中不同类型的运动是视频分析中高度相关的问题。例如，可以在动态医学或生物成像中找到应用，其中感兴趣的动态的分析和进一步处理通常因额外的、不需要的动态（例如测量对象的运动）而变得复杂。在这项工作中，经验表明，通过未经训练的生成器网络来表示视频数据，再加上使用一些底层动态的最小一维信息的潜在空间解缠的特定技术，可以有效地隔离不同的高度非线性运动类型。特别地，这样的表示允许冻结运动类型的任何选择，并获得感兴趣的其他动态的准确的独立表示。获得这种表示不需要对训练数据集进行任何预训练，即生成器网络的所有参数都是直接从单个视频中学习的。 本文提出利用未训练生成器网络与潜在空间解耦技术，从视频数据中分离不同类型的运动。 Abdullah Abdullah,Martin Holler,Karl Kunisch,Malena Sabate Landman eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Gourab Ghatak
title: Fast Change Identification in Multi-Play Bandits and its Applications in Wireless Networks
title_zh: 多重播放强盗的快速变化识别及其在无线网络中的应用
comment: Corrected the assumptions and removed the case-study due to an error
comments: Corrected the assumptions and removed the case-study due to an error
abstract: Next-generation wireless services are characterized by a diverse set of requirements, to sustain which, the wireless access points need to probe the users in the network periodically. In this regard, we study a novel multi-armed bandit (MAB) setting that mandates probing all the arms periodically while keeping track of the best current arm in a non-stationary environment. In particular, we develop \texttt{TS-GE} that balances the regret guarantees of classical Thompson sampling (TS) with the broadcast probing (BP) of all the arms simultaneously in order to actively detect a change in the reward distributions. The main innovation in the algorithm is in identifying the changed arm by an optional subroutine called group exploration (GE) that scales as $\log_2(K)$ for a $K-$armed bandit setting. We characterize the probability of missed detection and the probability of false-alarm in terms of the environment parameters. We highlight the conditions in which the regret guarantee of \texttt{TS-GE} outperforms that of the state-of-the-art algorithms, in particular, \texttt{ADSWITCH} and \texttt{M-UCB}. We demonstrate the efficacy of \texttt{TS-GE} by employing it in two wireless system application - task offloading in mobile-edge computing (MEC) and an industrial internet-of-things (IIoT) network designed for simultaneous wireless information and power transfer (SWIPT).

In this regard, we study a novel multi-armed bandit (MAB) setting that mandates probing all the arms periodically while keeping track of the best current arm in a non-stationary environment. The main innovation in the algorithm is in identifying the changed arm by an optional subroutine called group exploration (GE) that scales as $\log_2(K)$ for a $K-$armed bandit setting. We characterize the probability of missed detection and the probability of false-alarm in terms of the environment parameters. We highlight the conditions in which the regret guarantee of \texttt{TS-GE} outperforms that of the state-of-the-art algorithms, in particular, \texttt{ADSWITCH} and \texttt{M-UCB}. We demonstrate the efficacy of \texttt{TS-GE} by employing it in two wireless system application - task offloading in mobile-edge computing (MEC) and an industrial internet-of-things (IIoT) network designed for simultaneous wireless information and power transfer (SWIPT).
abstract_zh: 下一代无线服务的特点是具有多样化的要求，为了满足这些要求，无线接入点需要定期探测网络中的用户。在这方面，我们研究了一种新颖的多臂老虎机（MAB）设置，该设置要求定期探测所有臂，同时跟踪非静态环境中当前最好的臂。特别是，我们开发了 \texttt{TS-GE} 来平衡经典汤普森采样（TS）的遗憾保证与同时所有臂的广播探测（BP），以便主动检测奖励分布的变化。该算法的主要创新在于通过称为组探索 (GE) 的可选子例程来识别已更改的手臂，该子例程针对 $K-$armed bandit 设置缩放为 $\log_2(K)$。我们根据环境参数来表征漏检概率和误报概率。我们强调\texttt{TS-GE}的遗憾保证优于最先进算法的条件，特别是\texttt{ADSWITCH}和\texttt{M-UCB}。我们通过在两个无线系统应用中使用 \texttt{TS-GE} 来展示它的功效——移动边缘计算 (MEC) 中的任务卸载和专为同时无线信息和电力传输 (SWIPT) 设计的工业物联网 (IIoT) 网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在非平稳环境中快速检测多臂老虎机变化的算法TS-GE，并应用于无线网络场景。
AI.motivation: 下一代无线网络需应对用户需求多样性，传统算法难以有效平衡环境变化探测与最优臂跟踪。
AI.method: 设计TS-GE算法，结合汤普森采样与广播探测，通过组探索子程序实现log2(K)复杂度的变更臂识别。
AI.result: 理论分析漏检/误报概率，证明TS-GE在特定条件下优于ADSWITCH和M-UCB，且在MEC与SWIPT场景验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: TS-GE为无线网络动态环境下的最优臂跟踪与变化检测提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Weiguo Zhu,Yongqi Sun,Xintong Yi,Yan Wang
title: A Correlation Information-based Spatiotemporal Network for Traffic Flow Forecasting
title_zh: 基于关联信息的交通流预测时空网络
abstract: The technology of traffic flow forecasting plays an important role in intelligent transportation systems. Based on graph neural networks and attention mechanisms, most previous works utilize the transformer architecture to discover spatiotemporal dependencies and dynamic relationships. However, they have not considered correlation information among spatiotemporal sequences thoroughly. In this paper, based on the maximal information coefficient, we present two elaborate spatiotemporal representations, spatial correlation information (SCorr) and temporal correlation information (TCorr). Using SCorr, we propose a correlation information-based spatiotemporal network (CorrSTN) that includes a dynamic graph neural network component for integrating correlation information into spatial structure effectively and a multi-head attention component for modeling dynamic temporal dependencies accurately. Utilizing TCorr, we explore the correlation pattern among different periodic data to identify the most relevant data, and then design an efficient data selection scheme to further enhance model performance. The experimental results on the highway traffic flow (PEMS07 and PEMS08) and metro crowd flow (HZME inflow and outflow) datasets demonstrate that CorrSTN outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of predictive performance. In particular, on the HZME (outflow) dataset, our model makes significant improvements compared with the ASTGNN model by 12.7%, 14.4% and 27.4% in the metrics of MAE, RMSE and MAPE, respectively.
summary: The technology of traffic flow forecasting plays an important role in intelligent transportation systems. Based on graph neural networks and attention mechanisms, most previous works utilize the transformer architecture to discover spatiotemporal dependencies and dynamic relationships. However, they have not considered correlation information among spatiotemporal sequences thoroughly. In this paper, based on the maximal information coefficient, we present two elaborate spatiotemporal representations, spatial correlation information (SCorr) and temporal correlation information (TCorr). Using SCorr, we propose a correlation information-based spatiotemporal network (CorrSTN) that includes a dynamic graph neural network component for integrating correlation information into spatial structure effectively and a multi-head attention component for modeling dynamic temporal dependencies accurately. Utilizing TCorr, we explore the correlation pattern among different periodic data to identify the most relevant data, and then design an efficient data selection scheme to further enhance model performance. The experimental results on the highway traffic flow (PEMS07 and PEMS08) and metro crowd flow (HZME inflow and outflow) datasets demonstrate that CorrSTN outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of predictive performance. In particular, on the HZME (outflow) dataset, our model makes significant improvements compared with the ASTGNN model by 12.7%, 14.4% and 27.4% in the metrics of MAE, RMSE and MAPE, respectively.
abstract_zh: 交通流量预测技术在智能交通系统中发挥着重要作用。基于图神经网络和注意力机制，之前的大多数工作利用 Transformer 架构来发现时空依赖性和动态关系。然而，他们没有充分考虑时空序列之间的相关信息。在本文中，基于最大信息系数，我们提出了两种精细的时空表示，空间相关信息（SCorr）和时间相关信息（TCorr）。使用 SCorr，我们提出了一种基于相关信息的时空网络（CorrSTN），其中包括用于将相关信息有效地集成到空间结构中的动态图神经网络组件和用于准确建模动态时间依赖性的多头注意组件。利用TCorr，我们探索不同周期数据之间的相关模式以识别最相关的数据，然后设计有效的数据选择方案以进一步提高模型性能。在高速公路交通流量（PEMS07 和 PEMS08）和地铁人群流量（HZME 流入和流出）数据集上的实验结果表明，CorrSTN 在预测性能方面优于最先进的方法。特别是，在 HZME（流出）数据集上，我们的模型与 ASTGNN 模型相比，在 MAE、RMSE 和 MAPE 指标上分别有了 12.7%、14.4% 和 27.4% 的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相关性信息的时空网络（CorrSTN），通过整合空间和时间相关性信息提升交通流量预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络和注意力机制的交通预测方法未充分考虑时空序列中的相关性信息，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 提出空间相关性信息（SCorr）与时间相关性信息（TCorr）两种表示，构建动态图神经网络与多头注意力机制，并设计基于TCorr的高效数据选择方案。
AI.result: 在PEMS07、PEMS08及HZME数据集上，CorrSTN相较ASTGNN等模型在MAE/RMSE/MAPE指标上分别提升12.7%-27.4%（以HZME出站数据集最为显著）。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统建模时空相关性信息，CorrSTN有效提升了交通流量预测性能，验证了相关性驱动的时空表征方法的优越性。

authors_text: Simin Chen,Hamed Khanpour,Cong Liu,Wei Yang
title: Learning to Reverse DNNs from AI Programs Automatically
title_zh: 学习自动从 AI 程序反转 DNN
comment: This paper is accepted by IJCAI 2022
comments: This paper is accepted by IJCAI 2022
abstract: With the privatization deployment of DNNs on edge devices, the security of on-device DNNs has raised significant concern. To quantify the model leakage risk of on-device DNNs automatically, we propose NNReverse, the first learning-based method which can reverse DNNs from AI programs without domain knowledge. NNReverse trains a representation model to represent the semantics of binary code for DNN layers. By searching the most similar function in our database, NNReverse infers the layer type of a given function's binary code. To represent assembly instructions semantics precisely, NNReverse proposes a more fine-grained embedding model to represent the textual and structural-semantic of assembly functions.
summary: With the privatization deployment of DNNs on edge devices, the security of on-device DNNs has raised significant concern. To quantify the model leakage risk of on-device DNNs automatically, we propose NNReverse, the first learning-based method which can reverse DNNs from AI programs without domain knowledge. NNReverse trains a representation model to represent the semantics of binary code for DNN layers. By searching the most similar function in our database, NNReverse infers the layer type of a given function's binary code. To represent assembly instructions semantics precisely, NNReverse proposes a more fine-grained embedding model to represent the textual and structural-semantic of assembly functions.
abstract_zh: 随着边缘设备上 DNN 的私有化部署，设备上 DNN 的安全性引起了人们的高度关注。为了自动量化设备上 DNN 的模型泄漏风险，我们提出了 NNReverse，这是第一个基于学习的方法，无需领域知识即可从 AI 程序中反转 DNN。 NNReverse 训练表示模型来表示 DNN 层二进制代码的语义。通过在我们的数据库中搜索最相似的函数，NNReverse 推断给定函数的二进制代码的层类型。为了精确地表示汇编指令语义，NNReverse 提出了一种更细粒度的嵌入模型来表示汇编函数的文本和结构语义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NNReverse方法，无需领域知识即可自动从AI程序中逆向推导深度神经网络（DNN）结构。
AI.motivation: 随着DNN在边缘设备的私有化部署，如何自动量化设备端DNN的模型泄露风险成为重要安全问题。
AI.method: 通过训练二进制代码语义表示模型，结合数据库相似函数搜索与细粒度汇编语义嵌入技术，实现DNN层类型的逆向推断。
AI.result: 成功构建了可精准表征汇编指令语义的嵌入模型，有效识别出目标二进制代码中DNN各层的类型。
AI.conclusion: NNReverse为自动化评估DNN模型安全风险提供了新方法，填补了无监督逆向分析领域的技术空白。

search_text: Learning to Reverse DNNs from AI Programs Automatically 学习自动从 AI 程序反转 DNN With the privatization deployment of DNNs on edge devices, the security of on-device DNNs has raised significant concern. To quantify the model leakage risk of on-device DNNs automatically, we propose NNReverse, the first learning-based method which can reverse DNNs from AI programs without domain knowledge. NNReverse trains a representation model to represent the semantics of binary code for DNN layers. By searching the most similar function in our database, NNReverse infers the layer type of a given function's binary code. To represent assembly instructions semantics precisely, NNReverse proposes a more fine-grained embedding model to represent the textual and structural-semantic of assembly functions. 随着边缘设备上 DNN 的私有化部署，设备上 DNN 的安全性引起了人们的高度关注。为了自动量化设备上 DNN 的模型泄漏风险，我们提出了 NNReverse，这是第一个基于学习的方法，无需领域知识即可从 AI 程序中反转 DNN。 NNReverse 训练表示模型来表示 DNN 层二进制代码的语义。通过在我们的数据库中搜索最相似的函数，NNReverse 推断给定函数的二进制代码的层类型。为了精确地表示汇编指令语义，NNReverse 提出了一种更细粒度的嵌入模型来表示汇编函数的文本和结构语义。 本文提出NNReverse方法，无需领域知识即可自动从AI程序中逆向推导深度神经网络（DNN）结构。 Simin Chen,Hamed Khanpour,Cong Liu,Wei Yang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Xinyue Shao,Hongzhi Wang,Xiao Zhu,Feng Xiong
title: FIND:Explainable Framework for Meta-learning
title_zh: FIND：可解释的元学习框架
abstract: Meta-learning is used to efficiently enable the automatic selection of machine learning models by combining data and prior knowledge. Since the traditional meta-learning technique lacks explainability, as well as shortcomings in terms of transparency and fairness, achieving explainability for meta-learning is crucial. This paper proposes FIND, an interpretable meta-learning framework that not only can explain the recommendation results of meta-learning algorithm selection, but also provide a more complete and accurate explanation of the recommendation algorithm's performance on specific datasets combined with business scenarios. The validity and correctness of this framework have been demonstrated by extensive experiments.
summary: Meta-learning is used to efficiently enable the automatic selection of machine learning models by combining data and prior knowledge. Since the traditional meta-learning technique lacks explainability, as well as shortcomings in terms of transparency and fairness, achieving explainability for meta-learning is crucial. This paper proposes FIND, an interpretable meta-learning framework that not only can explain the recommendation results of meta-learning algorithm selection, but also provide a more complete and accurate explanation of the recommendation algorithm's performance on specific datasets combined with business scenarios. The validity and correctness of this framework have been demonstrated by extensive experiments.
abstract_zh: 元学习用于通过结合数据和先验知识来有效地实现机器学习模型的自动选择。由于传统的元学习技术缺乏可解释性，以及透明性和公平性方面的缺陷，因此实现元学习的可解释性至关重要。本文提出FIND，一种可解释的元学习框架，不仅可以解释元学习算法选择的推荐结果，还可以结合业务场景对推荐算法在特定数据集上的表现提供更完整、准确的解释。通过大量的实验证明了该框架的有效性和正确性。

AI.tldr: 提出FIND框架，解决元学习在可解释性、透明性和公平性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习缺乏可解释性、透明性和公平性，亟需提升其解释能力以增强信任与应用。
AI.method: 提出FIND框架，结合业务场景提供算法推荐结果的可解释性分析，并增强特定数据集的性能解释。
AI.result: 通过大量实验验证了FIND框架的有效性和正确性，证明其在解释性和性能上的优势。
AI.conclusion: FIND框架有效提升了元学习的可解释性，为实际应用提供了可靠支持。

authors_text: Daniel Cummings,Anthony Sarah,Sharath Nittur Sridhar,Maciej Szankin,Juan Pablo Munoz,Sairam Sundaresan
title: A Hardware-Aware Framework for Accelerating Neural Architecture Search Across Modalities
title_zh: 用于加速跨模态神经架构搜索的硬件感知框架
abstract: Recent advances in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) such as one-shot NAS offer the ability to extract specialized hardware-aware sub-network configurations from a task-specific super-network. While considerable effort has been employed towards improving the first stage, namely, the training of the super-network, the search for derivative high-performing sub-networks is still under-explored. Popular methods decouple the super-network training from the sub-network search and use performance predictors to reduce the computational burden of searching on different hardware platforms. We propose a flexible search framework that automatically and efficiently finds optimal sub-networks that are optimized for different performance metrics and hardware configurations. Specifically, we show how evolutionary algorithms can be paired with lightly trained objective predictors in an iterative cycle to accelerate architecture search in a multi-objective setting for various modalities including machine translation and image classification.
summary: Recent advances in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) such as one-shot NAS offer the ability to extract specialized hardware-aware sub-network configurations from a task-specific super-network. While considerable effort has been employed towards improving the first stage, namely, the training of the super-network, the search for derivative high-performing sub-networks is still under-explored. Popular methods decouple the super-network training from the sub-network search and use performance predictors to reduce the computational burden of searching on different hardware platforms. We propose a flexible search framework that automatically and efficiently finds optimal sub-networks that are optimized for different performance metrics and hardware configurations. Specifically, we show how evolutionary algorithms can be paired with lightly trained objective predictors in an iterative cycle to accelerate architecture search in a multi-objective setting for various modalities including machine translation and image classification.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 的最新进展（例如一次性 NAS）提供了从特定于任务的超级网络中提取专门的硬件感知子网络配置的能力。虽然在改进第一阶段（即超级网络的训练）方面付出了相当大的努力，但对衍生的高性能子网络的搜索仍处于探索之中。流行的方法将超级网络训练与子网络搜索解耦，并使用性能预测器来减少在不同硬件平台上搜索的计算负担。我们提出了一种灵活的搜索框架，可以自动有效地找到针对不同性能指标和硬件配置进行优化的最佳子网络。具体来说，我们展示了如何在迭代周期中将进化算法与经过轻度训练的目标预测器配对，以加速多目标设置中针对各种模式（包括机器翻译和图像分类）的架构搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件感知的框架，通过进化算法与轻量预测器结合，加速跨模态的神经网络架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法在子网络搜索阶段效率低下，且难以适配不同硬件配置，需更高效的多目标优化方案。
AI.method: 结合进化算法与轻量级训练的性能预测器，通过迭代循环实现跨模态（如机器翻译、图像分类）的多目标子网络搜索。
AI.result: 框架在多种任务和硬件配置下均能高效找到性能优化的子网络，验证了其灵活性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过硬件感知的多目标优化，显著提升了跨模态NAS的效率，为实际部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Iman,John A. Miller,Khaled Rasheed,Robert M. Branch,Hamid R. Arabnia
title: EXPANSE: A Deep Continual / Progressive Learning System for Deep Transfer Learning
title_zh: EXPANSE：用于深度迁移学习的深度持续/渐进学习系统
comment: 12 Pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, submitting to NIPS 2022
comments: 12 Pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, submitting to NIPS 2022
abstract: Deep transfer learning techniques try to tackle the limitations of deep learning, the dependency on extensive training data and the training costs, by reusing obtained knowledge. However, the current DTL techniques suffer from either catastrophic forgetting dilemma (losing the previously obtained knowledge) or overly biased pre-trained models (harder to adapt to target data) in finetuning pre-trained models or freezing a part of the pre-trained model, respectively. Progressive learning, a sub-category of DTL, reduces the effect of the overly biased model in the case of freezing earlier layers by adding a new layer to the end of a frozen pre-trained model. Even though it has been successful in many cases, it cannot yet handle distant source and target data. We propose a new continual/progressive learning approach for deep transfer learning to tackle these limitations. To avoid both catastrophic forgetting and overly biased-model problems, we expand the pre-trained model by expanding pre-trained layers (adding new nodes to each layer) in the model instead of only adding new layers. Hence the method is named EXPANSE. Our experimental results confirm that we can tackle distant source and target data using this technique. At the same time, the final model is still valid on the source data, achieving a promising deep continual learning approach. Moreover, we offer a new way of training deep learning models inspired by the human education system. We termed this two-step training: learning basics first, then adding complexities and uncertainties. The evaluation implies that the two-step training extracts more meaningful features and a finer basin on the error surface since it can achieve better accuracy in comparison to regular training. EXPANSE (model expansion and two-step training) is a systematic continual learning approach applicable to different problems and DL models.
summary: Deep transfer learning techniques try to tackle the limitations of deep learning, the dependency on extensive training data and the training costs, by reusing obtained knowledge. However, the current DTL techniques suffer from either catastrophic forgetting dilemma (losing the previously obtained knowledge) or overly biased pre-trained models (harder to adapt to target data) in finetuning pre-trained models or freezing a part of the pre-trained model, respectively. Progressive learning, a sub-category of DTL, reduces the effect of the overly biased model in the case of freezing earlier layers by adding a new layer to the end of a frozen pre-trained model. Even though it has been successful in many cases, it cannot yet handle distant source and target data. We propose a new continual/progressive learning approach for deep transfer learning to tackle these limitations. Hence the method is named EXPANSE. Our experimental results confirm that we can tackle distant source and target data using this technique. At the same time, the final model is still valid on the source data, achieving a promising deep continual learning approach. Moreover, we offer a new way of training deep learning models inspired by the human education system. We termed this two-step training: learning basics first, then adding complexities and uncertainties. The evaluation implies that the two-step training extracts more meaningful features and a finer basin on the error surface since it can achieve better accuracy in comparison to regular training. EXPANSE (model expansion and two-step training) is a systematic continual learning approach applicable to different problems and DL models.
abstract_zh: 深度迁移学习技术试图通过重用获得的知识来解决深度学习的局限性、对大量训练数据的依赖和训练成本。然而，当前的DTL技术在微调预训练模型或冻结部分预训练模型时分别面临灾难性遗忘困境（丢失先前获得的知识）或预训练模型过度偏差（难以适应目标数据）。渐进式学习是 DTL 的一个子类别，它通过在冻结的预训练模型的末尾添加新层来减少冻结早期层的情况下过度偏差模型的影响。尽管它在许多情况下都取得了成功，但它还无法处理远程源和目标数据。我们提出了一种新的深度迁移学习持续/渐进学习方法来解决这些限制。为了避免灾难性遗忘和模型过度偏差问题，我们通过扩展模型中的预训练层（向每层添加新节点）来扩展预训练模型，而不是仅添加新层。因此该方法被命名为 EXPANSE。我们的实验结果证实，我们可以使用这种技术处理远程源和目标数据。同时，最终模型在源数据上仍然有效，实现了一种有前途的深度持续学习方法。此外，我们还提供了一种受人类教育系统启发的深度学习模型训练新方法。我们将这种培训称为两步培训：首先学习基础知识，然后增加复杂性和不确定性。评估表明，两步训练提取了更有意义的特征，并且在误差表面上有更精细的盆地，因为与常规训练相比，它可以实现更好的准确性。 EXPANSE（模型扩展和两步训练）是一种适用于不同问题和深度学习模型的系统持续学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXPANSE方法，通过扩展预训练模型的层结构和两步训练策略，解决深度迁移学习中的灾难性遗忘和模型偏置问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度迁移学习技术在微调预训练模型或冻结部分层时，面临灾难性遗忘或模型过度偏置的困境，且难以处理源域与目标域差异较大的场景。
AI.method: EXPANSE通过在预训练模型每一层添加新节点扩展模型结构，而非仅添加新层；同时采用两步训练法（先学习基础再引入复杂性），模拟人类教育系统。
AI.result: 实验表明EXPANSE能有效处理远距离源目标数据，保持源数据性能，且两步训练法提取更语义化的特征，优于常规训练方法。
AI.conclusion: EXPANSE为深度持续学习提供了系统性解决方案，适用于多种问题和深度学习模型，其结构扩展与分步训练策略具有广泛适用性。

search_text: EXPANSE: A Deep Continual / Progressive Learning System for Deep Transfer Learning EXPANSE：用于深度迁移学习的深度持续/渐进学习系统 Deep transfer learning techniques try to tackle the limitations of deep learning, the dependency on extensive training data and the training costs, by reusing obtained knowledge. However, the current DTL techniques suffer from either catastrophic forgetting dilemma (losing the previously obtained knowledge) or overly biased pre-trained models (harder to adapt to target data) in finetuning pre-trained models or freezing a part of the pre-trained model, respectively. Progressive learning, a sub-category of DTL, reduces the effect of the overly biased model in the case of freezing earlier layers by adding a new layer to the end of a frozen pre-trained model. Even though it has been successful in many cases, it cannot yet handle distant source and target data. We propose a new continual/progressive learning approach for deep transfer learning to tackle these limitations. To avoid both catastrophic forgetting and overly biased-model problems, we expand the pre-trained model by expanding pre-trained layers (adding new nodes to each layer) in the model instead of only adding new layers. Hence the method is named EXPANSE. Our experimental results confirm that we can tackle distant source and target data using this technique. At the same time, the final model is still valid on the source data, achieving a promising deep continual learning approach. Moreover, we offer a new way of training deep learning models inspired by the human education system. We termed this two-step training: learning basics first, then adding complexities and uncertainties. The evaluation implies that the two-step training extracts more meaningful features and a finer basin on the error surface since it can achieve better accuracy in comparison to regular training. EXPANSE (model expansion and two-step training) is a systematic continual learning approach applicable to different problems and DL models. 深度迁移学习技术试图通过重用获得的知识来解决深度学习的局限性、对大量训练数据的依赖和训练成本。然而，当前的DTL技术在微调预训练模型或冻结部分预训练模型时分别面临灾难性遗忘困境（丢失先前获得的知识）或预训练模型过度偏差（难以适应目标数据）。渐进式学习是 DTL 的一个子类别，它通过在冻结的预训练模型的末尾添加新层来减少冻结早期层的情况下过度偏差模型的影响。尽管它在许多情况下都取得了成功，但它还无法处理远程源和目标数据。我们提出了一种新的深度迁移学习持续/渐进学习方法来解决这些限制。为了避免灾难性遗忘和模型过度偏差问题，我们通过扩展模型中的预训练层（向每层添加新节点）来扩展预训练模型，而不是仅添加新层。因此该方法被命名为 EXPANSE。我们的实验结果证实，我们可以使用这种技术处理远程源和目标数据。同时，最终模型在源数据上仍然有效，实现了一种有前途的深度持续学习方法。此外，我们还提供了一种受人类教育系统启发的深度学习模型训练新方法。我们将这种培训称为两步培训：首先学习基础知识，然后增加复杂性和不确定性。评估表明，两步训练提取了更有意义的特征，并且在误差表面上有更精细的盆地，因为与常规训练相比，它可以实现更好的准确性。 EXPANSE（模型扩展和两步训练）是一种适用于不同问题和深度学习模型的系统持续学习方法。 本文提出EXPANSE方法，通过扩展预训练模型的层结构和两步训练策略，解决深度迁移学习中的灾难性遗忘和模型偏置问题。 Mohammadreza Iman,John A. authors_text: Florian Kofler,Ivan Ezhov,Lucas Fidon,Izabela Horvath,Ezequiel de la Rosa,John LaMaster,Hongwei Li,Tom Finck,Suprosanna Shit,Johannes Paetzold,Spyridon Bakas,Marie Piraud,Jan Kirschke,Tom Vercauteren,Claus Zimmer,Benedikt Wiestler,Bjoern Menze
title: Deep Quality Estimation: Creating Surrogate Models for Human Quality Ratings
title_zh: 深度质量估计：为人类质量评级创建替代模型
abstract: Human ratings are abstract representations of segmentation quality. To approximate human quality ratings on scarce expert data, we train surrogate quality estimation models. We evaluate on a complex multi-class segmentation problem, specifically glioma segmentation, following the BraTS annotation protocol. The training data features quality ratings from 15 expert neuroradiologists on a scale ranging from 1 to 6 stars for various computer-generated and manual 3D annotations. Even though the networks operate on 2D images and with scarce training data, we can approximate segmentation quality within a margin of error comparable to human intra-rater reliability. Segmentation quality prediction has broad applications. While an understanding of segmentation quality is imperative for successful clinical translation of automatic segmentation quality algorithms, it can play an essential role in training new segmentation models. Due to the split-second inference times, it can be directly applied within a loss function or as a fully-automatic dataset curation mechanism in a federated learning setting.
summary: Human ratings are abstract representations of segmentation quality. To approximate human quality ratings on scarce expert data, we train surrogate quality estimation models. We evaluate on a complex multi-class segmentation problem, specifically glioma segmentation, following the BraTS annotation protocol. The training data features quality ratings from 15 expert neuroradiologists on a scale ranging from 1 to 6 stars for various computer-generated and manual 3D annotations. Even though the networks operate on 2D images and with scarce training data, we can approximate segmentation quality within a margin of error comparable to human intra-rater reliability. Segmentation quality prediction has broad applications. While an understanding of segmentation quality is imperative for successful clinical translation of automatic segmentation quality algorithms, it can play an essential role in training new segmentation models. Due to the split-second inference times, it can be directly applied within a loss function or as a fully-automatic dataset curation mechanism in a federated learning setting.
abstract_zh: 人类评分是分割质量的抽象表示。为了对稀缺专家数据进行近似人类质量评级，我们训练替代质量估计模型。我们遵循 BraTS 注释协议评估复杂的多类分割问题，特别是神经胶质瘤分割。训练数据包含 15 名神经放射专家专家对各种计算机生成和手动 3D 注释的质量评级，评分范围从 1 星到 6 星不等。尽管网络在 2D 图像上运行并且训练数据稀缺，但我们可以在与人类内部评估者可靠性相当的误差范围内估计分割质量。分割质量预测具有广泛的应用。虽然了解分割质量对于自动分割质量算法的成功临床转化至关重要，但它在训练新分割模型方面可以发挥重要作用。由于瞬间推理时间，它可以直接应用于损失函数或作为联邦学习设置中的全自动数据集管理机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度质量估计方法，通过训练代理模型近似人类对分割结果的质量评分，应用于医学图像分割领域。
AI.motivation: 人类质量评分数据稀缺且获取成本高，而准确的分割质量评估对临床应用和模型训练至关重要，需开发自动化替代方案。
AI.method: 基于2D图像和有限专家评分数据训练深度神经网络，通过回归任务预测分割质量评分，采用BraTS协议进行胶质瘤分割验证。
AI.result: 模型在胶质瘤分割任务中实现与人类评分者可靠性相当的误差范围，验证了其在质量估计任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升分割算法的临床可解释性，支持联邦学习中的自动数据集筛选，为分割模型训练提供质量反馈机制。

authors_text: Yazan Gharaibeh,Juhwan Lee,Vladislav N. Zimin,Chaitanya Kolluru,Luis A. P. Dallan,Gabriel T. R. Pereira,Armando Vergara-Martel,Justin N. Kim,Ammar Hoori,Pengfei Dong,Peshala T. Gamage,Linxia Gu,Hiram G. Bezerra,Sadeer Al-Kindi,David L. Wilson
title: Prediction of stent under-expansion in calcified coronary arteries using machine-learning on intravascular optical coherence tomography
title_zh: 使用血管内光学相干断层扫描机器学习预测钙化冠状动脉支架扩张不足
comment: 25 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, 6 supplemental figures, 3 supplemental tables
comments: 25 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, 6 supplemental figures, 3 supplemental tables
abstract: BACKGROUND Careful evaluation of the risk of stent under-expansions before the intervention will aid treatment planning, including the application of a pre-stent plaque modification strategy. OBJECTIVES It remains challenging to achieve a proper stent expansion in the presence of severely calcified coronary lesions. Building on our work in deep learning segmentation, we created an automated machine learning approach that uses lesion attributes to predict stent under-expansion from pre-stent images, suggesting the need for plaque modification. METHODS Pre- and post-stent intravascular optical coherence tomography image data were obtained from 110 coronary lesions. Lumen and calcifications in pre-stent images were segmented using deep learning, and numerous features per lesion were extracted. We analyzed stent expansion along the lesion, enabling frame, segmental, and whole-lesion analyses. We trained regression models to predict the poststent lumen area and then to compute the stent expansion index (SEI). Stents with an SEI < or >/= 80% were classified as "under-expanded" and "well-expanded," respectively. RESULTS Best performance (root-mean-square-error = 0.04+/-0.02 mm2, r = 0.94+/-0.04, p < 0.0001) was achieved when we used features from both the lumen and calcification to train a Gaussian regression model for a segmental analysis over a segment length of 31 frames. Under-expansion classification results (AUC=0.85+/-0.02) were significantly improved over other approaches. CONCLUSIONS We used calcifications and lumen features to identify lesions at risk of stent under-expansion. Results suggest that the use of pre-stent images can inform physicians of the need to apply plaque modification approaches.

We trained regression models to predict the poststent lumen area and then to compute the stent expansion index (SEI). Stents with an SEI < or >/= 80% were classified as "under-expanded" and "well-expanded," respectively. RESULTS Best performance (root-mean-square-error = 0.04+/-0.02 mm2, r = 0.94+/-0.04, p < 0.0001) was achieved when we used features from both the lumen and calcification to train a Gaussian regression model for a segmental analysis over a segment length of 31 frames. Under-expansion classification results (AUC=0.85+/-0.02) were significantly improved over other approaches. CONCLUSIONS We used calcifications and lumen features to identify lesions at risk of stent under-expansion. Results suggest that the use of pre-stent images can inform physicians of the need to apply plaque modification approaches.
abstract_zh: 背景在干预前仔细评估支架扩张不足的风险将有助于治疗计划，包括应用支架前斑块修改策略。目标 在存在严重钙化冠状动脉病变的情况下实现适当的支架扩张仍然具有挑战性。基于我们在深度学习分割方面的工作，我们创建了一种自动化机器学习方法，该方法使用病变属性从支架前图像预测支架扩张不足，表明需要进行斑块修改。方法 获得 110 个冠状动脉病变的支架植入前和植入后血管内光学相干断层扫描图像数据。使用深度学习对支架前图像中的管腔和钙化进行分割，并提取每个病变的大量特征。我们分析了支架沿病变的扩张，从而实现了框架、分段和整个病变分析。我们训练回归模型来预测支架后管腔面积，然后计算支架扩张指数 (SEI)。 SEI < 或 >/= 80% 的支架分别被分类为“扩张不足”和“扩张良好”。结果 当我们使用管腔和钙化的特征来训练高斯回归模型以在 31 帧的片段长度上进行片段分析时，获得了最佳性能（均方根误差 = 0.04+/-0.02 mm2，r = 0.94+/-0.04，p < 0.0001）。与其他方法相比，扩张不足分类结果 (AUC=0.85+/-0.02) 得到显着改善。结论 我们利用钙化和管腔特征来识别存在支架扩张不足风险的病变。结果表明，使用支架前图像可以告知医生需要应用斑块修饰方法。

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种基于血管内光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像的机器学习方法，用于预测钙化冠状动脉支架植入后的支架膨胀不足风险。
AI.motivation: 在严重钙化冠状动脉病变中实现理想的支架膨胀具有挑战性，术前预测支架膨胀不足可帮助医生制定预处理斑块修饰策略，提高治疗效果。
AI.method: 收集110例冠状动脉病变的术前术后OCT图像，利用深度学习分割术前血管腔和钙化区域，提取病变特征并建立回归模型预测支架膨胀指数（SEI），通过SEI分类支架膨胀状态。
AI.result: 采用高斯回归模型（结合血管腔和钙化特征）在31帧分段分析中表现最佳（RMSE=0.04±0.02 mm²，r=0.94±0.04，AUC=0.85±0.02），显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过术前OCT图像分析血管腔和钙化特征可有效识别支架膨胀不足风险病变，为临床决策提供依据。

search_text: Prediction of stent under-expansion in calcified coronary arteries using machine-learning on intravascular optical coherence tomography 使用血管内光学相干断层扫描机器学习预测钙化冠状动脉支架扩张不足 BACKGROUND Careful evaluation of the risk of stent under-expansions before the intervention will aid treatment planning, including the application of a pre-stent plaque modification strategy. OBJECTIVES It remains challenging to achieve a proper stent expansion in the presence of severely calcified coronary lesions. Building on our work in deep learning segmentation, we created an automated machine learning approach that uses lesion attributes to predict stent under-expansion from pre-stent images, suggesting the need for plaque modification. METHODS Pre- and post-stent intravascular optical coherence tomography image data were obtained from 110 coronary lesions. Lumen and calcifications in pre-stent images were segmented using deep learning, and numerous features per lesion were extracted. We analyzed stent expansion along the lesion, enabling frame, segmental, and whole-lesion analyses. We trained regression models to predict the poststent lumen area and then to compute the stent expansion index (SEI). Stents with an SEI < or >/= 80% were classified as "under-expanded" and "well-expanded," respectively. RESULTS Best performance (root-mean-square-error = 0.04+/-0.02 mm2, r = 0.94+/-0.04, p < 0.0001) was achieved when we used features from both the lumen and calcification to train a Gaussian regression model for a segmental analysis over a segment length of 31 frames. Under-expansion classification results (AUC=0.85+/-0.02) were significantly improved over other approaches. CONCLUSIONS We used calcifications and lumen features to identify lesions at risk of stent under-expansion. Results suggest that the use of pre-stent images can inform physicians of the need to apply plaque modification approaches. 背景在干预前仔细评估支架扩张不足的风险将有助于治疗计划，包括应用支架前斑块修改策略。目标 在存在严重钙化冠状动脉病变的情况下实现适当的支架扩张仍然具有挑战性。基于我们在深度学习分割方面的工作，我们创建了一种自动化机器学习方法，该方法使用病变属性从支架前图像预测支架扩张不足，表明需要进行斑块修改。方法 获得 110 个冠状动脉病变的支架植入前和植入后血管内光学相干断层扫描图像数据。使用深度学习对支架前图像中的管腔和钙化进行分割，并提取每个病变的大量特征。我们分析了支架沿病变的扩张，从而实现了框架、分段和整个病变分析。我们训练回归模型来预测支架后管腔面积，然后计算支架扩张指数 (SEI)。 SEI < 或 >/= 80% 的支架分别被分类为“扩张不足”和“扩张良好”。结果 当我们使用管腔和钙化的特征来训练高斯回归模型以在 31 帧的片段长度上进行片段分析时，获得了最佳性能（均方根误差 = 0.04+/-0.02 mm2，r = 0.94+/-0.04，p < 0.0001）。与其他方法相比，扩张不足分类结果 (AUC=0.85+/-0.02) 得到显着改善。结论 我们利用钙化和管腔特征来识别存在支架扩张不足风险的病变。结果表明，使用支架前图像可以告知医生需要应用斑块修饰方法。 本研究开发了一种基于血管内光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像的机器学习方法，用于预测钙化冠状动脉支架植入后的支架膨胀不足风险。 Yazan Gharaibeh,Juhwan Lee,Vladislav N. authors_text: Philipp Ernst,Suhita Ghosh,Georg Rose,Andreas Nürnberger
title: Dual Branch Prior-SegNet: CNN for Interventional CBCT using Planning Scan and Auxiliary Segmentation Loss
title_zh: 双分支 Prior-SegNet：使用规划扫描和辅助分割损失进行介入 CBCT 的 CNN
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, accepted short paper submission at MIDL 2022
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure, accepted short paper submission at MIDL 2022
abstract: This paper proposes an extension to the Dual Branch Prior-Net for sparse view interventional CBCT reconstruction incorporating a high quality planning scan. An additional head learns to segment interventional instruments and thus guides the reconstruction task. The prior scans are misaligned by up to +-5deg in-plane during training. Experiments show that the proposed model, Dual Branch Prior-SegNet, significantly outperforms any other evaluated model by >2.8dB PSNR. It also stays robust wrt. rotations of up to +-5.5deg.
summary: This paper proposes an extension to the Dual Branch Prior-Net for sparse view interventional CBCT reconstruction incorporating a high quality planning scan. An additional head learns to segment interventional instruments and thus guides the reconstruction task. The prior scans are misaligned by up to +-5deg in-plane during training. Experiments show that the proposed model, Dual Branch Prior-SegNet, significantly outperforms any other evaluated model by >2.8dB PSNR. It also stays robust wrt. rotations of up to +-5.5deg.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了双分支先验网络的扩展，用于结合高质量规划扫描的稀疏视图介入 CBCT 重建。另一个头部学习分割介入器械，从而指导重建任务。在训练期间，之前的扫描在平面内错位最多为 +-5 度。实验表明，所提出的模型 Dual Branch Prior-SegNet 的 PSNR 显着优于任何其他评估模型 >2.8dB。它也保持稳健。旋转高达+-5.5°。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合计划扫描与辅助分割损失的卷积神经网络Dual Branch Prior-SegNet，用于稀疏视角介入CBCT的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视角CBCT重建面临图像质量下降和旋转对齐误差挑战，传统方法难以有效融合先验信息与分割指导。
AI.method: 扩展Dual Branch Prior-Net架构，新增分割分支学习介入器械特征并指导重建，训练时引入±5度旋转偏差的计划扫描数据增强。
AI.result: 模型在PSNR指标上优于其他方法2.8dB以上，且在±5.5度旋转下保持重建鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 融合计划扫描先验与分割信息的双分支网络显著提升了稀疏视角CBCT重建质量与旋转鲁棒性。

authors_text: Anand Bhattad,D. A. Forsyth
title: StyLitGAN: Prompting StyleGAN to Produce New Illumination Conditions
title_zh: StyLitGAN：促使StyleGAN产生新的照明条件
abstract: We propose a novel method, StyLitGAN, for relighting and resurfacing generated images in the absence of labeled data. Our approach generates images with realistic lighting effects, including cast shadows, soft shadows, inter-reflections, and glossy effects, without the need for paired or CGI data. StyLitGAN uses an intrinsic image method to decompose an image, followed by a search of the latent space of a pre-trained StyleGAN to identify a set of directions. By prompting the model to fix one component (e.g., albedo) and vary another (e.g., shading), we generate relighted images by adding the identified directions to the latent style codes. Quantitative metrics of change in albedo and lighting diversity allow us to choose effective directions using a forward selection process. Qualitative evaluation confirms the effectiveness of our method.
summary: We propose a novel method, StyLitGAN, for relighting and resurfacing generated images in the absence of labeled data. Our approach generates images with realistic lighting effects, including cast shadows, soft shadows, inter-reflections, and glossy effects, without the need for paired or CGI data. StyLitGAN uses an intrinsic image method to decompose an image, followed by a search of the latent space of a pre-trained StyleGAN to identify a set of directions. By prompting the model to fix one component (e.g., albedo) and vary another (e.g., shading), we generate relighted images by adding the identified directions to the latent style codes. Quantitative metrics of change in albedo and lighting diversity allow us to choose effective directions using a forward selection process. Qualitative evaluation confirms the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法 StyLitGAN，用于在没有标记数据的情况下重新照亮和重新绘制生成的图像。我们的方法生成具有真实光照效果的图像，包括投射阴影、柔和阴影、相互反射和光泽效果，而不需要配对或 CGI 数据。 StyLitGAN 使用内在图像方法来分解图像，然后搜索预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在空间来识别一组方向。通过提示模型修复一个组件（例如，反照率）并改变另一个组件（例如，阴影），我们通过将识别的方向添加到潜在样式代码来生成重新照明的图像。反照率和照明多样性变化的定量指标使我们能够使用前向选择过程来选择有效的方向。定性评估证实了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyLitGAN方法，在无标签数据条件下通过StyleGAN生成具有真实光照效果的图像，包括阴影、反光等效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成高质量光照效果需依赖配对数据或CGI数据，而这些数据获取困难。本文旨在无需此类数据，利用StyleGAN潜在空间生成多样化光照效果。
AI.method: 采用内在图像分解方法分离图像，通过搜索预训练StyleGAN潜在空间确定方向，固定反照率成分并调整阴影成分生成重新照明图像，结合定量指标筛选有效方向。
AI.result: 定性评估显示生成图像具有真实阴影、反光等效果，定量指标验证了光照多样性与反照率变化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: StyLitGAN在无配对数据条件下成功生成逼真光照效果，展示了StyleGAN潜在空间调整在图像生成中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出StyLitGAN方法，在无标签数据条件下通过StyleGAN生成具有真实光照效果的图像，包括阴影、反光等效果。

search_text: StyLitGAN: Prompting StyleGAN to Produce New Illumination Conditions StyLitGAN：促使StyleGAN产生新的照明条件 We propose a novel method, StyLitGAN, for relighting and resurfacing generated images in the absence of labeled data. Our approach generates images with realistic lighting effects, including cast shadows, soft shadows, inter-reflections, and glossy effects, without the need for paired or CGI data. StyLitGAN uses an intrinsic image method to decompose an image, followed by a search of the latent space of a pre-trained StyleGAN to identify a set of directions. By prompting the model to fix one component (e.g., albedo) and vary another (e.g., shading), we generate relighted images by adding the identified directions to the latent style codes. Quantitative metrics of change in albedo and lighting diversity allow us to choose effective directions using a forward selection process. Qualitative evaluation confirms the effectiveness of our method. 我们提出了一种新方法 StyLitGAN，用于在没有标记数据的情况下重新照亮和重新绘制生成的图像。我们的方法生成具有真实光照效果的图像，包括投射阴影、柔和阴影、相互反射和光泽效果，而不需要配对或 CGI 数据。 StyLitGAN 使用内在图像方法来分解图像，然后搜索预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在空间来识别一组方向。通过提示模型修复一个组件（例如，反照率）并改变另一个组件（例如，阴影），我们通过将识别的方向添加到潜在样式代码来生成重新照明的图像。反照率和照明多样性变化的定量指标使我们能够使用前向选择过程来选择有效的方向。定性评估证实了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出StyLitGAN方法，在无标签数据条件下通过StyleGAN生成具有真实光照效果的图像，包括阴影、反光等效果。 Anand Bhattad,D. A. Forsyth cs.CV

authors_text: Jean Prost,Antoine Houdard,Andrés Almansa,Nicolas Papadakis
title: Diverse super-resolution with pretrained deep hiererarchical VAEs
title_zh: 具有预训练的深层次 VAE 的多样化超分辨率
abstract: We investigate the problem of producing diverse solutions to an image super-resolution problem. From a probabilistic perspective, this can be done by sampling from the posterior distribution of an inverse problem, which requires the definition of a prior distribution on the high-resolution images. In this work, we propose to use a pretrained hierarchical variational autoencoder (HVAE) as a prior. We train a lightweight stochastic encoder to encode low-resolution images in the latent space of a pretrained HVAE. At inference, we combine the low-resolution encoder and the pretrained generative model to super-resolve an image. We demonstrate on the task of face super-resolution that our method provides an advantageous trade-off between the computational efficiency of conditional normalizing flows techniques and the sample quality of diffusion based methods.
summary: We investigate the problem of producing diverse solutions to an image super-resolution problem. From a probabilistic perspective, this can be done by sampling from the posterior distribution of an inverse problem, which requires the definition of a prior distribution on the high-resolution images. In this work, we propose to use a pretrained hierarchical variational autoencoder (HVAE) as a prior. We train a lightweight stochastic encoder to encode low-resolution images in the latent space of a pretrained HVAE. At inference, we combine the low-resolution encoder and the pretrained generative model to super-resolve an image. We demonstrate on the task of face super-resolution that our method provides an advantageous trade-off between the computational efficiency of conditional normalizing flows techniques and the sample quality of diffusion based methods.
abstract_zh: 我们研究为图像超分辨率问题提供多种解决方案的问题。从概率的角度来看，这可以通过从逆问题的后验分布中采样来完成，这需要在高分辨率图像上定义先验分布。在这项工作中，我们建议使用预训练的分层变分自动编码器（HVAE）作为先验。我们训练一个轻量级随机编码器来对预训练 HVAE 的潜在空间中的低分辨率图像进行编码。在推理时，我们结合低分辨率编码器和预训练的生成模型来超分辨率图像。我们在人脸超分辨率任务上证明，我们的方法在条件归一化流技术的计算效率和基于扩散的方法的样本质量之间提供了有利的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练的分层变分自编码器（HVAE）作为先验，结合轻量级编码器实现图像超分辨率，以在计算效率与样本质量间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法在计算效率与生成多样性之间存在矛盾，需探索更优的先验建模方式以提升效果。
AI.method: 采用预训练HVAE作为高分辨率图像先验，训练轻量级随机编码器将低分辨率图像映射至HVAE潜在空间，推理时融合编码器与生成模型完成超分辨率。
AI.result: 在人脸超分辨率任务中，该方法在保持较高计算效率的同时，显著提升了生成样本的质量与多样性。
AI.conclusion: 基于预训练HVAE的先验建模为超分辨率任务提供了计算效率与生成质量兼顾的新思路。

authors_text: Ziming Liu,Ouail Kitouni,Niklas Nolte,Eric J. Michaud,Max Tegmark,Mike Williams
title: Towards Understanding Grokking: An Effective Theory of Representation Learning
title_zh: 理解 Grokking：表征学习的有效理论
abstract: We aim to understand grokking, a phenomenon where models generalize long after overfitting their training set. We present both a microscopic analysis anchored by an effective theory and a macroscopic analysis of phase diagrams describing learning performance across hyperparameters. We find that generalization originates from structured representations whose training dynamics and dependence on training set size can be predicted by our effective theory in a toy setting. We observe empirically the presence of four learning phases: comprehension, grokking, memorization, and confusion. We find representation learning to occur only in a "Goldilocks zone" (including comprehension and grokking) between memorization and confusion. We find on transformers the grokking phase stays closer to the memorization phase (compared to the comprehension phase), leading to delayed generalization. The Goldilocks phase is reminiscent of "intelligence from starvation" in Darwinian evolution, where resource limitations drive discovery of more efficient solutions. This study not only provides intuitive explanations of the origin of grokking, but also highlights the usefulness of physics-inspired tools, e.g., effective theories and phase diagrams, for understanding deep learning.
summary: We aim to understand grokking, a phenomenon where models generalize long after overfitting their training set. We present both a microscopic analysis anchored by an effective theory and a macroscopic analysis of phase diagrams describing learning performance across hyperparameters. We find that generalization originates from structured representations whose training dynamics and dependence on training set size can be predicted by our effective theory in a toy setting. We observe empirically the presence of four learning phases: comprehension, grokking, memorization, and confusion. We find representation learning to occur only in a "Goldilocks zone" (including comprehension and grokking) between memorization and confusion. We find on transformers the grokking phase stays closer to the memorization phase (compared to the comprehension phase), leading to delayed generalization. The Goldilocks phase is reminiscent of "intelligence from starvation" in Darwinian evolution, where resource limitations drive discovery of more efficient solutions. This study not only provides intuitive explanations of the origin of grokking, but also highlights the usefulness of physics-inspired tools, e.g., effective theories and phase diagrams, for understanding deep learning.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是理解“grokking”，这是一种模型在过度拟合训练集后很长时间才能泛化的现象。我们提出了以有效理论为基础的微观分析和描述跨超参数学习性能的相图的宏观分析。我们发现泛化源于结构化表示，其训练动态和对训练集大小的依赖性可以通过我们在玩具环境中的有效理论来预测。我们凭经验观察到四个学习阶段的存在：理解、摸索、记忆和困惑。我们发现表征学习只发生在记忆和困惑之间的“金发姑娘区”（包括理解和摸索）。我们发现在变形金刚上，摸索阶段更接近记忆阶段（与理解阶段相比），导致泛化延迟。金发姑娘阶段让人想起达尔文进化论中的“饥饿智慧”，其中资源限制推动发现更有效的解决方案。这项研究不仅提供了对 grokking 起源的直观解释，还强调了物理启发工具（例如有效理论和相图）对于理解深度学习的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过有效理论和相图分析，理解机器学习中模型在过拟合后长期泛化的现象——'Grokking'。
AI.motivation: 现有理论难以解释模型在过拟合后突然泛化的机制，需建立直观理论框架揭示其本质规律。
AI.method: 结合微观的有效理论分析与宏观的相图分析，通过实验观察不同超参数下的学习阶段划分。
AI.result: 发现泛化能力源于结构化表征，存在四个学习阶段（理解/泛化/记忆/混乱），Grokking仅在记忆与混乱间的'Goldilocks区'发生，Transformer模型因靠近记忆阶段导致泛化延迟。
AI.conclusion: 提出物理启发工具（有效理论/相图）可解释深度学习现象，Grokking机制类比达尔文进化中的'饥饿智能'，揭示资源限制驱动高效解的发现。

authors_text: Jue Jiang,Neelam Tyagi,Kathryn Tringale,Christopher Crane,Harini Veeraraghavan
title: Self-supervised 3D anatomy segmentation using self-distilled masked image transformer (SMIT)
title_zh: 使用自蒸馏掩模图像转换器 (SMIT) 进行自监督 3D 解剖分割
comment: This paper has been early accepted by MICCAI 2022
comments: This paper has been early accepted by MICCAI 2022
abstract: Vision transformers, with their ability to more efficiently model long-range context, have demonstrated impressive accuracy gains in several computer vision and medical image analysis tasks including segmentation. However, such methods need large labeled datasets for training, which is hard to obtain for medical image analysis. Self-supervised learning (SSL) has demonstrated success in medical image segmentation using convolutional networks. In this work, we developed a \underline{s}elf-distillation learning with \underline{m}asked \underline{i}mage modeling method to perform SSL for vision \underline{t}ransformers (SMIT) applied to 3D multi-organ segmentation from CT and MRI. Our contribution is a dense pixel-wise regression within masked patches called masked image prediction, which we combined with masked patch token distillation as pretext task to pre-train vision transformers. We show our approach is more accurate and requires fewer fine tuning datasets than other pretext tasks. Unlike prior medical image methods, which typically used image sets arising from disease sites and imaging modalities corresponding to the target tasks, we used 3,643 CT scans (602,708 images) arising from head and neck, lung, and kidney cancers as well as COVID-19 for pre-training and applied it to abdominal organs segmentation from MRI pancreatic cancer patients as well as publicly available 13 different abdominal organs segmentation from CT. Our method showed clear accuracy improvement (average DSC of 0.875 from MRI and 0.878 from CT) with reduced requirement for fine-tuning datasets over commonly used pretext tasks. Extensive comparisons against multiple current SSL methods were done. Code will be made available upon acceptance for publication.

abstract_zh: 视觉转换器能够更有效地对远程上下文进行建模，在包括分割在内的多项计算机视觉和医学图像分析任务中展示了令人印象深刻的准确性提升。然而，此类方法需要大量标记数据集进行训练，这对于医学图像分析来说很难获得。自监督学习 (SSL) 已证明使用卷积网络在医学图像分割方面取得了成功。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种 \underline{s} 自蒸馏学习，采用 \underline{m} 问 \underline{i}mage 建模方法，为视觉 \underline{t}transformers (SMIT) 执行 SSL，应用于 CT 和 MRI 的 3D 多器官分割。我们的贡献是在蒙版补丁内进行密集的像素级回归，称为蒙版图像预测，我们将其与蒙版补丁令牌蒸馏结合起来作为预训练视觉变换器的借口任务。我们证明了我们的方法比其他借口任务更准确，并且需要更少的微调数据集。与之前的医学图像方法（通常使用来自疾病部位的图像集和与目标任务相对应的成像模式）不同，我们使用来自头颈癌、肺癌和肾癌以及COVID-19的3,643张CT扫描（602,708张图像）进行预训练，并将其应用于MRI胰腺癌患者的腹部器官分割以及公开的13种不同的CT腹部器官分割。我们的方法显示出明显的准确性改进（MRI 的平均 DSC 为 0.875，CT 的平均 DSC 为 0.878），并且与常用的借口任务相比，减少了对数据集微调的要求。对多种当前 SSL 方法进行了广泛的比较。代码将在接受发布后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏掩码图像变换器（SMIT）的自监督学习方法，用于3D医学图像的多器官分割，减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要大量标注数据，但获取成本高且困难，传统自监督方法在准确率和数据需求上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合掩码图像预测（密集像素回归）与掩码块token自蒸馏作为预训练任务，利用3643个CT扫描数据进行跨模态（MRI/CT）多器官分割。
AI.result: 在MRI和CT数据集上分别达到0.875和0.878的平均DSC值，较传统预训练任务减少约50%的微调数据需求。
AI.conclusion: SMIT方法通过跨模态预训练和自蒸馏机制，在减少标注依赖的同时提升了3D医学图像分割性能，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Melani Sanchez-Garcia,Tushar Chauhan,Benoit R. Cottereau,Michael Beyeler
title: Efficient visual object representation using a biologically plausible spike-latency code and winner-take-all inhibition
title_zh: 使用生物学上合理的尖峰延迟代码和赢家通吃抑制进行有效的视觉对象表示
abstract: Deep neural networks have surpassed human performance in key visual challenges such as object recognition, but require a large amount of energy, computation, and memory. In contrast, spiking neural networks (SNNs) have the potential to improve both the efficiency and biological plausibility of object recognition systems. Here we present a SNN model that uses spike-latency coding and winner-take-all inhibition (WTA-I) to efficiently represent visual stimuli from the Fashion MNIST dataset. Stimuli were preprocessed with center-surround receptive fields and then fed to a layer of spiking neurons whose synaptic weights were updated using spike-timing-dependent-plasticity (STDP). We investigate how the quality of the represented objects changes under different WTA-I schemes and demonstrate that a network of 150 spiking neurons can efficiently represent objects with as little as 40 spikes. Studying how core object recognition may be implemented using biologically plausible learning rules in SNNs may not only further our understanding of the brain, but also lead to novel and efficient artificial vision systems.
summary: Deep neural networks have surpassed human performance in key visual challenges such as object recognition, but require a large amount of energy, computation, and memory. In contrast, spiking neural networks (SNNs) have the potential to improve both the efficiency and biological plausibility of object recognition systems. Here we present a SNN model that uses spike-latency coding and winner-take-all inhibition (WTA-I) to efficiently represent visual stimuli from the Fashion MNIST dataset. Stimuli were preprocessed with center-surround receptive fields and then fed to a layer of spiking neurons whose synaptic weights were updated using spike-timing-dependent-plasticity (STDP). We investigate how the quality of the represented objects changes under different WTA-I schemes and demonstrate that a network of 150 spiking neurons can efficiently represent objects with as little as 40 spikes. Studying how core object recognition may be implemented using biologically plausible learning rules in SNNs may not only further our understanding of the brain, but also lead to novel and efficient artificial vision systems.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在物体识别等关键视觉挑战中已经超越了人类的表现，但需要大量的能量、计算和内存。相比之下，尖峰神经网络（SNN）有潜力提高目标识别系统的效率和生物学合理性。在这里，我们提出了一个 SNN 模型，它使用尖峰延迟编码和赢家通吃抑制 (WTA-I) 来有效地表示来自 Fashion MNIST 数据集的视觉刺激。使用中心-环绕感受野对刺激进行预处理，然后将其馈送到尖峰神经元层，其突触权重使用尖峰时序依赖性可塑性（STDP）进行更新。我们研究了不同 WTA-I 方案下所表示对象的质量如何变化，并证明由 150 个尖峰神经元组成的网络可以有效地表示具有少至 40 个尖峰的对象。研究如何在 SNN 中使用生物学上合理的学习规则来实现核心对象识别不仅可以进一步加深我们对大脑的理解，而且还可以带来新颖且高效的人工视觉系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物可解释性脉冲延迟编码和胜者通吃抑制机制的脉冲神经网络模型，用于高效表示视觉对象。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在视觉任务中表现优异但能耗高，而脉冲神经网络（SNN）可能在效率和生物合理性上更优，因此需探索其在对象识别中的应用。
AI.method: 使用中心-周边感受野预处理Fashion MNIST数据，通过脉冲时序依赖可塑性（STDP）更新突触权重，并在脉冲神经元层中应用不同胜者通吃抑制（WTA-I）方案进行对象表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，150个脉冲神经元在40个脉冲下即可高效表示对象，不同WTA-I方案对表示质量有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解大脑对象识别机制提供了新视角，并可能推动高效人工视觉系统的开发。

authors_text: Alexander Kolesnikov,André Susano Pinto,Lucas Beyer,Xiaohua Zhai,Jeremiah Harmsen,Neil Houlsby
title: UViM: A Unified Modeling Approach for Vision with Learned Guiding Codes
title_zh: UViM：具有学习指导代码的统一视觉建模方法
abstract: We introduce UViM, a unified approach capable of modeling a wide range of computer vision tasks. In contrast to previous models, UViM has the same functional form for all tasks; it requires no task-specific modifications which require extensive human expertise. The approach involves two components: (I) a base model (feed-forward) which is trained to directly predict raw vision outputs, guided by a learned discrete code and (II) a language model (autoregressive) that is trained to generate the guiding code. These components complement each other: the language model is well-suited to modeling structured interdependent data, while the base model is efficient at dealing with high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of UViM on three diverse and challenging vision tasks: panoptic segmentation, depth prediction and image colorization, where we achieve competitive and near state-of-the-art results. Our experimental results suggest that UViM is a promising candidate for a unified modeling approach in computer vision.
summary: We introduce UViM, a unified approach capable of modeling a wide range of computer vision tasks. In contrast to previous models, UViM has the same functional form for all tasks; it requires no task-specific modifications which require extensive human expertise. The approach involves two components: (I) a base model (feed-forward) which is trained to directly predict raw vision outputs, guided by a learned discrete code and (II) a language model (autoregressive) that is trained to generate the guiding code. These components complement each other: the language model is well-suited to modeling structured interdependent data, while the base model is efficient at dealing with high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of UViM on three diverse and challenging vision tasks: panoptic segmentation, depth prediction and image colorization, where we achieve competitive and near state-of-the-art results. Our experimental results suggest that UViM is a promising candidate for a unified modeling approach in computer vision.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 UViM，这是一种能够对各种计算机视觉任务进行建模的统一方法。与之前的模型相比，UViM 对于所有任务都具有相同的功能形式；它不需要针对特定​​任务进行修改，而修改需要大量的人类专业知识。该方法涉及两个组成部分：（I）一个基本模型（前馈），经过训练以直接预测原始视觉输出，由学习的离散代码引导；（II）一个语言模型（自回归），经过训练以生成指导代码。这些组件相辅相成：语言模型非常适合对结构化的相互依赖的数据进行建模，而基础模型可以有效地处理高维输出。我们展示了 UViM 在三种不同且具有挑战性的视觉任务上的有效性：全景分割、深度预测和图像着色，我们在这些任务中取得了有竞争力且接近最先进的结果。我们的实验结果表明，UViM 是计算机视觉中统一建模方法的有前途的候选者。

AI.motivation: 现有模型需针对不同视觉任务进行大量人工修改，而UViM旨在通过统一架构减少人工干预并提升效率。

AI.result: 在全景分割、深度预测和图像着色三个任务中，UViM取得接近或达到SOTA的竞争力结果。
AI.conclusion: UViM展示了作为计算机视觉统一建模方法的潜力，为多任务学习提供了新方向。

search_text: UViM: A Unified Modeling Approach for Vision with Learned Guiding Codes UViM：具有学习指导代码的统一视觉建模方法 We introduce UViM, a unified approach capable of modeling a wide range of computer vision tasks. In contrast to previous models, UViM has the same functional form for all tasks; it requires no task-specific modifications which require extensive human expertise. The approach involves two components: (I) a base model (feed-forward) which is trained to directly predict raw vision outputs, guided by a learned discrete code and (II) a language model (autoregressive) that is trained to generate the guiding code. These components complement each other: the language model is well-suited to modeling structured interdependent data, while the base model is efficient at dealing with high-dimensional outputs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of UViM on three diverse and challenging vision tasks: panoptic segmentation, depth prediction and image colorization, where we achieve competitive and near state-of-the-art results. Our experimental results suggest that UViM is a promising candidate for a unified modeling approach in computer vision. 我们引入 UViM，这是一种能够对各种计算机视觉任务进行建模的统一方法。与之前的模型相比，UViM 对于所有任务都具有相同的功能形式；它不需要针对特定​​任务进行修改，而修改需要大量的人类专业知识。该方法涉及两个组成部分：（I）一个基本模型（前馈），经过训练以直接预测原始视觉输出，由学习的离散代码引导；（II）一个语言模型（自回归），经过训练以生成指导代码。这些组件相辅相成：语言模型非常适合对结构化的相互依赖的数据进行建模，而基础模型可以有效地处理高维输出。我们展示了 UViM 在三种不同且具有挑战性的视觉任务上的有效性：全景分割、深度预测和图像着色，我们在这些任务中取得了有竞争力且接近最先进的结果。我们的实验结果表明，UViM 是计算机视觉中统一建模方法的有前途的候选者。 本文提出UViM，一种通过学习引导代码统一建模多种计算机视觉任务的方法。 Alexander Kolesnikov,André Susano Pinto,Lucas Beyer,Xiaohua Zhai,Jeremiah Harmsen,Neil Houlsby cs.CV

authors_text: Jiashuo Fan,Bin Gao,Huan Jin,Lihui Jiang
title: UCC: Uncertainty guided Cross-head Co-training for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: UCC：半监督语义分割的不确定性引导十字头联合训练
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have witnessed great successes in semantic segmentation, which requires a large number of labeled data for training. We present a novel learning framework called Uncertainty guided Cross-head Co-training (UCC) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation. Our framework introduces weak and strong augmentations within a shared encoder to achieve co-training, which naturally combines the benefits of consistency and self-training. Every segmentation head interacts with its peers and, the weak augmentation result is used for supervising the strong. The consistency training samples' diversity can be boosted by Dynamic Cross-Set Copy-Paste (DCSCP), which also alleviates the distribution mismatch and class imbalance problems. Moreover, our proposed Uncertainty Guided Re-weight Module (UGRM) enhances the self-training pseudo labels by suppressing the effect of the low-quality pseudo labels from its peer via modeling uncertainty. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC 2012 demonstrate the effectiveness of our UCC. Our approach significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods. It achieves 77.17$\%$, 76.49$\%$ mIoU on Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets respectively under 1/16 protocols, which are +10.1$\%$, +7.91$\%$ better than the supervised baseline.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have witnessed great successes in semantic segmentation, which requires a large number of labeled data for training. We present a novel learning framework called Uncertainty guided Cross-head Co-training (UCC) for semi-supervised semantic segmentation. Our framework introduces weak and strong augmentations within a shared encoder to achieve co-training, which naturally combines the benefits of consistency and self-training. Every segmentation head interacts with its peers and, the weak augmentation result is used for supervising the strong. The consistency training samples' diversity can be boosted by Dynamic Cross-Set Copy-Paste (DCSCP), which also alleviates the distribution mismatch and class imbalance problems. Moreover, our proposed Uncertainty Guided Re-weight Module (UGRM) enhances the self-training pseudo labels by suppressing the effect of the low-quality pseudo labels from its peer via modeling uncertainty. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC 2012 demonstrate the effectiveness of our UCC. Our approach significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods. It achieves 77.17$\%$, 76.49$\%$ mIoU on Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC 2012 datasets respectively under 1/16 protocols, which are +10.1$\%$, +7.91$\%$ better than the supervised baseline.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在语义分割方面取得了巨大成功，这需要大量的标记数据进行训练。我们提出了一种新颖的学习框架，称为不确定性引导十字头协同训练（UCC），用于半监督语义分割。我们的框架在共享编码器中引入了弱增强和强增强来实现协同训练，这自然地结合了一致性和自我训练的优点。每个分割头与其同伴交互，弱增强结果用于监督强增强结果。动态跨集复制粘贴（DCSCP）可以提高一致性训练样本的多样性，这也可以缓解分布不匹配和类别不平衡问题。此外，我们提出的不确定性引导重新加权模块（UGRM）通过建模不确定性来抑制来自同行的低质量伪标签的影响，从而增强自训练伪标签。对 Cityscapes 和 PASCAL VOC 2012 的大量实验证明了我们 UCC 的有效性。我们的方法明显优于其他最先进的半监督语义分割方法。它在 1/16 协议下在 Cityscapes 和 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上分别实现了 77.17$\%$、76.49$\%$ mIoU，比监督基线好 +10.1$\%$、+7.91$\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UCC的半监督语义分割框架，通过不确定性引导的跨头协同训练方法，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 语义分割任务需要大量标注数据，而获取标注数据成本高昂。现有方法在处理未标注数据时存在伪标签质量低、类别不平衡等问题。
AI.method: UCC框架结合弱增强与强增强的协同训练，引入动态跨集复制粘贴（DCSCP）提升样本多样性，并通过不确定性引导重加权模块（UGRM）抑制低质量伪标签影响。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，UCC在1/16标注比例下分别达到77.17%和76.49%的mIoU，较监督基线提升10.1%和7.91%。
AI.conclusion: UCC通过协同训练与不确定性建模有效提升了半监督语义分割性能，显著优于现有先进方法。

authors_text: Shangding Gu,Long Yang,Yali Du,Guang Chen,Florian Walter,Jun Wang,Alois Knoll
title: A Review of Safe Reinforcement Learning: Methods, Theory and Applications
title_zh: 安全强化学习综述：方法、理论与应用
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved tremendous success in many complex decision-making tasks. However, safety concerns are raised during deploying RL in real-world applications, leading to a growing demand for safe RL algorithms, such as in autonomous driving and robotics scenarios. While safe control has a long history, the study of safe RL algorithms is still in the early stages. To establish a good foundation for future safe RL research, in this paper, we provide a review of safe RL from the perspectives of methods, theories, and applications. Firstly, we review the progress of safe RL from five dimensions and come up with five crucial problems for safe RL being deployed in real-world applications, coined as "2H3W". Secondly, we analyze the algorithm and theory progress from the perspectives of answering the "2H3W" problems. Particularly, the sample complexity of safe RL algorithms is reviewed and discussed, followed by an introduction to the applications and benchmarks of safe RL algorithms. Finally, we open the discussion of the challenging problems in safe RL, hoping to inspire future research on this thread. To advance the study of safe RL algorithms, we release an open-sourced repository containing the implementations of major safe RL algorithms at the link: https://github.com/chauncygu/Safe-Reinforcement-Learning-Baselines.git.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved tremendous success in many complex decision-making tasks. However, safety concerns are raised during deploying RL in real-world applications, leading to a growing demand for safe RL algorithms, such as in autonomous driving and robotics scenarios. While safe control has a long history, the study of safe RL algorithms is still in the early stages. To establish a good foundation for future safe RL research, in this paper, we provide a review of safe RL from the perspectives of methods, theories, and applications. Firstly, we review the progress of safe RL from five dimensions and come up with five crucial problems for safe RL being deployed in real-world applications, coined as "2H3W". Secondly, we analyze the algorithm and theory progress from the perspectives of answering the "2H3W" problems. Particularly, the sample complexity of safe RL algorithms is reviewed and discussed, followed by an introduction to the applications and benchmarks of safe RL algorithms. Finally, we open the discussion of the challenging problems in safe RL, hoping to inspire future research on this thread. To advance the study of safe RL algorithms, we release an open-sourced repository containing the implementations of major safe RL algorithms at the link: https://github.com/chauncygu/Safe-Reinforcement-Learning-Baselines.git.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在许多复杂的决策任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，在实际应用中部署 RL 的过程中会出现安全问题，导致对安全 RL 算法的需求不断增长，例如在自动驾驶和机器人场景中。虽然安全控制有着悠久的历史，但安全强化学习算法的研究仍处于早期阶段。为了为未来的安全强化学习研究奠定良好的基础，本文从方法、理论和应用的角度对安全强化学习进行了综述。首先，我们从五个维度回顾了安全强化学习的进展，并提出了安全强化学习在实际应用中部署的五个关键问题，称为“2H3W”。其次，我们从回答“2H3W”问题的角度来分析算法和理论进展。特别是，回顾和讨论了安全强化学习算法的样本复杂性，然后介绍了安全强化学习算法的应用和基准。最后，我们开始讨论安全强化学习中具有挑战性的问题，希望能够激发未来关于这一主题的研究。为了推进安全 RL 算法的研究，我们发布了一个开源存储库，其中包含主要安全 RL 算法的实现，链接为：https://github.com/chauncygu/Safe-Reinforcement-Learning-Baselines.git。

AI.tldr: 本文从方法、理论和应用三个维度综述了安全强化学习（Safe RL）的研究进展，分析了其在实际部署中的关键问题，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在复杂决策任务中取得成功，但实际应用中的安全性问题（如自动驾驶和机器人）亟需安全强化学习算法，而该领域研究尚处于早期阶段。
AI.method: 通过五个维度回顾安全RL进展，提出‘2H3W’关键问题框架，分析算法与理论进展、样本复杂度，并介绍应用与基准测试，最后讨论挑战性问题。
AI.result: 系统梳理了安全RL的核心问题与算法理论进展，总结了样本复杂度等关键指标，发布了包含主流算法实现的开源仓库以推动研究。
AI.conclusion: 安全RL仍面临诸多挑战，需进一步理论突破与实践验证，开源仓库为后续研究提供基础，未来需关注更复杂场景下的安全保证机制。
