search_text: A Review of Safe Reinforcement Learning: Methods, Theory and Applications 安全强化学习综述：方法、理论与应用 Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved tremendous success in many complex decision-making tasks. However, safety concerns are raised during deploying RL in real-world applications, leading to a growing demand for safe RL algorithms, such as in autonomous driving and robotics scenarios. While safe control has a long history, the study of safe RL algorithms is still in the early stages. To establish a good foundation for future safe RL research, in this paper, we provide a review of safe RL from the perspectives of methods, theories, and applications. Firstly, we review the progress of safe RL from five dimensions and come up with five crucial problems for safe RL being deployed in real-world applications, coined as "2H3W". Secondly, we analyze the algorithm and theory progress from the perspectives of answering the "2H3W" problems. Particularly, the sample complexity of safe RL algorithms is reviewed and discussed, followed by an introduction to the applications and benchmarks of safe RL algorithms. Finally, we open the discussion of the challenging problems in safe RL, hoping to inspire future research on this thread. To advance the study of safe RL algorithms, we release an open-sourced repository containing the implementations of major safe RL algorithms at the link: https://github.com/chauncygu/Safe-Reinforcement-Learning-Baselines.git. 强化学习（RL）在许多复杂的决策任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，在实际应用中部署 RL 的过程中会出现安全问题，导致对安全 RL 算法的需求不断增长，例如在自动驾驶和机器人场景中。虽然安全控制有着悠久的历史，但安全强化学习算法的研究仍处于早期阶段。为了为未来的安全强化学习研究奠定良好的基础，本文从方法、理论和应用的角度对安全强化学习进行了综述。首先，我们从五个维度回顾了安全强化学习的进展，并提出了安全强化学习在实际应用中部署的五个关键问题，称为“2H3W”。其次，我们从回答“2H3W”问题的角度来分析算法和理论进展。特别是，回顾和讨论了安全强化学习算法的样本复杂性，然后介绍了安全强化学习算法的应用和基准。最后，我们开始讨论安全强化学习中具有挑战性的问题，希望能够激发未来关于这一主题的研究。为了推进安全 RL 算法的研究，我们发布了一个开源存储库，其中包含主要安全 RL 算法的实现，链接为：https://github.com/chauncygu/Safe-Reinforcement-Learning-Baselines.git。 本文从方法、理论和应用三个维度综述了安全强化学习（Safe RL）的研究进展，分析了其在实际部署中的关键问题，并提出了未来研究方向。 Shangding Gu,Long Yang,Yali Du,Guang Chen,Florian Walter,Jun Wang,Alois Knoll cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cristian J. Vaca-Rubio,Dariush Salami,Petar Popovski,Elisabeth de Carvalho,Zheng-Hua Tan,Stephan Sigg
title: User Localization using RF Sensing: A Performance comparison between LIS and mmWave Radars
title_zh: 使用射频传感进行用户定位：LIS 和毫米波雷达之间的性能比较
abstract: Since electromagnetic signals are omnipresent, Radio Frequency (RF)-sensing has the potential to become a universal sensing mechanism with applications in localization, smart-home, retail, gesture recognition, intrusion detection, etc. Two emerging technologies in RF-sensing, namely sensing through Large Intelligent Surfaces (LISs) and mmWave Frequency-Modulated Continuous-Wave (FMCW) radars, have been successfully applied to a wide range of applications. In this work, we compare LIS and mmWave radars for localization in real-world and simulated environments. In our experiments, the mmWave radar achieves 0.71 Intersection Over Union (IOU) and 3cm error for bounding boxes, while LIS has 0.56 IOU and 10cm distance error. Although the radar outperforms the LIS in terms of accuracy, LIS features additional applications in communication in addition to sensing scenarios.
summary: Since electromagnetic signals are omnipresent, Radio Frequency (RF)-sensing has the potential to become a universal sensing mechanism with applications in localization, smart-home, retail, gesture recognition, intrusion detection, etc. Two emerging technologies in RF-sensing, namely sensing through Large Intelligent Surfaces (LISs) and mmWave Frequency-Modulated Continuous-Wave (FMCW) radars, have been successfully applied to a wide range of applications. In this work, we compare LIS and mmWave radars for localization in real-world and simulated environments. In our experiments, the mmWave radar achieves 0.71 Intersection Over Union (IOU) and 3cm error for bounding boxes, while LIS has 0.56 IOU and 10cm distance error. Although the radar outperforms the LIS in terms of accuracy, LIS features additional applications in communication in addition to sensing scenarios.
abstract_zh: 由于电磁信号无处不在，射频（RF）传感有潜力成为一种通用传感机制，可应用于定位、智能家居、零售、手势识别、入侵检测等领域。射频传感领域的两种新兴技术，即通过大型智能表面（LIS）和毫米波调频连续波（FMCW）雷达进行传感，已成功应用于广泛的应用。在这项工作中，我们比较了 LIS 和毫米波雷达在现实世界和模拟环境中的定位。在我们的实验中，毫米波雷达实现了 0.71 的 IOU 和边界框的 3 厘米误差，而 LIS 的 IOU 为 0.56 和 10 厘米的距离误差。尽管雷达在精度方面优于 LIS，但 LIS 除了传感场景外，还具有通信方面的其他应用。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了LIS和毫米波雷达在用户定位任务中的性能表现。
AI.motivation: RF传感技术具有广泛应用前景，但LIS与毫米波雷达等新兴技术的定位性能尚需系统对比验证。
AI.method: 通过真实环境与模拟实验，使用IOU指标和定位误差对两种技术进行量化评估。
AI.result: 毫米波雷达在边界框IOU(0.71)和定位误差(3cm)上优于LIS(0.56 IOU/10cm误差)
AI.conclusion: 毫米波雷达定位精度更优，但LIS兼具通信功能可能在特定场景更具优势。

authors_text: Artem Kaznatcheev,Konrad Paul Kording
title: Nothing makes sense in deep learning, except in the light of evolution
title_zh: 除了进化论之外，深度学习没有任何意义
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is a surprisingly successful branch of machine learning. The success of DL is usually explained by focusing analysis on a particular recent algorithm and its traits. Instead, we propose that an explanation of the success of DL must look at the population of all algorithms in the field and how they have evolved over time. We argue that cultural evolution is a useful framework to explain the success of DL. In analogy to biology, we use `development' to mean the process converting the pseudocode or text description of an algorithm into a fully trained model. This includes writing the programming code, compiling and running the program, and training the model. If all parts of the process don't align well then the resultant model will be useless (if the code runs at all!). This is a constraint. A core component of evolutionary developmental biology is the concept of deconstraints -- these are modification to the developmental process that avoid complete failure by automatically accommodating changes in other components. We suggest that many important innovations in DL, from neural networks themselves to hyperparameter optimization and AutoGrad, can be seen as developmental deconstraints. These deconstraints can be very helpful to both the particular algorithm in how it handles challenges in implementation and the overall field of DL in how easy it is for new ideas to be generated. We highlight how our perspective can both advance DL and lead to new insights for evolutionary biology.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) is a surprisingly successful branch of machine learning. The success of DL is usually explained by focusing analysis on a particular recent algorithm and its traits. Instead, we propose that an explanation of the success of DL must look at the population of all algorithms in the field and how they have evolved over time. We argue that cultural evolution is a useful framework to explain the success of DL. In analogy to biology, we use `development' to mean the process converting the pseudocode or text description of an algorithm into a fully trained model. This includes writing the programming code, compiling and running the program, and training the model. If all parts of the process don't align well then the resultant model will be useless (if the code runs at all!). This is a constraint. A core component of evolutionary developmental biology is the concept of deconstraints -- these are modification to the developmental process that avoid complete failure by automatically accommodating changes in other components. We suggest that many important innovations in DL, from neural networks themselves to hyperparameter optimization and AutoGrad, can be seen as developmental deconstraints. These deconstraints can be very helpful to both the particular algorithm in how it handles challenges in implementation and the overall field of DL in how easy it is for new ideas to be generated. We highlight how our perspective can both advance DL and lead to new insights for evolutionary biology.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）是机器学习的一个非常成功的分支。深度学习的成功通常是通过集中分析最近的特定算法及其特征来解释的。相反，我们建议对深度学习成功的解释必须着眼于该领域所有算法的总体以及它们如何随着时间的推移而演变。我们认为文化进化是解释深度学习成功的有用框架。与生物学类似，我们使用“开发”来表示将算法的伪代码或文本描述转换为经过充分训练的模型的过程。这包括编写编程代码、编译和运行程序以及训练模型。如果流程的所有部分都不能很好地协调，那么生成的模型将毫无用处（如果代码完全运行的话！）。这是一个限制。进化发育生物学的核心组成部分是解约束的概念——这些是对发育过程的修改，通过自动适应其他组件的变化来避免完全失败。我们认为深度学习领域的许多重要创新，从神经网络本身到超参数优化和 AutoGrad，都可以被视为发展的去约束。这些去约束对于特定算法如何处理实现中的挑战以及整个深度学习领域如何容易产生新想法都非常有帮助。我们强调我们的观点如何既能推进深度学习，又能为进化生物学带来新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文化进化框架解释深度学习的成功，提出算法群体的演变和去约束机制是关键因素。
AI.motivation: 传统解释聚焦单一算法，忽视深度学习领域整体演变过程，需从文化进化角度提供更全面的解释。
AI.method: 类比生物进化发育理论，将深度学习开发过程分为'发育'阶段，分析去约束机制如何促进算法创新与实施。
AI.result: 发现神经网络、超参数优化等创新属于去约束，降低了实现难度并加速领域发展，为进化生物学提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科视角可推动深度学习进步，并促进进化生物学研究，强调去约束机制在技术与生物进化中的共性价值。

We highlight how our perspective can both advance DL and lead to new insights for evolutionary biology. 深度学习（DL）是机器学习的一个非常成功的分支。深度学习的成功通常是通过集中分析最近的特定算法及其特征来解释的。相反，我们建议对深度学习成功的解释必须着眼于该领域所有算法的总体以及它们如何随着时间的推移而演变。我们认为文化进化是解释深度学习成功的有用框架。与生物学类似，我们使用“开发”来表示将算法的伪代码或文本描述转换为经过充分训练的模型的过程。这包括编写编程代码、编译和运行程序以及训练模型。如果流程的所有部分都不能很好地协调，那么生成的模型将毫无用处（如果代码完全运行的话！）。这是一个限制。进化发育生物学的核心组成部分是解约束的概念——这些是对发育过程的修改，通过自动适应其他组件的变化来避免完全失败。我们认为深度学习领域的许多重要创新，从神经网络本身到超参数优化和 AutoGrad，都可以被视为发展的去约束。这些去约束对于特定算法如何处理实现中的挑战以及整个深度学习领域如何容易产生新想法都非常有帮助。我们强调我们的观点如何既能推进深度学习，又能为进化生物学带来新的见解。 本文通过文化进化框架解释深度学习的成功，提出算法群体的演变和去约束机制是关键因素。 Artem Kaznatcheev,Konrad Paul Kording cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,q-bio.PE

authors_text: Jorge Ramírez-Ruiz,Dmytro Grytskyy,Chiara Mastrogiuseppe,Yamen Habib,Rubén Moreno-Bote
title: Complex behavior from intrinsic motivation to occupy action-state path space
title_zh: 从内在动机到占据动作状态路径空间的复杂行为
comment: Extended results, main ones: high dimensional, continuous control, experiment from Gymnasium; and detailed comparison with Empowerment and Free Energy Principle. Updated all main figures
comments: Extended results, main ones: high dimensional, continuous control, experiment from Gymnasium; and detailed comparison with Empowerment and Free Energy Principle. Updated all main figures
abstract: Most theories of behavior posit that agents tend to maximize some form of reward or utility. However, animals very often move with curiosity and seem to be motivated in a reward-free manner. Here we abandon the idea of reward maximization, and propose that the goal of behavior is maximizing occupancy of future paths of actions and states. According to this maximum occupancy principle, rewards are the means to occupy path space, not the goal per se; goal-directedness simply emerges as rational ways of searching for resources so that movement, understood amply, never ends. We find that action-state path entropy is the only measure consistent with additivity and other intuitive properties of expected future action-state path occupancy. We provide analytical expressions that relate the optimal policy and state-value function, and prove convergence of our value iteration algorithm. Using discrete and continuous state tasks, including a high--dimensional controller, we show that complex behaviors such as `dancing', hide-and-seek and a basic form of altruistic behavior naturally result from the intrinsic motivation to occupy path space. All in all, we present a theory of behavior that generates both variability and goal-directedness in the absence of reward maximization.
summary: Most theories of behavior posit that agents tend to maximize some form of reward or utility. However, animals very often move with curiosity and seem to be motivated in a reward-free manner. Here we abandon the idea of reward maximization, and propose that the goal of behavior is maximizing occupancy of future paths of actions and states. According to this maximum occupancy principle, rewards are the means to occupy path space, not the goal per se; goal-directedness simply emerges as rational ways of searching for resources so that movement, understood amply, never ends. We find that action-state path entropy is the only measure consistent with additivity and other intuitive properties of expected future action-state path occupancy. We provide analytical expressions that relate the optimal policy and state-value function, and prove convergence of our value iteration algorithm. Using discrete and continuous state tasks, including a high--dimensional controller, we show that complex behaviors such as `dancing', hide-and-seek and a basic form of altruistic behavior naturally result from the intrinsic motivation to occupy path space. All in all, we present a theory of behavior that generates both variability and goal-directedness in the absence of reward maximization.
abstract_zh: 大多数行为理论都认为，主体倾向于最大化某种形式的奖励或效用。然而，动物经常带着好奇心而行动，并且似乎是以一种无奖励的方式被激励的。在这里，我们放弃奖励最大化的想法，并提出行为的目标是最大化对未来行动和状态路径的占用。根据最大占用原则，奖励是占用路径空间的手段，而不是目标本身；目标导向只是作为寻找资源的理性方式而出现，因此，充分理解后，运动永无止境。我们发现动作状态路径熵是与可加性和预期未来动作状态路径占用的其他直观属性一致的唯一度量。我们提供了将最优策略和状态值函数联系起来的分析表达式，并证明了我们的值迭代算法的收敛性。使用离散和连续状态任务，包括高维控制器，我们证明了诸如“跳舞”、捉迷藏和基本形式的利他行为等复杂行为自然是由占据路径空间的内在动机产生的。总而言之，我们提出了一种在没有奖励最大化的情况下产生可变性和目标导向性的行为理论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需最大化奖励的行为理论，主张通过最大化未来动作-状态路径的占用率来解释复杂行为。
AI.motivation: 传统行为理论认为代理需最大化奖励，但动物常表现出无奖励驱动的好奇行为，因此需探索无需奖励机制的行为解释。
AI.method: 引入动作-状态路径熵作为衡量指标，推导最优策略与状态价值函数关系，并通过离散/连续状态任务验证算法收敛性。
AI.result: 实验显示，基于路径占用率的内在动机可自然产生舞蹈、捉迷藏及利他行为等复杂行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 该理论在无奖励最大化前提下，成功解释了行为的多样性和目标导向性，为理解内在动机驱动的行为提供了新框架。

authors_text: Yunjun Gao,Xiaoze Liu,Junyang Wu,Tianyi Li,Pengfei Wang,Lu Chen
title: ClusterEA: Scalable Entity Alignment with Stochastic Training and Normalized Mini-batch Similarities
title_zh: ClusterEA：具有随机训练和归一化小批量相似性的可扩展实体对齐
abstract: Entity alignment (EA) aims at finding equivalent entities in different knowledge graphs (KGs). Embedding-based approaches have dominated the EA task in recent years. Those methods face problems that come from the geometric properties of embedding vectors, including hubness and isolation. To solve these geometric problems, many normalization approaches have been adopted for EA. However, the increasing scale of KGs renders it hard for EA models to adopt the normalization processes, thus limiting their usage in real-world applications. To tackle this challenge, we present ClusterEA, a general framework that is capable of scaling up EA models and enhancing their results by leveraging normalization methods on mini-batches with a high entity equivalent rate. ClusterEA contains three components to align entities between large-scale KGs, including stochastic training, ClusterSampler, and SparseFusion. It first trains a large-scale Siamese GNN for EA in a stochastic fashion to produce entity embeddings. Based on the embeddings, a novel ClusterSampler strategy is proposed for sampling highly overlapped mini-batches. Finally, ClusterEA incorporates SparseFusion, which normalizes local and global similarity and then fuses all similarity matrices to obtain the final similarity matrix. Extensive experiments with real-life datasets on EA benchmarks offer insight into the proposed framework, and suggest that it is capable of outperforming the state-of-the-art scalable EA framework by up to 8 times in terms of Hits@1.
summary: Entity alignment (EA) aims at finding equivalent entities in different knowledge graphs (KGs). Embedding-based approaches have dominated the EA task in recent years. Those methods face problems that come from the geometric properties of embedding vectors, including hubness and isolation. To solve these geometric problems, many normalization approaches have been adopted for EA. However, the increasing scale of KGs renders it hard for EA models to adopt the normalization processes, thus limiting their usage in real-world applications. To tackle this challenge, we present ClusterEA, a general framework that is capable of scaling up EA models and enhancing their results by leveraging normalization methods on mini-batches with a high entity equivalent rate. ClusterEA contains three components to align entities between large-scale KGs, including stochastic training, ClusterSampler, and SparseFusion. It first trains a large-scale Siamese GNN for EA in a stochastic fashion to produce entity embeddings. Based on the embeddings, a novel ClusterSampler strategy is proposed for sampling highly overlapped mini-batches. Finally, ClusterEA incorporates SparseFusion, which normalizes local and global similarity and then fuses all similarity matrices to obtain the final similarity matrix. Extensive experiments with real-life datasets on EA benchmarks offer insight into the proposed framework, and suggest that it is capable of outperforming the state-of-the-art scalable EA framework by up to 8 times in terms of Hits@1.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐（EA）旨在寻找不同知识图（KG）中的等效实体。近年来，基于嵌入的方法在 EA 任务中占据主导地位。这些方法面临着来自嵌入向量的几何特性的问题，包括中心性和隔离性。为了解决这些几何问题，EA 采用了许多标准化方法。然而，知识图谱规模的不断扩大使得 EA 模型很难采用规范化过程，从而限制了它们在实际应用中的使用。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 ClusterEA，这是一个通用框架，能够扩展 EA 模型并通过利用具有高实体等效率的小批量标准化方法来增强其结果。 ClusterEA 包含三个用于在大规模 KG 之间对齐实体的组件，包括随机训练、ClusterSampler 和 SparseFusion。它首先以随机方式为 EA 训练一个大规模 Siamese GNN，以生成实体嵌入。基于嵌入，提出了一种新颖的 ClusterSampler 策略，用于对高度重叠的小批量进行采样。最后，ClusterEA 结合了 SparseFusion，对局部和全局相似度进行归一化，然后融合所有相似度矩阵以获得最终的相似度矩阵。在 EA 基准上对真实数据集进行的广泛实验提供了对所提出框架的深入了解，并表明它的 Hits@1 性能比最先进的可扩展 EA 框架高出 8 倍。

AI.tldr: 提出ClusterEA框架，通过随机训练和归一化小批量相似度解决大规模知识图谱中的实体对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入方法存在几何性质问题（如hubness和孤立点），而归一化方法难以适应大规模知识图谱，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: ClusterEA包含三个组件：1) 随机训练生成实体嵌入；2) ClusterSampler采样高重叠小批量；3) SparseFusion归一化并融合局部/全局相似度矩阵。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，ClusterEA在Hits@1指标上优于现有最佳框架最高达8倍。
AI.conclusion: ClusterEA通过可扩展框架有效解决了大规模实体对齐的几何问题，在多个基准测试中表现优异。

authors_text: Makis Arsenis,Robert Kleinberg
title: Individual Fairness in Prophet Inequalities
title_zh: 先知不平等中的个人公平
comment: 25 pages, 1 figure, to appear as extended abstract in the proceedings of Economics and Computation (EC) '22
comments: 25 pages, 1 figure, to appear as extended abstract in the proceedings of Economics and Computation (EC) '22
abstract: Prophet inequalities are performance guarantees for online algorithms (a.k.a. stopping rules) solving the following "hiring problem": a decision maker sequentially inspects candidates whose values are independent random numbers and is asked to hire at most one candidate by selecting it before inspecting the values of future candidates in the sequence. A classic result in optimal stopping theory asserts that there exist stopping rules guaranteeing that the decision maker will hire a candidate whose expected value is at least half as good as the expected value of the candidate hired by a "prophet", i.e. one who has simultaneous access to the realizations of all candidates' values. Such stopping rules have provably good performance but might treat individual candidates unfairly in a number of different ways. In this work we identify two types of individual fairness that might be desirable in optimal stopping problems. We call them identity-independent fairness (IIF) and time-independent fairness (TIF) and give precise definitions in the context of the hiring problem. We give polynomial-time algorithms for finding the optimal IIF/TIF stopping rules for a given instance with discrete support and we manage to recover a prophet inequality with factor $1/2$ when the decision maker's stopping rule is required to satisfy both fairness properties while the prophet is unconstrained. We also explore worst-case ratios between optimal selection rules in the presence vs. absence of individual fairness constraints, in both the online and offline settings. Finally, we consider a framework in which the decision maker doesn't know the distributions of candidates' values but has access to independent samples from each distribution. We provide constant-competitive IIF/TIF algorithms using one sample per distribution in the offline setting and two samples per distribution in the online setting.
summary: Prophet inequalities are performance guarantees for online algorithms (a.k.a. stopping rules) solving the following "hiring problem": a decision maker sequentially inspects candidates whose values are independent random numbers and is asked to hire at most one candidate by selecting it before inspecting the values of future candidates in the sequence. A classic result in optimal stopping theory asserts that there exist stopping rules guaranteeing that the decision maker will hire a candidate whose expected value is at least half as good as the expected value of the candidate hired by a "prophet", i.e. one who has simultaneous access to the realizations of all candidates' values. Such stopping rules have provably good performance but might treat individual candidates unfairly in a number of different ways. In this work we identify two types of individual fairness that might be desirable in optimal stopping problems. We call them identity-independent fairness (IIF) and time-independent fairness (TIF) and give precise definitions in the context of the hiring problem. We give polynomial-time algorithms for finding the optimal IIF/TIF stopping rules for a given instance with discrete support and we manage to recover a prophet inequality with factor $1/2$ when the decision maker's stopping rule is required to satisfy both fairness properties while the prophet is unconstrained. We also explore worst-case ratios between optimal selection rules in the presence vs. absence of individual fairness constraints, in both the online and offline settings. Finally, we consider a framework in which the decision maker doesn't know the distributions of candidates' values but has access to independent samples from each distribution. We provide constant-competitive IIF/TIF algorithms using one sample per distribution in the offline setting and two samples per distribution in the online setting.
abstract_zh: 预言不等式是在线算法（又名停止规则）解决以下“招聘问题”的性能保证：决策者顺序检查值为独立随机数的候选人，并要求在检查序列中未来候选人的值之前选择最多一名候选人。最优停止理论的一个经典结果断言，存在停止规则，保证决策者将雇用一名预期价值至少是“先知”雇用的候选人的预期价值一半的候选人，即可以同时实现所有候选人价值观的候选人。事实证明，此类停止规则具有良好的性能，但可能会以多种不同的方式对待个别候选人不公平。在这项工作中，我们确定了在最佳停止问题中可能需要的两种类型的个体公平性。我们将它们称为身份无关公平性（IIF）和时间无关公平性（TIF），并在招聘问题的背景下给出了精确的定义。我们给出了多项式时间算法，用于在具有离散支持的给定实例中找到最佳 IIF/TIF 停止规则，并且当要求决策者的停止规则满足两个公平性且预言者不受约束时，我们设法用因子 $1/2$ 恢复预言者不等式。我们还探讨了在线和离线环境中存在与不存在个体公平约束的情况下最优选择规则之间的最坏情况比率。最后，我们考虑一个框架，其中决策者不知道候选人值的分布，但可以访问每个分布的独立样本。我们提供持续竞争的 IIF/TIF 算法，在离线设置中每个分布使用一个样本，在在线设置中每个分布使用两个样本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在最优停止问题中引入个体公平性的方法，提出两种公平性定义（IIF和TIF），并设计满足这些约束的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统先知不等式算法虽具性能保证，但可能对候选人造成身份或时间相关的不公平，需在决策中引入公平性约束。
AI.method: 定义IIF和TIF公平性概念，设计多项式时间算法求解离散支持实例的最优公平停止规则，并分析样本驱动的在线/离线算法。
AI.result: 恢复了1/2先知不等式因子，分析了公平约束下的最坏情况比率，提出基于单/双样本的常数竞争算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化公平性约束，为在线决策算法提供了兼顾性能与公平性的理论框架和实用方法。

authors_text: Daniel Agassy,Dani Dorfman,Haim Kaplan
title: Expander Decomposition with Fewer Inter-Cluster Edges Using a Spectral Cut Player
title_zh: 使用频谱切割播放器进行具有更少簇间边缘的扩展器分解
abstract: A $(φ,ε)$-expander-decomposition of a graph $G$ (with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges) is a partition of $V$ into clusters $V_1,\ldots,V_k$ with conductance $Φ(G[V_i]) \ge φ$, such that there are at most $εm$ inter-cluster edges. Such a decomposition plays a crucial role in many graph algorithms. We give a randomized $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ time algorithm for computing a $(φ, φ\log^2 {n})$-expander decomposition. This improves upon the $(φ, φ\log^3 {n})$-expander decomposition also obtained in $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ time by [Saranurak and Wang, SODA 2019] (SW) and brings the number of inter-cluster edges within logarithmic factor of optimal. One crucial component of SW's algorithm is non-stop version of the cut-matching game of [Khandekar, Rao, Vazirani, JACM 2009] (KRV): The cut player does not stop when it gets from the matching player an unbalanced sparse cut, but continues to play on a trimmed part of the large side. The crux of our improvement is the design of a non-stop version of the cleverer cut player of [Orecchia, Schulman, Vazirani, Vishnoi, STOC 2008] (OSVV). The cut player of OSSV uses a more sophisticated random walk, a subtle potential function, and spectral arguments. Designing and analysing a non-stop version of this game was an explicit open question asked by SW.
summary: A $(φ,ε)$-expander-decomposition of a graph $G$ (with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges) is a partition of $V$ into clusters $V_1,\ldots,V_k$ with conductance $Φ(G[V_i]) \ge φ$, such that there are at most $εm$ inter-cluster edges. Such a decomposition plays a crucial role in many graph algorithms. We give a randomized $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ time algorithm for computing a $(φ, φ\log^2 {n})$-expander decomposition. This improves upon the $(φ, φ\log^3 {n})$-expander decomposition also obtained in $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ time by [Saranurak and Wang, SODA 2019] (SW) and brings the number of inter-cluster edges within logarithmic factor of optimal. One crucial component of SW's algorithm is non-stop version of the cut-matching game of [Khandekar, Rao, Vazirani, JACM 2009] (KRV): The cut player does not stop when it gets from the matching player an unbalanced sparse cut, but continues to play on a trimmed part of the large side. The crux of our improvement is the design of a non-stop version of the cleverer cut player of [Orecchia, Schulman, Vazirani, Vishnoi, STOC 2008] (OSVV). The cut player of OSSV uses a more sophisticated random walk, a subtle potential function, and spectral arguments. Designing and analysing a non-stop version of this game was an explicit open question asked by SW.
abstract_zh: 图 $G$（具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边）的 $(φ,ε)$ 扩展器分解是将 $V$ 划分为簇 $V_1,\ldots,V_k$，电导为 $Φ(G[V_i]) \ge φ$，使得最多有 $εm$ 簇间边。这种分解在许多图算法中起着至关重要的作用。我们给出了一个随机的 $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ 时间算法来计算 $(φ, φ\log^2 {n})$ 扩展器分解。这改进了 [Saranurak 和 Wang, SODA 2019] (SW) 在 $\tilde{O}(m/φ)$ 时间内获得的 $(φ, φ\log^3 {n})$ 扩展器分解，并使簇间边缘的数量在最优的对数因子内。 SW 算法的一个重要组成部分是 [Khandekar, Rao, Vazirani, JACM 2009] (KRV) 的剪切匹配游戏的不间断版本：剪切玩家在从匹配玩家处获得不平衡稀疏剪切时不会停止，而是继续在大边的修剪部分上进行游戏。我们改进的关键是设计 [Orecchia、Schulman、Vazirani、Vishnoi、STOC 2008] (OSVV) 的更聪明剪切播放器的不间断版本。 OSSV 的剪切播放器使用更复杂的随机游走、微妙的势函数和谱参数。设计和分析该游戏的不间断版本是 SW 提出的一个明确的开放性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的图分解算法，通过设计更高效的谱切割玩家，减少簇间边数量。
AI.motivation: 图的展开分解在许多算法中起关键作用，减少簇间边数量可提升算法效率。此前方法的边数量界为φ log³n，本文旨在进一步优化。
AI.method: 设计并分析了OSVV算法中切割玩家的非停止版本，结合更复杂的随机游走和势函数，改进切割策略。
AI.result: 提出随机算法在Õ(m/φ)时间内实现(φ, φ log²n)-展开分解，将簇间边数量减少到接近最优的对数因子范围。
AI.conclusion: 解决了Saranurak和Wang提出的问题，通过改进切割玩家策略，实现了更优的展开分解，为图算法提供更高效工具。

authors_text: Venkat Varada,Mina Ghashami,Jitesh Mehta,Haotian Jiang,Kurtis Voris
title: Low-cost Relevance Generation and Evaluation Metrics for Entity Resolution in AI
title_zh: 人工智能中实体解析的低成本相关性生成和评估指标
abstract: Entity Resolution (ER) in voice assistants is a prime component during run time that resolves entities in users request to real world entities. ER involves two major functionalities 1. Relevance generation and 2. Ranking. In this paper we propose a low cost relevance generation framework by generating features using customer implicit and explicit feedback signals. The generated relevance datasets can serve as test sets to measure ER performance. We also introduce a set of metrics that accurately measures the performance of ER systems in various dimensions. They provide great interpretability to deep dive and identifying root cause of ER issues, whether the problem is in relevance generation or ranking.
summary: Entity Resolution (ER) in voice assistants is a prime component during run time that resolves entities in users request to real world entities. ER involves two major functionalities 1. Relevance generation and 2. Ranking. In this paper we propose a low cost relevance generation framework by generating features using customer implicit and explicit feedback signals. The generated relevance datasets can serve as test sets to measure ER performance. We also introduce a set of metrics that accurately measures the performance of ER systems in various dimensions. They provide great interpretability to deep dive and identifying root cause of ER issues, whether the problem is in relevance generation or ranking.
abstract_zh: 语音助手中的实体解析 (ER) 是运行时的主要组件，它将用户请求中的实体解析为现实世界的实体。 ER 涉及两个主要功能 1. 相关性生成和 2. 排名。在本文中，我们提出了一种低成本相关性生成框架，通过使用客户隐式和显式反馈信号生成特征。生成的相关性数据集可以作为测试集来衡量 ER 性能。我们还引入了一组指标，可以准确衡量 ER 系统在各个维度的性能。它们为深入研究和识别 ER 问题的根本原因提供了很好的解释性，无论问题是相关性生成还是排名。

AI.tldr: 提出一种低成本的相关性生成框架和评估指标，以改进实体解析（ER）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的实体解析系统在相关性生成和排序上存在成本高、评估不准确的问题，需要更高效和可解释的评估方法。
AI.method: 利用用户隐式和显式反馈信号生成特征，构建相关性数据集，并设计多维评估指标以衡量ER系统的性能。
AI.result: 生成的低成相关性数据集可有效评估ER性能，新指标提升了问题诊断的准确性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架和指标为AI实体解析系统的优化提供了低成本、高解释性的解决方案，有助于提升系统性能和问题诊断能力。

search_text: Low-cost Relevance Generation and Evaluation Metrics for Entity Resolution in AI 人工智能中实体解析的低成本相关性生成和评估指标 Entity Resolution (ER) in voice assistants is a prime component during run time that resolves entities in users request to real world entities. ER involves two major functionalities 1. Relevance generation and 2. Ranking. In this paper we propose a low cost relevance generation framework by generating features using customer implicit and explicit feedback signals. The generated relevance datasets can serve as test sets to measure ER performance. We also introduce a set of metrics that accurately measures the performance of ER systems in various dimensions. They provide great interpretability to deep dive and identifying root cause of ER issues, whether the problem is in relevance generation or ranking. 语音助手中的实体解析 (ER) 是运行时的主要组件，它将用户请求中的实体解析为现实世界的实体。 ER 涉及两个主要功能 1. 相关性生成和 2. 排名。在本文中，我们提出了一种低成本相关性生成框架，通过使用客户隐式和显式反馈信号生成特征。生成的相关性数据集可以作为测试集来衡量 ER 性能。我们还引入了一组指标，可以准确衡量 ER 系统在各个维度的性能。它们为深入研究和识别 ER 问题的根本原因提供了很好的解释性，无论问题是相关性生成还是排名。 提出一种低成本的相关性生成框架和评估指标，以改进实体解析（ER）系统的性能。 Venkat Varada,Mina Ghashami,Jitesh Mehta,Haotian Jiang,Kurtis Voris cs.IT,cs.AI

authors_text: Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Micah Goldblum,Hossein Souri,Sanyam Kapoor,Chen Zhu,Yann LeCun,Andrew Gordon Wilson
title: Pre-Train Your Loss: Easy Bayesian Transfer Learning with Informative Priors
title_zh: 预训练你的损失：利用信息丰富的先验进行简单的贝叶斯迁移学习
abstract: Deep learning is increasingly moving towards a transfer learning paradigm whereby large foundation models are fine-tuned on downstream tasks, starting from an initialization learned on the source task. But an initialization contains relatively little information about the source task. Instead, we show that we can learn highly informative posteriors from the source task, through supervised or self-supervised approaches, which then serve as the basis for priors that modify the whole loss surface on the downstream task. This simple modular approach enables significant performance gains and more data-efficient learning on a variety of downstream classification and segmentation tasks, serving as a drop-in replacement for standard pre-training strategies. These highly informative priors also can be saved for future use, similar to pre-trained weights, and stand in contrast to the zero-mean isotropic uninformative priors that are typically used in Bayesian deep learning.
summary: Deep learning is increasingly moving towards a transfer learning paradigm whereby large foundation models are fine-tuned on downstream tasks, starting from an initialization learned on the source task. But an initialization contains relatively little information about the source task. Instead, we show that we can learn highly informative posteriors from the source task, through supervised or self-supervised approaches, which then serve as the basis for priors that modify the whole loss surface on the downstream task. This simple modular approach enables significant performance gains and more data-efficient learning on a variety of downstream classification and segmentation tasks, serving as a drop-in replacement for standard pre-training strategies. These highly informative priors also can be saved for future use, similar to pre-trained weights, and stand in contrast to the zero-mean isotropic uninformative priors that are typically used in Bayesian deep learning.
abstract_zh: 深度学习越来越倾向于迁移学习范式，其中大型基础模型从源任务上学习的初始化开始，对下游任务进行微调。但初始化包含的有关源任务的信息相对较少。相反，我们表明，我们可以通过监督或自监督的方法从源任务中学习信息丰富的后验，然后将其作为修改下游任务的整个损失表面的先验的基础。这种简单的模块化方法可以在各种下游分类和分割任务上实现显着的性能提升和更高效的数据学习，作为标准预训练策略的直接替代。这些信息丰富的先验也可以保存以供将来使用，类似于预先训练的权重，并且与贝叶斯深度学习中通常使用的零均值各向同性无信息先验形成对比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息先验的贝叶斯迁移学习方法，通过从源任务学习高信息量后验分布作为下游任务的先验，提升迁移学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练初始化包含的源任务信息有限，而贝叶斯深度学习通常使用无信息先验，无法有效利用源任务知识。
AI.method: 通过有监督或自监督学习从源任务获取高信息量后验分布，将其作为下游任务的先验，重塑损失函数表面，实现模块化迁移学习。
AI.result: 在多种分类和分割任务中实现显著性能提升和更高的数据效率，且先验可保存复用，优于标准预训练策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过信息先验替代零均值先验，为迁移学习提供更高效的数据利用方式，是标准预训练策略的有效替代方案。

authors_text: Charles Millard,Mark Chiew
title: A theoretical framework for self-supervised MR image reconstruction using sub-sampling via variable density Noisier2Noise
title_zh: 通过可变密度 Noisier2Noise 使用子采样进行自监督 MR 图像重建的理论框架
abstract: In recent years, there has been attention on leveraging the statistical modeling capabilities of neural networks for reconstructing sub-sampled Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data. Most proposed methods assume the existence of a representative fully-sampled dataset and use fully-supervised training. However, for many applications, fully sampled training data is not available, and may be highly impractical to acquire. The development and understanding of self-supervised methods, which use only sub-sampled data for training, are therefore highly desirable. This work extends the Noisier2Noise framework, which was originally constructed for self-supervised denoising tasks, to variable density sub-sampled MRI data. We use the Noisier2Noise framework to analytically explain the performance of Self-Supervised Learning via Data Undersampling (SSDU), a recently proposed method that performs well in practice but until now lacked theoretical justification. Further, we propose two modifications of SSDU that arise as a consequence of the theoretical developments. Firstly, we propose partitioning the sampling set so that the subsets have the same type of distribution as the original sampling mask. Secondly, we propose a loss weighting that compensates for the sampling and partitioning densities. On the fastMRI dataset we show that these changes significantly improve SSDU's image restoration quality and robustness to the partitioning parameters.
summary: In recent years, there has been attention on leveraging the statistical modeling capabilities of neural networks for reconstructing sub-sampled Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data. Most proposed methods assume the existence of a representative fully-sampled dataset and use fully-supervised training. However, for many applications, fully sampled training data is not available, and may be highly impractical to acquire. The development and understanding of self-supervised methods, which use only sub-sampled data for training, are therefore highly desirable. This work extends the Noisier2Noise framework, which was originally constructed for self-supervised denoising tasks, to variable density sub-sampled MRI data. We use the Noisier2Noise framework to analytically explain the performance of Self-Supervised Learning via Data Undersampling (SSDU), a recently proposed method that performs well in practice but until now lacked theoretical justification. Further, we propose two modifications of SSDU that arise as a consequence of the theoretical developments. Firstly, we propose partitioning the sampling set so that the subsets have the same type of distribution as the original sampling mask. Secondly, we propose a loss weighting that compensates for the sampling and partitioning densities. On the fastMRI dataset we show that these changes significantly improve SSDU's image restoration quality and robustness to the partitioning parameters.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们开始关注利用神经网络的统计建模功能来重建子采样磁共振成像（MRI）数据。大多数提出的方法都假设存在代表性的完全采样数据集并使用完全监督的训练。然而，对于许多应用程序来说，完全采样的训练数据是不可用的，并且获取起来可能非常不切实际。因此，非常需要开发和理解仅使用子采样数据进行训练的自监督方法。这项工作将最初为自监督去噪任务而构建的 Noisier2Noise 框架扩展到了可变密度子采样 MRI 数据。我们使用 Noisier2Noise 框架来分析解释通过数据欠采样进行自监督学习 (SSDU) 的性能，这是一种最近提出的方法，在实践中表现良好，但迄今为止缺乏理论依据。此外，我们提出了由于理论发展而产生的 SSDU 的两个修改。首先，我们建议对采样集进行分区，以便子集具有与原始采样掩码相同的分布类型。其次，我们提出了一种补偿采样和分区密度的损失权重。在 fastMRI 数据集上，我们表明这些变化显着提高了 SSDU 的图像恢复质量和分区参数的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Noisier2Noise框架的自监督MRI图像重建理论方法，通过变密度子采样技术解决全采样数据缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI重建方法依赖全采样数据进行监督训练，但实际应用中全采样数据获取困难且成本高昂，亟需无需全采样的自监督学习方法。
AI.method: 将Noisier2Noise框架扩展至变密度子采样MRI数据，理论解释SSDU方法并提出两项改进：采样集分区策略与损失权重补偿机制。
AI.result: 在fastMRI数据集上验证改进方法显著提升图像重建质量，并增强对分区参数的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与改进设计，本文为自监督MRI重建提供了有效框架，推动了无全采样数据场景下的应用可行性。

Firstly, we propose partitioning the sampling set so that the subsets have the same type of distribution as the original sampling mask. Secondly, we propose a loss weighting that compensates for the sampling and partitioning densities. On the fastMRI dataset we show that these changes significantly improve SSDU's image restoration quality and robustness to the partitioning parameters. 近年来，人们开始关注利用神经网络的统计建模功能来重建子采样磁共振成像（MRI）数据。大多数提出的方法都假设存在代表性的完全采样数据集并使用完全监督的训练。然而，对于许多应用程序来说，完全采样的训练数据是不可用的，并且获取起来可能非常不切实际。因此，非常需要开发和理解仅使用子采样数据进行训练的自监督方法。这项工作将最初为自监督去噪任务而构建的 Noisier2Noise 框架扩展到了可变密度子采样 MRI 数据。我们使用 Noisier2Noise 框架来分析解释通过数据欠采样进行自监督学习 (SSDU) 的性能，这是一种最近提出的方法，在实践中表现良好，但迄今为止缺乏理论依据。此外，我们提出了由于理论发展而产生的 SSDU 的两个修改。首先，我们建议对采样集进行分区，以便子集具有与原始采样掩码相同的分布类型。其次，我们提出了一种补偿采样和分区密度的损失权重。在 fastMRI 数据集上，我们表明这些变化显着提高了 SSDU 的图像恢复质量和分区参数的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于Noisier2Noise框架的自监督MRI图像重建理论方法，通过变密度子采样技术解决全采样数据缺失问题。 Charles Millard,Mark Chiew eess.IV,cs.AI

authors_text: Luca Rossini,Paolo Ferrari,Francesco Ruscelli,Arturo Laurenzi,Nikos G. Tsagarakis,Enrico Mingo Hoffman
title: Loco-Manipulation Planning for Legged Robots: Offline and Online Strategies
title_zh: 腿式机器人的局部操纵规划：离线和在线策略
abstract: The deployment of robots within realistic environments requires the capability to plan and refine the loco-manipulation trajectories on the fly to avoid unexpected interactions with a dynamic environment. This extended abstract provides a pipeline to offline plan a configuration space global trajectory based on a randomized strategy, and to online locally refine it depending on any change of the dynamic environment and the robot state. The offline planner directly plans in the contact space, and additionally seeks for whole-body feasible configurations compliant with the sampled contact states. The planned trajectory, made by a discrete set of contacts and configurations, can be seen as a graph and it can be online refined during the execution of the global trajectory. The online refinement is carried out by a graph optimization planner exploiting visual information. It locally acts on the global initial plan to account for possible changes in the environment. While the offline planner is a concluded work, tested on the humanoid COMAN+, the online local planner is still a work-in-progress which has been tested on a reduced model of the CENTAURO robot to avoid dynamic and static obstacles interfering with a wheeled motion task. Both the COMAN+ and the CENTAURO robots have been designed at the Italian Institute of Technology (IIT).
summary: The deployment of robots within realistic environments requires the capability to plan and refine the loco-manipulation trajectories on the fly to avoid unexpected interactions with a dynamic environment. This extended abstract provides a pipeline to offline plan a configuration space global trajectory based on a randomized strategy, and to online locally refine it depending on any change of the dynamic environment and the robot state. The offline planner directly plans in the contact space, and additionally seeks for whole-body feasible configurations compliant with the sampled contact states. The planned trajectory, made by a discrete set of contacts and configurations, can be seen as a graph and it can be online refined during the execution of the global trajectory. The online refinement is carried out by a graph optimization planner exploiting visual information. It locally acts on the global initial plan to account for possible changes in the environment. While the offline planner is a concluded work, tested on the humanoid COMAN+, the online local planner is still a work-in-progress which has been tested on a reduced model of the CENTAURO robot to avoid dynamic and static obstacles interfering with a wheeled motion task. Both the COMAN+ and the CENTAURO robots have been designed at the Italian Institute of Technology (IIT).
abstract_zh: 在现实环境中部署机器人需要能够动态规划和完善局部操纵轨迹，以避免与动态环境发生意外交互。这种扩展的抽象提供了一个管道，可以根据随机策略离线规划配置空间全局轨迹，并根据动态环境和机器人状态的任何变化在线本地细化它。离线规划器直接在接触空间中进行规划，并另外寻找符合采样接触状态的全身可行配置。由一组离散的接触和配置组成的规划轨迹可以被视为一个图表，并且可以在全局轨迹的执行过程中在线细化。在线细化是由图优化规划器利用视觉信息进行的。它在本地根据全局初始计划采取行动，以考虑环境中可能的变化。虽然离线规划器已经完成，并在人形 COMAN+ 上进行了测试，但在线本地规划器仍然是一个正在进行的工作，已在 CENTAURO 机器人的简化模型上进行了测试，以避免动态和静态障碍物干扰轮式运动任务。 COMAN+ 和 CENTAURO 机器人均由意大利理工学院 (IIT) 设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对腿式机器人的离线与在线混合轨迹规划方法，以应对动态环境中的意外交互。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中机器人需实时调整轨迹以避免动态障碍物，传统方法难以兼顾全局规划与局部适应性。
AI.method: 离线阶段基于随机化策略在接触空间规划全局轨迹，生成接触点与配置的离散图；在线阶段通过图优化利用视觉信息局部修正轨迹，适应环境变化。
AI.result: 离线规划器在COMAN+人形机器人上验证有效，在线局部规划器在CENTAURO简化模型中成功避开动静态障碍物，但尚未完全实现。
AI.conclusion: 混合策略提升了动态环境下的适应性，但在线优化仍需进一步完善，且依赖于高精度视觉感知与计算资源。

authors_text: Pourya Shamsolmoali,Masoumeh Zareapoor,Eric Granger,Huiyu Zhou
title: Salient Skin Lesion Segmentation via Dilated Scale-Wise Feature Fusion Network
title_zh: 通过扩张的尺度特征融合网络进行显着皮肤病变分割
abstract: Skin lesion detection in dermoscopic images is essential in the accurate and early diagnosis of skin cancer by a computerized apparatus. Current skin lesion segmentation approaches show poor performance in challenging circumstances such as indistinct lesion boundaries, low contrast between the lesion and the surrounding area, or heterogeneous background that causes over/under segmentation of the skin lesion. To accurately recognize the lesion from the neighboring regions, we propose a dilated scale-wise feature fusion network based on convolution factorization. Our network is designed to simultaneously extract features at different scales which are systematically fused for better detection. The proposed model has satisfactory accuracy and efficiency. Various experiments for lesion segmentation are performed along with comparisons with the state-of-the-art models. Our proposed model consistently showcases state-of-the-art results.
summary: Skin lesion detection in dermoscopic images is essential in the accurate and early diagnosis of skin cancer by a computerized apparatus. Current skin lesion segmentation approaches show poor performance in challenging circumstances such as indistinct lesion boundaries, low contrast between the lesion and the surrounding area, or heterogeneous background that causes over/under segmentation of the skin lesion. To accurately recognize the lesion from the neighboring regions, we propose a dilated scale-wise feature fusion network based on convolution factorization. Our network is designed to simultaneously extract features at different scales which are systematically fused for better detection. The proposed model has satisfactory accuracy and efficiency. Various experiments for lesion segmentation are performed along with comparisons with the state-of-the-art models. Our proposed model consistently showcases state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 皮肤镜图像中的皮肤病变检测对于计算机设备准确、早期诊断皮肤癌至关重要。目前的皮肤病灶分割方法在具有挑战性的情况下表现不佳，例如病灶边界不清晰、病灶与周围区域之间的对比度较低或导致皮肤病灶分割过度/不足的异质背景。为了准确识别邻近区域的病变，我们提出了一种基于卷积分解的扩展尺度特征融合网络。我们的网络旨在同时提取不同尺度的特征，这些特征被系统地融合以实现更好的检测。所提出的模型具有令人满意的精度和效率。进行了各种病变分割实验并与最先进的模型进行比较。我们提出的模型始终展示了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩张尺度特征融合网络的皮肤病变分割方法，旨在解决复杂环境下皮肤病变分割的准确性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在病变边界模糊、对比度低或背景复杂时容易出现过分割或欠分割，影响皮肤癌的早期诊断准确性。
AI.method: 设计扩张尺度特征融合网络，通过卷积分解同时提取多尺度特征并系统融合，提升病变区域识别能力。
AI.result: 在多个实验中表现出色，分割精度和效率均优于现有最先进模型，达到同类最佳水平。
AI.conclusion: 该网络有效解决了复杂场景下的皮肤病变分割难题，具有较高的临床应用价值。

authors_text: Andres Karjus,Mar Canet Solà,Tillmann Ohm,Sebastian E. Ahnert,Maximilian Schich
title: Compression ensembles quantify aesthetic complexity and the evolution of visual art
title_zh: 压缩整体量化了审美复杂性和视觉艺术的演变
abstract: The quantification of visual aesthetics and complexity have a long history, the latter previously operationalized via the application of compression algorithms. Here we generalize and extend the compression approach beyond simple complexity measures to quantify algorithmic distance in historical and contemporary visual media. The proposed "ensemble" approach works by compressing a large number of transformed versions of a given input image, resulting in a vector of associated compression ratios. This approach is more efficient than other compression-based algorithmic distances, and is particularly suited for the quantitative analysis of visual artifacts, because human creative processes can be understood as algorithms in the broadest sense. Unlike comparable image embedding methods using machine learning, our approach is fully explainable through the transformations. We demonstrate that the method is cognitively plausible and fit for purpose by evaluating it against human complexity judgments, and on automated detection tasks of authorship and style. We show how the approach can be used to reveal and quantify trends in art historical data, both on the scale of centuries and in rapidly evolving contemporary NFT art markets. We further quantify temporal resemblance to disambiguate artists outside the documented mainstream from those who are deeply embedded in Zeitgeist. Finally, we note that compression ensembles constitute a quantitative representation of the concept of visual family resemblance, as distinct sets of dimensions correspond to shared visual characteristics otherwise hard to pin down. Our approach provides a new perspective for the study of visual art, algorithmic image analysis, and quantitative aesthetics more generally.
summary: The quantification of visual aesthetics and complexity have a long history, the latter previously operationalized via the application of compression algorithms. Here we generalize and extend the compression approach beyond simple complexity measures to quantify algorithmic distance in historical and contemporary visual media. The proposed "ensemble" approach works by compressing a large number of transformed versions of a given input image, resulting in a vector of associated compression ratios. This approach is more efficient than other compression-based algorithmic distances, and is particularly suited for the quantitative analysis of visual artifacts, because human creative processes can be understood as algorithms in the broadest sense. Unlike comparable image embedding methods using machine learning, our approach is fully explainable through the transformations. We demonstrate that the method is cognitively plausible and fit for purpose by evaluating it against human complexity judgments, and on automated detection tasks of authorship and style. We show how the approach can be used to reveal and quantify trends in art historical data, both on the scale of centuries and in rapidly evolving contemporary NFT art markets. We further quantify temporal resemblance to disambiguate artists outside the documented mainstream from those who are deeply embedded in Zeitgeist. Finally, we note that compression ensembles constitute a quantitative representation of the concept of visual family resemblance, as distinct sets of dimensions correspond to shared visual characteristics otherwise hard to pin down. Our approach provides a new perspective for the study of visual art, algorithmic image analysis, and quantitative aesthetics more generally.
abstract_zh: 视觉美学和复杂性的量化有着悠久的历史，后者之前通过压缩算法的应用来实现。在这里，我们概括并扩展了压缩方法，超越了简单的复杂性度量，以量化历史和当代视觉媒体中的算法距离。所提出的“集成”方法的工作原理是压缩给定输入图像的大量变换版本，从而产生相关压缩比的向量。这种方法比其他基于压缩的算法距离更有效，并且特别适合视觉伪影的定量分析，因为人类的创作过程可以被理解为最广泛意义上的算法。与使用机器学习的类似图像嵌入方法不同，我们的方法可以通过转换完全解释。我们通过根据人类复杂性判断以及作者身份和风格的自动检测任务对其进行评估，证明该方法在认知上是合理的并且适合目的。我们展示了如何使用该方法来揭示和量化艺术历史数据的趋势，无论是在几个世纪的规模上还是在快速发展的当代 NFT 艺术市场上。我们进一步量化了时间上的相似性，以区分记录主流之外的艺术家与深深植根于时代精神的艺术家。最后，我们注意到压缩集合构成了视觉家族相似性概念的定量表示，因为不同的维度集对应于共享的视觉特征，否则很难确定。我们的方法为视觉艺术、算法图像分析和更广泛的定量美学的研究提供了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于压缩算法的集成方法，用于量化视觉艺术的审美复杂性及演变过程。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩算法仅能衡量简单复杂度，无法有效分析历史与当代视觉媒介的算法距离，且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 通过压缩输入图像的多种变换版本，生成压缩率向量，构建可解释的算法距离度量框架。
AI.result: 方法在人类复杂度判断、作者归属检测及艺术史趋势分析中表现有效，可区分主流与非主流艺术家。
AI.conclusion: 压缩集成提供了量化视觉艺术家族相似性的新视角，为算法图像分析与审美研究开辟了新路径。

search_text: Compression ensembles quantify aesthetic complexity and the evolution of visual art 压缩整体量化了审美复杂性和视觉艺术的演变 The quantification of visual aesthetics and complexity have a long history, the latter previously operationalized via the application of compression algorithms. Here we generalize and extend the compression approach beyond simple complexity measures to quantify algorithmic distance in historical and contemporary visual media. The proposed "ensemble" approach works by compressing a large number of transformed versions of a given input image, resulting in a vector of associated compression ratios. This approach is more efficient than other compression-based algorithmic distances, and is particularly suited for the quantitative analysis of visual artifacts, because human creative processes can be understood as algorithms in the broadest sense. Unlike comparable image embedding methods using machine learning, our approach is fully explainable through the transformations. We demonstrate that the method is cognitively plausible and fit for purpose by evaluating it against human complexity judgments, and on automated detection tasks of authorship and style. We show how the approach can be used to reveal and quantify trends in art historical data, both on the scale of centuries and in rapidly evolving contemporary NFT art markets. We further quantify temporal resemblance to disambiguate artists outside the documented mainstream from those who are deeply embedded in Zeitgeist. Finally, we note that compression ensembles constitute a quantitative representation of the concept of visual family resemblance, as distinct sets of dimensions correspond to shared visual characteristics otherwise hard to pin down. Our approach provides a new perspective for the study of visual art, algorithmic image analysis, and quantitative aesthetics more generally. 视觉美学和复杂性的量化有着悠久的历史，后者之前通过压缩算法的应用来实现。在这里，我们概括并扩展了压缩方法，超越了简单的复杂性度量，以量化历史和当代视觉媒体中的算法距离。所提出的“集成”方法的工作原理是压缩给定输入图像的大量变换版本，从而产生相关压缩比的向量。这种方法比其他基于压缩的算法距离更有效，并且特别适合视觉伪影的定量分析，因为人类的创作过程可以被理解为最广泛意义上的算法。与使用机器学习的类似图像嵌入方法不同，我们的方法可以通过转换完全解释。我们通过根据人类复杂性判断以及作者身份和风格的自动检测任务对其进行评估，证明该方法在认知上是合理的并且适合目的。我们展示了如何使用该方法来揭示和量化艺术历史数据的趋势，无论是在几个世纪的规模上还是在快速发展的当代 NFT 艺术市场上。我们进一步量化了时间上的相似性，以区分记录主流之外的艺术家与深深植根于时代精神的艺术家。最后，我们注意到压缩集合构成了视觉家族相似性概念的定量表示，因为不同的维度集对应于共享的视觉特征，否则很难确定。我们的方法为视觉艺术、算法图像分析和更广泛的定量美学的研究提供了新的视角。 本文提出了一种基于压缩算法的集成方法，用于量化视觉艺术的审美复杂性及演变过程。 Andres Karjus,Mar Canet Solà,Tillmann Ohm,Sebastian E. Ahnert,Maximilian Schich cs.CV

authors_text: Moritz Böhle,Mario Fritz,Bernt Schiele
title: B-cos Networks: Alignment is All We Need for Interpretability
title_zh: B-cos 网络：为了可解释性，我们所需要的就是对齐
abstract: We present a new direction for increasing the interpretability of deep neural networks (DNNs) by promoting weight-input alignment during training. For this, we propose to replace the linear transforms in DNNs by our B-cos transform. As we show, a sequence (network) of such transforms induces a single linear transform that faithfully summarises the full model computations. Moreover, the B-cos transform introduces alignment pressure on the weights during optimisation. As a result, those induced linear transforms become highly interpretable and align with task-relevant features. Importantly, the B-cos transform is designed to be compatible with existing architectures and we show that it can easily be integrated into common models such as VGGs, ResNets, InceptionNets, and DenseNets, whilst maintaining similar performance on ImageNet. The resulting explanations are of high visual quality and perform well under quantitative metrics for interpretability. Code available at https://www.github.com/moboehle/B-cos.
summary: We present a new direction for increasing the interpretability of deep neural networks (DNNs) by promoting weight-input alignment during training. For this, we propose to replace the linear transforms in DNNs by our B-cos transform. As we show, a sequence (network) of such transforms induces a single linear transform that faithfully summarises the full model computations. Moreover, the B-cos transform introduces alignment pressure on the weights during optimisation. As a result, those induced linear transforms become highly interpretable and align with task-relevant features. Importantly, the B-cos transform is designed to be compatible with existing architectures and we show that it can easily be integrated into common models such as VGGs, ResNets, InceptionNets, and DenseNets, whilst maintaining similar performance on ImageNet. The resulting explanations are of high visual quality and perform well under quantitative metrics for interpretability. Code available at https://www.github.com/moboehle/B-cos.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新方向，通过在训练期间促进权重输入对齐来提高深度神经网络（DNN）的可解释性。为此，我们建议用 B-cos 变换替换 DNN 中的线性变换。正如我们所展示的，此类变换的序列（网络）会产生单个线性变换，该线性变换忠实地总结了完整的模型计算。此外，B-cos 变换在优化过程中引入了权重对齐压力。因此，这些引发的线性变换变得高度可解释，并与任务相关的特征保持一致。重要的是，B-cos 变换旨在与现有架构兼容，我们表明它可以轻松集成到 VGG、ResNets、InceptionNets 和 DenseNets 等常见模型中，同时在 ImageNet 上保持类似的性能。由此产生的解释具有很高的视觉质量，并且在可解释性的定量指标下表现良好。代码可在 https://www.github.com/moboehle/B-cos 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出B-cos变换，通过促进权重与输入对齐来提升深度神经网络的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络缺乏可解释性，需在保持模型性能的同时增强其解释能力。
AI.method: 用B-cos变换替代传统线性变换，通过优化过程中的对齐压力使权重与任务相关特征对齐。
AI.result: 兼容主流架构（如ResNet、VGG），在ImageNet上保持性能，生成高质量且符合定量指标的解释。
AI.conclusion: B-cos变换有效提升模型可解释性，无需牺牲性能，为解释性研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Hugo Bohy,Ahmad Hammoudeh,Antoine Maiorca,Stéphane Dupont,Thierry Dutoit
title: Analysis of Co-Laughter Gesture Relationship on RGB videos in Dyadic Conversation Contex
title_zh: Dyadic Contex 中 RGB 视频的笑声手势关系分析
abstract: The development of virtual agents has enabled human-avatar interactions to become increasingly rich and varied. Moreover, an expressive virtual agent i.e. that mimics the natural expression of emotions, enhances social interaction between a user (human) and an agent (intelligent machine). The set of non-verbal behaviors of a virtual character is, therefore, an important component in the context of human-machine interaction. Laughter is not just an audio signal, but an intrinsic relationship of multimodal non-verbal communication, in addition to audio, it includes facial expressions and body movements. Motion analysis often relies on a relevant motion capture dataset, but the main issue is that the acquisition of such a dataset is expensive and time-consuming. This work studies the relationship between laughter and body movements in dyadic conversations. The body movements were extracted from videos using deep learning based pose estimator model. We found that, in the explored NDC-ME dataset, a single statistical feature (i.e, the maximum value, or the maximum of Fourier transform) of a joint movement weakly correlates with laughter intensity by 30%. However, we did not find a direct correlation between audio features and body movements. We discuss about the challenges to use such dataset for the audio-driven co-laughter motion synthesis task.
summary: The development of virtual agents has enabled human-avatar interactions to become increasingly rich and varied. Moreover, an expressive virtual agent i.e. that mimics the natural expression of emotions, enhances social interaction between a user (human) and an agent (intelligent machine). The set of non-verbal behaviors of a virtual character is, therefore, an important component in the context of human-machine interaction. Laughter is not just an audio signal, but an intrinsic relationship of multimodal non-verbal communication, in addition to audio, it includes facial expressions and body movements. Motion analysis often relies on a relevant motion capture dataset, but the main issue is that the acquisition of such a dataset is expensive and time-consuming. This work studies the relationship between laughter and body movements in dyadic conversations. The body movements were extracted from videos using deep learning based pose estimator model. We found that, in the explored NDC-ME dataset, a single statistical feature (i.e, the maximum value, or the maximum of Fourier transform) of a joint movement weakly correlates with laughter intensity by 30%. However, we did not find a direct correlation between audio features and body movements. We discuss about the challenges to use such dataset for the audio-driven co-laughter motion synthesis task.
abstract_zh: 虚拟代理的发展使得人与虚拟形象的交互变得越来越丰富和多样。此外，富有表现力的虚拟代理，即模仿情感的自然表达，增强了用户（人类）和代理（智能机器）之间的社交互动。因此，虚拟角色的一组非语言行为是人机交互环境中的重要组成部分。笑声不仅仅是一种音频信号，而是一种多模态非语言交流的内在关系，除了音频之外，还包括面部表情和身体动作。运动分析通常依赖于相关的运动捕捉数据集，但主要问题是获取此类数据集既昂贵又耗时。这项工作研究了二元对话中笑声和身体动作之间的关系。使用基于深度学习的姿势估计器模型从视频中提取身体动作。我们发现，在探索的 NDC-ME 数据集中，关节运动的单个统计特征（即最大值或傅里叶变换的最大值）与笑声强度的相关性为 30%。然而，我们没有发现音频特征和身体运动之间的直接相关性。我们讨论了使用此类数据集进行音频驱动的笑声运动合成任务的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了双人对话场景中笑声与身体动作的关系，通过RGB视频提取肢体动作特征并研究其与笑声强度的关联性。
AI.motivation: 虚拟代理需要更自然的情绪表达以增强人机交互的社会性，而传统动作捕捉数据成本高昂，需探索基于视频的替代方法。
AI.method: 使用基于深度学习的姿态估计模型从视频中提取身体动作数据，分析关节运动的统计特征（如最大值、傅里叶变换最大值）与笑声强度的相关性。
AI.result: 在NDC-ME数据集中发现单个关节运动统计特征与笑声强度存在约30%的弱相关性，但音频特征与身体动作无直接关联。
AI.conclusion: 当前数据集在音频驱动的共笑动作合成任务中存在局限性，需进一步研究多模态特征融合方法以提升模型表现。

motivation: 虚拟代理需要更自然的情绪表达以增强人机交互的社会性，而传统动作捕捉数据成本高昂，需探索基于视频的替代方法。
method: 使用基于深度学习的姿态估计模型从视频中提取身体动作数据，分析关节运动的统计特征（如最大值、傅里叶变换最大值）与笑声强度的相关性。
result: 在NDC-ME数据集中发现单个关节运动统计特征与笑声强度存在约30%的弱相关性，但音频特征与身体动作无直接关联。
conclusion: 当前数据集在音频驱动的共笑动作合成任务中存在局限性，需进一步研究多模态特征融合方法以提升模型表现。
search_text: Analysis of Co-Laughter Gesture Relationship on RGB videos in Dyadic Conversation Contex Dyadic Contex 中 RGB 视频的笑声手势关系分析 The development of virtual agents has enabled human-avatar interactions to become increasingly rich and varied. Moreover, an expressive virtual agent i.e. that mimics the natural expression of emotions, enhances social interaction between a user (human) and an agent (intelligent machine). The set of non-verbal behaviors of a virtual character is, therefore, an important component in the context of human-machine interaction. Laughter is not just an audio signal, but an intrinsic relationship of multimodal non-verbal communication, in addition to audio, it includes facial expressions and body movements. Motion analysis often relies on a relevant motion capture dataset, but the main issue is that the acquisition of such a dataset is expensive and time-consuming. This work studies the relationship between laughter and body movements in dyadic conversations. The body movements were extracted from videos using deep learning based pose estimator model. We found that, in the explored NDC-ME dataset, a single statistical feature (i.e, the maximum value, or the maximum of Fourier transform) of a joint movement weakly correlates with laughter intensity by 30%. However, we did not find a direct correlation between audio features and body movements. We discuss about the challenges to use such dataset for the audio-driven co-laughter motion synthesis task. 虚拟代理的发展使得人与虚拟形象的交互变得越来越丰富和多样。此外，富有表现力的虚拟代理，即模仿情感的自然表达，增强了用户（人类）和代理（智能机器）之间的社交互动。因此，虚拟角色的一组非语言行为是人机交互环境中的重要组成部分。笑声不仅仅是一种音频信号，而是一种多模态非语言交流的内在关系，除了音频之外，还包括面部表情和身体动作。运动分析通常依赖于相关的运动捕捉数据集，但主要问题是获取此类数据集既昂贵又耗时。这项工作研究了二元对话中笑声和身体动作之间的关系。使用基于深度学习的姿势估计器模型从视频中提取身体动作。我们发现，在探索的 NDC-ME 数据集中，关节运动的单个统计特征（即最大值或傅里叶变换的最大值）与笑声强度的相关性为 30%。然而，我们没有发现音频特征和身体运动之间的直接相关性。我们讨论了使用此类数据集进行音频驱动的笑声运动合成任务的挑战。 本文分析了双人对话场景中笑声与身体动作的关系，通过RGB视频提取肢体动作特征并研究其与笑声强度的关联性。 Hugo Bohy,Ahmad Hammoudeh,Antoine Maiorca,Stéphane Dupont,Thierry Dutoit cs.CV

authors_text: Zhicheng Cao,Kaituo Zhang,Liaojun Pang,Heng Zhao
title: A Demographic Attribute Guided Approach to Age Estimation
title_zh: 人口统计属性引导的年龄估计方法
abstract: Face-based age estimation has attracted enormous attention due to wide applications to public security surveillance, human-computer interaction, etc. With vigorous development of deep learning, age estimation based on deep neural network has become the mainstream practice. However, seeking a more suitable problem paradigm for age change characteristics, designing the corresponding loss function and designing a more effective feature extraction module still needs to be studied. What is more, change of face age is also related to demographic attributes such as ethnicity and gender, and the dynamics of different age groups is also quite different. This problem has so far not been paid enough attention to. How to use demographic attribute information to improve the performance of age estimation remains to be further explored. In light of these issues, this research makes full use of auxiliary information of face attributes and proposes a new age estimation approach with an attribute guidance module. We first design a multi-scale attention residual convolution unit (MARCU) to extract robust facial features other than simply using other standard feature modules such as VGG and ResNet. Then, after being especially treated through full connection (FC) layers, the facial demographic attributes are weight-summed by 1*1 convolutional layer and eventually merged with the age features by a global FC layer. Lastly, we propose a new error compression ranking (ECR) loss to better converge the age regression value. Experimental results on three public datasets of UTKFace, LAP2016 and Morph show that our proposed approach achieves superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face-based age estimation has attracted enormous attention due to wide applications to public security surveillance, human-computer interaction, etc. With vigorous development of deep learning, age estimation based on deep neural network has become the mainstream practice. However, seeking a more suitable problem paradigm for age change characteristics, designing the corresponding loss function and designing a more effective feature extraction module still needs to be studied. What is more, change of face age is also related to demographic attributes such as ethnicity and gender, and the dynamics of different age groups is also quite different. This problem has so far not been paid enough attention to. How to use demographic attribute information to improve the performance of age estimation remains to be further explored. In light of these issues, this research makes full use of auxiliary information of face attributes and proposes a new age estimation approach with an attribute guidance module. We first design a multi-scale attention residual convolution unit (MARCU) to extract robust facial features other than simply using other standard feature modules such as VGG and ResNet. Then, after being especially treated through full connection (FC) layers, the facial demographic attributes are weight-summed by 1*1 convolutional layer and eventually merged with the age features by a global FC layer. Lastly, we propose a new error compression ranking (ECR) loss to better converge the age regression value. Experimental results on three public datasets of UTKFace, LAP2016 and Morph show that our proposed approach achieves superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于人脸的年龄估计因其广泛应用于公共安全监控、人机交互等领域而受到广泛关注。随着深度学习的蓬勃发展，基于深度神经网络的年龄估计已成为主流实践。然而，寻求更适合年龄变化特征的问题范式、设计相应的损失函数以及设计更有效的特征提取模块仍然需要研究。更重要的是，人脸年龄的变化还与种族、性别等人口统计属性相关，不同年龄段的动态也存在较大差异。这个问题至今还没有引起足够的重视。如何利用人口统计属性信息来提高年龄估计的性能还有待进一步探索。针对这些问题，本研究充分利用人脸属性的辅助信息，提出了一种带有属性引导模块的年龄估计新方法。我们首先设计了一个多尺度注意力残差卷积单元（MARCU）来提取鲁棒的面部特征，而不是简单地使用其他标准特征模块（例如 VGG 和 ResNet）。然后，经过全连接（FC）层的特殊处理后，面部人口统计属性通过1*1卷积层进行权重求和，并最终通过全局FC层与年龄特征合并。最后，我们提出了一种新的错误压缩排名（ECR）损失，以更好地收敛年龄回归值。在 UTKFace、LAP2016 和 Morph 三个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人脸属性引导的年龄估计方法，通过结合人口统计属性（如种族和性别）提升年龄估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在年龄估计中未充分考虑人口统计属性对年龄变化的影响，且特征提取模块和损失函数设计仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 设计多尺度注意力残差卷积单元（MARCU）提取面部特征，通过全连接层处理人口属性信息并加权融合，提出误差压缩排序（ECR）损失函数优化回归收敛。
AI.result: 在UTKFace、LAP2016和Morph三个公开数据集上，该方法性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合人口统计属性信息及改进的模块与损失函数能有效提升年龄估计准确率。

ai_content.conclusion: 融合人口统计属性信息及改进的模块与损失函数能有效提升年龄估计准确率。

authors_text: Lun Ai,Johannes Langer,Stephen H. Muggleton,Ute Schmid
title: Explanatory machine learning for sequential human teaching
title_zh: 用于顺序人类教学的解释性机器学习
comment: Submitted to the International Joint Conference on Learning & Reasoning (IJCLR) 2023
comments: Submitted to the International Joint Conference on Learning & Reasoning (IJCLR) 2023
abstract: The topic of comprehensibility of machine-learned theories has recently drawn increasing attention. Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) uses logic programming to derive logic theories from small data based on abduction and induction techniques. Learned theories are represented in the form of rules as declarative descriptions of obtained knowledge. In earlier work, the authors provided the first evidence of a measurable increase in human comprehension based on machine-learned logic rules for simple classification tasks. In a later study, it was found that the presentation of machine-learned explanations to humans can produce both beneficial and harmful effects in the context of game learning. We continue our investigation of comprehensibility by examining the effects of the ordering of concept presentations on human comprehension. In this work, we examine the explanatory effects of curriculum order and the presence of machine-learned explanations for sequential problem-solving. We show that 1) there exist tasks A and B such that learning A before B has a better human comprehension with respect to learning B before A and 2) there exist tasks A and B such that the presence of explanations when learning A contributes to improved human comprehension when subsequently learning B. We propose a framework for the effects of sequential teaching on comprehension based on an existing definition of comprehensibility and provide evidence for support from data collected in human trials. Empirical results show that sequential teaching of concepts with increasing complexity a) has a beneficial effect on human comprehension and b) leads to human re-discovery of divide-and-conquer problem-solving strategies, and c) studying machine-learned explanations allows adaptations of human problem-solving strategy with better performance.
summary: The topic of comprehensibility of machine-learned theories has recently drawn increasing attention. Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) uses logic programming to derive logic theories from small data based on abduction and induction techniques. Learned theories are represented in the form of rules as declarative descriptions of obtained knowledge. In earlier work, the authors provided the first evidence of a measurable increase in human comprehension based on machine-learned logic rules for simple classification tasks. In a later study, it was found that the presentation of machine-learned explanations to humans can produce both beneficial and harmful effects in the context of game learning. We continue our investigation of comprehensibility by examining the effects of the ordering of concept presentations on human comprehension. In this work, we examine the explanatory effects of curriculum order and the presence of machine-learned explanations for sequential problem-solving. We show that 1) there exist tasks A and B such that learning A before B has a better human comprehension with respect to learning B before A and 2) there exist tasks A and B such that the presence of explanations when learning A contributes to improved human comprehension when subsequently learning B. We propose a framework for the effects of sequential teaching on comprehension based on an existing definition of comprehensibility and provide evidence for support from data collected in human trials. Empirical results show that sequential teaching of concepts with increasing complexity a) has a beneficial effect on human comprehension and b) leads to human re-discovery of divide-and-conquer problem-solving strategies, and c) studying machine-learned explanations allows adaptations of human problem-solving strategy with better performance.
abstract_zh: 机器学习理论的可理解性这一话题最近引起了越来越多的关注。归纳逻辑编程 (ILP) 使用逻辑编程基于溯因和归纳技术从小数据中导出逻辑理论。学到的理论以规则的形式表示，作为所获得知识的声明性描述。在早期的工作中，作者提供了第一个证据，证明基于机器学习的简单分类任务的逻辑规则，人类理解力显着提高。在后来的一项研究中发现，向人类呈现机器学习的解释在游戏学习的背景下既可以产生有益的效果，也可以产生有害的影响。我们通过检查概念呈现的顺序对人类理解的影响来继续我们对可理解性的研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了课程顺序的解释效果以及机器学习解释对顺序解决问题的存在。我们证明：1）存在任务 A 和 B，使得在 A 之前学习 A 相对于在 A 之前学习 B 具有更好的人类理解能力；2）存在任务 A 和 B，使得学习 A 时的解释有助于在随后学习 B 时提高人类理解能力。我们基于现有的可理解性定义，提出了一个关于顺序教学对理解的影响的框架，并提供了人类试验中收集的数据支持的证据。实证结果表明，顺序教授越来越复杂的概念a）对人类理解有有益影响，b）导致人类重新发现分而治之的问题解决策略，c）研究机器学习的解释可以使人类解决问题的策略具有更好的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了顺序教学中概念呈现顺序及机器学习解释对人类理解的影响，探讨了序列问题解决中的解释性机器学习效果。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习理论可解释性的重要性提升，研究如何通过顺序教学和机器生成的解释增强人类对复杂任务的理解成为关键问题。
AI.method: 通过人类实验对比不同任务顺序（A先于B或B先于A）及解释存在与否对学习效果的影响，结合现有可解释性定义构建分析框架。
AI.result: 1) 任务顺序影响理解效果，先学简单任务更优；2) 任务A的解释可提升任务B的学习效果；3) 顺序教学促进分治策略的再发现并提升解决问题的性能。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计教学序列并结合机器学习解释能有效增强人类对复杂问题的理解与策略优化能力。

result: 1) 任务顺序影响理解效果，先学简单任务更优；2) 任务A的解释可提升任务B的学习效果；3) 顺序教学促进分治策略的再发现并提升解决问题的性能。
conclusion: 合理设计教学序列并结合机器学习解释能有效增强人类对复杂问题的理解与策略优化能力。
search_text: Explanatory machine learning for sequential human teaching 用于顺序人类教学的解释性机器学习 The topic of comprehensibility of machine-learned theories has recently drawn increasing attention. Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) uses logic programming to derive logic theories from small data based on abduction and induction techniques. Learned theories are represented in the form of rules as declarative descriptions of obtained knowledge. In earlier work, the authors provided the first evidence of a measurable increase in human comprehension based on machine-learned logic rules for simple classification tasks. In a later study, it was found that the presentation of machine-learned explanations to humans can produce both beneficial and harmful effects in the context of game learning. We continue our investigation of comprehensibility by examining the effects of the ordering of concept presentations on human comprehension. In this work, we examine the explanatory effects of curriculum order and the presence of machine-learned explanations for sequential problem-solving. We show that 1) there exist tasks A and B such that learning A before B has a better human comprehension with respect to learning B before A and 2) there exist tasks A and B such that the presence of explanations when learning A contributes to improved human comprehension when subsequently learning B. We propose a framework for the effects of sequential teaching on comprehension based on an existing definition of comprehensibility and provide evidence for support from data collected in human trials. Empirical results show that sequential teaching of concepts with increasing complexity a) has a beneficial effect on human comprehension and b) leads to human re-discovery of divide-and-conquer problem-solving strategies, and c) studying machine-learned explanations allows adaptations of human problem-solving strategy with better performance. 机器学习理论的可理解性这一话题最近引起了越来越多的关注。归纳逻辑编程 (ILP) 使用逻辑编程基于溯因和归纳技术从小数据中导出逻辑理论。学到的理论以规则的形式表示，作为所获得知识的声明性描述。在早期的工作中，作者提供了第一个证据，证明基于机器学习的简单分类任务的逻辑规则，人类理解力显着提高。在后来的一项研究中发现，向人类呈现机器学习的解释在游戏学习的背景下既可以产生有益的效果，也可以产生有害的影响。我们通过检查概念呈现的顺序对人类理解的影响来继续我们对可理解性的研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了课程顺序的解释效果以及机器学习解释对顺序解决问题的存在。我们证明：1）存在任务 A 和 B，使得在 A 之前学习 A 相对于在 A 之前学习 B 具有更好的人类理解能力；2）存在任务 A 和 B，使得学习 A 时的解释有助于在随后学习 B 时提高人类理解能力。我们基于现有的可理解性定义，提出了一个关于顺序教学对理解的影响的框架，并提供了人类试验中收集的数据支持的证据。实证结果表明，顺序教授越来越复杂的概念a）对人类理解有有益影响，b）导致人类重新发现分而治之的问题解决策略，c）研究机器学习的解释可以使人类解决问题的策略具有更好的表现。 本文研究了顺序教学中概念呈现顺序及机器学习解释对人类理解的影响，探讨了序列问题解决中的解释性机器学习效果。 Lun Ai,Johannes Langer,Stephen H. Muggleton,Ute Schmid cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yue Cao,XiaoJiang Zhou,Jiaqi Feng,Peihao Huang,Yao Xiao,Dayao Chen,Sheng Chen
title: Sampling Is All You Need on Modeling Long-Term User Behaviors for CTR Prediction
title_zh: 在对长期用户行为进行建模以进行点击率预测时，只需采样即可
abstract: Rich user behavior data has been proven to be of great value for Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction applications, especially in industrial recommender, search, or advertising systems. However, it's non-trivial for real-world systems to make full use of long-term user behaviors due to the strict requirements of online serving time. Most previous works adopt the retrieval-based strategy, where a small number of user behaviors are retrieved first for subsequent attention. However, the retrieval-based methods are sub-optimal and would cause more or less information losses, and it's difficult to balance the effectiveness and efficiency of the retrieval algorithm. In this paper, we propose SDIM (Sampling-based Deep Interest Modeling), a simple yet effective sampling-based end-to-end approach for modeling long-term user behaviors. We sample from multiple hash functions to generate hash signatures of the candidate item and each item in the user behavior sequence, and obtain the user interest by directly gathering behavior items associated with the candidate item with the same hash signature. We show theoretically and experimentally that the proposed method performs on par with standard attention-based models on modeling long-term user behaviors, while being sizable times faster. We also introduce the deployment of SDIM in our system. Specifically, we decouple the behavior sequence hashing, which is the most time-consuming part, from the CTR model by designing a separate module named BSE (behavior Sequence Encoding). BSE is latency-free for the CTR server, enabling us to model extremely long user behaviors. Both offline and online experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of SDIM. SDIM now has been deployed online in the search system of Meituan APP.
summary: Rich user behavior data has been proven to be of great value for Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction applications, especially in industrial recommender, search, or advertising systems. However, it's non-trivial for real-world systems to make full use of long-term user behaviors due to the strict requirements of online serving time. Most previous works adopt the retrieval-based strategy, where a small number of user behaviors are retrieved first for subsequent attention. However, the retrieval-based methods are sub-optimal and would cause more or less information losses, and it's difficult to balance the effectiveness and efficiency of the retrieval algorithm. In this paper, we propose SDIM (Sampling-based Deep Interest Modeling), a simple yet effective sampling-based end-to-end approach for modeling long-term user behaviors. We sample from multiple hash functions to generate hash signatures of the candidate item and each item in the user behavior sequence, and obtain the user interest by directly gathering behavior items associated with the candidate item with the same hash signature. We show theoretically and experimentally that the proposed method performs on par with standard attention-based models on modeling long-term user behaviors, while being sizable times faster. We also introduce the deployment of SDIM in our system. Specifically, we decouple the behavior sequence hashing, which is the most time-consuming part, from the CTR model by designing a separate module named BSE (behavior Sequence Encoding). BSE is latency-free for the CTR server, enabling us to model extremely long user behaviors. Both offline and online experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of SDIM. SDIM now has been deployed online in the search system of Meituan APP.
abstract_zh: 丰富的用户行为数据已被证明对于点击率 (CTR) 预测应用具有巨大价值，尤其是在工业推荐、搜索或广告系统中。然而，由于在线服务时间的严格要求，现实世界的系统充分利用长期用户行为并非易事。之前的大多数工作都采用基于检索的策略，首先检索少量用户行为以供后续关注。然而，基于检索的方法并不是最优的，会或多或少地造成信息损失，并且很难平衡检索算法的有效性和效率。在本文中，我们提出了 SDIM（基于采样的深度兴趣建模），这是一种简单而有效的基于采样的端到端方法，用于对长期用户行为进行建模。我们从多个哈希函数中进行采样，生成候选项目和用户行为序列中每个项目的哈希签名，并通过直接收集与具有相同哈希签名的候选项目相关的行为项目来获取用户兴趣。我们从理论上和实验上证明，所提出的方法在建模长期用户行为方面与标准的基于注意力的模型表现相同，同时速度要快很多倍。我们还介绍了SDIM在我们系统中的部署。具体来说，我们通过设计一个名为 BSE（行为序列编码）的单独模块，将最耗时的部分行为序列哈希与 CTR 模型解耦。 BSE 对于 CTR 服务器来说是无延迟的，使我们能够对极长的用户行为进行建模。通过离线和在线实验来证明SDIM的有效性。目前SDIM已上线美团APP搜索系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于采样的深度兴趣建模方法（SDIM），用于在点击率预测中高效建模长期用户行为。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检索的注意力机制方法在处理长期用户行为时存在信息损失且效率低下，难以平衡效果与在线服务时延。
AI.method: 通过多哈希函数采样生成候选物品与用户行为序列的哈希签名，直接聚合相同签名的行为项建模用户兴趣，并设计独立模块BSE实现哈希计算与CTR模型解耦。
AI.result: SDIM在保持与标准注意力模型相当效果的同时，计算效率显著提升，并已在美团APP搜索系统中成功部署。
AI.conclusion: SDIM为长期用户行为建模提供了简单高效的采样解决方案，有效解决了工业级CTR预测中的时延与效果矛盾。

authors_text: Felix Christian Bauer,Gregor Lenz,Saeid Haghighatshoar,Sadique Sheik
title: EXODUS: Stable and Efficient Training of Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: EXODUS：稳定高效的尖峰神经网络训练
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are gaining significant traction in machine learning tasks where energy-efficiency is of utmost importance. Training such networks using the state-of-the-art back-propagation through time (BPTT) is, however, very time-consuming. Previous work by Shrestha and Orchard [2018] employs an efficient GPU-accelerated back-propagation algorithm called SLAYER, which speeds up training considerably. SLAYER, however, does not take into account the neuron reset mechanism while computing the gradients, which we argue to be the source of numerical instability. To counteract this, SLAYER introduces a gradient scale hyperparameter across layers, which needs manual tuning. In this paper, (i) we modify SLAYER and design an algorithm called EXODUS, that accounts for the neuron reset mechanism and applies the Implicit Function Theorem (IFT) to calculate the correct gradients (equivalent to those computed by BPTT), (ii) we eliminate the need for ad-hoc scaling of gradients, thus, reducing the training complexity tremendously, (iii) we demonstrate, via computer simulations, that EXODUS is numerically stable and achieves a comparable or better performance than SLAYER especially in various tasks with SNNs that rely on temporal features. Our code is available at https://github.com/synsense/sinabs-exodus.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are gaining significant traction in machine learning tasks where energy-efficiency is of utmost importance. Training such networks using the state-of-the-art back-propagation through time (BPTT) is, however, very time-consuming. Previous work by Shrestha and Orchard [2018] employs an efficient GPU-accelerated back-propagation algorithm called SLAYER, which speeds up training considerably. SLAYER, however, does not take into account the neuron reset mechanism while computing the gradients, which we argue to be the source of numerical instability. To counteract this, SLAYER introduces a gradient scale hyperparameter across layers, which needs manual tuning. In this paper, (i) we modify SLAYER and design an algorithm called EXODUS, that accounts for the neuron reset mechanism and applies the Implicit Function Theorem (IFT) to calculate the correct gradients (equivalent to those computed by BPTT), (ii) we eliminate the need for ad-hoc scaling of gradients, thus, reducing the training complexity tremendously, (iii) we demonstrate, via computer simulations, that EXODUS is numerically stable and achieves a comparable or better performance than SLAYER especially in various tasks with SNNs that rely on temporal features. Our code is available at https://github.com/synsense/sinabs-exodus.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 在能源效率至关重要的机器学习任务中获得了巨大的关注。然而，使用最先进的时间反向传播（BPTT）来训练此类网络非常耗时。 Shrestha 和 Orchard [2018] 之前的工作采用了一种名为 SLAYER 的高效 GPU 加速反向传播算法，可显着加快训练速度。然而，SLAYER 在计算梯度时没有考虑神经元重置机制，我们认为这是数值不稳定的根源。为了解决这个问题，SLAYER引入了跨层的梯度尺度超参数，这需要手动调整。在本文中，（i）我们修改了 SLAYER 并设计了一种名为 EXODUS 的算法，该算法考虑了神经元重置机制并应用隐式函数定理（IFT）来计算正确的梯度（相当于 BPTT 计算的梯度），（ii）我们消除了对梯度进行临时缩放的需要，从而极大地降低了训练复杂性，（iii）我们通过计算机模拟证明 EXODUS 在数值上是稳定的，并且实现了与SLAYER，尤其是在依赖时间特征的 SNN 的各种任务中。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/synsense/sinabs-exodus 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXODUS算法，通过改进SLAYER方法解决脉冲神经网络（SNN）训练中的数值不稳定问题，并提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAYER方法在计算梯度时忽略神经元重置机制，导致数值不稳定，且需手动调整梯度缩放参数，增加了训练复杂度。
AI.method: 基于隐函数定理（IFT）设计EXODUS算法，纳入神经元重置机制以准确计算梯度，并消除对梯度缩放参数的依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明EXODUS在保持或提升性能的同时，显著提高数值稳定性，尤其在依赖时间特征的SNN任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: EXODUS通过理论改进和算法优化，为SNN训练提供了更稳定高效的解决方案，优于现有方法如SLAYER。
