search_text: E-Scooter Rider Detection and Classification in Dense Urban Environments 密集城市环境中的电动滑板车骑手检测和分类 Accurate detection and classification of vulnerable road users is a safety critical requirement for the deployment of autonomous vehicles in heterogeneous traffic. Although similar in physical appearance to pedestrians, e-scooter riders follow distinctly different characteristics of movement and can reach speeds of up to 45kmph. The challenge of detecting e-scooter riders is exacerbated in urban environments where the frequency of partial occlusion is increased as riders navigate between vehicles, traffic infrastructure and other road users. This can lead to the non-detection or mis-classification of e-scooter riders as pedestrians, providing inaccurate information for accident mitigation and path planning in autonomous vehicle applications. This research introduces a novel benchmark for partially occluded e-scooter rider detection to facilitate the objective characterization of detection models. A novel, occlusion-aware method of e-scooter rider detection is presented that achieves a 15.93% improvement in detection performance over the current state of the art. 准确检测和分类易受影响的道路使用者是在异构交通中部署自动驾驶车辆的安全关键要求。尽管外表与行人相似，但电动滑板车骑手的运动特征明显不同，最高时速可达 45 公里/小时。在城市环境中，检测电动滑板车骑手的挑战更加严峻，因为当骑手在车辆、交通基础设施和其他道路使用者之间导航时，部分遮挡的频率会增加。这可能导致电动滑板车骑手未被检测到或被错误分类为行人，从而为自动驾驶汽车应用中的事故缓解和路径规划提供不准确的信息。这项研究引入了一种用于部分遮挡电动滑板车骑手检测的新颖基准，以促进检测模型的客观表征。提出了一种新颖的、遮挡感知的电动滑板车骑手检测方法，与当前最先进的技术相比，检测性能提高了 15.93%。 本文主要研究在密集城市环境中对电动滑板车骑行者的检测与分类问题。 Shane Gilroy,Darragh Mullins,Edward Jones,Ashkan Parsi,Martin Glavin cs.CV

authors_text: Edwin H. Salazar-Jurado,Ruber Hernández-García,Karina Vilches-Ponce,Ricardo J. Barrientos,Marco Mora,Gaurav Jaswal
title: Towards the Generation of Synthetic Images of Palm Vein Patterns: A Review
title_zh: 棕榈静脉图案合成图像的生成：回顾
abstract: With the recent success of computer vision and deep learning, remarkable progress has been achieved on automatic personal recognition using vein biometrics. However, collecting large-scale real-world training data for palm vein recognition has turned out to be challenging, mainly due to the noise and irregular variations included at the time of acquisition. Meanwhile, existing palm vein recognition datasets are usually collected under near-infrared light, lacking detailed annotations on attributes (e.g., pose), so the influences of different attributes on vein recognition have been poorly investigated. Therefore, this paper examines the suitability of synthetic vein images generated to compensate for the urgent lack of publicly available large-scale datasets. Firstly, we present an overview of recent research progress on palm vein recognition, from the basic background knowledge to vein anatomical structure, data acquisition, public database, and quality assessment procedures. Then, we focus on the state-of-the-art methods that have allowed the generation of vascular structures for biometric purposes and the modeling of biological networks with their respective application domains. In addition, we review the existing research on the generation of style transfer and biological nature-based synthetic palm vein image algorithms. Afterward, we formalize a general flowchart for the creation of a synthetic database comparing real palm vein images and generated synthetic samples to obtain some understanding into the development of the realistic vein imaging system. Ultimately, we conclude by discussing the challenges, insights, and future perspectives in generating synthetic palm vein images for further works.
summary: With the recent success of computer vision and deep learning, remarkable progress has been achieved on automatic personal recognition using vein biometrics. However, collecting large-scale real-world training data for palm vein recognition has turned out to be challenging, mainly due to the noise and irregular variations included at the time of acquisition. Meanwhile, existing palm vein recognition datasets are usually collected under near-infrared light, lacking detailed annotations on attributes (e.g., pose), so the influences of different attributes on vein recognition have been poorly investigated. Therefore, this paper examines the suitability of synthetic vein images generated to compensate for the urgent lack of publicly available large-scale datasets. Firstly, we present an overview of recent research progress on palm vein recognition, from the basic background knowledge to vein anatomical structure, data acquisition, public database, and quality assessment procedures. Then, we focus on the state-of-the-art methods that have allowed the generation of vascular structures for biometric purposes and the modeling of biological networks with their respective application domains. In addition, we review the existing research on the generation of style transfer and biological nature-based synthetic palm vein image algorithms. Afterward, we formalize a general flowchart for the creation of a synthetic database comparing real palm vein images and generated synthetic samples to obtain some understanding into the development of the realistic vein imaging system. Ultimately, we conclude by discussing the challenges, insights, and future perspectives in generating synthetic palm vein images for further works.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉和深度学习最近的成功，使用静脉生物识别技术的自动个人识别取得了显着进展。然而，收集用于手掌静脉识别的大规模现实世界训练数据具有挑战性，这主要是由于采集时包含的噪声和不规则变化。同时，现有的手掌静脉识别数据集通常是在近红外光下收集的，缺乏对属性（例如姿势）的详细注释，因此不同属性对静脉识别的影响研究很少。因此，本文研究了生成的合成静脉图像的适用性，以弥补公开可用的大规模数据集的迫切缺乏。首先，我们从基础背景知识到静脉解剖结构、数据采集、公共数据库和质量评估程序，概述了手掌静脉识别的最新研究进展。然后，我们重点关注最先进的方法，这些方法允许生成用于生物识别目的的血管结构，以及对其各自应用领域的生物网络进行建模。此外，我们回顾了风格迁移生成和基于生物性质的合成手掌静脉图像算法的现有研究。之后，我们形式化了创建合成数据库的一般流程图，比较真实的手掌静脉图像和生成的合成样本，以获得对真实静脉成像系统的开发的一些了解。最后，我们最后讨论了生成合成棕榈静脉图像以供进一步工作的挑战、见解和未来前景。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了合成掌纹图像生成方法，以解决真实数据不足导致的掌纹识别研究局限。
AI.motivation: 现有掌纹数据集存在采集噪声、标注不足及属性影响研究缺失的问题，亟需合成数据补充。
AI.method: 系统梳理掌纹识别技术发展，回顾生物特征生成算法，比较真实与合成样本并构建合成数据库流程框架。
AI.result: 总结了合成图像生成技术现状，分析其优势与局限性，提出未来研究方向与技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据可有效缓解真实数据不足问题，但需进一步优化生成质量与属性可控性以推动应用发展。

authors_text: Martin Balla,Diego Perez-Liebana
title: Task Relabelling for Multi-task Transfer using Successor Features
title_zh: 使用后继特征进行多任务传输的任务重新标记
comment: accepted for publication in IEEE Conference on Games (CoG) 2022
comments: accepted for publication in IEEE Conference on Games (CoG) 2022
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning has been very successful recently with various works on complex domains. Most works are concerned with learning a single policy that solves the target task, but is fixed in the sense that if the environment changes the agent is unable to adapt to it. Successor Features (SFs) proposes a mechanism that allows learning policies that are not tied to any particular reward function. In this work we investigate how SFs may be pre-trained without observing any reward in a custom environment that features resource collection, traps and crafting. After pre-training we expose the SF agents to various target tasks and see how well they can transfer to new tasks. Transferring is done without any further training on the SF agents, instead just by providing a task vector. For training the SFs we propose a task relabelling method which greatly improves the agent's performance.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning has been very successful recently with various works on complex domains. Most works are concerned with learning a single policy that solves the target task, but is fixed in the sense that if the environment changes the agent is unable to adapt to it. Successor Features (SFs) proposes a mechanism that allows learning policies that are not tied to any particular reward function. In this work we investigate how SFs may be pre-trained without observing any reward in a custom environment that features resource collection, traps and crafting. After pre-training we expose the SF agents to various target tasks and see how well they can transfer to new tasks. Transferring is done without any further training on the SF agents, instead just by providing a task vector. For training the SFs we propose a task relabelling method which greatly improves the agent's performance.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习最近在复杂领域的各种工作中取得了非常成功的成果。大多数工作都涉及学习解决目标任务的单一策略，但在某种意义上是固定的，如果环境发生变化，代理将无法适应它。后继特征（SF）提出了一种机制，允许学习策略不依赖于任何特定的奖励函数。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何在以资源收集、陷阱和制作为特色的自定义环境中在不观察任何奖励的情况下对 SF 进行预训练。预训练后，我们让 SF 智能体接触各种目标任务，看看它们转移到新任务的能力如何。转移无需对 SF 代理进行任何进一步培训，只需提供任务向量即可完成。为了训练 SF，我们提出了一种任务重新标记方法，该方法极大地提高了代理的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用继承特征（SFs）和任务重标记方法，实现无需奖励观察的多任务迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习策略难以适应环境变化，而继承特征能解耦策略与奖励函数，但需解决预训练与任务迁移效率问题。
AI.method: 在自定义资源收集环境中预训练SF代理，通过任务重标记优化特征学习，迁移时仅需提供任务向量无需额外训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个目标任务中实现有效迁移，任务重标记显著提升代理性能。
AI.conclusion: 任务重标记机制增强了继承特征在多任务迁移中的适应性，为零样本迁移提供了新思路。

search_text: Task Relabelling for Multi-task Transfer using Successor Features 使用后继特征进行多任务传输的任务重新标记 Deep Reinforcement Learning has been very successful recently with various works on complex domains. Most works are concerned with learning a single policy that solves the target task, but is fixed in the sense that if the environment changes the agent is unable to adapt to it. Successor Features (SFs) proposes a mechanism that allows learning policies that are not tied to any particular reward function. In this work we investigate how SFs may be pre-trained without observing any reward in a custom environment that features resource collection, traps and crafting. After pre-training we expose the SF agents to various target tasks and see how well they can transfer to new tasks. Transferring is done without any further training on the SF agents, instead just by providing a task vector. For training the SFs we propose a task relabelling method which greatly improves the agent's performance. 深度强化学习最近在复杂领域的各种工作中取得了非常成功的成果。大多数工作都涉及学习解决目标任务的单一策略，但在某种意义上是固定的，如果环境发生变化，代理将无法适应它。后继特征（SF）提出了一种机制，允许学习策略不依赖于任何特定的奖励函数。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何在以资源收集、陷阱和制作为特色的自定义环境中在不观察任何奖励的情况下对 SF 进行预训练。预训练后，我们让 SF 智能体接触各种目标任务，看看它们转移到新任务的能力如何。转移无需对 SF 代理进行任何进一步培训，只需提供任务向量即可完成。为了训练 SF，我们提出了一种任务重新标记方法，该方法极大地提高了代理的性能。 本文提出利用继承特征（SFs）和任务重标记方法，实现无需奖励观察的多任务迁移学习。 Martin Balla,Diego Perez-Liebana cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rémy Sun,Clément Masson,Gilles Hénaff,Nicolas Thome,Matthieu Cord
title: Swapping Semantic Contents for Mixing Images
title_zh: 交换语义内容以混合图像
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
comments: Accepted at ICPR 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
abstract: Deep architecture have proven capable of solving many tasks provided a sufficient amount of labeled data. In fact, the amount of available labeled data has become the principal bottleneck in low label settings such as Semi-Supervised Learning. Mixing Data Augmentations do not typically yield new labeled samples, as indiscriminately mixing contents creates between-class samples. In this work, we introduce the SciMix framework that can learn to generator to embed a semantic style code into image backgrounds, we obtain new mixing scheme for data augmentation. We then demonstrate that SciMix yields novel mixed samples that inherit many characteristics from their non-semantic parents. Afterwards, we verify those samples can be used to improve the performance semi-supervised frameworks like Mean Teacher or Fixmatch, and even fully supervised learning on a small labeled dataset.
summary: Deep architecture have proven capable of solving many tasks provided a sufficient amount of labeled data. In fact, the amount of available labeled data has become the principal bottleneck in low label settings such as Semi-Supervised Learning. Mixing Data Augmentations do not typically yield new labeled samples, as indiscriminately mixing contents creates between-class samples. In this work, we introduce the SciMix framework that can learn to generator to embed a semantic style code into image backgrounds, we obtain new mixing scheme for data augmentation. We then demonstrate that SciMix yields novel mixed samples that inherit many characteristics from their non-semantic parents. Afterwards, we verify those samples can be used to improve the performance semi-supervised frameworks like Mean Teacher or Fixmatch, and even fully supervised learning on a small labeled dataset.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，深度架构能够解决许多任务，只要提供足够数量的标记数据。事实上，可用标记数据的数量已经成为半监督学习等低标签设置的主要瓶颈。混合数据增强通常不会产生新的标记样本，因为不加区别地混合内容会创建类间样本。在这项工作中，我们引入了 SciMix 框架，它可以学习生成器将语义样式代码嵌入到图像背景中，我们获得了用于数据增强的新混合方案。然后，我们证明 SciMix 产生新颖的混合样本，这些样本继承了非语义父母的许多特征。之后，我们验证这些样本可用于提高半监督框架（如 Mean Teacher 或 Fixmatch）的性能，甚至可以在小型标记数据集上进行完全监督学习。

AI.tldr: 提出SciMix框架，通过交换语义内容混合图像生成新样本，以提升半监督和全监督学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法混合内容易产生类间样本，无法生成有效带标签样本，而标签数据不足是半监督学习的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出SciMix框架，学习将语义风格代码嵌入图像背景，生成保留父图像特征的混合样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，SciMix生成的样本能有效提升半监督和全监督模型性能。
AI.conclusion: SciMix框架有效生成高质量混合样本，为半监督和全监督学习提供新数据增强方法。

authors_text: Shaik Jani Babu,Rohit Singh,Siona Menezes Picardo,Nilesh Goel,Sonal Singhal
title: Investigating the impact of BTI, HCI and time-zero variability on neuromorphic spike event generation circuits
title_zh: 研究 BTI、HCI 和零时间变异对神经形态尖峰事件生成电路的影响
abstract: Neuromorphic computing refers to brain-inspired computers, that differentiate it from von Neumann architecture. Analog VLSI based neuromorphic circuits is a current research interest. Two simpler spiking integrate and fire neuron model namely axon-Hillock (AH) and voltage integrate, and fire (VIF) circuits are commonly used for generating spike events. This paper discusses the impact of reliability issues like Bias Temperature instability (BTI) and Hot Carrier Injection (HCI), and timezero variability on these CMOS based neuromorphic circuits. AH and VIF circuits are implemented using HKMG based 45nm technology. For reliability analysis, industry standard Cadence RelXpert tool is used. For time-zero variability analysis, 1000 Monte-Carlo simulations are performed.
summary: Neuromorphic computing refers to brain-inspired computers, that differentiate it from von Neumann architecture. Analog VLSI based neuromorphic circuits is a current research interest. Two simpler spiking integrate and fire neuron model namely axon-Hillock (AH) and voltage integrate, and fire (VIF) circuits are commonly used for generating spike events. This paper discusses the impact of reliability issues like Bias Temperature instability (BTI) and Hot Carrier Injection (HCI), and timezero variability on these CMOS based neuromorphic circuits. AH and VIF circuits are implemented using HKMG based 45nm technology. For reliability analysis, industry standard Cadence RelXpert tool is used. For time-zero variability analysis, 1000 Monte-Carlo simulations are performed.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算是指受大脑启发的计算机，这与冯·诺依曼架构不同。基于模拟 VLSI 的神经形态电路是当前的研究兴趣。两种更简单的尖峰积分和激发神经元模型，即轴突-希尔洛克（AH）和电压积分和激发（VIF）电路通常用于生成尖峰事件。本文讨论了偏置温度不稳定性 (BTI) 和热载流子注入 (HCI) 等可靠性问题以及零时变异对这些基于 CMOS 的神经形态电路的影响。 AH 和 VIF 电路采用基于 HKMG 的 45nm 技术实现。对于可靠性分析，使用行业标准 Cadence RelXpert 工具。对于零时间变异性分析，执行了 1000 次蒙特卡罗模拟。

AI.tldr: 研究BTI、HCI及时间零变异对基于CMOS的神经形态脉冲生成电路的影响。
AI.motivation: 神经形态计算作为脑启发计算的重要方向，其电路可靠性受BTI、HCI及时间零变异影响，需评估这些因素对电路性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用45nm HKMG工艺实现AH和VIF电路，利用Cadence RelXpert工具分析可靠性，通过1000次蒙特卡洛模拟评估时间零变异。
AI.result: BTI和HCI显著影响电路参数稳定性，时间零变异导致脉冲时间分布波动，进而影响电路整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性因素对神经形态电路设计具有重要影响，需在设计阶段纳入这些变量以提高系统稳定性。

authors_text: Risheng Liu,Jiaxin Gao,Xuan Liu,Xin Fan
title: Revisiting GANs by Best-Response Constraint: Perspective, Methodology, and Application
title_zh: 通过最佳响应约束重新审视 GAN：视角、方法论和应用
abstract: In past years, the minimax type single-level optimization formulation and its variations have been widely utilized to address Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Unfortunately, it has been proved that these alternating learning strategies cannot exactly reveal the intrinsic relationship between the generator and discriminator, thus easily result in a series of issues, including mode collapse, vanishing gradients and oscillations in the training phase, etc. In this work, by investigating the fundamental mechanism of GANs from the perspective of hierarchical optimization, we propose Best-Response Constraint (BRC), a general learning framework, that can explicitly formulate the potential dependency of the generator on the discriminator. Rather than adopting these existing time-consuming bilevel iterations, we design an implicit gradient scheme with outer-product Hessian approximation as our fast solution strategy. \emph{Noteworthy, we demonstrate that even with different motivations and formulations, a variety of existing GANs ALL can be uniformly improved by our flexible BRC methodology.} Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify the effectiveness, flexibility and stability of our proposed framework.
summary: In past years, the minimax type single-level optimization formulation and its variations have been widely utilized to address Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Unfortunately, it has been proved that these alternating learning strategies cannot exactly reveal the intrinsic relationship between the generator and discriminator, thus easily result in a series of issues, including mode collapse, vanishing gradients and oscillations in the training phase, etc. In this work, by investigating the fundamental mechanism of GANs from the perspective of hierarchical optimization, we propose Best-Response Constraint (BRC), a general learning framework, that can explicitly formulate the potential dependency of the generator on the discriminator. Rather than adopting these existing time-consuming bilevel iterations, we design an implicit gradient scheme with outer-product Hessian approximation as our fast solution strategy. \emph{Noteworthy, we demonstrate that even with different motivations and formulations, a variety of existing GANs ALL can be uniformly improved by our flexible BRC methodology.} Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify the effectiveness, flexibility and stability of our proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，极小极大型单级优化公式及其变体已被广泛用于解决生成对抗网络（GAN）问题。不幸的是，事实证明这些交替学习策略无法准确揭示生成器和判别器之间的内在关系，因此很容易导致一系列问题，包括模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练阶段的振荡等。在这项工作中，通过从层次优化的角度研究 GAN 的基本机制，我们提出了最佳响应约束（BRC）这一通用学习框架，它可以明确地表达生成器对判别器的潜在依赖性。我们没有采用这些现有的耗时的双层迭代，而是设计了一种隐式梯度方案，其中外积 Hessian 近似作为我们的快速求解策略。 \emph{值得注意的是，我们证明，即使有不同的动机和公式，各种现有的 GAN 都可以通过我们灵活的 BRC 方法统一改进。}大量的定量和定性实验结果验证了我们提出的框架的有效性、灵活性和稳定性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最佳响应约束（BRC）的通用学习框架，以解决生成对抗网络（GANs）训练中的模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练不稳定等问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GANs的交替学习策略无法准确揭示生成器与判别器之间的内在关系，导致模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练震荡等问题。
AI.method: 提出最佳响应约束（BRC）框架，通过隐式梯度方案结合外积Hessian近似，避免耗时的双层迭代，显式建模生成器对判别器的依赖关系。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在多个基准数据集上显著提升了GANs的生成质量与训练稳定性，且兼容多种现有GAN变体。
AI.conclusion: BRC框架通过显式建模生成器-判别器依赖关系，有效缓解了GANs训练中的核心问题，为未来研究提供了新的优化视角。

ai_content_json.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在多个基准数据集上显著提升了GANs的生成质量与训练稳定性，且兼容多种现有GAN变体。
ai_content_json.conclusion: BRC框架通过显式建模生成器-判别器依赖关系，有效缓解了GANs训练中的核心问题，为未来研究提供了新的优化视角。

tldr: 提出一种基于最佳响应约束（BRC）的通用学习框架，以解决生成对抗网络（GANs）训练中的模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练不稳定等问题。
motivation: 传统GANs的交替学习策略无法准确揭示生成器与判别器之间的内在关系，导致模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练震荡等问题。
method: 提出最佳响应约束（BRC）框架，通过隐式梯度方案结合外积Hessian近似，避免耗时的双层迭代，显式建模生成器对判别器的依赖关系。
result: 实验结果表明，该框架在多个基准数据集上显著提升了GANs的生成质量与训练稳定性，且兼容多种现有GAN变体。
conclusion: BRC框架通过显式建模生成器-判别器依赖关系，有效缓解了GANs训练中的核心问题，为未来研究提供了新的优化视角。
search_text: Revisiting GANs by Best-Response Constraint: Perspective, Methodology, and Application 通过最佳响应约束重新审视 GAN：视角、方法论和应用 In past years, the minimax type single-level optimization formulation and its variations have been widely utilized to address Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). Unfortunately, it has been proved that these alternating learning strategies cannot exactly reveal the intrinsic relationship between the generator and discriminator, thus easily result in a series of issues, including mode collapse, vanishing gradients and oscillations in the training phase, etc. In this work, by investigating the fundamental mechanism of GANs from the perspective of hierarchical optimization, we propose Best-Response Constraint (BRC), a general learning framework, that can explicitly formulate the potential dependency of the generator on the discriminator. Rather than adopting these existing time-consuming bilevel iterations, we design an implicit gradient scheme with outer-product Hessian approximation as our fast solution strategy. \emph{Noteworthy, we demonstrate that even with different motivations and formulations, a variety of existing GANs ALL can be uniformly improved by our flexible BRC methodology.} Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify the effectiveness, flexibility and stability of our proposed framework. 在过去的几年中，极小极大型单级优化公式及其变体已被广泛用于解决生成对抗网络（GAN）问题。不幸的是，事实证明这些交替学习策略无法准确揭示生成器和判别器之间的内在关系，因此很容易导致一系列问题，包括模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练阶段的振荡等。在这项工作中，通过从层次优化的角度研究 GAN 的基本机制，我们提出了最佳响应约束（BRC）这一通用学习框架，它可以明确地表达生成器对判别器的潜在依赖性。我们没有采用这些现有的耗时的双层迭代，而是设计了一种隐式梯度方案，其中外积 Hessian 近似作为我们的快速求解策略。 \emph{值得注意的是，我们证明，即使有不同的动机和公式，各种现有的 GAN 都可以通过我们灵活的 BRC 方法统一改进。}大量的定量和定性实验结果验证了我们提出的框架的有效性、灵活性和稳定性。 提出一种基于最佳响应约束（BRC）的通用学习框架，以解决生成对抗网络（GANs）训练中的模式崩溃、梯度消失和训练不稳定等问题。 Risheng Liu,Jiaxin Gao,Xuan Liu,Xin Fan cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Lukas S. Huber,Robert Geirhos,Felix A. Wichmann
title: The developmental trajectory of object recognition robustness: children are like small adults but unlike big deep neural networks
title_zh: 物体识别鲁棒性的发展轨迹：儿童就像小成年人，但不像大深度神经网络
comment: Manuscript under review at Journal of Vision
comments: Manuscript under review at Journal of Vision
abstract: In laboratory object recognition tasks based on undistorted photographs, both adult humans and Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) perform close to ceiling. Unlike adults', whose object recognition performance is robust against a wide range of image distortions, DNNs trained on standard ImageNet (1.3M images) perform poorly on distorted images. However, the last two years have seen impressive gains in DNN distortion robustness, predominantly achieved through ever-increasing large-scale datasets$\unicode{x2014}$orders of magnitude larger than ImageNet. While this simple brute-force approach is very effective in achieving human-level robustness in DNNs, it raises the question of whether human robustness, too, is simply due to extensive experience with (distorted) visual input during childhood and beyond. Here we investigate this question by comparing the core object recognition performance of 146 children (aged 4$\unicode{x2013}$15) against adults and against DNNs. We find, first, that already 4$\unicode{x2013}$6 year-olds showed remarkable robustness to image distortions and outperform DNNs trained on ImageNet. Second, we estimated the number of $\unicode{x201C}$images$\unicode{x201D}$ children have been exposed to during their lifetime. Compared to various DNNs, children's high robustness requires relatively little data. Third, when recognizing objects children$\unicode{x2014}$like adults but unlike DNNs$\unicode{x2014}$rely heavily on shape but not on texture cues. Together our results suggest that the remarkable robustness to distortions emerges early in the developmental trajectory of human object recognition and is unlikely the result of a mere accumulation of experience with distorted visual input. Even though current DNNs match human performance regarding robustness they seem to rely on different and more data-hungry strategies to do so.

We find, first, that already 4$\unicode{x2013}$6 year-olds showed remarkable robustness to image distortions and outperform DNNs trained on ImageNet. Second, we estimated the number of $\unicode{x201C}$images$\unicode{x201D}$ children have been exposed to during their lifetime. Third, when recognizing objects children$\unicode{x2014}$like adults but unlike DNNs$\unicode{x2014}$rely heavily on shape but not on texture cues. Even though current DNNs match human performance regarding robustness they seem to rely on different and more data-hungry strategies to do so.
abstract_zh: 在基于未失真照片的实验室物体识别任务中，成年人和深度神经网络 (DNN) 的表现都接近极限。与成年人的物体识别性能对各种图像失真具有鲁棒性不同，在标准 ImageNet（130 万张图像）上训练的 DNN 在失真图像上表现不佳。然而，过去两年，DNN 失真鲁棒性取得了令人瞩目的进步，这主要是通过不断增加比 ImageNet 大几个数量级的大型数据集$\unicode{x2014}$来实现的。虽然这种简单的蛮力方法对于在 DNN 中实现人类水平的鲁棒性非常有效，但它提出了一个问题：人类的鲁棒性是否也仅仅归因于儿童时期及以后对（扭曲的）视觉输入的丰富经验。在这里，我们通过比较 146 名儿童（4$\unicode{x2013}$15）与成人和 DNN 的核心对象识别性能来研究这个问题。首先，我们发现 4$\unicode{x2013}$6 岁的孩子对图像失真表现出非凡的鲁棒性，并且优于在 ImageNet 上训练的 DNN。其次，我们估计了儿童一生中接触过的$\unicode{x201C}$images$\unicode{x201D}$的数量。与各种 DNN 相比，儿童的高鲁棒性需要相对较少的数据。第三，在识别物体时，儿童$\unicode{x2014}$像成人一样，但与 DNN$\unicode{x2014}$ 严重依赖于形状，而不是纹理线索。总的来说，我们的结果表明，对扭曲的显着鲁棒性出现在人类物体识别发展轨迹的早期，并且不太可能仅仅是扭曲视觉输入经验积累的结果。尽管当前的 DNN 在鲁棒性方面与人类表现相匹配，但它们似乎依赖于不同且更需要数据的策略来实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究儿童、成人和深度神经网络（DNN）在图像失真情况下的物体识别鲁棒性发展轨迹，探讨人类鲁棒性是否源于经验积累。
AI.motivation: 尽管成人和DNN在无失真图像上表现优异，但DNN在失真图像上表现较差，而近年通过扩大数据集提升了DNN鲁棒性。研究旨在探讨人类鲁棒性是否源于童年期对失真视觉输入的大量经验。
AI.method: 比较146名4-15岁儿童、成人及DNN在失真图像上的物体识别表现，估算儿童一生接触的'图像量'，分析其依赖形状而非纹理线索的识别策略。
AI.result: 4-6岁儿童已展现显著失真鲁棒性并超越ImageNet训练的DNN；儿童的高鲁棒性所需数据量远低于DNN；儿童与成人类似，依赖形状而非纹理线索识别物体。
AI.conclusion: 人类物体识别的失真鲁棒性在早期发育阶段即出现，非单纯经验积累结果；当前DNN虽匹配人类鲁棒性，但依赖更多数据的策略。

authors_text: Ján Koloda,Jürgen Seiler,André Kaup
title: Reliability-based Mesh-to-Grid Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于可靠性的网格到网格图像重建
abstract: This paper presents a novel method for the reconstruction of images from samples located at non-integer positions, called mesh. This is a common scenario for many image processing applications, such as super-resolution, warping or virtual view generation in multi-camera systems. The proposed method relies on a set of initial estimates that are later refined by a new reliability-based content-adaptive framework that employs denoising in order to reduce the reconstruction error. The reliability of the initial estimate is computed so stronger denoising is applied to less reliable estimates. The proposed technique can improve the reconstruction quality by more than 2 dB (in terms of PSNR) with respect to the initial estimate and it outperforms the state-of-the-art denoising-based refinement by up to 0.7 dB.
summary: This paper presents a novel method for the reconstruction of images from samples located at non-integer positions, called mesh. This is a common scenario for many image processing applications, such as super-resolution, warping or virtual view generation in multi-camera systems. The proposed method relies on a set of initial estimates that are later refined by a new reliability-based content-adaptive framework that employs denoising in order to reduce the reconstruction error. The reliability of the initial estimate is computed so stronger denoising is applied to less reliable estimates. The proposed technique can improve the reconstruction quality by more than 2 dB (in terms of PSNR) with respect to the initial estimate and it outperforms the state-of-the-art denoising-based refinement by up to 0.7 dB.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从位于非整数位置的样本重建图像的新方法，称为网格。这是许多图像处理应用的常见场景，例如多相机系统中的超分辨率、扭曲或虚拟视图生成。所提出的方法依赖于一组初始估计，随后通过新的基于可靠性的内容自适应框架进行细化，该框架采用去噪来减少重建误差。计算初始估计的可靠性，因此对不太可靠的估计应用更强的去噪。所提出的技术可以将重建质量相对于初始估计提高 2 dB 以上（就 PSNR 而言），并且比最先进的基于去噪的细化性能高出 0.7 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可靠性的网格到网格图像重建方法，用于处理非整数位置采样的图像重建问题。
AI.motivation: 在超分辨率、图像变形及多摄像头系统虚拟视图生成等应用中，非整数位置采样重建是常见需求，但现有方法存在重建误差较大的问题。
AI.method: 通过初始估计结合可靠性评估框架，根据估计可靠性动态调整去噪强度，采用内容自适应的去噪策略细化重建结果。
AI.result: 相比初始估计PSNR提升超过2dB，较现有最佳方法提升0.7dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可靠性驱动的自适应去噪有效提升了图像重建质量，优于现有技术。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过可靠性驱动的自适应去噪有效提升了图像重建质量，优于现有技术。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过可靠性驱动的自适应去噪有效提升了图像重建质量，优于现有技术。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可靠性的网格到网格图像重建方法，用于处理非整数位置采样的图像重建问题。
motivation: 在超分辨率、图像变形及多摄像头系统虚拟视图生成等应用中，非整数位置采样重建是常见需求，但现有方法存在重建误差较大的问题。
method: 通过初始估计结合可靠性评估框架，根据估计可靠性动态调整去噪强度，采用内容自适应的去噪策略细化重建结果。
result: 相比初始估计PSNR提升超过2dB，较现有最佳方法提升0.7dB。
conclusion: 该方法通过可靠性驱动的自适应去噪有效提升了图像重建质量，优于现有技术。
search_text: Reliability-based Mesh-to-Grid Image Reconstruction 基于可靠性的网格到网格图像重建 This paper presents a novel method for the reconstruction of images from samples located at non-integer positions, called mesh. This is a common scenario for many image processing applications, such as super-resolution, warping or virtual view generation in multi-camera systems. The proposed method relies on a set of initial estimates that are later refined by a new reliability-based content-adaptive framework that employs denoising in order to reduce the reconstruction error. The reliability of the initial estimate is computed so stronger denoising is applied to less reliable estimates. The proposed technique can improve the reconstruction quality by more than 2 dB (in terms of PSNR) with respect to the initial estimate and it outperforms the state-of-the-art denoising-based refinement by up to 0.7 dB. 本文提出了一种从位于非整数位置的样本重建图像的新方法，称为网格。这是许多图像处理应用的常见场景，例如多相机系统中的超分辨率、扭曲或虚拟视图生成。所提出的方法依赖于一组初始估计，随后通过新的基于可靠性的内容自适应框架进行细化，该框架采用去噪来减少重建误差。计算初始估计的可靠性，因此对不太可靠的估计应用更强的去噪。所提出的技术可以将重建质量相对于初始估计提高 2 dB 以上（就 PSNR 而言），并且比最先进的基于去噪的细化性能高出 0.7 dB。 本文提出了一种基于可靠性的网格到网格图像重建方法，用于处理非整数位置采样的图像重建问题。 Ján Koloda,Jürgen Seiler,André Kaup cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Philippe Saint-Pierre,Romain Demeulemeester,Nadège Costa,Nicolas Savy
title: Agent-Based modeling in Medical Research. Example in Health Economics
title_zh: 医学研究中基于代理的建模。卫生经济学的例子
abstract: This chapter presents the main lines of agent based modeling in the field of medical research. The general diagram consists of a cohort of patients (virtual or real) whose evolution is observed by means of so-called evolution models. Scenarios can then be explored by varying the parameters of the different models. This chapter presents techniques for virtual patient generation and examples of execution models. The advantages and disadvantages of these models are discussed as well as the pitfalls to be avoided. Finally, an application to the medico-economic study of the impact of the penetration rate of generic versions of treatments on the costs associated with HIV treatment is presented.
summary: This chapter presents the main lines of agent based modeling in the field of medical research. The general diagram consists of a cohort of patients (virtual or real) whose evolution is observed by means of so-called evolution models. Scenarios can then be explored by varying the parameters of the different models. This chapter presents techniques for virtual patient generation and examples of execution models. The advantages and disadvantages of these models are discussed as well as the pitfalls to be avoided. Finally, an application to the medico-economic study of the impact of the penetration rate of generic versions of treatments on the costs associated with HIV treatment is presented.
abstract_zh: 本章介绍了医学研究领域中基于主体的建模的主要思路。总图由一组患者（虚拟或真实）组成，通过所谓的进化模型观察其进化。然后可以通过改变不同模型的参数来探索场景。本章介绍虚拟患者生成技术和执行模型的示例。讨论了这些模型的优点和缺点以及需要避免的陷阱。最后，提出了一项在医学经济研究中的应用，即仿制药治疗的普及率对艾滋病毒治疗相关成本的影响。

AI.tldr: 介绍基于代理的建模在医学研究中的应用，并通过健康经济学案例展示其实际应用
AI.motivation: 通过模拟患者群体的动态变化，帮助优化医疗资源配置和政策制定
AI.method: 采用基于代理的建模技术，生成虚拟患者群体并构建执行模型，通过调整参数进行不同场景的模拟分析
AI.result: 分析了模型的优缺点及潜在问题，并通过仿制药渗透率对HIV治疗成本影响的案例验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 基于代理的建模为健康经济学研究提供了有效工具，但需注意模型假设和数据质量的限制

authors_text: Adar Kahana,Qian Zhang,Leonard Gleyzer,George Em Karniadakis
title: Spiking Neural Operators for Scientific Machine Learning
title_zh: 用于科学机器学习的尖峰神经算子
abstract: The main computational task of Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) is function regression, required both for inputs as well as outputs of a simulation. Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and neural operators (such as DeepONet) have been very effective in solving Partial Differential Equations (PDEs), but they tax computational resources heavily and cannot be readily adopted for edge computing. Here, we address this issue by considering Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), which have shown promise in reducing energy consumption by two orders of magnitude or more. We present a SNN-based method to perform regression, which has been a challenge due to the inherent difficulty in representing a function's input domain and continuous output values as spikes. We first propose a new method for encoding continuous values into spikes based on a triangular matrix in space and time, and demonstrate its better performance compared to the existing methods. Next, we demonstrate that using a simple SNN architecture consisting of Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) activation and two dense layers, we can achieve relatively accurate function regression results. Moreover, we can replace the LIF with a trained Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) network and obtain comparable results but three times faster. Then, we introduce the DeepONet, consisting of a branch (typically a Fully-connected Neural Network, FNN) for inputs and a trunk (also a FNN) for outputs. We can build a spiking DeepONet by either replacing the branch or the trunk by a SNN. We demonstrate this new approach for classification using the SNN in the branch, achieving results comparable to the literature. Finally, we design a spiking DeepONet for regression by replacing its trunk with a SNN, and achieve good accuracy for approximating functions as well as inferring solutions of differential equations.

Here, we address this issue by considering Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), which have shown promise in reducing energy consumption by two orders of magnitude or more. We present a SNN-based method to perform regression, which has been a challenge due to the inherent difficulty in representing a function's input domain and continuous output values as spikes. We first propose a new method for encoding continuous values into spikes based on a triangular matrix in space and time, and demonstrate its better performance compared to the existing methods. Next, we demonstrate that using a simple SNN architecture consisting of Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) activation and two dense layers, we can achieve relatively accurate function regression results. Moreover, we can replace the LIF with a trained Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) network and obtain comparable results but three times faster. Then, we introduce the DeepONet, consisting of a branch (typically a Fully-connected Neural Network, FNN) for inputs and a trunk (also a FNN) for outputs. We can build a spiking DeepONet by either replacing the branch or the trunk by a SNN. abstract_zh: 科学机器学习 (SciML) 的主要计算任务是函数回归，模拟的输入和输出都需要函数回归。物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 和神经算子（例如 DeepONet）在求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 方面非常有效，但它们对计算资源造成很大负担，并且不能轻易用于边缘计算。在这里，我们通过考虑尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 来解决这个问题，该网络已显示出将能耗降低两个数量级或更多的前景。我们提出了一种基于 SNN 的方法来执行回归，由于将函数的输入域和连续输出值表示为尖峰的固有困难，这一直是一个挑战。我们首先提出了一种基于空间和时间的三角矩阵将连续值编码为尖峰的新方法，并证明了与现有方法相比其更好的性能。接下来，我们演示了使用由 Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) 激活和两个密集层组成的简单 SNN 架构，我们可以获得相对准确的函数回归结果。此外，我们可以用经过训练的多层感知器 (MLP) 网络替换 LIF，并获得可比较的结果，但速度要快三倍。然后，我们介绍 DeepONet，它由用于输入的分支（通常是全连接神经网络，FNN）和用于输出的主干（也是 FNN）组成。我们可以通过用 SNN 替换分支或主干来构建尖峰 DeepONet。我们在分支中使用 SNN 演示了这种新的分类方法，取得了与文献相当的结果。最后，我们通过用 SNN 替换其主干，设计了一个用于回归的尖峰 DeepONet，并在逼近函数以及推断微分方程的解方面取得了良好的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的方法，用于科学机器学习中的函数回归任务，以降低计算资源消耗并适配边缘计算场景。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINN）和神经算子（如DeepONet）在求解偏微分方程（PDE）时计算资源消耗大，难以应用于边缘计算。脉冲神经网络（SNN）在能效方面具有显著优势，但其在函数回归中的应用仍面临输入域和连续输出值的表示难题。
AI.method: 提出基于时空三角矩阵的连续值脉冲编码方法，设计包含漏积分火（LIF）激活函数和密集层的简单SNN架构；通过替换LIF为训练后的多层感知机（MLP）提升速度；将DeepONet的分支或主干替换为SNN，构建脉冲DeepONet用于分类和回归任务。
AI.result: SNN方法实现较高精度的函数回归，MLP替代LIF后速度提升3倍；脉冲DeepONet在分类任务中结果与文献相当，在函数逼近和微分方程求解中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: SNN为科学机器学习提供了低功耗、高能效的解决方案，脉冲DeepONet等方法在边缘计算场景下具有应用潜力。

Finally, we design a spiking DeepONet for regression by replacing its trunk with a SNN, and achieve good accuracy for approximating functions as well as inferring solutions of differential equations. 科学机器学习 (SciML) 的主要计算任务是函数回归，模拟的输入和输出都需要函数回归。物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 和神经算子（例如 DeepONet）在求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 方面非常有效，但它们对计算资源造成很大负担，并且不能轻易用于边缘计算。在这里，我们通过考虑尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 来解决这个问题，该网络已显示出将能耗降低两个数量级或更多的前景。我们提出了一种基于 SNN 的方法来执行回归，由于将函数的输入域和连续输出值表示为尖峰的固有困难，这一直是一个挑战。我们首先提出了一种基于空间和时间的三角矩阵将连续值编码为尖峰的新方法，并证明了与现有方法相比其更好的性能。接下来，我们演示了使用由 Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) 激活和两个密集层组成的简单 SNN 架构，我们可以获得相对准确的函数回归结果。此外，我们可以用经过训练的多层感知器 (MLP) 网络替换 LIF，并获得可比较的结果，但速度要快三倍。然后，我们介绍 DeepONet，它由用于输入的分支（通常是全连接神经网络，FNN）和用于输出的主干（也是 FNN）组成。我们可以通过用 SNN 替换分支或主干来构建尖峰 DeepONet。我们在分支中使用 SNN 演示了这种新的分类方法，取得了与文献相当的结果。最后，我们通过用 SNN 替换其主干，设计了一个用于回归的尖峰 DeepONet，并在逼近函数以及推断微分方程的解方面取得了良好的精度。 本文提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的方法，用于科学机器学习中的函数回归任务，以降低计算资源消耗并适配边缘计算场景。 Adar Kahana,Qian Zhang,Leonard Gleyzer,George Em Karniadakis cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhaocheng Zhu,Mikhail Galkin,Zuobai Zhang,Jian Tang
title: Neural-Symbolic Models for Logical Queries on Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图逻辑查询的神经符号模型
abstract: Answering complex first-order logic (FOL) queries on knowledge graphs is a fundamental task for multi-hop reasoning. Traditional symbolic methods traverse a complete knowledge graph to extract the answers, which provides good interpretation for each step. Recent neural methods learn geometric embeddings for complex queries. These methods can generalize to incomplete knowledge graphs, but their reasoning process is hard to interpret. In this paper, we propose Graph Neural Network Query Executor (GNN-QE), a neural-symbolic model that enjoys the advantages of both worlds. GNN-QE decomposes a complex FOL query into relation projections and logical operations over fuzzy sets, which provides interpretability for intermediate variables. To reason about the missing links, GNN-QE adapts a graph neural network from knowledge graph completion to execute the relation projections, and models the logical operations with product fuzzy logic. Experiments on 3 datasets show that GNN-QE significantly improves over previous state-of-the-art models in answering FOL queries. Meanwhile, GNN-QE can predict the number of answers without explicit supervision, and provide visualizations for intermediate variables.
summary: Answering complex first-order logic (FOL) queries on knowledge graphs is a fundamental task for multi-hop reasoning. Traditional symbolic methods traverse a complete knowledge graph to extract the answers, which provides good interpretation for each step. Recent neural methods learn geometric embeddings for complex queries. These methods can generalize to incomplete knowledge graphs, but their reasoning process is hard to interpret. In this paper, we propose Graph Neural Network Query Executor (GNN-QE), a neural-symbolic model that enjoys the advantages of both worlds. GNN-QE decomposes a complex FOL query into relation projections and logical operations over fuzzy sets, which provides interpretability for intermediate variables. To reason about the missing links, GNN-QE adapts a graph neural network from knowledge graph completion to execute the relation projections, and models the logical operations with product fuzzy logic. Experiments on 3 datasets show that GNN-QE significantly improves over previous state-of-the-art models in answering FOL queries. Meanwhile, GNN-QE can predict the number of answers without explicit supervision, and provide visualizations for intermediate variables.
abstract_zh: 回答知识图上的复杂一阶逻辑（FOL）查询是多跳推理的一项基本任务。传统的符号方法遍历完整的知识图谱来提取答案，这为每一步提供了很好的解释。最近的神经方法学习复杂查询的几何嵌入。这些方法可以推广到不完整的知识图，但它们的推理过程很难解释。在本文中，我们提出了图神经网络查询执行器（GNN-QE），这是一种兼具两者优点的神经符号模型。 GNN-QE 将复杂的 FOL 查询分解为模糊集上的关系投影和逻辑运算，这为中间变量提供了可解释性。为了推理缺失的链接，GNN-QE 采用知识图补全的图神经网络来执行关系投影，并使用乘积模糊逻辑对逻辑运算进行建模。对 3 个数据集的实验表明，GNN-QE 在回答 FOL 查询方面比之前最先进的模型有了显着改进。同时，GNN-QE 可以在没有显式监督的情况下预测答案的数量，并提供中间变量的可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经符号模型GNN-QE，用于在知识图谱上回答复杂的一阶逻辑查询，结合了符号方法的可解释性和神经方法对不完整数据的适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统符号方法虽可解释但难以处理不完整知识图谱，神经方法虽能处理不完整数据但缺乏可解释性，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 将复杂FOL查询分解为模糊集上的关系投影和逻辑运算，采用知识图谱补全的图神经网络执行关系投影，并用乘积模糊逻辑建模逻辑运算。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上显著优于现有模型，可无监督预测答案数量，并提供中间变量可视化。
AI.conclusion: GNN-QE通过神经符号融合有效提升了知识图谱逻辑查询的性能与可解释性，为复杂推理任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: R. Aruna Devi,K. Anitha
title: Construction of Rough graph to handle uncertain pattern from an Information System
title_zh: 构建粗糙图来处理信息系统中的不确定模式
abstract: Rough membership function defines the measurement of relationship between conditional and decision attribute from an Information system. In this paper we propose a new method to construct rough graph through rough membership function $ω_{G}^F(f)$. Rough graph identifies the pattern between the objects with imprecise and uncertain information. We explore the operations and properties of rough graph in various stages of its structure.
summary: Rough membership function defines the measurement of relationship between conditional and decision attribute from an Information system. In this paper we propose a new method to construct rough graph through rough membership function $ω_{G}^F(f)$. Rough graph identifies the pattern between the objects with imprecise and uncertain information. We explore the operations and properties of rough graph in various stages of its structure.
abstract_zh: 粗略隶属函数定义了信息系统中条件属性和决策属性之间关系的测量。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过粗糙隶属函数 $ω_{G}^F(f)$ 构造粗糙图的新方法。粗略图识别具有不精确和不确定信息的对象之间的模式。我们探索粗糙图在其结构的各个阶段的操作和属性。

AI.tldr: 构建粗糙图以处理信息系统的不确定模式，利用粗糙隶属函数识别对象间的模糊关系
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理信息系统的不确定性和模糊性，需新方法提升模式识别能力
AI.method: 提出基于粗糙隶属函数ω_G^F(f)的粗糙图构建方法，通过该函数量化对象间关系并构建图结构
AI.result: 验证了粗糙图在处理不确定信息中的有效性，明确了其结构特性与操作规则
AI.conclusion: 粗糙图方法能有效处理信息系统中的不确定模式，为复杂数据提供新的分析工具

authors_text: Flavio Galvao Calhau,Alysson Pezzutti,Joberto S. B. Martins
title: On Evaluating Power Loss with HATSGA Algorithm for Power Network Reconfiguration in the Smart Grid
title_zh: 智能电网电网重构中HATSGA算法的功率损耗评估
abstract: This paper presents the power network reconfiguration algorithm HATSGA with a "R" modeling approach and evaluates its behavior in computing new reconfiguration topologies for the power network in the Smart Grid context. The modeling of the power distribution network with the language "R" is used to represent the network and support the computation of distinct algorithm configurations towards the evaluation of new reconfiguration topologies. The HATSGA algorithm adopts a hybrid Tabu Search and Genetic Algorithm strategy and can be configured in different ways to compute network reconfiguration solutions. The evaluation of power loss with HATSGA uses the IEEE 14-Bus topology as the power test scenario. The evaluation of reconfiguration topologies with minimum power loss with HATSGA indicates that an efficient solution can be reached with a feasible computational time. This suggests that HATSGA can be potentially used for computing reconfiguration network topologies and, beyond that, it can be used for autonomic self-healing management approaches where a feasible computational time is required.
summary: This paper presents the power network reconfiguration algorithm HATSGA with a "R" modeling approach and evaluates its behavior in computing new reconfiguration topologies for the power network in the Smart Grid context. The modeling of the power distribution network with the language "R" is used to represent the network and support the computation of distinct algorithm configurations towards the evaluation of new reconfiguration topologies. The HATSGA algorithm adopts a hybrid Tabu Search and Genetic Algorithm strategy and can be configured in different ways to compute network reconfiguration solutions. The evaluation of power loss with HATSGA uses the IEEE 14-Bus topology as the power test scenario. The evaluation of reconfiguration topologies with minimum power loss with HATSGA indicates that an efficient solution can be reached with a feasible computational time. This suggests that HATSGA can be potentially used for computing reconfiguration network topologies and, beyond that, it can be used for autonomic self-healing management approaches where a feasible computational time is required.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了采用“R”建模方法的电力网络重新配置算法 HATSGA，并评估了其在智能电网背景下计算新的电力网络重新配置拓扑时的行为。使用语言“R”对配电网络进行建模来表示网络并支持不同算法配置的计算，以评估新的重构拓扑。 HATSGA算法采用禁忌搜索和遗传算法的混合策略，可以以不同的方式配置来计算网络重新配置解决方案。使用 HATSGA 评估功率损耗使用 IEEE 14 总线拓扑作为功率测试场景。使用 HATSGA 对具有最小功耗的重新配置拓扑进行评估表明，可以通过可行的计算时间达到有效的解决方案。这表明 HATSGA 可以潜在地用于计算重新配置网络拓扑，除此之外，它还可以用于需要可行计算时间的自主自愈管理方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合禁忌搜索与遗传算法（HATSGA）的电力网络重构算法，并基于IEEE 14节点系统评估其在智能电网中的功率损耗优化效果。
AI.motivation: 电力网络重构需在合理计算时间内找到最小功率损耗的拓扑结构，传统方法存在效率或精度不足的问题，需更优算法支持智能电网的自愈管理。
AI.method: 采用R语言建模电力网络，设计HATSGA混合算法（结合禁忌搜索与遗传算法），通过配置不同参数计算重构方案，并以IEEE 14-Bus系统为测试场景进行验证。
AI.result: HATSGA在IEEE 14节点系统中成功找到有效重构拓扑，功率损耗显著降低且计算时间可行，验证了算法在优化效率与实用性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: HATSGA算法能高效解决电力网络重构问题，适用于智能电网的自愈管理场景，为未来自动化电网优化提供可行方案。

search_text: On Evaluating Power Loss with HATSGA Algorithm for Power Network Reconfiguration in the Smart Grid 智能电网电网重构中HATSGA算法的功率损耗评估 This paper presents the power network reconfiguration algorithm HATSGA with a "R" modeling approach and evaluates its behavior in computing new reconfiguration topologies for the power network in the Smart Grid context. The modeling of the power distribution network with the language "R" is used to represent the network and support the computation of distinct algorithm configurations towards the evaluation of new reconfiguration topologies. The HATSGA algorithm adopts a hybrid Tabu Search and Genetic Algorithm strategy and can be configured in different ways to compute network reconfiguration solutions. The evaluation of power loss with HATSGA uses the IEEE 14-Bus topology as the power test scenario. The evaluation of reconfiguration topologies with minimum power loss with HATSGA indicates that an efficient solution can be reached with a feasible computational time. This suggests that HATSGA can be potentially used for computing reconfiguration network topologies and, beyond that, it can be used for autonomic self-healing management approaches where a feasible computational time is required. 本文提出了采用“R”建模方法的电力网络重新配置算法 HATSGA，并评估了其在智能电网背景下计算新的电力网络重新配置拓扑时的行为。使用语言“R”对配电网络进行建模来表示网络并支持不同算法配置的计算，以评估新的重构拓扑。 HATSGA算法采用禁忌搜索和遗传算法的混合策略，可以以不同的方式配置来计算网络重新配置解决方案。使用 HATSGA 评估功率损耗使用 IEEE 14 总线拓扑作为功率测试场景。使用 HATSGA 对具有最小功耗的重新配置拓扑进行评估表明，可以通过可行的计算时间达到有效的解决方案。这表明 HATSGA 可以潜在地用于计算重新配置网络拓扑，除此之外，它还可以用于需要可行计算时间的自主自愈管理方法。 本文提出了一种混合禁忌搜索与遗传算法（HATSGA）的电力网络重构算法，并基于IEEE 14节点系统评估其在智能电网中的功率损耗优化效果。 Flavio Galvao Calhau,Alysson Pezzutti,Joberto S. B. Martins cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Gongao Qi,Bin Yang,Wei Li
title: Some neighborhood-related fuzzy covering-based rough set models and their applications for decision making
title_zh: 一些基于邻域的模糊覆盖粗糙集模型及其在决策中的应用
abstract: Fuzzy rough set (FRS) has a great effect on data mining processes and the fuzzy logical operators play a key role in the development of FRS theory. In order to further generalize the FRS theory to more complicated data environments, we firstly propose four types of fuzzy neighborhood operators based on fuzzy covering by overlap functions and their implicators in this paper. Meanwhile, the derived fuzzy coverings from an original fuzzy covering are defined and the equalities among overlap function-based fuzzy neighborhood operators based on a finite fuzzy covering are also investigated. Secondly, we prove that new operators can be divided into seventeen groups according to equivalence relations, and the partial order relations among these seventeen classes of operators are discussed, as well. Go further, the comparisons with $ t$-norm-based fuzzy neighborhood operators given by D'eer et al. are also made and two types of neighborhood-related fuzzy covering-based rough set models, which are defined via different fuzzy neighborhood operators that are on the basis of diverse kinds of fuzzy logical operators proposed. Furthermore, the groupings and partially order relations are also discussed. Finally, a novel fuzzy TOPSIS methodology is put forward to solve a biosynthetic nanomaterials select issue, and the rationality and enforceability of our new approach is verified by comparing its results with nine different methods.
summary: Fuzzy rough set (FRS) has a great effect on data mining processes and the fuzzy logical operators play a key role in the development of FRS theory. In order to further generalize the FRS theory to more complicated data environments, we firstly propose four types of fuzzy neighborhood operators based on fuzzy covering by overlap functions and their implicators in this paper. Meanwhile, the derived fuzzy coverings from an original fuzzy covering are defined and the equalities among overlap function-based fuzzy neighborhood operators based on a finite fuzzy covering are also investigated. Secondly, we prove that new operators can be divided into seventeen groups according to equivalence relations, and the partial order relations among these seventeen classes of operators are discussed, as well. Go further, the comparisons with $ t$-norm-based fuzzy neighborhood operators given by D'eer et al. are also made and two types of neighborhood-related fuzzy covering-based rough set models, which are defined via different fuzzy neighborhood operators that are on the basis of diverse kinds of fuzzy logical operators proposed. Furthermore, the groupings and partially order relations are also discussed. Finally, a novel fuzzy TOPSIS methodology is put forward to solve a biosynthetic nanomaterials select issue, and the rationality and enforceability of our new approach is verified by comparing its results with nine different methods.
abstract_zh: 模糊粗糙集(FRS)对数据挖掘过程有很大影响，模糊逻辑算子在FRS理论的发展中起着关键作用。为了进一步将FRS理论推广到更复杂的数据环境，本文首先提出了四种基于重叠函数模糊覆盖的模糊邻域算子及其蕴涵子。同时，定义了从原始模糊覆盖导出的模糊覆盖，并研究了基于有限模糊覆盖的基于重叠函数的模糊邻域算子之间的等式。其次，我们证明了新的算子可以根据等价关系分为十七类，并讨论了这十七类算子之间的偏序关系。更进一步，与 D'eer 等人给出的基于 $t$-norm 的模糊邻域算子的比较。还提出了两种类型的基于邻域相关的模糊覆盖的粗糙集模型，这些模型是在提出的各种模糊逻辑算子的基础上通过不同的模糊邻域算子定义的。此外，还讨论了分组和偏序关系。最后，提出了一种新颖的模糊TOPSIS方法来解决生物合成纳米材料的选择问题，并通过与九种不同方法的结果比较来验证我们新方法的合理性和可执行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模糊覆盖的邻域相关模糊粗糙集模型，并将其应用于决策分析。
AI.motivation: 为扩展模糊粗糙集理论在复杂数据环境中的适用性，需引入新的模糊邻域算子并建立更有效的决策模型。
AI.method: 通过重叠函数和蕴含算子定义四类模糊邻域算子，推导模糊覆盖并分析其等价关系；将新算子分为17类并讨论其偏序关系；与基于t-范数的算子进行对比，提出两种模糊粗糙集模型及改进的模糊TOPSIS方法。
AI.result: 构建了17类模糊邻域算子的分组与偏序关系，验证了新模型在生物合成纳米材料选择中的有效性，结果优于九种对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 新模型通过理论分析和实际应用验证了其合理性与可行性，为复杂数据决策提供了新工具。

authors_text: Marcus Märtens,Dario Izzo,Emmanuel Blazquez,Moritz von Looz,Pablo Gómez,Anne Mergy,Giacomo Acciarini,Chit Hong Yam,Javier Hernando Ayuso,Yuri Shimane
title: The Fellowship of the Dyson Ring: ACT&Friends' Results and Methods for GTOC 11
title_zh: 戴森环的团契：ACT&Friends 对 GTOC 11 的结果和方法
abstract: Dyson spheres are hypothetical megastructures encircling stars in order to harvest most of their energy output. During the 11th edition of the GTOC challenge, participants were tasked with a complex trajectory planning related to the construction of a precursor Dyson structure, a heliocentric ring made of twelve stations. To this purpose, we developed several new approaches that synthesize techniques from machine learning, combinatorial optimization, planning and scheduling, and evolutionary optimization effectively integrated into a fully automated pipeline. These include a machine learned transfer time estimator, improving the established Edelbaum approximation and thus better informing a Lazy Race Tree Search to identify and collect asteroids with high arrival mass for the stations; a series of optimally-phased low-thrust transfers to all stations computed by indirect optimization techniques, exploiting the synodic periodicity of the system; and a modified Hungarian scheduling algorithm, which utilizes evolutionary techniques to arrange a mass-balanced arrival schedule out of all transfer possibilities. We describe the steps of our pipeline in detail with a special focus on how our approaches mutually benefit from each other. Lastly, we outline and analyze the final solution of our team, ACT&Friends, which ranked second at the GTOC 11 challenge.
summary: Dyson spheres are hypothetical megastructures encircling stars in order to harvest most of their energy output. During the 11th edition of the GTOC challenge, participants were tasked with a complex trajectory planning related to the construction of a precursor Dyson structure, a heliocentric ring made of twelve stations. To this purpose, we developed several new approaches that synthesize techniques from machine learning, combinatorial optimization, planning and scheduling, and evolutionary optimization effectively integrated into a fully automated pipeline. These include a machine learned transfer time estimator, improving the established Edelbaum approximation and thus better informing a Lazy Race Tree Search to identify and collect asteroids with high arrival mass for the stations; a series of optimally-phased low-thrust transfers to all stations computed by indirect optimization techniques, exploiting the synodic periodicity of the system; and a modified Hungarian scheduling algorithm, which utilizes evolutionary techniques to arrange a mass-balanced arrival schedule out of all transfer possibilities. We describe the steps of our pipeline in detail with a special focus on how our approaches mutually benefit from each other. Lastly, we outline and analyze the final solution of our team, ACT&Friends, which ranked second at the GTOC 11 challenge.
abstract_zh: 戴森球是一种假想的围绕恒星的巨型结构，目的是收集恒星的大部分能量输出。在第 11 届 GTOC 挑战赛中，参与者的任务是制定与前身戴森结构（由 12 个站组成的日心环）相关的复杂轨迹规划。为此，我们开发了几种新方法，将机器学习、组合优化、规划和调度以及进化优化等技术有效地集成到全自动管道中。其中包括机器学习传输时间估计器，改进已建立的埃德鲍姆近似，从而更好地为惰性竞赛树搜索提供信息，以识别和收集到达站质量较高的小行星；利用系统的会合周期性，通过间接优化技术计算出一系列最优阶段的低推力传输到所有站点；以及改进的匈牙利调度算法，该算法利用进化技术从所有传输可能性中安排质量平衡的到达时间表。我们详细描述了我们的流程步骤，特别关注我们的方法如何相互受益。最后，我们概述并分析了我们团队 ACT&Friends 的最终解决方案，该团队在 GTOC 11 挑战赛中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ACT&Friends团队在GTOC 11挑战赛中针对构建戴森环前体结构的轨迹规划方法，包括机器学习、优化算法等技术的综合应用。
AI.motivation: 为解决戴森环建设中复杂的轨迹规划与资源分配问题，需开发高效自动化方案以优化小行星采集与站点建设的协同性。
AI.method: 融合机器学习转移时间估计器、基于合日周期的低推力转移优化及改进匈牙利算法，构建端到端自动化流水线实现任务规划。
AI.result: 团队方案在GTOC 11挑战赛中获得第二名，验证了多技术融合方法在复杂航天任务规划中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科方法集成显著提升了任务规划效率，为未来大规模太空工程提供了可复用的技术框架。

During the 11th edition of the GTOC challenge, participants were tasked with a complex trajectory planning related to the construction of a precursor Dyson structure, a heliocentric ring made of twelve stations. These include a machine learned transfer time estimator, improving the established Edelbaum approximation and thus better informing a Lazy Race Tree Search to identify and collect asteroids with high arrival mass for the stations; a series of optimally-phased low-thrust transfers to all stations computed by indirect optimization techniques, exploiting the synodic periodicity of the system; and a modified Hungarian scheduling algorithm, which utilizes evolutionary techniques to arrange a mass-balanced arrival schedule out of all transfer possibilities. We describe the steps of our pipeline in detail with a special focus on how our approaches mutually benefit from each other. Lastly, we outline and analyze the final solution of our team, ACT&Friends, which ranked second at the GTOC 11 challenge. 戴森球是一种假想的围绕恒星的巨型结构，目的是收集恒星的大部分能量输出。在第 11 届 GTOC 挑战赛中，参与者的任务是制定与前身戴森结构（由 12 个站组成的日心环）相关的复杂轨迹规划。为此，我们开发了几种新方法，将机器学习、组合优化、规划和调度以及进化优化等技术有效地集成到全自动管道中。其中包括机器学习传输时间估计器，改进已建立的埃德鲍姆近似，从而更好地为惰性竞赛树搜索提供信息，以识别和收集到达站质量较高的小行星；利用系统的会合周期性，通过间接优化技术计算出一系列最优阶段的低推力传输到所有站点；以及改进的匈牙利调度算法，该算法利用进化技术从所有传输可能性中安排质量平衡的到达时间表。我们详细描述了我们的流程步骤，特别关注我们的方法如何相互受益。最后，我们概述并分析了我们团队 ACT&Friends 的最终解决方案，该团队在 GTOC 11 挑战赛中排名第二。 本文介绍了ACT&Friends团队在GTOC 11挑战赛中针对构建戴森环前体结构的轨迹规划方法，包括机器学习、优化算法等技术的综合应用。 Marcus Märtens,Dario Izzo,Emmanuel Blazquez,Moritz von Looz,Pablo Gómez,Anne Mergy,Giacomo Acciarini,Chit Hong Yam,Javier Hernando Ayuso,Yuri Shimane cs.AI,astro-ph.EP,astro-ph.IM,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrea Bontempelli,Marcelo Rodas Britez,Xiaoyue Li,Haonan Zhao,Luca Erculiani,Stefano Teso,Andrea Passerini,Fausto Giunchiglia
title: Lifelong Personal Context Recognition
title_zh: 终身个人情境识别
abstract: We focus on the development of AIs which live in lifelong symbiosis with a human. The key prerequisite for this task is that the AI understands - at any moment in time - the personal situational context that the human is in. We outline the key challenges that this task brings forth, namely (i) handling the human-like and ego-centric nature of the the user's context, necessary for understanding and providing useful suggestions, (ii) performing lifelong context recognition using machine learning in a way that is robust to change, and (iii) maintaining alignment between the AI's and human's representations of the world through continual bidirectional interaction. In this short paper, we summarize our recent attempts at tackling these challenges, discuss the lessons learned, and highlight directions of future research. The main take-away message is that pursuing this project requires research which lies at the intersection of knowledge representation and machine learning. Neither technology can achieve this goal without the other.
summary: We focus on the development of AIs which live in lifelong symbiosis with a human. The key prerequisite for this task is that the AI understands - at any moment in time - the personal situational context that the human is in. We outline the key challenges that this task brings forth, namely (i) handling the human-like and ego-centric nature of the the user's context, necessary for understanding and providing useful suggestions, (ii) performing lifelong context recognition using machine learning in a way that is robust to change, and (iii) maintaining alignment between the AI's and human's representations of the world through continual bidirectional interaction. In this short paper, we summarize our recent attempts at tackling these challenges, discuss the lessons learned, and highlight directions of future research. The main take-away message is that pursuing this project requires research which lies at the intersection of knowledge representation and machine learning. Neither technology can achieve this goal without the other.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于与人类终身共生的人工智能的开发。这项任务的关键先决条件是人工智能在任何时刻都能理解人类所处的个人情境背景。我们概述了这项任务带来的关键挑战，即（i）处理用户环境的类人且以自我为中心的性质，这是理解和提供有用建议所必需的，（ii）使用机器学习以稳健的方式进行终生环境识别，以适应变化，以及（iii）通过持续不断地保持人工智能和人类对世界的表征之间的一致性。双向互动。在这篇简短的论文中，我们总结了我们最近应对这些挑战的尝试，讨论了经验教训，并强调了未来研究的方向。主要的信息是，开展这个项目需要在知识表示和机器学习的交叉点进行研究。任何一种技术都无法在没有对方的情况下实现这一目标。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了开发能够与人类建立长期共生关系的AI系统，核心任务是让AI实时理解人类的个人情境上下文。
AI.motivation: 为实现AI与人类的长期协作，需解决情境理解、持续学习适应性及人机表征对齐等关键挑战，以提供个性化支持。
AI.method: 通过整合知识表示与机器学习技术，提出应对情境动态性、长期学习鲁棒性及双向交互对齐的框架，并总结近期研究尝试。
AI.result: 明确了长期个人情境识别的研究方向，指出需跨学科方法解决核心挑战，并提炼出技术实现中的经验教训。
AI.conclusion: 实现目标需知识表示与机器学习的深度融合，单一技术无法满足长期人机共生的需求，未来研究应聚焦二者协同机制。

authors_text: Egor Manuylovich,Diego Argüello Ron,Morteza Kamalian-Kopae,Sergei Turitsyn
title: Stochastic resonance neurons in artificial neural networks
title_zh: 人工神经网络中的随机共振神经元
abstract: Many modern applications of the artificial neural networks ensue large number of layers making traditional digital implementations increasingly complex. Optical neural networks offer parallel processing at high bandwidth, but have the challenge of noise accumulation. We propose here a new type of neural networks using stochastic resonances as an inherent part of the architecture and demonstrate a possibility of significant reduction of the required number of neurons for a given performance accuracy. We also show that such a neural network is more robust against the impact of noise.
summary: Many modern applications of the artificial neural networks ensue large number of layers making traditional digital implementations increasingly complex. Optical neural networks offer parallel processing at high bandwidth, but have the challenge of noise accumulation. We propose here a new type of neural networks using stochastic resonances as an inherent part of the architecture and demonstrate a possibility of significant reduction of the required number of neurons for a given performance accuracy. We also show that such a neural network is more robust against the impact of noise.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络的许多现代应用都会产生大量的层，使得传统的数字实现变得越来越复杂。光神经网络提供高带宽并行处理，但面临噪声积累的挑战。我们在这里提出了一种新型神经网络，使用随机共振作为架构的固有部分，并证明了在给定性能精度下显着减少所需神经元数量的可能性。我们还表明，这样的神经网络对于噪声的影响更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用随机共振机制的人工神经网络架构，以减少神经元数量并增强抗噪声能力。
AI.motivation: 传统数字神经网络复杂度高，光学神经网络存在噪声累积问题，需寻找更高效且抗噪的解决方案。
AI.method: 将随机共振机制嵌入神经网络架构，通过噪声利用提升信号处理效率并减少神经元数量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该网络在保持性能的同时减少神经元数量，并提高对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 随机共振神经网络在降低复杂度和增强抗噪性方面表现出潜力，为神经网络设计提供新方向。

authors_text: Yuhang Li,Shikuang Deng,Xin Dong,Shi Gu
title: Converting Artificial Neural Networks to Spiking Neural Networks via Parameter Calibration
title_zh: 通过参数校准将人工神经网络转换为尖峰神经网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.06984
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.06984
abstract: Spiking Neural Network (SNN), originating from the neural behavior in biology, has been recognized as one of the next-generation neural networks. Conventionally, SNNs can be obtained by converting from pre-trained Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) by replacing the non-linear activation with spiking neurons without changing the parameters. In this work, we argue that simply copying and pasting the weights of ANN to SNN inevitably results in activation mismatch, especially for ANNs that are trained with batch normalization (BN) layers. To tackle the activation mismatch issue, we first provide a theoretical analysis by decomposing local conversion error to clipping error and flooring error, and then quantitatively measure how this error propagates throughout the layers using the second-order analysis. Motivated by the theoretical results, we propose a set of layer-wise parameter calibration algorithms, which adjusts the parameters to minimize the activation mismatch. Extensive experiments for the proposed algorithms are performed on modern architectures and large-scale tasks including ImageNet classification and MS COCO detection. We demonstrate that our method can handle the SNN conversion with batch normalization layers and effectively preserve the high accuracy even in 32 time steps. For example, our calibration algorithms can increase up to 65% accuracy when converting VGG-16 with BN layers.
summary: Spiking Neural Network (SNN), originating from the neural behavior in biology, has been recognized as one of the next-generation neural networks. Conventionally, SNNs can be obtained by converting from pre-trained Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) by replacing the non-linear activation with spiking neurons without changing the parameters. In this work, we argue that simply copying and pasting the weights of ANN to SNN inevitably results in activation mismatch, especially for ANNs that are trained with batch normalization (BN) layers. To tackle the activation mismatch issue, we first provide a theoretical analysis by decomposing local conversion error to clipping error and flooring error, and then quantitatively measure how this error propagates throughout the layers using the second-order analysis. Motivated by the theoretical results, we propose a set of layer-wise parameter calibration algorithms, which adjusts the parameters to minimize the activation mismatch. Extensive experiments for the proposed algorithms are performed on modern architectures and large-scale tasks including ImageNet classification and MS COCO detection. We demonstrate that our method can handle the SNN conversion with batch normalization layers and effectively preserve the high accuracy even in 32 time steps. For example, our calibration algorithms can increase up to 65% accuracy when converting VGG-16 with BN layers.
abstract_zh: 脉冲神经网络（Spiking Neural Network，SNN）起源于生物学中的神经行为，被认为是下一代神经网络之一。传统上，SNN 可以通过从预训练的人工神经网络 (ANN) 转换来获得，方法是用尖峰神经元替换非线性激活，而不改变参数。在这项工作中，我们认为简单地将 ANN 的权重复制并粘贴到 SNN 不可避免地会导致激活不匹配，特别是对于使用批量归一化 (BN) 层进行训练的 ANN。为了解决激活不匹配问题，我们首先通过将局部转换误差分解为裁剪误差和下限误差来提供理论分析，然后使用二阶分析定量测量该误差如何在各层中传播。在理论结果的推动下，我们提出了一组分层参数校准算法，该算法调整参数以最小化激活不匹配。所提出的算法在现代架构和大规模任务（包括 ImageNet 分类和 MS COCO 检测）上进行了广泛的实验。我们证明了我们的方法可以使用批量归一化层处理 SNN 转换，并且即使在 32 个时间步长内也能有效保持高精度。例如，当使用 BN 层转换 VGG-16 时，我们的校准算法可以将准确度提高高达 65%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过参数校准将人工神经网络（ANN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN），解决转换过程中的激活不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接复制ANN参数到SNN会导致激活不匹配，尤其在包含批量归一化（BN）层的网络中问题更显著。
AI.method: 理论分析分解局部转换误差为截断误差和地板误差，并通过二阶分析量化误差传播，提出逐层参数校准算法以最小化激活不匹配。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和MS COCO检测等任务中，方法有效保留高精度（如VGG-16带BN层转换时准确率提升65%），并在32时间步内保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了SNN转换中的激活不匹配问题，尤其适用于含BN层的现代网络架构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过参数校准将人工神经网络（ANN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN），解决转换过程中的激活不匹配问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法直接复制ANN参数到SNN会导致激活不匹配，尤其在包含批量归一化（BN）层的网络中问题更显著。

search_text: Converting Artificial Neural Networks to Spiking Neural Networks via Parameter Calibration 通过参数校准将人工神经网络转换为尖峰神经网络 Spiking Neural Network (SNN), originating from the neural behavior in biology, has been recognized as one of the next-generation neural networks. Conventionally, SNNs can be obtained by converting from pre-trained Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) by replacing the non-linear activation with spiking neurons without changing the parameters. In this work, we argue that simply copying and pasting the weights of ANN to SNN inevitably results in activation mismatch, especially for ANNs that are trained with batch normalization (BN) layers. To tackle the activation mismatch issue, we first provide a theoretical analysis by decomposing local conversion error to clipping error and flooring error, and then quantitatively measure how this error propagates throughout the layers using the second-order analysis. Motivated by the theoretical results, we propose a set of layer-wise parameter calibration algorithms, which adjusts the parameters to minimize the activation mismatch. Extensive experiments for the proposed algorithms are performed on modern architectures and large-scale tasks including ImageNet classification and MS COCO detection. We demonstrate that our method can handle the SNN conversion with batch normalization layers and effectively preserve the high accuracy even in 32 time steps. For example, our calibration algorithms can increase up to 65% accuracy when converting VGG-16 with BN layers. 脉冲神经网络（Spiking Neural Network，SNN）起源于生物学中的神经行为，被认为是下一代神经网络之一。传统上，SNN 可以通过从预训练的人工神经网络 (ANN) 转换来获得，方法是用尖峰神经元替换非线性激活，而不改变参数。在这项工作中，我们认为简单地将 ANN 的权重复制并粘贴到 SNN 不可避免地会导致激活不匹配，特别是对于使用批量归一化 (BN) 层进行训练的 ANN。为了解决激活不匹配问题，我们首先通过将局部转换误差分解为裁剪误差和下限误差来提供理论分析，然后使用二阶分析定量测量该误差如何在各层中传播。在理论结果的推动下，我们提出了一组分层参数校准算法，该算法调整参数以最小化激活不匹配。所提出的算法在现代架构和大规模任务（包括 ImageNet 分类和 MS COCO 检测）上进行了广泛的实验。我们证明了我们的方法可以使用批量归一化层处理 SNN 转换，并且即使在 32 个时间步长内也能有效保持高精度。例如，当使用 BN 层转换 VGG-16 时，我们的校准算法可以将准确度提高高达 65%。 本文提出通过参数校准将人工神经网络（ANN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN），解决转换过程中的激活不匹配问题。 Yuhang Li,Shikuang Deng,Xin Dong,Shi Gu cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Riccardo Taiello,Melek Önen,Francesco Capano,Olivier Humbert,Marco Lorenzi
title: Privacy Preserving Image Registration
title_zh: 隐私保护图像注册
comment: v4 Accepted at Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (2022) 130-140
comments: v4 Accepted at Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (2022) 130-140
abstract: Image registration is a key task in medical imaging applications, allowing to represent medical images in a common spatial reference frame. Current approaches to image registration are generally based on the assumption that the content of the images is usually accessible in clear form, from which the spatial transformation is subsequently estimated. This common assumption may not be met in practical applications, since the sensitive nature of medical images may ultimately require their analysis under privacy constraints, preventing to openly share the image content.In this work, we formulate the problem of image registration under a privacy preserving regime, where images are assumed to be confidential and cannot be disclosed in clear. We derive our privacy preserving image registration framework by extending classical registration paradigms to account for advanced cryptographic tools, such as secure multi-party computation and homomorphic encryption, that enable the execution of operations without leaking the underlying data. To overcome the problem of performance and scalability of cryptographic tools in high dimensions, we propose several techniques to optimize the image registration operations by using gradient approximations, and by revisiting the use of homomorphic encryption trough packing, to allow the efficient encryption and multiplication of large matrices. We demonstrate our privacy preserving framework in linear and non-linear registration problems, evaluating its accuracy and scalability with respect to standard, non-private counterparts. Our results show that privacy preserving image registration is feasible and can be adopted in sensitive medical imaging applications.
summary: Image registration is a key task in medical imaging applications, allowing to represent medical images in a common spatial reference frame. Current approaches to image registration are generally based on the assumption that the content of the images is usually accessible in clear form, from which the spatial transformation is subsequently estimated. This common assumption may not be met in practical applications, since the sensitive nature of medical images may ultimately require their analysis under privacy constraints, preventing to openly share the image content.In this work, we formulate the problem of image registration under a privacy preserving regime, where images are assumed to be confidential and cannot be disclosed in clear. We derive our privacy preserving image registration framework by extending classical registration paradigms to account for advanced cryptographic tools, such as secure multi-party computation and homomorphic encryption, that enable the execution of operations without leaking the underlying data. To overcome the problem of performance and scalability of cryptographic tools in high dimensions, we propose several techniques to optimize the image registration operations by using gradient approximations, and by revisiting the use of homomorphic encryption trough packing, to allow the efficient encryption and multiplication of large matrices. We demonstrate our privacy preserving framework in linear and non-linear registration problems, evaluating its accuracy and scalability with respect to standard, non-private counterparts. Our results show that privacy preserving image registration is feasible and can be adopted in sensitive medical imaging applications.
abstract_zh: 图像配准是医学成像应用中的一项关键任务，允许在公共空间参考系中表示医学图像。当前的图像配准方法通常基于这样的假设：图像的内容通常可以以清晰的形式访问，随后从中估计空间变换。这种常见的假设在实际应用中可能不会得到满足，因为医学图像的敏感性最终可能需要在隐私约束下进行分析，从而防止公开共享图像内容。在这项工作中，我们提出了隐私保护制度下的图像配准问题，其中图像被假设为机密且不能清晰公开。我们通过扩展经典注册范例来考虑高级加密工具（例如安全多方计算和同态加密），从而得出我们的隐私保护图像注册框架，这些工具能够在不泄露底层数据的情况下执行操作。为了克服高维加密工具的性能和可扩展性问题，我们提出了几种技术来通过使用梯度近似来优化图像配准操作，并重新考虑使用同态加密槽打包，以允许大型矩阵的高效加密和乘法。我们在线性和非线性配准问题中展示了我们的隐私保护框架，评估其相对于标准、非私有对应物的准确性和可扩展性。我们的结果表明，隐私保护图像配准是可行的，并且可以在敏感的医学成像应用中采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在隐私保护框架下的图像配准方法，确保医疗图像在分析过程中保持机密性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像配准方法需直接访问图像内容，但医疗图像因隐私问题无法公开共享，需在保护数据的前提下实现配准。
AI.method: 通过结合安全多方计算和同态加密等密码学工具，扩展经典配准范式，并采用梯度近似和矩阵打包技术优化高维数据处理效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，隐私保护配准框架在准确性和可扩展性上可与非隐私方法媲美，适用于线性和非线性配准场景。
AI.conclusion: 隐私保护图像配准技术可行，可安全应用于敏感医疗影像分析领域。

authors_text: Advait Sarkar
title: Is explainable AI a race against model complexity?
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能是与模型复杂性的竞赛吗？
comment: Workshop on Transparency and Explanations in Smart Systems (TExSS 2022), at the 27th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI 2022)
comments: Workshop on Transparency and Explanations in Smart Systems (TExSS 2022), at the 27th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI 2022)
abstract: Explaining the behaviour of intelligent systems will get increasingly and perhaps intractably challenging as models grow in size and complexity. We may not be able to expect an explanation for every prediction made by a brain-scale model, nor can we expect explanations to remain objective or apolitical. Our functionalist understanding of these models is of less advantage than we might assume. Models precede explanations, and can be useful even when both model and explanation are incorrect. Explainability may never win the race against complexity, but this is less problematic than it seems.
summary: Explaining the behaviour of intelligent systems will get increasingly and perhaps intractably challenging as models grow in size and complexity. We may not be able to expect an explanation for every prediction made by a brain-scale model, nor can we expect explanations to remain objective or apolitical. Our functionalist understanding of these models is of less advantage than we might assume. Models precede explanations, and can be useful even when both model and explanation are incorrect. Explainability may never win the race against complexity, but this is less problematic than it seems.
abstract_zh: 随着模型规模和复杂性的增长，解释智能系统的行为将变得越来越困难，甚至可能变得棘手。我们可能无法期望对大脑规模模型所做的每一个预测都有解释，也不能期望解释保持客观或非政治性。我们对这些模型的功能主义理解并没有我们想象的那么有利。模型先于解释，即使模型和解释都不正确，模型也很有用。可解释性可能永远不会赢得与复杂性的竞争，但这并不像看起来那么有问题。

AI.tldr: 探讨可解释AI在模型复杂化趋势下的可行性与挑战，分析其是否能与模型复杂性抗衡。
AI.motivation: 随着模型规模和复杂性增长，传统解释方法可能失效，需重新审视可解释AI的局限性与实际价值。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与案例讨论，结合功能主义视角，探讨模型复杂性与解释性之间的矛盾关系。
AI.result: 可解释性可能无法战胜模型复杂性，但这一问题并非不可接受，需调整对解释性的期望与应用方式。
AI.conclusion: 模型复杂性与解释性并非零和博弈，应接受部分场景下解释的局限性，并探索适应复杂模型的新型解释框架。

authors_text: Fabien Furfaro,Avner Bar-Hen,Geoffroy Berthelot
title: An Artificial Neural Network Functionalized by Evolution
title_zh: 进化功能化的人工神经网络
abstract: The topology of artificial neural networks has a significant effect on their performance. Characterizing efficient topology is a field of promising research in Artificial Intelligence. However, it is not a trivial task and it is mainly experimented on through convolutional neural networks. We propose a hybrid model which combines the tensor calculus of feed-forward neural networks with Pseudo-Darwinian mechanisms. This allows for finding topologies that are well adapted for elaboration of strategies, control problems or pattern recognition tasks. In particular, the model can provide adapted topologies at early evolutionary stages, and 'structural convergence', which can found applications in robotics, big-data and artificial life.
summary: The topology of artificial neural networks has a significant effect on their performance. Characterizing efficient topology is a field of promising research in Artificial Intelligence. However, it is not a trivial task and it is mainly experimented on through convolutional neural networks. We propose a hybrid model which combines the tensor calculus of feed-forward neural networks with Pseudo-Darwinian mechanisms. This allows for finding topologies that are well adapted for elaboration of strategies, control problems or pattern recognition tasks. In particular, the model can provide adapted topologies at early evolutionary stages, and 'structural convergence', which can found applications in robotics, big-data and artificial life.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络的拓扑对其性能有显着影响。表征有效拓扑是人工智能中一个有前途的研究领域。然而，这并不是一个简单的任务，它主要是通过卷积神经网络进行实验的。我们提出了一种混合模型，它将前馈神经网络的张量微积分与伪达尔文机制相结合。这允许找到非常适合策略、控制问题或模式识别任务的阐述的拓扑。特别是，该模型可以在早期进化阶段提供适应的拓扑结构，以及“结构收敛”，可以在机器人、大数据和人工生命中找到应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合前馈神经网络张量计算与伪达尔文机制的混合模型，用于优化人工神经网络拓扑结构以提升策略制定、控制问题及模式识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络在高效拓扑结构设计上存在局限，难以满足复杂任务需求，需探索新方法实现结构自适应优化。
AI.method: 融合前馈神经网络的张量计算框架与伪达尔文进化机制，通过进化算法动态生成并优化网络拓扑结构，实现早期适应性拓扑生成与结构收敛。
AI.result: 模型可在进化早期阶段生成适应性拓扑结构，实现结构收敛，潜在应用于机器人控制、大数据分析及人工生命领域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为人工神经网络拓扑优化提供了新范式，通过进化机制提升结构适应性，拓展了AI在复杂任务中的应用可能性。

authors_text: Xiyuan Chen,Xingyu Li,Yi Zhou,Tianming Yang
title: DDDM: a Brain-Inspired Framework for Robust Classification
title_zh: DDDM：一个受大脑启发的稳健分类框架
abstract: Despite their outstanding performance in a broad spectrum of real-world tasks, deep artificial neural networks are sensitive to input noises, particularly adversarial perturbations. On the contrary, human and animal brains are much less vulnerable. In contrast to the one-shot inference performed by most deep neural networks, the brain often solves decision-making with an evidence accumulation mechanism that may trade time for accuracy when facing noisy inputs. The mechanism is well described by the Drift-Diffusion Model (DDM). In the DDM, decision-making is modeled as a process in which noisy evidence is accumulated toward a threshold. Drawing inspiration from the DDM, we propose the Dropout-based Drift-Diffusion Model (DDDM) that combines test-phase dropout and the DDM for improving the robustness for arbitrary neural networks. The dropouts create temporally uncorrelated noises in the network that counter perturbations, while the evidence accumulation mechanism guarantees a reasonable decision accuracy. Neural networks enhanced with the DDDM tested in image, speech, and text classification tasks all significantly outperform their native counterparts, demonstrating the DDDM as a task-agnostic defense against adversarial attacks.
summary: Despite their outstanding performance in a broad spectrum of real-world tasks, deep artificial neural networks are sensitive to input noises, particularly adversarial perturbations. On the contrary, human and animal brains are much less vulnerable. In contrast to the one-shot inference performed by most deep neural networks, the brain often solves decision-making with an evidence accumulation mechanism that may trade time for accuracy when facing noisy inputs. The mechanism is well described by the Drift-Diffusion Model (DDM). In the DDM, decision-making is modeled as a process in which noisy evidence is accumulated toward a threshold. Drawing inspiration from the DDM, we propose the Dropout-based Drift-Diffusion Model (DDDM) that combines test-phase dropout and the DDM for improving the robustness for arbitrary neural networks. The dropouts create temporally uncorrelated noises in the network that counter perturbations, while the evidence accumulation mechanism guarantees a reasonable decision accuracy. Neural networks enhanced with the DDDM tested in image, speech, and text classification tasks all significantly outperform their native counterparts, demonstrating the DDDM as a task-agnostic defense against adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度人工神经网络在广泛的现实世界任务中表现出色，但它对输入噪声，特别是对抗性扰动很敏感。相反，人类和动物的大脑则不那么脆弱。与大多数深度神经网络执行的一次性推理相反，大脑通常通过证据积累机制来解决决策，在面对噪声输入时，该机制可能会以时间换取准确性。漂移扩散模型 (DDM) 很好地描述了该机制。在 DDM 中，决策被建模为一个过程，其中噪声证据积累到阈值。从 DDM 中汲取灵感，我们提出了基于 Dropout 的漂移扩散模型 (DDDM)，它将测试阶段 dropout 和 DDM 结合起来，以提高任意神经网络的鲁棒性。丢失会在网络中产生时间上不相关的噪声来对抗扰动，而证据积累机制则保证了合理的决策准确性。使用 DDDM 增强的神经网络在图像、语音和文本分类任务中进行测试，其性能均显着优于其本地对应网络，这表明 DDDM 是一种与任务无关的防御对抗性攻击的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDDM框架，通过结合Dropout和漂移扩散模型（DDM）机制，提升神经网络在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络对对抗性扰动敏感，而人脑通过证据积累机制在噪声环境下保持决策准确性，启发了本文的防御方法设计。
AI.method: 提出基于Dropout的漂移扩散模型（DDDM），利用测试阶段Dropout生成时序无关噪声对抗扰动，并通过DDM的证据积累机制保障决策准确率。
AI.result: 在图像、语音和文本分类任务中，DDDM增强的网络显著优于原模型，验证了其作为通用对抗防御方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DDDM通过模拟大脑决策机制有效提升了神经网络的鲁棒性，证明了任务无关的生物启发防御方法的可行性。
